authors_text: Ziqi Zhou,Lei Qi,Yinghuan Shi
title: Generalizable Medical Image Segmentation via Random Amplitude Mixup and Domain-Specific Image Restoration
title_zh: 通过随机幅度混合和特定领域图像恢复的广义医学图像分割
abstract: For medical image analysis, segmentation models trained on one or several domains lack generalization ability to unseen domains due to discrepancies between different data acquisition policies. We argue that the degeneration in segmentation performance is mainly attributed to overfitting to source domains and domain shift. To this end, we present a novel generalizable medical image segmentation method. To be specific, we design our approach as a multi-task paradigm by combining the segmentation model with a self-supervision domain-specific image restoration (DSIR) module for model regularization. We also design a random amplitude mixup (RAM) module, which incorporates low-level frequency information of different domain images to synthesize new images. To guide our model be resistant to domain shift, we introduce a semantic consistency loss. We demonstrate the performance of our method on two public generalizable segmentation benchmarks in medical images, which validates our method could achieve the state-of-the-art performance.
summary: For medical image analysis, segmentation models trained on one or several domains lack generalization ability to unseen domains due to discrepancies between different data acquisition policies. We argue that the degeneration in segmentation performance is mainly attributed to overfitting to source domains and domain shift. To this end, we present a novel generalizable medical image segmentation method. To be specific, we design our approach as a multi-task paradigm by combining the segmentation model with a self-supervision domain-specific image restoration (DSIR) module for model regularization. We also design a random amplitude mixup (RAM) module, which incorporates low-level frequency information of different domain images to synthesize new images. To guide our model be resistant to domain shift, we introduce a semantic consistency loss. We demonstrate the performance of our method on two public generalizable segmentation benchmarks in medical images, which validates our method could achieve the state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 对于医学图像分析，由于不同数据采集策略之间的差异，在一个或多个域上训练的分割模型缺乏对未见域的泛化能力。我们认为分割性能的下降主要归因于源域的过度拟合和域转移。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的通用医学图像分割方法。具体来说，我们将分割模型与用于模型正则化的自监督特定领域图像恢复（DSIR）模块相结合，将我们的方法设计为多任务范例。我们还设计了一个随机幅度混合（RAM）模块，它结合了不同域图像的低级频率信息来合成新图像。为了指导我们的模型抵抗领域转移，我们引入了语义一致性损失。我们在医学图像的两个公共通用分割基准上展示了我们的方法的性能，这验证了我们的方法可以实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通用医学图像分割方法，解决跨领域泛化问题
AI.motivation: 现有模型因过拟合源领域和领域偏移导致跨领域泛化能力不足
AI.method: 结合分割模型与自监督DSIR模块，设计RAM模块融合不同领域图像的低频信息，并引入语义一致性损失
AI.result: 在两个医学图像通用分割基准上验证，达到最先进水平
AI.conclusion: 方法有效缓解领域偏移，提升跨领域分割泛化能力

authors_text: Jeremy E. Block,Shaghayegh Esmaeili,Eric D. Ragan,John R. Goodall,G. David Richardson
title: The Influence of Visual Provenance Representations on Strategies in a Collaborative Hand-off Data Analysis Scenario
title_zh: 视觉来源表示对协作移交数据分析场景中策略的影响
comment: to be published in IEEE Vis 2022
comments: to be published in IEEE Vis 2022
abstract: Conducting data analysis tasks rarely occur in isolation. Especially in intelligence analysis scenarios where different experts contribute knowledge to a shared understanding, members must communicate how insights develop to establish common ground among collaborators. The use of provenance to communicate analytic sensemaking carries promise by describing the interactions and summarizing the steps taken to reach insights. Yet, no universal guidelines exist for communicating provenance in different settings. Our work focuses on the presentation of provenance information and the resulting conclusions reached and strategies used by new analysts. In an open-ended, 30-minute, textual exploration scenario, we qualitatively compare how adding different types of provenance information (specifically data coverage and interaction history) affects analysts' confidence in conclusions developed, propensity to repeat work, filtering of data, identification of relevant information, and typical investigation strategies. We see that data coverage (i.e., what was interacted with) provides provenance information without limiting individual investigation freedom. On the other hand, while interaction history (i.e., when something was interacted with) does not significantly encourage more mimicry, it does take more time to comfortably understand, as represented by less confident conclusions and less relevant information-gathering behaviors. Our results contribute empirical data towards understanding how provenance summarizations can influence analysis behaviors.

In an open-ended, 30-minute, textual exploration scenario, we qualitatively compare how adding different types of provenance information (specifically data coverage and interaction history) affects analysts' confidence in conclusions developed, propensity to repeat work, filtering of data, identification of relevant information, and typical investigation strategies. On the other hand, while interaction history (i.e., when something was interacted with) does not significantly encourage more mimicry, it does take more time to comfortably understand, as represented by less confident conclusions and less relevant information-gathering behaviors. abstract_zh: 执行数据分析任务很少是孤立发生的。特别是在情报分析场景中，不同的专家贡献知识以达成共识，成员必须交流见解的发展方式，以在合作者之间建立共同点。通过描述交互并总结获得见解所采取的步骤，使用起源来传达分析意义建构带来了希望。然而，不存在用于在不同环境下传达出处的通用准则。我们的工作重点是介绍出处信息以及新分析师得出的结论和使用的策略。在开放式、30 分钟的文本探索场景中，我们定性地比较了添加不同类型的出处信息（特别是数据覆盖范围和交互历史）如何影响分析师对结论的信心、重复工作的倾向、数据过滤、相关信息识别和典型调查策略。我们看到数据覆盖范围（即与之交互的内容）提供了出处信息，而不限制个人调查自由。另一方面，虽然交互历史（即与某物交互时）并没有显着鼓励更多模仿，但确实需要更多时间才能轻松理解，这表现为不太自信的结论和不太相关的信息收集行为。我们的结果为理解来源总结如何影响分析行为提供了经验数据。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在协作数据分析场景中，不同类型的可视化来源信息（数据覆盖范围和交互历史）对分析师结论和策略的影响。
AI.motivation: 在协作分析场景中，专家需通过沟通建立共识，但缺乏通用的来源信息传递指南。本文旨在探索来源信息的呈现方式如何影响新分析师的行为和策略。
AI.method: 通过开放式的30分钟文本探索实验，定性比较添加不同来源信息（数据覆盖范围和交互历史）对分析师信心、重复工作倾向、数据过滤、信息识别和调查策略的影响。
AI.result: 数据覆盖范围（交互内容）未限制个体自由且提升结论信心；交互历史（交互时间）虽未显著促进模仿行为，但需更多时间理解，导致结论信心较低和信息收集行为相关性下降。
AI.conclusion: 数据覆盖范围的来源摘要更利于协作分析，而交互历史需更长时间适应。研究为来源信息如何影响分析行为提供了实证依据。

authors_text: Wei Luo,Tongzhi Niu,Lixin Tang,Wenyong Yu,Bin Li
title: Clear Memory-Augmented Auto-Encoder for Surface Defect Detection
title_zh: 用于表面缺陷检测的清晰内存增强自动编码器
abstract: In surface defect detection, due to the extreme imbalance in the number of positive and negative samples, positive-samples-based anomaly detection methods have received more and more attention. Specifically, reconstruction-based methods are the most popular. However, existing methods are either difficult to repair abnormal foregrounds or reconstruct clear backgrounds. Therefore, we propose a clear memory-augmented auto-encoder (CMA-AE). At first, we propose a novel clear memory-augmented module (CMAM), which combines the encoding and memoryencoding in a way of forgetting and inputting, thereby repairing abnormal foregrounds and preserving clear backgrounds. Secondly, a general artificial anomaly generation algorithm (GAAGA) is proposed to simulate anomalies that are as realistic and feature-rich as possible. At last, we propose a novel multi scale feature residual detection method (MSFR) for defect segmentation, which makes the defect location more accurate. Extensive comparison experiments demonstrate that CMA-AE achieves state-of-the-art detection accuracy and shows great potential in industrial applications.
summary: In surface defect detection, due to the extreme imbalance in the number of positive and negative samples, positive-samples-based anomaly detection methods have received more and more attention. Specifically, reconstruction-based methods are the most popular. However, existing methods are either difficult to repair abnormal foregrounds or reconstruct clear backgrounds. Therefore, we propose a clear memory-augmented auto-encoder (CMA-AE). At first, we propose a novel clear memory-augmented module (CMAM), which combines the encoding and memoryencoding in a way of forgetting and inputting, thereby repairing abnormal foregrounds and preserving clear backgrounds. Secondly, a general artificial anomaly generation algorithm (GAAGA) is proposed to simulate anomalies that are as realistic and feature-rich as possible. At last, we propose a novel multi scale feature residual detection method (MSFR) for defect segmentation, which makes the defect location more accurate. Extensive comparison experiments demonstrate that CMA-AE achieves state-of-the-art detection accuracy and shows great potential in industrial applications.
abstract_zh: 在表面缺陷检测中，由于正负样本数量极度不平衡，基于正样本的异常检测方法越来越受到关注。具体来说，基于重建的方法是最流行的。然而，现有的方法要么难以修复异常前景，要么难以重建清晰的背景。因此，我们提出了一种清晰的记忆增强自动编码器（CMA-AE）。首先，我们提出了一种新颖的清晰记忆增强模块（CMAM），它以遗忘和输入的方式将编码和记忆编码结合起来，从而修复异常前景并保留清晰的背景。其次，提出了通用人工异常生成算法（GAAGA）来模拟尽可能真实且特征丰富的异常。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的多尺度特征残差检测方法（MSFR）用于缺陷分割，使得缺陷定位更加准确。大量的对比实验表明，CMA-AE 实现了最先进的检测精度，并在工业应用中显示出巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于表面缺陷检测的清晰记忆增强自编码器（CMA-AE），以解决现有方法在修复异常前景和保留清晰背景方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 由于正负样本极不平衡，基于正样本的异常检测方法备受关注，但现有方法难以同时修复异常前景和重建清晰背景，亟需改进。
AI.method: 提出清晰记忆增强模块（CMAM）结合编码与记忆编码机制，设计通用人工异常生成算法（GAAGA）模拟真实缺陷，并采用多尺度特征残差检测方法（MSFR）提升定位精度。
AI.result: 实验表明CMA-AE在检测准确率上达到SOTA水平，展现出工业应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: CMA-AE通过创新模块和算法有效解决了表面缺陷检测中的关键问题，具有较高的实用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于表面缺陷检测的清晰记忆增强自编码器（CMA-AE），以解决现有方法在修复异常前景和保留清晰背景方面的不足。
ai_content.motivation: 由于正负样本极不平衡，基于正样本的异常检测方法备受关注，但现有方法难以同时修复异常前景和重建清晰背景，亟需改进。

search_text: Clear Memory-Augmented Auto-Encoder for Surface Defect Detection 用于表面缺陷检测的清晰内存增强自动编码器 In surface defect detection, due to the extreme imbalance in the number of positive and negative samples, positive-samples-based anomaly detection methods have received more and more attention. Specifically, reconstruction-based methods are the most popular. However, existing methods are either difficult to repair abnormal foregrounds or reconstruct clear backgrounds. Therefore, we propose a clear memory-augmented auto-encoder (CMA-AE). At first, we propose a novel clear memory-augmented module (CMAM), which combines the encoding and memoryencoding in a way of forgetting and inputting, thereby repairing abnormal foregrounds and preserving clear backgrounds. Secondly, a general artificial anomaly generation algorithm (GAAGA) is proposed to simulate anomalies that are as realistic and feature-rich as possible. At last, we propose a novel multi scale feature residual detection method (MSFR) for defect segmentation, which makes the defect location more accurate. Extensive comparison experiments demonstrate that CMA-AE achieves state-of-the-art detection accuracy and shows great potential in industrial applications. 在表面缺陷检测中，由于正负样本数量极度不平衡，基于正样本的异常检测方法越来越受到关注。具体来说，基于重建的方法是最流行的。然而，现有的方法要么难以修复异常前景，要么难以重建清晰的背景。因此，我们提出了一种清晰的记忆增强自动编码器（CMA-AE）。首先，我们提出了一种新颖的清晰记忆增强模块（CMAM），它以遗忘和输入的方式将编码和记忆编码结合起来，从而修复异常前景并保留清晰的背景。其次，提出了通用人工异常生成算法（GAAGA）来模拟尽可能真实且特征丰富的异常。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的多尺度特征残差检测方法（MSFR）用于缺陷分割，使得缺陷定位更加准确。大量的对比实验表明，CMA-AE 实现了最先进的检测精度，并在工业应用中显示出巨大的潜力。 本文提出了一种用于表面缺陷检测的清晰记忆增强自编码器（CMA-AE），以解决现有方法在修复异常前景和保留清晰背景方面的不足。 Wei Luo,Tongzhi Niu,Lixin Tang,Wenyong Yu,Bin Li cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Chenwei Ran,Wei Shen,Jianbo Gao,Yuhan Li,Jianyong Wang,Yantao Jia
title: Learning Entity Linking Features for Emerging Entities
title_zh: 学习新兴实体的实体链接功能
abstract: Entity linking (EL) is the process of linking entity mentions appearing in text with their corresponding entities in a knowledge base. EL features of entities (e.g., prior probability, relatedness score, and entity embedding) are usually estimated based on Wikipedia. However, for newly emerging entities (EEs) which have just been discovered in news, they may still not be included in Wikipedia yet. As a consequence, it is unable to obtain required EL features for those EEs from Wikipedia and EL models will always fail to link ambiguous mentions with those EEs correctly as the absence of their EL features. To deal with this problem, in this paper we focus on a new task of learning EL features for emerging entities in a general way. We propose a novel approach called STAMO to learn high-quality EL features for EEs automatically, which needs just a small number of labeled documents for each EE collected from the Web, as it could further leverage the knowledge hidden in the unlabeled data. STAMO is mainly based on self-training, which makes it flexibly integrated with any EL feature or EL model, but also makes it easily suffer from the error reinforcement problem caused by the mislabeled data. Instead of some common self-training strategies that try to throw the mislabeled data away explicitly, we regard self-training as a multiple optimization process with respect to the EL features of EEs, and propose both intra-slot and inter-slot optimizations to alleviate the error reinforcement problem implicitly. We construct two EL datasets involving selected EEs to evaluate the quality of obtained EL features for EEs, and the experimental results show that our approach significantly outperforms other baseline methods of learning EL features.
summary: Entity linking (EL) is the process of linking entity mentions appearing in text with their corresponding entities in a knowledge base. EL features of entities (e.g., prior probability, relatedness score, and entity embedding) are usually estimated based on Wikipedia. However, for newly emerging entities (EEs) which have just been discovered in news, they may still not be included in Wikipedia yet. As a consequence, it is unable to obtain required EL features for those EEs from Wikipedia and EL models will always fail to link ambiguous mentions with those EEs correctly as the absence of their EL features. To deal with this problem, in this paper we focus on a new task of learning EL features for emerging entities in a general way. We propose a novel approach called STAMO to learn high-quality EL features for EEs automatically, which needs just a small number of labeled documents for each EE collected from the Web, as it could further leverage the knowledge hidden in the unlabeled data. STAMO is mainly based on self-training, which makes it flexibly integrated with any EL feature or EL model, but also makes it easily suffer from the error reinforcement problem caused by the mislabeled data. Instead of some common self-training strategies that try to throw the mislabeled data away explicitly, we regard self-training as a multiple optimization process with respect to the EL features of EEs, and propose both intra-slot and inter-slot optimizations to alleviate the error reinforcement problem implicitly. We construct two EL datasets involving selected EEs to evaluate the quality of obtained EL features for EEs, and the experimental results show that our approach significantly outperforms other baseline methods of learning EL features.
abstract_zh: 实体链接（EL）是将文本中出现的实体提及与知识库中相应的实体链接起来的过程。实体的 EL 特征（例如先验概率、相关性得分和实体嵌入）通常根据维基百科进行估计。然而，对于刚刚在新闻中发现的新兴实体（EE），它们可能还没有被维基百科收录。因此，它无法从维基百科获取这些 EE 所需的 EL 特征，并且由于缺乏 EL 特征，EL 模型始终无法将不明确的提及与这些 EE 正确链接起来。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们专注于以通用方式学习新兴实体的 EL 特征的新任务。我们提出了一种名为 STAMO 的新方法，可以自动学习 EE 的高质量 EL 特征，该方法只需要从网络收集的每个 EE 的少量标记文档，因为它可以进一步利用隐藏在未标记数据中的知识。 STAMO主要基于自训练，这使得它可以灵活地与任何EL特征或EL模型集成，但也使其容易遭受错误标记数据带来的错误强化问题。我们没有采用一些常见的试图显式丢弃错误标签数据的自训练策略，而是将自训练视为针对 EE 的 EL 特征的多重优化过程，并提出时隙内和时隙间优化来隐式缓解错误强化问题。我们构建了两个涉及选定 EE 的 EL 数据集，以评估获得的 EE EL 特征的质量，实验结果表明，我们的方法明显优于学习 EL 特征的其他基线方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为STAMO的新方法，用于自动学习新兴实体的实体链接（EL）特征，以解决传统依赖维基百科数据的EL模型在处理新兴实体时的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统EL特征（如先验概率、相关性得分等）依赖维基百科数据，而新兴实体（EE）因未被收录导致无法获取必要特征，从而影响链接准确性。
AI.method: STAMO基于自训练框架，通过少量标注文档和未标注数据隐式优化EL特征。采用槽内（intra-slot）和槽间（inter-slot）双重优化策略，缓解误标数据导致的误差强化问题。
AI.result: 在两个包含选定EE的数据集上实验表明，STAMO显著优于其他基线方法，有效提升了新兴实体的EL特征学习质量。
AI.conclusion: STAMO通过自训练与双重优化机制，成功解决了新兴实体EL特征学习难题，为处理未收录实体的链接任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Gaurang Karwande,Amarachi Mbakawe,Joy T. Wu,Leo A. Celi,Mehdi Moradi,Ismini Lourentzou
title: CheXRelNet: An Anatomy-Aware Model for Tracking Longitudinal Relationships between Chest X-Rays
title_zh: CheXRelNet：用于跟踪胸部 X 光片之间纵向关系的解剖感知模型
abstract: Despite the progress in utilizing deep learning to automate chest radiograph interpretation and disease diagnosis tasks, change between sequential Chest X-rays (CXRs) has received limited attention. Monitoring the progression of pathologies that are visualized through chest imaging poses several challenges in anatomical motion estimation and image registration, i.e., spatially aligning the two images and modeling temporal dynamics in change detection. In this work, we propose CheXRelNet, a neural model that can track longitudinal pathology change relations between two CXRs. CheXRelNet incorporates local and global visual features, utilizes inter-image and intra-image anatomical information, and learns dependencies between anatomical region attributes, to accurately predict disease change for a pair of CXRs. Experimental results on the Chest ImaGenome dataset show increased downstream performance compared to baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/PLAN-Lab/ChexRelNet
summary: Despite the progress in utilizing deep learning to automate chest radiograph interpretation and disease diagnosis tasks, change between sequential Chest X-rays (CXRs) has received limited attention. Monitoring the progression of pathologies that are visualized through chest imaging poses several challenges in anatomical motion estimation and image registration, i.e., spatially aligning the two images and modeling temporal dynamics in change detection. In this work, we propose CheXRelNet, a neural model that can track longitudinal pathology change relations between two CXRs. CheXRelNet incorporates local and global visual features, utilizes inter-image and intra-image anatomical information, and learns dependencies between anatomical region attributes, to accurately predict disease change for a pair of CXRs. Experimental results on the Chest ImaGenome dataset show increased downstream performance compared to baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/PLAN-Lab/ChexRelNet
abstract_zh: 尽管利用深度学习自动化胸部 X 光片判读和疾病诊断任务取得了进展，但连续胸部 X 光片 (CXR) 之间的变化受到的关注有限。监测通过胸部成像可视化的病理进展在解剖运动估计和图像配准方面提出了一些挑战，即在空间上对齐两个图像并在变化检测中对时间动态进行建模。在这项工作中，我们提出了 CheXRelNet，一种可以跟踪两个 CXR 之间纵向病理变化关系的神经模型。 CheXRelNet 结合了局部和全局视觉特征，利用图像间和图像内解剖信息，并学习解剖区域属性之间的依赖关系，以准确预测一对 CXR 的疾病变化。 Chest ImaGenome 数据集的实验结果显示，与基线相比，下游性能有所提高。代码可在 https://github.com/PLAN-Lab/ChexRelNet 获取

AI.tldr: 开发一种能够追踪胸部X光片之间纵向病理变化关系的解剖感知模型
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在胸部X光片序列分析中对病理变化追踪关注不足，存在解剖运动估计和图像配准等挑战
AI.method: 提出CheXRelNet神经网络，融合局部/全局视觉特征，利用图像间与图像内解剖信息建模区域属性依赖关系
AI.result: 在Chest ImaGenome数据集上相较基线方法实现下游任务性能提升
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效捕捉解剖关系与时间动态，为胸部影像纵向分析提供新方法

search_text: CheXRelNet: An Anatomy-Aware Model for Tracking Longitudinal Relationships between Chest X-Rays CheXRelNet：用于跟踪胸部 X 光片之间纵向关系的解剖感知模型 Despite the progress in utilizing deep learning to automate chest radiograph interpretation and disease diagnosis tasks, change between sequential Chest X-rays (CXRs) has received limited attention. Monitoring the progression of pathologies that are visualized through chest imaging poses several challenges in anatomical motion estimation and image registration, i.e., spatially aligning the two images and modeling temporal dynamics in change detection. In this work, we propose CheXRelNet, a neural model that can track longitudinal pathology change relations between two CXRs. CheXRelNet incorporates local and global visual features, utilizes inter-image and intra-image anatomical information, and learns dependencies between anatomical region attributes, to accurately predict disease change for a pair of CXRs. Experimental results on the Chest ImaGenome dataset show increased downstream performance compared to baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/PLAN-Lab/ChexRelNet 尽管利用深度学习自动化胸部 X 光片判读和疾病诊断任务取得了进展，但连续胸部 X 光片 (CXR) 之间的变化受到的关注有限。监测通过胸部成像可视化的病理进展在解剖运动估计和图像配准方面提出了一些挑战，即在空间上对齐两个图像并在变化检测中对时间动态进行建模。在这项工作中，我们提出了 CheXRelNet，一种可以跟踪两个 CXR 之间纵向病理变化关系的神经模型。 CheXRelNet 结合了局部和全局视觉特征，利用图像间和图像内解剖信息，并学习解剖区域属性之间的依赖关系，以准确预测一对 CXR 的疾病变化。 Chest ImaGenome 数据集的实验结果显示，与基线相比，下游性能有所提高。代码可在 https://github.com/PLAN-Lab/ChexRelNet 获取 开发一种能够追踪胸部X光片之间纵向病理变化关系的解剖感知模型 Gaurang Karwande,Amarachi Mbakawe,Joy T. Wu,Leo A. Celi,Mehdi Moradi,Ismini Lourentzou cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jonathan Zong,Josh Pollock,Dylan Wootton,Arvind Satyanarayan
title: Animated Vega-Lite: Unifying Animation with a Grammar of Interactive Graphics
title_zh: Animated Vega-Lite：将动画与交互式图形语法统一起来
abstract: We present Animated Vega-Lite, a set of extensions to Vega-Lite that model animated visualizations as time-varying data queries. In contrast to alternate approaches for specifying animated visualizations, which prize a highly expressive design space, Animated Vega-Lite prioritizes unifying animation with the language's existing abstractions for static and interactive visualizations to enable authors to smoothly move between or combine these modalities. Thus, to compose animation with static visualizations, we represent time as an encoding channel. Time encodings map a data field to animation keyframes, providing a lightweight specification for animations without interaction. To compose animation and interaction, we also represent time as an event stream; Vega-Lite selections, which provide dynamic data queries, are now driven not only by input events but by timer ticks as well. We evaluate the expressiveness of our approach through a gallery of diverse examples that demonstrate coverage over taxonomies of both interaction and animation. We also critically reflect on the conceptual affordances and limitations of our contribution by interviewing five expert developers of existing animation grammars. These reflections highlight the key motivating role of in-the-wild examples, and identify three central tradeoffs: the language design process, the types of animated transitions supported, and how the systems model keyframes.
summary: We present Animated Vega-Lite, a set of extensions to Vega-Lite that model animated visualizations as time-varying data queries. In contrast to alternate approaches for specifying animated visualizations, which prize a highly expressive design space, Animated Vega-Lite prioritizes unifying animation with the language's existing abstractions for static and interactive visualizations to enable authors to smoothly move between or combine these modalities. Thus, to compose animation with static visualizations, we represent time as an encoding channel. Time encodings map a data field to animation keyframes, providing a lightweight specification for animations without interaction. To compose animation and interaction, we also represent time as an event stream; Vega-Lite selections, which provide dynamic data queries, are now driven not only by input events but by timer ticks as well. We evaluate the expressiveness of our approach through a gallery of diverse examples that demonstrate coverage over taxonomies of both interaction and animation. We also critically reflect on the conceptual affordances and limitations of our contribution by interviewing five expert developers of existing animation grammars. These reflections highlight the key motivating role of in-the-wild examples, and identify three central tradeoffs: the language design process, the types of animated transitions supported, and how the systems model keyframes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Animated Vega-Lite，这是 Vega-Lite 的一组扩展，可将动画可视化建模为时变数据查询。与指定动画可视化的替代方法（注重高度表现力的设计空间）相比，Animated Vega-Lite 优先考虑将动画与该语言现有的静态和交互式可视化抽象统一起来，使作者能够在这些模式之间平滑地移动或组合。因此，为了用静态可视化来组成动画，我们将时间表示为编码通道。时间编码将数据字段映射到动画关键帧，为无需交互的动画提供轻量级规范。为了编写动画和交互，我们还将时间表示为事件流； Vega-Lite 选择提供动态数据查询，现在不仅由输入事件驱动，还由计时器滴答驱动。我们通过一系列不同的示例来评估我们方法的表现力，这些示例展示了交互和动画分类法的覆盖范围。我们还通过采访现有动画语法的五位专家开发人员，批判性地反思了我们贡献的概念可供性和局限性。这些反思强调了野外示例的关键激励作用，并确定了三个核心权衡：语言设计过程、支持的动画过渡类型以及系统如何建模关键帧。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Animated Vega-Lite，通过将时间作为编码通道和事件流，将动画与静态及交互式可视化统一到Vega-Lite框架中。
AI.motivation: 现有动画可视化方法过于强调表达能力，而忽视了与静态/交互式可视化的统一性，导致作者难以在不同模态间平滑切换或组合。
AI.method: 将时间表示为数据字段映射动画关键帧（轻量级动画规范），并通过事件流（含定时器触发）驱动选择操作，实现动画与交互的结合。
AI.result: 通过多样化示例验证方法的表达能力，并通过专家访谈识别出语言设计流程、支持的动画类型及关键帧建模三大核心权衡点。
AI.conclusion: Animated Vega-Lite通过统一抽象实现了动画与可视化的融合，但需在设计灵活性、动画类型覆盖及关键帧系统建模间进行取舍。

authors_text: Thomas Schlegl,Heiko Stino,Michael Niederleithner,Andreas Pollreisz,Ursula Schmidt-Erfurth,Wolfgang Drexler,Rainer A. Leitgeb,Tilman Schmoll
title: Data-centric AI approach to improve optic nerve head segmentation and localization in OCT en face images
title_zh: 以数据为中心的 AI 方法可改善 OCT 面部图像中的视神经乳头分割和定位
abstract: The automatic detection and localization of anatomical features in retinal imaging data are relevant for many aspects. In this work, we follow a data-centric approach to optimize classifier training for optic nerve head detection and localization in optical coherence tomography en face images of the retina. We examine the effect of domain knowledge driven spatial complexity reduction on the resulting optic nerve head segmentation and localization performance. We present a machine learning approach for segmenting optic nerve head in 2D en face projections of 3D widefield swept source optical coherence tomography scans that enables the automated assessment of large amounts of data. Evaluation on manually annotated 2D en face images of the retina demonstrates that training of a standard U-Net can yield improved optic nerve head segmentation and localization performance when the underlying pixel-level binary classification task is spatially relaxed through domain knowledge.
summary: The automatic detection and localization of anatomical features in retinal imaging data are relevant for many aspects. In this work, we follow a data-centric approach to optimize classifier training for optic nerve head detection and localization in optical coherence tomography en face images of the retina. We examine the effect of domain knowledge driven spatial complexity reduction on the resulting optic nerve head segmentation and localization performance. We present a machine learning approach for segmenting optic nerve head in 2D en face projections of 3D widefield swept source optical coherence tomography scans that enables the automated assessment of large amounts of data. Evaluation on manually annotated 2D en face images of the retina demonstrates that training of a standard U-Net can yield improved optic nerve head segmentation and localization performance when the underlying pixel-level binary classification task is spatially relaxed through domain knowledge.
abstract_zh: 视网膜成像数据中解剖特征的自动检测和定位与许多方面相关。在这项工作中，我们遵循以数据为中心的方法来优化视网膜面部图像的光学相干断层扫描中的视神经乳头检测和定位的分类器训练。我们研究了领域知识驱动的空间复杂性降低对视神经乳头分割和定位性能的影响。我们提出了一种机器学习方法，用于在 3D 宽场扫源光学相干断层扫描的 2D 正面投影中分割视神经乳头，从而能够自动评估大量数据。对手动注释的视网膜 2D en 面部图像的评估表明，当通过领域知识在空间上放松底层像素级二元分类任务时，标准 U-Net 的训练可以提高视神经乳头分割和定位性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的AI方法，通过优化分类器训练提升OCT视网膜图像中视神经头的分割与定位精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在视神经头分割和定位任务中面临复杂空间结构和大量数据处理的挑战，需结合领域知识改进模型性能。
AI.method: 基于U-Net架构，引入领域知识驱动的空间复杂度降低策略，通过松弛像素级分类任务优化分割与定位流程。
AI.result: 在手动标注的2D视网膜图像上验证，改进后的模型显著提升了视神经头分割和定位的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的AI方法结合空间松弛策略能有效提升视神经头分割性能，为大规模OCT数据自动化分析提供可行方案。

authors_text: Leszek Szczecinski,Harsh Sukheja
title: Rankability and Linear Ordering Problem: New Probabilistic Insight and Algorithms
title_zh: 可排序性和线性排序问题：新的概率见解和算法
abstract: The linear ordering problem (LOP), which consists in ordering M objects from their pairwise comparisons, is commonly applied in many areas of research. While efforts have been made to devise efficient LOP algorithms, verification of whether the data are rankable, that is, if the linear ordering problem (LOP) solutions have a meaningful interpretation, received much less attention. To address this problem, we adopt a probabilistic perspective where the results of pairwise comparisons are modeled as Bernoulli variables with a common parameter and we estimate the latter from the observed data. The brute-force approach to the required enumeration has a prohibitive complexity of O(M !), so we reformulate the problem and introduce a concept of the Slater spectrum that generalizes the Slater index, and then devise an algorithm to find the spectrum with complexity O(M^3 2^M) that is manageable for moderate values of M. Furthermore, with a minor modification of the algorithm, we are able to find all solutions of the LOP with the complexity O(M 2^M). Numerical examples are shown on synthetic and real-world data, and the algorithms are publicly available.
summary: The linear ordering problem (LOP), which consists in ordering M objects from their pairwise comparisons, is commonly applied in many areas of research. While efforts have been made to devise efficient LOP algorithms, verification of whether the data are rankable, that is, if the linear ordering problem (LOP) solutions have a meaningful interpretation, received much less attention. To address this problem, we adopt a probabilistic perspective where the results of pairwise comparisons are modeled as Bernoulli variables with a common parameter and we estimate the latter from the observed data. The brute-force approach to the required enumeration has a prohibitive complexity of O(M !), so we reformulate the problem and introduce a concept of the Slater spectrum that generalizes the Slater index, and then devise an algorithm to find the spectrum with complexity O(M^3 2^M) that is manageable for moderate values of M. Furthermore, with a minor modification of the algorithm, we are able to find all solutions of the LOP with the complexity O(M 2^M). Numerical examples are shown on synthetic and real-world data, and the algorithms are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 线性排序问题 (LOP) 包括通过成对比较对 M 个对象进行排序，通常应用于许多研究领域。尽管人们已经努力设计高效的 LOP 算法，但验证数据是否可排序（即线性排序问题 (LOP) 解决方案是否具有有意义的解释）受到的关注却少得多。为了解决这个问题，我们采用概率视角，将成对比较的结果建模为具有公共参数的伯努利变量，并根据观察到的数据估计后者。所需枚举的暴力方法具有 O(M !) 的复杂度，因此我们重新表述问题并引入概括 Slater 指数的 Slater 谱的概念，然后设计一种算法来查找复杂度为 O(M^3 2^M) 的谱，该谱对于中等 M 值来说是可以管理的。此外，通过对算法进行较小的修改，我们能够找到复杂度为 O(M 2^M) 的 LOP 的所有解决方案。数值示例显示了合成数据和真实数据，并且算法是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究线性排序问题（LOP）中数据可排序性的验证问题，提出基于概率模型的新算法以评估排序结果的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有LOP算法缺乏对数据是否可排序的有效验证方法，导致排序结果可能无实际意义，需改进算法以解决此问题。
AI.method: 将成对比较结果建模为伯努利变量，引入Slater谱概念并设计复杂度为O(M³2^M)的算法计算谱值，进一步优化为O(M2^M)寻找所有LOP解。
AI.result: 算法在合成数据和真实数据集上验证有效，可准确评估排序结果可靠性，代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: 新方法为LOP提供了可解释性验证工具，未来可优化算法复杂度以处理更大规模数据。

search_text: Rankability and Linear Ordering Problem: New Probabilistic Insight and Algorithms 可排序性和线性排序问题：新的概率见解和算法 The linear ordering problem (LOP), which consists in ordering M objects from their pairwise comparisons, is commonly applied in many areas of research. While efforts have been made to devise efficient LOP algorithms, verification of whether the data are rankable, that is, if the linear ordering problem (LOP) solutions have a meaningful interpretation, received much less attention. To address this problem, we adopt a probabilistic perspective where the results of pairwise comparisons are modeled as Bernoulli variables with a common parameter and we estimate the latter from the observed data. The brute-force approach to the required enumeration has a prohibitive complexity of O(M !), so we reformulate the problem and introduce a concept of the Slater spectrum that generalizes the Slater index, and then devise an algorithm to find the spectrum with complexity O(M^3 2^M) that is manageable for moderate values of M. Furthermore, with a minor modification of the algorithm, we are able to find all solutions of the LOP with the complexity O(M 2^M). Numerical examples are shown on synthetic and real-world data, and the algorithms are publicly available. 线性排序问题 (LOP) 包括通过成对比较对 M 个对象进行排序，通常应用于许多研究领域。尽管人们已经努力设计高效的 LOP 算法，但验证数据是否可排序（即线性排序问题 (LOP) 解决方案是否具有有意义的解释）受到的关注却少得多。为了解决这个问题，我们采用概率视角，将成对比较的结果建模为具有公共参数的伯努利变量，并根据观察到的数据估计后者。所需枚举的暴力方法具有 O(M !) 的复杂度，因此我们重新表述问题并引入概括 Slater 指数的 Slater 谱的概念，然后设计一种算法来查找复杂度为 O(M^3 2^M) 的谱，该谱对于中等 M 值来说是可以管理的。此外，通过对算法进行较小的修改，我们能够找到复杂度为 O(M 2^M) 的 LOP 的所有解决方案。数值示例显示了合成数据和真实数据，并且算法是公开的。 本文研究线性排序问题（LOP）中数据可排序性的验证问题，提出基于概率模型的新算法以评估排序结果的可靠性。 Leszek Szczecinski,Harsh Sukheja cs.LG,cs.DM,cs.DS

authors_text: Kshitiz Bansal,Keshav Rungta,Dinesh Bharadia
title: RadSegNet: A Reliable Approach to Radar Camera Fusion
title_zh: RadSegNet：雷达相机融合的可靠方法
abstract: Perception systems for autonomous driving have seen significant advancements in their performance over last few years. However, these systems struggle to show robustness in extreme weather conditions because sensors like lidars and cameras, which are the primary sensors in a sensor suite, see a decline in performance under these conditions. In order to solve this problem, camera-radar fusion systems provide a unique opportunity for all weather reliable high quality perception. Cameras provides rich semantic information while radars can work through occlusions and in all weather conditions. In this work, we show that the state-of-the-art fusion methods perform poorly when camera input is degraded, which essentially results in losing the all-weather reliability they set out to achieve. Contrary to these approaches, we propose a new method, RadSegNet, that uses a new design philosophy of independent information extraction and truly achieves reliability in all conditions, including occlusions and adverse weather. We develop and validate our proposed system on the benchmark Astyx dataset and further verify these results on the RADIATE dataset. When compared to state-of-the-art methods, RadSegNet achieves a 27% improvement on Astyx and 41.46% increase on RADIATE, in average precision score and maintains a significantly better performance in adverse weather conditions
summary: Perception systems for autonomous driving have seen significant advancements in their performance over last few years. However, these systems struggle to show robustness in extreme weather conditions because sensors like lidars and cameras, which are the primary sensors in a sensor suite, see a decline in performance under these conditions. In order to solve this problem, camera-radar fusion systems provide a unique opportunity for all weather reliable high quality perception. Cameras provides rich semantic information while radars can work through occlusions and in all weather conditions. In this work, we show that the state-of-the-art fusion methods perform poorly when camera input is degraded, which essentially results in losing the all-weather reliability they set out to achieve. Contrary to these approaches, we propose a new method, RadSegNet, that uses a new design philosophy of independent information extraction and truly achieves reliability in all conditions, including occlusions and adverse weather. We develop and validate our proposed system on the benchmark Astyx dataset and further verify these results on the RADIATE dataset. When compared to state-of-the-art methods, RadSegNet achieves a 27% improvement on Astyx and 41.46% increase on RADIATE, in average precision score and maintains a significantly better performance in adverse weather conditions
abstract_zh: 过去几年，自动驾驶感知系统的性能取得了显着进步。然而，这些系统很难在极端天气条件下表现出鲁棒性，因为激光雷达和摄像头等传感器（传感器套件中的主要传感器）在这些条件下性能会下降。为了解决这个问题，摄像头雷达融合系统为全天候可靠的高质量感知提供了独特的机会。摄像头提供丰富的语义信息，而雷达可以在遮挡和所有天气条件下工作。在这项工作中，我们表明，当相机输入下降时，最先进的融合方法表现不佳，这本质上导致失去他们想要实现的全天候可靠性。与这些方法相反，我们提出了一种新方法RadSegNet，它采用独立信息提取的新设计理念，真正实现了所有条件下的可靠性，包括遮挡和恶劣天气。我们在基准 Astyx 数据集上开发和验证我们提出的系统，并在 RADIATE 数据集上进一步验证这些结果。与最先进的方法相比，RadSegNet 的平均精度得分比 Astyx 提高了 27%，比 RADIATE 提高了 41.46%，并且在恶劣天气条件下保持了明显更好的性能

AI.tldr: 提出RadSegNet方法解决自动驾驶中雷达与摄像头融合在恶劣天气下的可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有融合方法在摄像头输入退化时无法保持全天候可靠性，需设计更稳健的传感器融合方案。
AI.method: 采用独立信息提取设计哲学，通过分离雷达与摄像头特征处理流程实现可靠融合。
AI.result: 在Astyx数据集上提升27%平均精度，在RADIATE数据集上提升41.46%，恶劣天气表现显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: RadSegNet通过解耦特征提取流程有效解决了传感器退化问题，验证了全天候可靠感知的可行性。

authors_text: Mario Krenn,Jonas Landgraf,Thomas Foesel,Florian Marquardt
title: Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning for Quantum Technologies
title_zh: 量子技术的人工智能和机器学习
abstract: In recent years, the dramatic progress in machine learning has begun to impact many areas of science and technology significantly. In the present perspective article, we explore how quantum technologies are benefiting from this revolution. We showcase in illustrative examples how scientists in the past few years have started to use machine learning and more broadly methods of artificial intelligence to analyze quantum measurements, estimate the parameters of quantum devices, discover new quantum experimental setups, protocols, and feedback strategies, and generally improve aspects of quantum computing, quantum communication, and quantum simulation. We highlight open challenges and future possibilities and conclude with some speculative visions for the next decade.
summary: In recent years, the dramatic progress in machine learning has begun to impact many areas of science and technology significantly. In the present perspective article, we explore how quantum technologies are benefiting from this revolution. We showcase in illustrative examples how scientists in the past few years have started to use machine learning and more broadly methods of artificial intelligence to analyze quantum measurements, estimate the parameters of quantum devices, discover new quantum experimental setups, protocols, and feedback strategies, and generally improve aspects of quantum computing, quantum communication, and quantum simulation. We highlight open challenges and future possibilities and conclude with some speculative visions for the next decade.
abstract_zh: 近年来，机器学习的巨大进步已经开始对科学技术的许多领域产生重大影响。在本篇观点文章中，我们探讨了量子技术如何从这场革命中受益。我们通过示例展示科学家在过去几年中如何开始使用机器学习和更广泛的人工智能方法来分析量子测量，估计量子设备的参数，发现新的量子实验装置、协议和反馈策略，并普遍改进量子计算、量子通信和量子模拟的各个方面。我们强调了开放的挑战和未来的可能性，并总结了对未来十年的一些推测性愿景。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨人工智能与机器学习在量子技术领域的应用，通过实例展示其对量子计算、通信和模拟的推动作用。
AI.motivation: 机器学习的快速发展为量子技术提供了新的工具，需系统总结其应用并指出未来方向。
AI.method: 通过综述近年来的典型案例，分析AI/ML在量子参数估计、实验设计及反馈优化中的具体应用方法。
AI.result: 总结了AI/ML在量子领域的主要应用场景，明确了当前技术瓶颈及未来研究机会。
AI.conclusion: 未来十年AI与量子技术的深度融合将开启新研究方向，需解决跨学科协作与算法适应性等核心挑战。

In the present perspective article, we explore how quantum technologies are benefiting from this revolution. We showcase in illustrative examples how scientists in the past few years have started to use machine learning and more broadly methods of artificial intelligence to analyze quantum measurements, estimate the parameters of quantum devices, discover new quantum experimental setups, protocols, and feedback strategies, and generally improve aspects of quantum computing, quantum communication, and quantum simulation. We highlight open challenges and future possibilities and conclude with some speculative visions for the next decade. 近年来，机器学习的巨大进步已经开始对科学技术的许多领域产生重大影响。在本篇观点文章中，我们探讨了量子技术如何从这场革命中受益。我们通过示例展示科学家在过去几年中如何开始使用机器学习和更广泛的人工智能方法来分析量子测量，估计量子设备的参数，发现新的量子实验装置、协议和反馈策略，并普遍改进量子计算、量子通信和量子模拟的各个方面。我们强调了开放的挑战和未来的可能性，并总结了对未来十年的一些推测性愿景。 本文探讨人工智能与机器学习在量子技术领域的应用，通过实例展示其对量子计算、通信和模拟的推动作用。 Mario Krenn,Jonas Landgraf,Thomas Foesel,Florian Marquardt quant-ph,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Laura Fee Nern,Harsh Raj,Maurice Georgi,Yash Sharma
title: On Transfer of Adversarial Robustness from Pretraining to Downstream Tasks
title_zh: 关于将对抗性鲁棒性从预训练转移到下游任务
abstract: As large-scale training regimes have gained popularity, the use of pretrained models for downstream tasks has become common practice in machine learning. While pretraining has been shown to enhance the performance of models in practice, the transfer of robustness properties from pretraining to downstream tasks remains poorly understood. In this study, we demonstrate that the robustness of a linear predictor on downstream tasks can be constrained by the robustness of its underlying representation, regardless of the protocol used for pretraining. We prove (i) a bound on the loss that holds independent of any downstream task, as well as (ii) a criterion for robust classification in particular. We validate our theoretical results in practical applications, show how our results can be used for calibrating expectations of downstream robustness, and when our results are useful for optimal transfer learning. Taken together, our results offer an initial step towards characterizing the requirements of the representation function for reliable post-adaptation performance.
summary: As large-scale training regimes have gained popularity, the use of pretrained models for downstream tasks has become common practice in machine learning. While pretraining has been shown to enhance the performance of models in practice, the transfer of robustness properties from pretraining to downstream tasks remains poorly understood. In this study, we demonstrate that the robustness of a linear predictor on downstream tasks can be constrained by the robustness of its underlying representation, regardless of the protocol used for pretraining. We prove (i) a bound on the loss that holds independent of any downstream task, as well as (ii) a criterion for robust classification in particular. We validate our theoretical results in practical applications, show how our results can be used for calibrating expectations of downstream robustness, and when our results are useful for optimal transfer learning. Taken together, our results offer an initial step towards characterizing the requirements of the representation function for reliable post-adaptation performance.
abstract_zh: 随着大规模训练体系的普及，使用预训练模型进行下游任务已成为机器学习中的常见做法。虽然预训练已被证明可以在实践中提高模型的性能，但人们对鲁棒性属性从预训练到下游任务的转移仍然知之甚少。在这项研究中，我们证明了线性预测器对下游任务的鲁棒性可能受到其底层表示的鲁棒性的限制，无论用于预训练的协议如何。我们证明了（i）独立于任何下游任务的损失的界限，以及（ii）特别是稳健分类的标准。我们在实际应用中验证了我们的理论结果，展示了我们的结果如何用于校准下游鲁棒性的期望，以及我们的结果何时可用于最佳迁移学习。总而言之，我们的结果为表征表征函数对可靠的适应后性能的要求迈出了第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了预训练模型的对抗鲁棒性向下游任务转移的机制，并提出了理论分析与验证方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练模型在下游任务中表现优异，但其鲁棒性转移的机制尚不明确，需建立理论框架以指导实践应用。
AI.method: 通过理论证明独立于下游任务的损失界及鲁棒分类准则，并结合实际应用验证理论结果。
AI.result: 提出了预训练表示鲁棒性约束下游任务鲁棒性的边界条件，并验证了其在下游任务鲁棒性校准与最优迁移学习中的应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 研究为表征函数的可靠后适配性能提供了初步理论依据，明确了表示鲁棒性在迁移学习中的关键作用。

authors_text: Prateek Mantri,Hariharan Subramonyam,Audrey L. Michal,Cindy Xiong
title: How Do Viewers Synthesize Conflicting Information from Data Visualizations?
title_zh: 观看者如何从数据可视化中综合相互矛盾的信息？
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, To be published in The IEEE Transactions on Visualizations and Computer Graphics
comments: 11 pages, 5 figures, To be published in The IEEE Transactions on Visualizations and Computer Graphics
abstract: Scientific knowledge develops through cumulative discoveries that build on, contradict, contextualize, or correct prior findings. Scientists and journalists often communicate these incremental findings to lay people through visualizations and text (e.g., the positive and negative effects of caffeine intake). Consequently, readers need to integrate diverse and contrasting evidence from multiple sources to form opinions or make decisions. However, the underlying mechanism for synthesizing information from multiple visualizations remains underexplored. To address this knowledge gap, we conducted a series of four experiments (N = 1166) in which participants synthesized empirical evidence from a pair of line charts presented sequentially. In Experiment 1, we administered a baseline condition with charts depicting no specific context where participants held no strong belief. To test for the generalizability, we introduced real-world scenarios to our visualizations in Experiment 2, and added accompanying text descriptions similar to on-line news articles or blog posts in Experiment 3. In all three experiments, we varied the relative direction and magnitude of line slopes within the chart pairs. We found that participants tended to weigh the positive slope more when the two charts depicted relationships in the opposite direction (e.g., one positive slope and one negative slope). Participants tended to weigh the less steep slope when the two charts depicted relationships in the same direction (e.g., both positive). Through these experiments, we characterize participants' synthesis behaviors depending on the relationship between the information they viewed, contribute to theories describing underlying cognitive mechanisms in information synthesis, and describe design implications for data storytelling.
summary: Scientific knowledge develops through cumulative discoveries that build on, contradict, contextualize, or correct prior findings. Scientists and journalists often communicate these incremental findings to lay people through visualizations and text (e.g., the positive and negative effects of caffeine intake). Consequently, readers need to integrate diverse and contrasting evidence from multiple sources to form opinions or make decisions. However, the underlying mechanism for synthesizing information from multiple visualizations remains underexplored. To address this knowledge gap, we conducted a series of four experiments (N = 1166) in which participants synthesized empirical evidence from a pair of line charts presented sequentially. In Experiment 1, we administered a baseline condition with charts depicting no specific context where participants held no strong belief. To test for the generalizability, we introduced real-world scenarios to our visualizations in Experiment 2, and added accompanying text descriptions similar to on-line news articles or blog posts in Experiment 3. In all three experiments, we varied the relative direction and magnitude of line slopes within the chart pairs. We found that participants tended to weigh the positive slope more when the two charts depicted relationships in the opposite direction (e.g., one positive slope and one negative slope). Through these experiments, we characterize participants' synthesis behaviors depending on the relationship between the information they viewed, contribute to theories describing underlying cognitive mechanisms in information synthesis, and describe design implications for data storytelling.
abstract_zh: 科学知识是通过不断积累的发现而发展起来的，这些发现建立在先前发现的基础上、与之相矛盾、结合了背景或纠正了先前的发现。科学家和记者经常通过可视化和文本向外行人传达这些渐进的发现（例如，咖啡因摄入的积极和消极影响）。因此，读者需要整合来自多个来源的不同且对比鲜明的证据来形成意见或做出决定。然而，从多个可视化中合成信息的基本机制仍未得到充分探索。为了解决这一知识差距，我们进行了一系列四项实验 (N = 1166)，参与者从一对顺序呈现的折线图中综合了经验证据。在实验 1 中，我们使用图表来管理基线条件，该图表没有描绘参与者没有强烈信念的特定背景。为了测试普遍性，我们在实验 2 中的可视化中引入了真实场景，并在实验 3 中添加了类似于在线新闻文章或博客文章的随附文本描述。在所有三个实验中，我们改变了图表对内线斜率的相对方向和大小。我们发现，当两张图表描绘相反方向的关系（例如，一个正斜率和一个负斜率）时，参与者倾向于更多地权衡正斜率。当两个图表描绘相同方向的关系（例如，均为正向）时，参与者倾向于权衡不太陡峭的斜率。通过这些实验，我们根据参与者所查看的信息之间的关系来描述参与者的综合行为，为描述信息综合中潜在认知机制的理论做出贡献，并描述数据讲故事的设计含义。

AI.tldr: 本文研究观众如何整合来自数据可视化的冲突信息，通过实验分析不同图表信息组合下的合成机制。
AI.motivation: 科学知识通过累积性发现发展，但现有研究对人们如何从多个可视化中合成冲突信息的机制了解不足，需探索其认知规律与设计启示。
AI.method: 通过四组实验（共1166名参与者），让被试依次观察包含不同斜率方向和幅度的折线图对，并在不同实验中引入现实场景和文本描述以测试情境影响。
AI.result: 当图表关系方向相反时，参与者更倾向于采纳正向斜率；方向相同时则更关注斜率较小的图表，揭示了冲突信息整合中的权重偏好模式。
AI.conclusion: 研究明确了信息合成行为与数据关系方向、幅度的关联，为信息合成的认知机制理论和数据叙事设计提供了实证依据与优化方向。

authors_text: Lingzhi Zhang,Shenghao Zhou,Simon Stent,Jianbo Shi
title: Fine-Grained Egocentric Hand-Object Segmentation: Dataset, Model, and Applications
title_zh: 细粒度的以自我为中心的手部对象分割：数据集、模型和应用程序
abstract: Egocentric videos offer fine-grained information for high-fidelity modeling of human behaviors. Hands and interacting objects are one crucial aspect of understanding a viewer's behaviors and intentions. We provide a labeled dataset consisting of 11,243 egocentric images with per-pixel segmentation labels of hands and objects being interacted with during a diverse array of daily activities. Our dataset is the first to label detailed hand-object contact boundaries. We introduce a context-aware compositional data augmentation technique to adapt to out-of-distribution YouTube egocentric video. We show that our robust hand-object segmentation model and dataset can serve as a foundational tool to boost or enable several downstream vision applications, including hand state classification, video activity recognition, 3D mesh reconstruction of hand-object interactions, and video inpainting of hand-object foregrounds in egocentric videos. Dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/owenzlz/EgoHOS
summary: Egocentric videos offer fine-grained information for high-fidelity modeling of human behaviors. Hands and interacting objects are one crucial aspect of understanding a viewer's behaviors and intentions. We provide a labeled dataset consisting of 11,243 egocentric images with per-pixel segmentation labels of hands and objects being interacted with during a diverse array of daily activities. Our dataset is the first to label detailed hand-object contact boundaries. We introduce a context-aware compositional data augmentation technique to adapt to out-of-distribution YouTube egocentric video. We show that our robust hand-object segmentation model and dataset can serve as a foundational tool to boost or enable several downstream vision applications, including hand state classification, video activity recognition, 3D mesh reconstruction of hand-object interactions, and video inpainting of hand-object foregrounds in egocentric videos. Dataset and code are available at: https://github.com/owenzlz/EgoHOS
abstract_zh: 以自我为中心的视频为人类行为的高保真建模提供了细粒度的信息。手和交互的物体是理解观看者的行为和意图的重要方面之一。我们提供了一个带标签的数据集，其中包含 11,243 个以自我为中心的图像，以及在各种日常活动中与之交互的手和物体的每像素分割标签。我们的数据集是第一个标记详细的手部物体接触边界的数据集。我们引入了一种上下文感知的组合数据增强技术，以适应未发行的 YouTube 以自我为中心的视频。我们展示了我们强大的手部对象分割模型和数据集可以作为基础工具来增强或启用多个下游视觉应用，包括手部状态分类、视频活动识别、手部对象交互的 3D 网格重建以及以自我为中心的视频中手部对象前景的视频修复。数据集和代码可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/owenzlz/EgoHOS

AI.method: 构建包含11,243张带像素级分割标签的以自我为中心图像的数据集，并提出上下文感知的组合数据增强技术以适应分布外的YouTube视频。
AI.result: 该数据集和分割模型可提升手部状态分类、视频动作识别、手部-物体3D重建及视频修复等任务的性能，代码和数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为以自我为中心的视觉任务提供了基础工具，推动了手部与物体交互分析的发展。

search_text: Fine-Grained Egocentric Hand-Object Segmentation: Dataset, Model, and Applications 细粒度的以自我为中心的手部对象分割：数据集、模型和应用程序 Egocentric videos offer fine-grained information for high-fidelity modeling of human behaviors. Hands and interacting objects are one crucial aspect of understanding a viewer's behaviors and intentions. We provide a labeled dataset consisting of 11,243 egocentric images with per-pixel segmentation labels of hands and objects being interacted with during a diverse array of daily activities. Our dataset is the first to label detailed hand-object contact boundaries. We introduce a context-aware compositional data augmentation technique to adapt to out-of-distribution YouTube egocentric video. We show that our robust hand-object segmentation model and dataset can serve as a foundational tool to boost or enable several downstream vision applications, including hand state classification, video activity recognition, 3D mesh reconstruction of hand-object interactions, and video inpainting of hand-object foregrounds in egocentric videos. authors_text: Xiatian Zhang,Noura Al Moubayed,Hubert P. H. Shum
title: Towards Graph Representation Learning Based Surgical Workflow Anticipation
title_zh: 迈向基于图表示学习的手术工作流程预测
comment: Proceedings of the 2022 IEEE-EMBS International Conference on Biomedical and Health Informatics (BHI), 2022
comments: Proceedings of the 2022 IEEE-EMBS International Conference on Biomedical and Health Informatics (BHI), 2022
abstract: Surgical workflow anticipation can give predictions on what steps to conduct or what instruments to use next, which is an essential part of the computer-assisted intervention system for surgery, e.g. workflow reasoning in robotic surgery. However, current approaches are limited to their insufficient expressive power for relationships between instruments. Hence, we propose a graph representation learning framework to comprehensively represent instrument motions in the surgical workflow anticipation problem. In our proposed graph representation, we maps the bounding box information of instruments to the graph nodes in the consecutive frames and build inter-frame/inter-instrument graph edges to represent the trajectory and interaction of the instruments over time. This design enhances the ability of our network on modeling both the spatial and temporal patterns of surgical instruments and their interactions. In addition, we design a multi-horizon learning strategy to balance the understanding of various horizons indifferent anticipation tasks, which significantly improves the model performance in anticipation with various horizons. Experiments on the Cholec80 dataset demonstrate the performance of our proposed method can exceed the state-of-the-art method based on richer backbones, especially in instrument anticipation (1.27 v.s. 1.48 for inMAE; 1.48 v.s. 2.68 for eMAE). To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to introduce a spatial-temporal graph representation into surgical workflow anticipation.
summary: Surgical workflow anticipation can give predictions on what steps to conduct or what instruments to use next, which is an essential part of the computer-assisted intervention system for surgery, e.g. workflow reasoning in robotic surgery. However, current approaches are limited to their insufficient expressive power for relationships between instruments. Hence, we propose a graph representation learning framework to comprehensively represent instrument motions in the surgical workflow anticipation problem. In our proposed graph representation, we maps the bounding box information of instruments to the graph nodes in the consecutive frames and build inter-frame/inter-instrument graph edges to represent the trajectory and interaction of the instruments over time. This design enhances the ability of our network on modeling both the spatial and temporal patterns of surgical instruments and their interactions. In addition, we design a multi-horizon learning strategy to balance the understanding of various horizons indifferent anticipation tasks, which significantly improves the model performance in anticipation with various horizons. Experiments on the Cholec80 dataset demonstrate the performance of our proposed method can exceed the state-of-the-art method based on richer backbones, especially in instrument anticipation (1.27 v.s. 1.48 for inMAE; 1.48 v.s. 2.68 for eMAE). To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to introduce a spatial-temporal graph representation into surgical workflow anticipation.
abstract_zh: 手术流程预期可以预测接下来要执行哪些步骤或使用哪些仪器，这是手术计算机辅助干预系统的重要组成部分。机器人手术中的工作流程推理。然而，当前的方法仅限于对乐器之间关系的表达能力不足。因此，我们提出了一种图表示学习框架来全面表示手术工作流程预期问题中的器械运动。在我们提出的图形表示中，我们将仪器的边界框信息映射到连续帧中的图形节点，并构建帧间/仪器间图形边缘来表示仪器随时间的轨迹和交互。这种设计增强了我们的网络对手术器械的空间和时间模式及其相互作用进行建模的能力。此外，我们设计了一种多视野学习策略来平衡不同预测任务中不同视野的理解，这显着提高了模型在不同视野预测中的性能。 Cholec80 数据集上的实验表明，我们提出的方法的性能可以超过基于更丰富主干的最先进方法，特别是在仪器预测方面（inMAE 为 1.27 vs 1.48；eMAE 为 1.48 vs 2.68）。据我们所知，我们是第一个将时空图表示引入手术工作流程预期的人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图表示学习的手术工作流预测方法，通过建模手术器械的空间-时间关系提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效捕捉手术器械间的复杂时空关系，限制了工作流预测的准确性。
AI.method: 将器械边界框映射为图节点，构建跨帧/跨器械的图边表征轨迹与交互；设计多时间跨度学习策略平衡不同预测任务。
AI.result: 在Cholec80数据集上，器械预测指标inMAE（1.27 vs 1.48）和eMAE（1.48 vs 2.68）均优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次将时空图表示引入手术工作流预测，通过图结构建模和多跨度学习策略显著提升预测性能。

authors_text: Feixiang Zhou,Xinyu Yang,Fang Chen,Long Chen,Zheheng Jiang,Hui Zhu,Reiko Heckel,Haikuan Wang,Minrui Fei,Huiyu Zhou
title: Cross-Skeleton Interaction Graph Aggregation Network for Representation Learning of Mouse Social Behaviour
title_zh: 用于小鼠社交行为表示学习的跨骨架交互图聚合网络
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
abstract: Automated social behaviour analysis of mice has become an increasingly popular research area in behavioural neuroscience. Recently, pose information (i.e., locations of keypoints or skeleton) has been used to interpret social behaviours of mice. Nevertheless, effective encoding and decoding of social interaction information underlying the keypoints of mice has been rarely investigated in the existing methods. In particular, it is challenging to model complex social interactions between mice due to highly deformable body shapes and ambiguous movement patterns. To deal with the interaction modelling problem, we here propose a Cross-Skeleton Interaction Graph Aggregation Network (CS-IGANet) to learn abundant dynamics of freely interacting mice, where a Cross-Skeleton Node-level Interaction module (CS-NLI) is used to model multi-level interactions (i.e., intra-, inter- and cross-skeleton interactions). Furthermore, we design a novel Interaction-Aware Transformer (IAT) to dynamically learn the graph-level representation of social behaviours and update the node-level representation, guided by our proposed interaction-aware self-attention mechanism. Finally, to enhance the representation ability of our model, an auxiliary self-supervised learning task is proposed for measuring the similarity between cross-skeleton nodes. Experimental results on the standard CRMI13-Skeleton and our PDMB-Skeleton datasets show that our proposed model outperforms several other state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Automated social behaviour analysis of mice has become an increasingly popular research area in behavioural neuroscience. Recently, pose information (i.e., locations of keypoints or skeleton) has been used to interpret social behaviours of mice. Nevertheless, effective encoding and decoding of social interaction information underlying the keypoints of mice has been rarely investigated in the existing methods. In particular, it is challenging to model complex social interactions between mice due to highly deformable body shapes and ambiguous movement patterns. To deal with the interaction modelling problem, we here propose a Cross-Skeleton Interaction Graph Aggregation Network (CS-IGANet) to learn abundant dynamics of freely interacting mice, where a Cross-Skeleton Node-level Interaction module (CS-NLI) is used to model multi-level interactions (i.e., intra-, inter- and cross-skeleton interactions). Furthermore, we design a novel Interaction-Aware Transformer (IAT) to dynamically learn the graph-level representation of social behaviours and update the node-level representation, guided by our proposed interaction-aware self-attention mechanism. Finally, to enhance the representation ability of our model, an auxiliary self-supervised learning task is proposed for measuring the similarity between cross-skeleton nodes. Experimental results on the standard CRMI13-Skeleton and our PDMB-Skeleton datasets show that our proposed model outperforms several other state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 小鼠的自动社会行为分析已成为行为神经科学中越来越受欢迎的研究领域。最近，姿势信息（即关键点或骨骼的位置）已被用来解释小鼠的社会行为。然而，现有方法很少研究对小鼠关键点背后的社会互动信息进行有效编码和解码。特别是，由于高度变形的身体形状和模糊的运动模式，对小鼠之间复杂的社交互动进行建模具有挑战性。为了解决交互建模问题，我们在这里提出了一种跨骨架交互图聚合网络（CS-IGANet）来学习自由交互小鼠的丰富动态，其中跨骨架节点级交互模块（CS-NLI）用于建模多级交互（即骨架内、骨架间和跨骨架交互）。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的交互感知变压器（IAT），在我们提出的交互感知自注意力机制的指导下，动态学习社交行为的图级表示并更新节点级表示。最后，为了增强模型的表示能力，提出了一种辅助自监督学习任务来测量跨骨架节点之间的相似性。标准 CRMI13-Skeleton 和我们的 PDMB-Skeleton 数据集的实验结果表明，我们提出的模型优于其他几种最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨骨架交互图聚合网络（CS-IGANet），用于学习小鼠社交行为的表示，以解决现有方法在建模复杂社交交互中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在编码和解码小鼠关键点下的社交交互信息时存在局限性，尤其在处理高度可变形的身体形状和模糊运动模式导致的复杂社交互动时面临挑战。
AI.method: 设计了跨骨架节点级交互模块（CS-NLI）建模多级交互（骨骼内、骨骼间及跨骨骼交互），并提出交互感知Transformer（IAT）动态学习图级表示，结合辅助自监督任务提升表示能力。
AI.result: 在CRMI13-Skeleton和PDMB-Skeleton数据集上，该模型优于多种现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了小鼠社交行为建模难题，为自动化社交行为分析提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨骨架交互图聚合网络（CS-IGANet），用于学习小鼠社交行为的表示，以解决现有方法在建模复杂社交交互中的不足。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在编码和解码小鼠关键点下的社交交互信息时存在局限性，尤其在处理高度可变形的身体形状和模糊运动模式导致的复杂社交互动时面临挑战。
ai_content.method: 设计了跨骨架节点级交互模块（CS-NLI）建模多级交互（骨骼内、骨骼间及跨骨骼交互），并提出交互感知Transformer（IAT）动态学习图级表示，结合辅助自监督任务提升表示能力。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了小鼠社交行为建模难题，为自动化社交行为分析提供了新思路。

search_text: Cross-Skeleton Interaction Graph Aggregation Network for Representation Learning of Mouse Social Behaviour 用于小鼠社交行为表示学习的跨骨架交互图聚合网络 Automated social behaviour analysis of mice has become an increasingly popular research area in behavioural neuroscience. Recently, pose information (i.e., locations of keypoints or skeleton) has been used to interpret social behaviours of mice. Nevertheless, effective encoding and decoding of social interaction information underlying the keypoints of mice has been rarely investigated in the existing methods. In particular, it is challenging to model complex social interactions between mice due to highly deformable body shapes and ambiguous movement patterns. To deal with the interaction modelling problem, we here propose a Cross-Skeleton Interaction Graph Aggregation Network (CS-IGANet) to learn abundant dynamics of freely interacting mice, where a Cross-Skeleton Node-level Interaction module (CS-NLI) is used to model multi-level interactions (i.e., intra-, inter- and cross-skeleton interactions). Furthermore, we design a novel Interaction-Aware Transformer (IAT) to dynamically learn the graph-level representation of social behaviours and update the node-level representation, guided by our proposed interaction-aware self-attention mechanism. Finally, to enhance the representation ability of our model, an auxiliary self-supervised learning task is proposed for measuring the similarity between cross-skeleton nodes. Experimental results on the standard CRMI13-Skeleton and our PDMB-Skeleton datasets show that our proposed model outperforms several other state-of-the-art approaches. 小鼠的自动社会行为分析已成为行为神经科学中越来越受欢迎的研究领域。最近，姿势信息（即关键点或骨骼的位置）已被用来解释小鼠的社会行为。然而，现有方法很少研究对小鼠关键点背后的社会互动信息进行有效编码和解码。特别是，由于高度变形的身体形状和模糊的运动模式，对小鼠之间复杂的社交互动进行建模具有挑战性。为了解决交互建模问题，我们在这里提出了一种跨骨架交互图聚合网络（CS-IGANet）来学习自由交互小鼠的丰富动态，其中跨骨架节点级交互模块（CS-NLI）用于建模多级交互（即骨架内、骨架间和跨骨架交互）。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的交互感知变压器（IAT），在我们提出的交互感知自注意力机制的指导下，动态学习社交行为的图级表示并更新节点级表示。最后，为了增强模型的表示能力，提出了一种辅助自监督学习任务来测量跨骨架节点之间的相似性。标准 CRMI13-Skeleton 和我们的 PDMB-Skeleton 数据集的实验结果表明，我们提出的模型优于其他几种最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种跨骨架交互图聚合网络（CS-IGANet），用于学习小鼠社交行为的表示，以解决现有方法在建模复杂社交交互中的不足。 Feixiang Zhou,Xinyu Yang,Fang Chen,Long Chen,Zheheng Jiang,Hui Zhu,Reiko Heckel,Haikuan Wang,Minrui Fei,Huiyu Zhou cs.CV

authors_text: Siyan Li,Ashwin Paranjape,Christopher D. Manning
title: When can I Speak? Predicting initiation points for spoken dialogue agents
title_zh: 我什么时候可以说话？预测语音对话代理的起始点
abstract: Current spoken dialogue systems initiate their turns after a long period of silence (700-1000ms), which leads to little real-time feedback, sluggish responses, and an overall stilted conversational flow. Humans typically respond within 200ms and successfully predicting initiation points in advance would allow spoken dialogue agents to do the same. In this work, we predict the lead-time to initiation using prosodic features from a pre-trained speech representation model (wav2vec 1.0) operating on user audio and word features from a pre-trained language model (GPT-2) operating on incremental transcriptions. To evaluate errors, we propose two metrics w.r.t. predicted and true lead times. We train and evaluate the models on the Switchboard Corpus and find that our method outperforms features from prior work on both metrics and vastly outperforms the common approach of waiting for 700ms of silence.
summary: Current spoken dialogue systems initiate their turns after a long period of silence (700-1000ms), which leads to little real-time feedback, sluggish responses, and an overall stilted conversational flow. Humans typically respond within 200ms and successfully predicting initiation points in advance would allow spoken dialogue agents to do the same. In this work, we predict the lead-time to initiation using prosodic features from a pre-trained speech representation model (wav2vec 1.0) operating on user audio and word features from a pre-trained language model (GPT-2) operating on incremental transcriptions. To evaluate errors, we propose two metrics w.r.t. predicted and true lead times. We train and evaluate the models on the Switchboard Corpus and find that our method outperforms features from prior work on both metrics and vastly outperforms the common approach of waiting for 700ms of silence.
abstract_zh: 目前的语音对话系统在长时间的沉默（700-1000ms）后才开始轮流，这导致实时反馈很少，反应迟缓，整体对话流程不自然。人类通常会在 200 毫秒内做出响应，并且提前成功预测起始点将使语音对话代理能够做到同样的事情。在这项工作中，我们使用来自对用户音频进行操作的预训练语音表示模型 (wav2vec 1.0) 的韵律特征和来自对增量转录进行操作的预训练语言模型 (GPT-2) 的单词特征来预测启动的准备时间。为了评估错误，我们提出了两个指标。预测和真实的交货时间。我们在 Switchboard Corpus 上训练和评估模型，发现我们的方法在这两个指标上都优于先前工作的特征，并且大大优于等待 700 毫秒静默的常见方法。

AI.tldr: 预测对话代理的发言起始点以提升实时性
AI.motivation: 现有系统因过长的静默等待导致响应迟缓，而人类能更快反应，需预测更早的发言时机
AI.method: 结合预训练语音模型（wav2vec 1.0）的韵律特征和语言模型（GPT-2）的词特征，提出两个评估指标
AI.result: 模型在Switchboard语料库上表现优于传统700ms静默等待方法及先前方法
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效提升对话代理的实时响应能力，优化对话流畅性

authors_text: Lisa Hellerstein,Devorah Kletenik,Naifeng Liu,R. Teal Witter
title: Adaptivity Gaps for the Stochastic Boolean Function Evaluation Problem
title_zh: 随机布尔函数评估问题的适应性差距
abstract: We consider the Stochastic Boolean Function Evaluation (SBFE) problem where the task is to efficiently evaluate a known Boolean function $f$ on an unknown bit string $x$ of length $n$. We determine $f(x)$ by sequentially testing the variables of $x$, each of which is associated with a cost of testing and an independent probability of being true. If a strategy for solving the problem is adaptive in the sense that its next test can depend on the outcomes of previous tests, it has lower expected cost but may take up to exponential space to store. In contrast, a non-adaptive strategy may have higher expected cost but can be stored in linear space and benefit from parallel resources. The adaptivity gap, the ratio between the expected cost of the optimal non-adaptive and adaptive strategies, is a measure of the benefit of adaptivity. We present lower bounds on the adaptivity gap for the SBFE problem for popular classes of Boolean functions, including read-once DNF formulas, read-once formulas, and general DNFs. Our bounds range from $Ω(\log n)$ to $Ω(n/\log n)$, contrasting with recent $O(1)$ gaps shown for symmetric functions and linear threshold functions.
summary: We consider the Stochastic Boolean Function Evaluation (SBFE) problem where the task is to efficiently evaluate a known Boolean function $f$ on an unknown bit string $x$ of length $n$. We determine $f(x)$ by sequentially testing the variables of $x$, each of which is associated with a cost of testing and an independent probability of being true. If a strategy for solving the problem is adaptive in the sense that its next test can depend on the outcomes of previous tests, it has lower expected cost but may take up to exponential space to store. In contrast, a non-adaptive strategy may have higher expected cost but can be stored in linear space and benefit from parallel resources. The adaptivity gap, the ratio between the expected cost of the optimal non-adaptive and adaptive strategies, is a measure of the benefit of adaptivity. We present lower bounds on the adaptivity gap for the SBFE problem for popular classes of Boolean functions, including read-once DNF formulas, read-once formulas, and general DNFs. Our bounds range from $Ω(\log n)$ to $Ω(n/\log n)$, contrasting with recent $O(1)$ gaps shown for symmetric functions and linear threshold functions.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑随机布尔函数求值 (SBFE) 问题，其中任务是在长度为 $n$ 的未知位串 $x$ 上有效地求值已知布尔函数 $f$。我们通过顺序测试 $x$ 的变量来确定 $f(x)$，每个变量都与测试成本和独立的真实概率相关。如果解决问题的策略是自适应的，即它的下一个测试可以依赖于先前测试的结果，那么它的预期成本较低，但可能需要指数空间来存储。相反，非自适应策略可能具有更高的预期成本，但可以存储在线性空间中并从并行资源中受益。适应性差距，即最优非适应性策略和适应性策略的预期成本之间的比率，是适应性效益的衡量标准。我们提出了流行类别布尔函数（包括一次读取 DNF 公式、一次读取公式和通用 DNF）的 SBFE 问题的适应性差距下界。我们的边界范围从 $Ω(\log n)$ 到 $Ω(n/\log n)$，与对称函数和线性阈值函数最近显示的 $O(1)$ 差距形成鲜明对比。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了随机布尔函数求值问题中自适应与非自适应策略的适应性差距，分析了不同布尔函数类的下界。
AI.motivation: 自适应策略虽能降低预期成本，但需指数级空间；非自适应策略空间效率高但成本可能更高。适应性差距衡量两者的效益差异，论文旨在为常见布尔函数类确定该差距的下界。
AI.method: 通过理论分析和数学证明，针对一次性析取范式（DNF）、一次性公式及通用DNF等布尔函数类，推导适应性差距的下界。
AI.result: 论文得出适应性差距的下界范围为Ω(log n)至Ω(n/log n)，与对称函数和线性阈值函数的O(1)结果形成对比。
AI.conclusion: 自适应策略对特定布尔函数类具有显著成本优势，该研究为算法设计提供了理论依据，突显了适应性在SBFE问题中的重要性。

authors_text: Yawen Wu,Dewen Zeng,Zhepeng Wang,Yiyu Shi,Jingtong Hu
title: Distributed Contrastive Learning for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 医学图像分割的分布式对比学习
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.10983
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.10983
abstract: Supervised deep learning needs a large amount of labeled data to achieve high performance. However, in medical imaging analysis, each site may only have a limited amount of data and labels, which makes learning ineffective. Federated learning (FL) can learn a shared model from decentralized data. But traditional FL requires fully-labeled data for training, which is very expensive to obtain. Self-supervised contrastive learning (CL) can learn from unlabeled data for pre-training, followed by fine-tuning with limited annotations. However, when adopting CL in FL, the limited data diversity on each site makes federated contrastive learning (FCL) ineffective. In this work, we propose two federated self-supervised learning frameworks for volumetric medical image segmentation with limited annotations. The first one features high accuracy and fits high-performance servers with high-speed connections. The second one features lower communication costs, suitable for mobile devices. In the first framework, features are exchanged during FCL to provide diverse contrastive data to each site for effective local CL while keeping raw data private. Global structural matching aligns local and remote features for a unified feature space among different sites. In the second framework, to reduce the communication cost for feature exchanging, we propose an optimized method FCLOpt that does not rely on negative samples. To reduce the communications of model download, we propose the predictive target network update (PTNU) that predicts the parameters of the target network. Based on PTNU, we propose the distance prediction (DP) to remove most of the uploads of the target network. Experiments on a cardiac MRI dataset show the proposed two frameworks substantially improve the segmentation and generalization performance compared with state-of-the-art techniques.

abstract_zh: 有监督的深度学习需要大量的标记数据才能实现高性能。然而，在医学影像分析中，每个站点可能只有有限的数据和标签，这使得学习效率低下。联邦学习（FL）可以从分散的数据中学习共享模型。但传统的 FL 需要完全标记的数据进行训练，获取成本非常昂贵。自监督对比学习（CL）可以从未标记的数据中学习进行预训练，然后使用有限的注释进行微调。然而，当在 FL 中采用 CL 时，每个站点上有限的数据多样性使得联邦对比学习（FCL）无效。在这项工作中，我们提出了两个联合自监督学习框架，用于具有有限注释的体积医学图像分割。第一个具有高精度，适合具有高速连接的高性能服务器。第二种特点是通信成本较低，适合移动设备。在第一个框架中，在 FCL 期间交换特征，为每个站点提供不同的对比数据，以实现有效的本地 CL，同时保持原始数据的私密性。全局结构匹配将本地和远程特征对齐，以在不同站点之间形成统一的特征空间。在第二个框架中，为了减少特征交换的通信成本，我们提出了一种不依赖负样本的优化方法 FCLOpt。为了减少模型下载的通信，我们提出了预测目标网络参数的预测目标网络更新（PTNU）。基于PTNU，我们提出距离预测（DP）来删除目标网络的大部分上传。心脏 MRI 数据集的实验表明，与最先进的技术相比，所提出的两个框架显着提高了分割和泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种联邦自监督学习框架，用于解决医疗图像分割中标签数据有限的问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗影像分析中标签数据稀缺，传统联邦学习依赖全标注数据成本高，而对比学习在联邦环境下因数据多样性不足效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计两种框架：第一种通过特征交换和全局结构匹配提升模型性能；第二种引入FCLOpt（无需负样本）、PTNU（预测目标网络参数）和DP（减少上传）降低通信成本。
AI.result: 在心脏MRI数据集上的实验表明，两种框架显著优于现有方法，在分割精度和泛化能力上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架有效应对医疗图像分割中的数据稀缺和通信约束问题，为联邦学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Martin Nisser,Yashaswini Makaram,Lucian Covarrubias,Amadou Bah,Faraz Faruqi,Ryo Suzuki,Stefanie Mueller
title: Mixels: Fabricating Interfaces using Programmable Magnetic Pixels
title_zh: Mixels：使用可编程磁性像素制造接口
comment: ACM UIST 2022: ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology
comments: ACM UIST 2022: ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology
abstract: In this paper, we present Mixels, programmable magnetic pixels that can be rapidly fabricated using an electromagnetic printhead mounted on an off-the-shelve 3-axis CNC machine. The ability to program magnetic material pixel-wise with varying magnetic force enables Mixels to create new tangible, tactile, and haptic interfaces. To facilitate the creation of interactive objects with Mixels, we provide a user interface that lets users specify the high-level magnetic behavior and that then computes the underlying magnetic pixel assignments and fabrication instructions to program the magnetic surface. Our custom hardware add-on based on an electromagnetic printhead and hall effect sensor clips onto a standard 3-axis CNC machine and can both write and read magnetic pixel values from magnetic material. Our evaluation shows that our system can reliably program and read magnetic pixels of various strengths, that we can predict the behavior of two interacting magnetic surfaces before programming them, that our electromagnet is strong enough to create pixels that utilize the maximum magnetic strength of the material being programmed, and that this material remains magnetized when removed from the magnetic plotter.
summary: In this paper, we present Mixels, programmable magnetic pixels that can be rapidly fabricated using an electromagnetic printhead mounted on an off-the-shelve 3-axis CNC machine. The ability to program magnetic material pixel-wise with varying magnetic force enables Mixels to create new tangible, tactile, and haptic interfaces. To facilitate the creation of interactive objects with Mixels, we provide a user interface that lets users specify the high-level magnetic behavior and that then computes the underlying magnetic pixel assignments and fabrication instructions to program the magnetic surface. Our custom hardware add-on based on an electromagnetic printhead and hall effect sensor clips onto a standard 3-axis CNC machine and can both write and read magnetic pixel values from magnetic material. Our evaluation shows that our system can reliably program and read magnetic pixels of various strengths, that we can predict the behavior of two interacting magnetic surfaces before programming them, that our electromagnet is strong enough to create pixels that utilize the maximum magnetic strength of the material being programmed, and that this material remains magnetized when removed from the magnetic plotter.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 Mixels，一种可编程磁性像素，可以使用安装在现成的 3 轴数控机床上的电磁打印头快速制造。利用不同的磁力对磁性材料进行像素级编程的能力使 Mixels 能够创建新的有形、触觉和触觉界面。为了促进使用 Mixels 创建交互式对象，我们提供了一个用户界面，让用户指定高级磁性行为，然后计算底层磁性像素分配和制造指令以对磁性表面进行编程。我们的定制硬件插件基于电磁打印头和霍尔效应传感器，可夹在标准 3 轴 CNC 机器上，并且可以从磁性材料中写入和读取磁性像素值。我们的评估表明，我们的系统可以可靠地编程和读取各种强度的磁性像素，我们可以在编程之前预测两个相互作用的磁性表面的行为，我们的电磁体足够强大，可以创建利用被编程材料的最大磁场强度的像素，并且当从磁绘图仪中取出时，该材料仍然保持磁化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Mixels的可编程磁性像素制造系统，通过电磁打印头和CNC机床实现触觉界面的快速制作。
AI.motivation: 现有交互界面在触觉反馈和磁性编程灵活性方面存在不足，需开发新型可编程磁性材料制造方法以支持复杂交互设计。
AI.method: 基于电磁打印头与霍尔传感器的硬件扩展模块，结合用户交互界面生成磁像素分配方案，通过CNC机床实现磁性材料的精确编程与读取。
AI.result: 系统可稳定编程不同强度磁像素，准确预测磁表面交互行为，电磁铁输出达到材料最大磁化强度且磁性持久保持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为创建可编程磁性交互界面提供了可靠的技术方案，实现了磁像素的精确控制与交互行为预测。

authors_text: Martin Nisser,Yashaswini Makaram,Faraz Faruqi,Ryo Suzuki,Stefanie Mueller
title: Selective Self-Assembly using Re-Programmable Magnetic Pixels
title_zh: 使用可重新编程的磁性像素进行选择性自组装
comment: 2022 IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: 2022 IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: This paper introduces a method to generate highly selective encodings that can be magnetically "programmed" onto physical modules to enable them to self-assemble in chosen configurations. We generate these encodings based on Hadamard matrices, and show how to design the faces of modules to be maximally attractive to their intended mate, while remaining maximally agnostic to other faces. We derive guarantees on these bounds, and verify their attraction and agnosticism experimentally. Using cubic modules whose faces have been covered in soft magnetic material, we show how inexpensive, passive modules with planar faces can be used to selectively self-assemble into target shapes without geometric guides. We show that these modules can be easily re-programmed for new target shapes using a CNC-based magnetic plotter, and demonstrate self-assembly of 8 cubes in a water tank.
summary: This paper introduces a method to generate highly selective encodings that can be magnetically "programmed" onto physical modules to enable them to self-assemble in chosen configurations. We generate these encodings based on Hadamard matrices, and show how to design the faces of modules to be maximally attractive to their intended mate, while remaining maximally agnostic to other faces. We derive guarantees on these bounds, and verify their attraction and agnosticism experimentally. Using cubic modules whose faces have been covered in soft magnetic material, we show how inexpensive, passive modules with planar faces can be used to selectively self-assemble into target shapes without geometric guides. We show that these modules can be easily re-programmed for new target shapes using a CNC-based magnetic plotter, and demonstrate self-assembly of 8 cubes in a water tank.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种生成高度选择性编码的方法，该编码可以通过磁性“编程”到物理模块上，使它们能够以选定的配置进行自组装。我们基于哈达玛矩阵生成这些编码，并展示如何设计模块的面孔，以最大限度地吸引其预期伴侣，同时保持对其他面孔最大限度的不可知性。我们对这些界限做出保证，并通过实验验证它们的吸引力和不可知论。使用表面覆盖有软磁材料的立方体模块，我们展示了如何使用具有平面的廉价无源模块来选择性地自组装成目标形状，而无需几何引导。我们展示了这些模块可以使用基于 CNC 的磁力绘图仪轻松地重新编程以适应新的目标形状，并演示了水箱中 8 个立方体的自组装。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于可重新编程磁性像素的选择性自组装方法，通过磁编码实现模块化自组装。
AI.motivation: 传统自组装依赖几何引导，缺乏灵活性和可重编程性，需开发无需几何引导且可重新编程的模块化自组装方法。
AI.method: 基于Hadamard矩阵生成磁编码，设计模块表面磁性材料，使其对目标配对面具有高吸引力，对非目标面保持中性，并通过CNC磁性绘图仪实现重新编程。
AI.result: 实验验证了模块的吸引性和中性界限，成功实现8个立方体在水箱中的目标形状自组装，证明方法有效且可重编程。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无需几何引导的灵活自组装提供了新思路，适用于复杂结构的模块化组装，具有可扩展性。
