search_text: Selective Self-Assembly using Re-Programmable Magnetic Pixels 使用可重新编程的磁性像素进行选择性自组装 This paper introduces a method to generate highly selective encodings that can be magnetically "programmed" onto physical modules to enable them to self-assemble in chosen configurations. We generate these encodings based on Hadamard matrices, and show how to design the faces of modules to be maximally attractive to their intended mate, while remaining maximally agnostic to other faces. We derive guarantees on these bounds, and verify their attraction and agnosticism experimentally. Using cubic modules whose faces have been covered in soft magnetic material, we show how inexpensive, passive modules with planar faces can be used to selectively self-assemble into target shapes without geometric guides. We show that these modules can be easily re-programmed for new target shapes using a CNC-based magnetic plotter, and demonstrate self-assembly of 8 cubes in a water tank. 本文介绍了一种生成高度选择性编码的方法，该编码可以通过磁性“编程”到物理模块上，使它们能够以选定的配置进行自组装。我们基于哈达玛矩阵生成这些编码，并展示如何设计模块的面孔，以最大限度地吸引其预期伴侣，同时保持对其他面孔最大限度的不可知性。我们对这些界限做出保证，并通过实验验证它们的吸引力和不可知论。使用表面覆盖有软磁材料的立方体模块，我们展示了如何使用具有平面的廉价无源模块来选择性地自组装成目标形状，而无需几何引导。我们展示了这些模块可以使用基于 CNC 的磁力绘图仪轻松地重新编程以适应新的目标形状，并演示了水箱中 8 个立方体的自组装。 提出一种基于可重新编程磁性像素的选择性自组装方法，通过磁编码实现模块化自组装。 Martin Nisser,Yashaswini Makaram,Faraz Faruqi,Ryo Suzuki,Stefanie Mueller cs.RO

authors_text: Qiyu Dai,Jiyao Zhang,Qiwei Li,Tianhao Wu,Hao Dong,Ziyuan Liu,Ping Tan,He Wang
title: Domain Randomization-Enhanced Depth Simulation and Restoration for Perceiving and Grasping Specular and Transparent Objects
title_zh: 用于感知和抓取镜面和透明物体的域随机化增强深度模拟和恢复
abstract: Commercial depth sensors usually generate noisy and missing depths, especially on specular and transparent objects, which poses critical issues to downstream depth or point cloud-based tasks. To mitigate this problem, we propose a powerful RGBD fusion network, SwinDRNet, for depth restoration. We further propose Domain Randomization-Enhanced Depth Simulation (DREDS) approach to simulate an active stereo depth system using physically based rendering and generate a large-scale synthetic dataset that contains 130K photorealistic RGB images along with their simulated depths carrying realistic sensor noises. To evaluate depth restoration methods, we also curate a real-world dataset, namely STD, that captures 30 cluttered scenes composed of 50 objects with different materials from specular, transparent, to diffuse. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed DREDS dataset bridges the sim-to-real domain gap such that, trained on DREDS, our SwinDRNet can seamlessly generalize to other real depth datasets, e.g. ClearGrasp, and outperform the competing methods on depth restoration with a real-time speed. We further show that our depth restoration effectively boosts the performance of downstream tasks, including category-level pose estimation and grasping tasks. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/PKU-EPIC/DREDS
summary: Commercial depth sensors usually generate noisy and missing depths, especially on specular and transparent objects, which poses critical issues to downstream depth or point cloud-based tasks. To mitigate this problem, we propose a powerful RGBD fusion network, SwinDRNet, for depth restoration. We further propose Domain Randomization-Enhanced Depth Simulation (DREDS) approach to simulate an active stereo depth system using physically based rendering and generate a large-scale synthetic dataset that contains 130K photorealistic RGB images along with their simulated depths carrying realistic sensor noises. To evaluate depth restoration methods, we also curate a real-world dataset, namely STD, that captures 30 cluttered scenes composed of 50 objects with different materials from specular, transparent, to diffuse. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed DREDS dataset bridges the sim-to-real domain gap such that, trained on DREDS, our SwinDRNet can seamlessly generalize to other real depth datasets, e.g. ClearGrasp, and outperform the competing methods on depth restoration with a real-time speed. We further show that our depth restoration effectively boosts the performance of downstream tasks, including category-level pose estimation and grasping tasks. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/PKU-EPIC/DREDS
abstract_zh: 商业深度传感器通常会产生噪声和缺失的深度，特别是在镜面和透明物体上，这给下游深度或基于点云的任务带来了关键问题。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一个强大的 RGBD 融合网络 SwinDRNet，用于深度恢复。我们进一步提出域随机化增强深度模拟 (DREDS) 方法，使用基于物理的渲染来模拟主动立体深度系统，并生成包含 130K 真实感 RGB 图像及其带有真实传感器噪声的模拟深度的大规模合成数据集。为了评估深度恢复方法，我们还策划了一个真实世界的数据集，即 STD，它捕获由 50 个具有不同材质（从镜面、透明到漫反射）的对象组成的 30 个杂乱场景。实验表明，所提出的 DREDS 数据集弥合了模拟与真实域之间的差距，这样，在 DREDS 上进行训练后，我们的 SwinDRNet 可以无缝推广到其他真实深度数据集，例如ClearGrasp，并以实时速度超越深度恢复方面的竞争方法。我们进一步表明，我们的深度恢复有效地提高了下游任务的性能，包括类别级姿态估计和抓取任务。我们的数据和代码可在 https://github.com/PKU-EPIC/DREDS 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合域随机化增强深度模拟与恢复的方法，用于解决镜面和透明物体在深度感知与抓取中的难题。
AI.motivation: 商用深度传感器在镜面和透明物体表面易产生噪声和缺失深度，影响下游任务效果，亟需有效深度恢复方案。
AI.method: 设计RGBD融合网络SwinDRNet进行深度恢复，并提出域随机化增强深度模拟（DREDS）方法，生成包含13万张真实感RGB图像及模拟深度的合成数据集，同时构建包含30个杂乱场景的STD真实数据集。
AI.result: DREDS数据集有效弥合仿真到现实的领域差距，SwinDRNet在ClearGrasp等真实数据集上优于现有方法，且实现实时速度；深度恢复显著提升目标姿态估计和抓取任务性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过域随机化增强的仿真数据与网络联合优化，为镜面/透明物体的深度感知与机器人抓取提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Dan Jia,Alexander Hermans,Bastian Leibe
title: Global Hierarchical Attention for 3D Point Cloud Analysis
title_zh: 3D 点云分析的全局分层关注
comment: Accepted to the German Conference on Pattern Recognition (GCPR) 2022
comments: Accepted to the German Conference on Pattern Recognition (GCPR) 2022
abstract: We propose a new attention mechanism, called Global Hierarchical Attention (GHA), for 3D point cloud analysis. GHA approximates the regular global dot-product attention via a series of coarsening and interpolation operations over multiple hierarchy levels. The advantage of GHA is two-fold. First, it has linear complexity with respect to the number of points, enabling the processing of large point clouds. Second, GHA inherently possesses the inductive bias to focus on spatially close points, while retaining the global connectivity among all points. Combined with a feedforward network, GHA can be inserted into many existing network architectures. We experiment with multiple baseline networks and show that adding GHA consistently improves performance across different tasks and datasets. For the task of semantic segmentation, GHA gives a +1.7% mIoU increase to the MinkowskiEngine baseline on ScanNet. For the 3D object detection task, GHA improves the CenterPoint baseline by +0.5% mAP on the nuScenes dataset, and the 3DETR baseline by +2.1% mAP25 and +1.5% mAP50 on ScanNet.
summary: We propose a new attention mechanism, called Global Hierarchical Attention (GHA), for 3D point cloud analysis. GHA approximates the regular global dot-product attention via a series of coarsening and interpolation operations over multiple hierarchy levels. The advantage of GHA is two-fold. First, it has linear complexity with respect to the number of points, enabling the processing of large point clouds. Second, GHA inherently possesses the inductive bias to focus on spatially close points, while retaining the global connectivity among all points. Combined with a feedforward network, GHA can be inserted into many existing network architectures. We experiment with multiple baseline networks and show that adding GHA consistently improves performance across different tasks and datasets. For the task of semantic segmentation, GHA gives a +1.7% mIoU increase to the MinkowskiEngine baseline on ScanNet. For the 3D object detection task, GHA improves the CenterPoint baseline by +0.5% mAP on the nuScenes dataset, and the 3DETR baseline by +2.1% mAP25 and +1.5% mAP50 on ScanNet.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的注意力机制，称为全局分层注意力（GHA），用于 3D 点云分析。 GHA 通过多个层级上的一系列粗化和插值操作来近似常规的全局点积注意力。 GHA 的优势有两个。首先，它相对于点的数量具有线性复杂度，可以处理大型点云。其次，GHA 本质上具有归纳偏差，专注于空间上接近的点，同时保留所有点之间的全局连通性。与前馈网络相结合，GHA 可以插入到许多现有的网络架构中。我们对多个基线网络进行了实验，结果表明添加 GHA 可以持续提高不同任务和数据集的性能。对于语义分割任务，GHA 使 ScanNet 上的 MinkowskiEngine 基线提高了 +1.7% mIoU。对于 3D 对象检测任务，GHA 在 nuScenes 数据集上将 CenterPoint 基线提高了 +0.5% mAP，在 ScanNet 上将 3DETR 基线提高了 +2.1% mAP25 和 +1.5% mAP50。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为全局分层注意力（GHA）的新机制，用于提升3D点云分析的效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 传统全局注意力机制在处理大规模3D点云时计算复杂度高，且难以平衡局部细节与全局关联性，需设计线性复杂度且兼顾局部与全局信息的模型。
AI.method: 通过多层级的粗化与插值操作近似全局点积注意力，实现线性复杂度；结合前馈网络，使GHA可嵌入多种现有架构中。
AI.result: 在ScanNet语义分割任务中，GHA使MinkowskiEngine基线mIoU提升1.7%；在nuScenes检测任务中CenterPoint基线mAP提升0.5%，ScanNet上3DETR基线mAP25/mAP50分别提升2.1%/1.5%。
AI.conclusion: GHA通过线性复杂度和空间归纳偏置有效提升多任务性能，验证了其在3D点云分析中的普适性与有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为全局分层注意力（GHA）的新机制，用于提升3D点云分析的效率和性能。
ai_content.motivation: 传统全局注意力机制在处理大规模3D点云时计算复杂度高，且难以平衡局部细节与全局关联性，需设计线性复杂度且兼顾局部与全局信息的模型。
ai_content.method: 通过多层级的粗化与插值操作近似全局点积注意力，实现线性复杂度；结合前馈网络，使GHA可嵌入多种现有架构中。
ai_content.result: 在ScanNet语义分割任务中，GHA使MinkowskiEngine基线mIoU提升1.7%；在nuScenes检测任务中CenterPoint基线mAP提升0.5%，ScanNet上3DETR基线mAP25/mAP50分别提升2.1%/1.5%。
ai_content.conclusion: GHA通过线性复杂度和空间归纳偏置有效提升多任务性能，验证了其在3D点云分析中的普适性与有效性。

search_text: Global Hierarchical Attention for 3D Point Cloud Analysis 3D 点云分析的全局分层关注 We propose a new attention mechanism, called Global Hierarchical Attention (GHA), for 3D point cloud analysis. GHA approximates the regular global dot-product attention via a series of coarsening and interpolation operations over multiple hierarchy levels. The advantage of GHA is two-fold. First, it has linear complexity with respect to the number of points, enabling the processing of large point clouds. Second, GHA inherently possesses the inductive bias to focus on spatially close points, while retaining the global connectivity among all points. Combined with a feedforward network, GHA can be inserted into many existing network architectures. We experiment with multiple baseline networks and show that adding GHA consistently improves performance across different tasks and datasets. For the task of semantic segmentation, GHA gives a +1.7% mIoU increase to the MinkowskiEngine baseline on ScanNet. For the 3D object detection task, GHA improves the CenterPoint baseline by +0.5% mAP on the nuScenes dataset, and the 3DETR baseline by +2.1% mAP25 and +1.5% mAP50 on ScanNet. 我们提出了一种新的注意力机制，称为全局分层注意力（GHA），用于 3D 点云分析。 GHA 通过多个层级上的一系列粗化和插值操作来近似常规的全局点积注意力。 GHA 的优势有两个。首先，它相对于点的数量具有线性复杂度，可以处理大型点云。其次，GHA 本质上具有归纳偏差，专注于空间上接近的点，同时保留所有点之间的全局连通性。与前馈网络相结合，GHA 可以插入到许多现有的网络架构中。我们对多个基线网络进行了实验，结果表明添加 GHA 可以持续提高不同任务和数据集的性能。对于语义分割任务，GHA 使 ScanNet 上的 MinkowskiEngine 基线提高了 +1.7% mIoU。对于 3D 对象检测任务，GHA 在 nuScenes 数据集上将 CenterPoint 基线提高了 +0.5% mAP，在 ScanNet 上将 3DETR 基线提高了 +2.1% mAP25 和 +1.5% mAP50。 本文提出一种名为全局分层注意力（GHA）的新机制，用于提升3D点云分析的效率和性能。 Dan Jia,Alexander Hermans,Bastian Leibe cs.CV

authors_text: Rishabh Agrawal,Nirav Ajmeri,Munindar P. Singh
title: Socially Intelligent Genetic Agents for the Emergence of Explicit Norms
title_zh: 用于显式规范出现的社会智能遗传因子
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 12 tables, accepted at IJCAI 2022 (and supplementary material with code availability and additional results)
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures, 12 tables, accepted at IJCAI 2022 (and supplementary material with code availability and additional results)
abstract: Norms help regulate a society. Norms may be explicit (represented in structured form) or implicit. We address the emergence of explicit norms by developing agents who provide and reason about explanations for norm violations in deciding sanctions and identifying alternative norms. These agents use a genetic algorithm to produce norms and reinforcement learning to learn the values of these norms. We find that applying explanations leads to norms that provide better cohesion and goal satisfaction for the agents. Our results are stable for societies with differing attitudes of generosity.
summary: Norms help regulate a society. Norms may be explicit (represented in structured form) or implicit. We address the emergence of explicit norms by developing agents who provide and reason about explanations for norm violations in deciding sanctions and identifying alternative norms. These agents use a genetic algorithm to produce norms and reinforcement learning to learn the values of these norms. We find that applying explanations leads to norms that provide better cohesion and goal satisfaction for the agents. Our results are stable for societies with differing attitudes of generosity.
abstract_zh: 规范有助于规范社会。规范可以是显式的（以结构化形式表示）或隐式的。我们通过开发代理来解决明确规范的出现问题，这些代理在决定制裁和确定替代规范时提供并推理违反规范的解释。这些代理使用遗传算法来生成规范，并使用强化学习来学习这些规范的值。我们发现应用解释会产生规范，为代理人提供更好的凝聚力和目标满意度。对于具有不同慷慨态度的社会，我们的结果是稳定的。

AI.tldr: 开发具有社会智能的遗传代理，通过解释机制促进显性规范的生成与维护。
AI.motivation: 规范对社会调节至关重要，但显性规范的生成和维持机制尚不明确，需探索代理如何通过解释促进规范演化。
AI.method: 结合遗传算法生成规范，强化学习评估规范价值，代理通过解释违规行为决定制裁并提出替代规范。
AI.result: 使用解释的规范显著提升代理群体的凝聚力与目标达成度，且在不同慷慨程度的社会中保持稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 社会智能代理通过解释机制可有效生成稳定显性规范，为复杂社会系统的协调提供新方法。

authors_text: Aimen Gaba,Vidya Setlur,Arjun Srinivasan,Jane Hoffswell,Cindy Xiong
title: Comparison Conundrum and the Chamber of Visualizations: An Exploration of How Language Influences Visual Design
title_zh: 比较难题和可视化室：语言如何影响视觉设计的探索
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, to appear in IEEE Transactions of Visualization and Computer Graphics (Also in proceedings of IEEE VIS 2022)
comments: 11 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, to appear in IEEE Transactions of Visualization and Computer Graphics (Also in proceedings of IEEE VIS 2022)
abstract: The language for expressing comparisons is often complex and nuanced, making supporting natural language-based visual comparison a non-trivial task. To better understand how people reason about comparisons in natural language, we explore a design space of utterances for comparing data entities. We identified different parameters of comparison utterances that indicate what is being compared (i.e., data variables and attributes) as well as how these parameters are specified (i.e., explicitly or implicitly). We conducted a user study with sixteen data visualization experts and non-experts to investigate how they designed visualizations for comparisons in our design space. Based on the rich set of visualization techniques observed, we extracted key design features from the visualizations and synthesized them into a subset of sixteen representative visualization designs. We then conducted a follow-up study to validate user preferences for the sixteen representative visualizations corresponding to utterances in our design space. Findings from these studies suggest guidelines and future directions for designing natural language interfaces and recommendation tools to better support natural language comparisons in visual analytics.
summary: The language for expressing comparisons is often complex and nuanced, making supporting natural language-based visual comparison a non-trivial task. To better understand how people reason about comparisons in natural language, we explore a design space of utterances for comparing data entities. We identified different parameters of comparison utterances that indicate what is being compared (i.e., data variables and attributes) as well as how these parameters are specified (i.e., explicitly or implicitly). We conducted a user study with sixteen data visualization experts and non-experts to investigate how they designed visualizations for comparisons in our design space. Based on the rich set of visualization techniques observed, we extracted key design features from the visualizations and synthesized them into a subset of sixteen representative visualization designs. We then conducted a follow-up study to validate user preferences for the sixteen representative visualizations corresponding to utterances in our design space. Findings from these studies suggest guidelines and future directions for designing natural language interfaces and recommendation tools to better support natural language comparisons in visual analytics.
abstract_zh: 用于表达比较的语言通常复杂而细致，这使得支持基于自然语言的视觉比较成为一项艰巨的任务。为了更好地理解人们如何用自然语言进行比较，我们探索了用于比较数据实体的话语设计空间。我们确定了比较话语的不同参数，这些参数指示正在比较的内容（即数据变量和属性）以及如何指定这些参数（即显式或隐式）。我们与 16 位数据可视化专家和非专家进行了一项用户研究，以调查他们如何设计可视化以便在我们的设计空间中进行比较。基于观察到的丰富的可视化技术，我们从可视化中提取了关键设计特征，并将它们合成为十六个代表性可视化设计的子集。然后，我们进行了一项后续研究，以验证用户对与我们设计空间中的话语相对应的十六种代表性可视化的偏好。这些研究的结果为设计自然语言界面和推荐工具提供了指导方针和未来方向，以更好地支持视觉分析中的自然语言比较。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨自然语言如何影响可视化设计，通过分析比较表达的参数和用户设计偏好，提出支持自然语言比较的可视化设计指南。
AI.motivation: 自然语言中的比较表达复杂且多义，现有可视化工具难以有效支持基于自然语言的比较任务，需探索语言与可视化设计之间的映射关系。
AI.method: 通过用户研究分析16名专家和非专家的可视化设计，提取关键设计特征并合成16种代表性方案，验证用户对不同语言参数对应可视化方案的偏好。
AI.result: 识别出比较参数的显隐性等关键维度，发现用户偏好与语言结构强相关的可视化形式，为自然语言接口设计提供可操作的指导原则。
AI.conclusion: 语言结构显著影响可视化设计选择，未来需开发能动态适配自然语言比较意图的推荐系统与可视化生成工具。

authors_text: Minmin Liu,Xuechen Li,Xiangbo Gao,Junliang Chen,Linlin Shen,Huisi Wu
title: Sample hardness based gradient loss for long-tailed cervical cell detection
title_zh: 用于长尾宫颈细胞检测的基于样本硬度的梯度损失
abstract: Due to the difficulty of cancer samples collection and annotation, cervical cancer datasets usually exhibit a long-tailed data distribution. When training a detector to detect the cancer cells in a WSI (Whole Slice Image) image captured from the TCT (Thinprep Cytology Test) specimen, head categories (e.g. normal cells and inflammatory cells) typically have a much larger number of samples than tail categories (e.g. cancer cells). Most existing state-of-the-art long-tailed learning methods in object detection focus on category distribution statistics to solve the problem in the long-tailed scenario without considering the "hardness" of each sample. To address this problem, in this work we propose a Grad-Libra Loss that leverages the gradients to dynamically calibrate the degree of hardness of each sample for different categories, and re-balance the gradients of positive and negative samples. Our loss can thus help the detector to put more emphasis on those hard samples in both head and tail categories. Extensive experiments on a long-tailed TCT WSI image dataset show that the mainstream detectors, e.g. RepPoints, FCOS, ATSS, YOLOF, etc. trained using our proposed Gradient-Libra Loss, achieved much higher (7.8%) mAP than that trained using cross-entropy classification loss.
summary: Due to the difficulty of cancer samples collection and annotation, cervical cancer datasets usually exhibit a long-tailed data distribution. When training a detector to detect the cancer cells in a WSI (Whole Slice Image) image captured from the TCT (Thinprep Cytology Test) specimen, head categories (e.g. normal cells and inflammatory cells) typically have a much larger number of samples than tail categories (e.g. cancer cells). Most existing state-of-the-art long-tailed learning methods in object detection focus on category distribution statistics to solve the problem in the long-tailed scenario without considering the "hardness" of each sample. To address this problem, in this work we propose a Grad-Libra Loss that leverages the gradients to dynamically calibrate the degree of hardness of each sample for different categories, and re-balance the gradients of positive and negative samples. Our loss can thus help the detector to put more emphasis on those hard samples in both head and tail categories. Extensive experiments on a long-tailed TCT WSI image dataset show that the mainstream detectors, e.g. RepPoints, FCOS, ATSS, YOLOF, etc. trained using our proposed Gradient-Libra Loss, achieved much higher (7.8%) mAP than that trained using cross-entropy classification loss.
abstract_zh: 由于癌症样本收集和注释的困难，宫颈癌数据集通常表现出长尾数据分布。当训练检测器检测从 TCT（薄层细胞学测试）样本捕获的 WSI（全切片图像）图像中的癌细胞时，头部类别（例如正常细胞和炎症细胞）的样本数量通常比尾部类别（例如癌细胞）的样本数量多得多。现有的目标检测中最先进的长尾学习方法大多侧重于类别分布统计来解决长尾场景中的问题，而不考虑每个样本的“硬度”。为了解决这个问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种 Grad-Libra Loss，它利用梯度来动态校准不同类别的每个样本的硬度程度，并重新平衡正负样本的梯度。因此，我们的损失可以帮助检测器更加重视头部和尾部类别中的硬样本。对长尾 TCT WSI 图像数据集的大量实验表明，主流检测器，例如使用我们提出的 Gradient-Libra Loss 训练的 RepPoints、FCOS、ATSS、YOLOF 等，比使用交叉熵分类损失训练的获得了更高的 mAP (7.8%)。

AI.tldr: 本文针对长尾分布的宫颈细胞检测问题，提出基于样本硬度的梯度损失函数Grad-Libra Loss以提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有长尾学习方法仅关注类别分布统计，忽略样本个体难度差异，导致尾部类别（如癌细胞）检测效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计Grad-Libra Loss通过梯度动态校准不同类别样本的难度，重新平衡正负样本梯度权重，强化对头尾类别困难样本的学习。
AI.result: 在长尾TCT数据集上，使用该损失函数的RepPoints、FCOS等检测器mAP提升7.8%。
AI.conclusion: Grad-Libra Loss能有效缓解长尾分布带来的类别不平衡问题，显著提升宫颈癌细胞检测精度。

authors_text: Hieu H. Pham,Louahdi Khoudour,Alain Crouzil,Pablo Zegers,Sergio A. Velastin
title: Video-based Human Action Recognition using Deep Learning: A Review
title_zh: 使用深度学习的基于视频的人类动作识别：回顾
abstract: Human action recognition is an important application domain in computer vision. Its primary aim is to accurately describe human actions and their interactions from a previously unseen data sequence acquired by sensors. The ability to recognize, understand, and predict complex human actions enables the construction of many important applications such as intelligent surveillance systems, human-computer interfaces, health care, security, and military applications. In recent years, deep learning has been given particular attention by the computer vision community. This paper presents an overview of the current state-of-the-art in action recognition using video analysis with deep learning techniques. We present the most important deep learning models for recognizing human actions, and analyze them to provide the current progress of deep learning algorithms applied to solve human action recognition problems in realistic videos highlighting their advantages and disadvantages. Based on the quantitative analysis using recognition accuracies reported in the literature, our study identifies state-of-the-art deep architectures in action recognition and then provides current trends and open problems for future works in this field.
summary: Human action recognition is an important application domain in computer vision. Its primary aim is to accurately describe human actions and their interactions from a previously unseen data sequence acquired by sensors. The ability to recognize, understand, and predict complex human actions enables the construction of many important applications such as intelligent surveillance systems, human-computer interfaces, health care, security, and military applications. In recent years, deep learning has been given particular attention by the computer vision community. This paper presents an overview of the current state-of-the-art in action recognition using video analysis with deep learning techniques. We present the most important deep learning models for recognizing human actions, and analyze them to provide the current progress of deep learning algorithms applied to solve human action recognition problems in realistic videos highlighting their advantages and disadvantages. Based on the quantitative analysis using recognition accuracies reported in the literature, our study identifies state-of-the-art deep architectures in action recognition and then provides current trends and open problems for future works in this field.
abstract_zh: 人体动作识别是计算机视觉的一个重要应用领域。其主要目的是根据传感器获取的以前未见过的数据序列准确描述人类行为及其相互作用。识别、理解和预测复杂人类行为的能力使得能够构建许多重要的应用，例如智能监控系统、人机界面、医疗保健、安全和军事应用。近年来，深度学习受到计算机视觉界的特别关注。本文概述了使用视频分析和深度学习技术进行动作识别的当前最新技术。我们提出了用于识别人类动作的最重要的深度学习模型，并对它们进行了分析，以提供用于解决现实视频中的人类动作识别问题的深度学习算法的当前进展，突出了它们的优点和缺点。基于文献中报告的识别精度的定量分析，我们的研究确定了动作识别中最先进的深层架构，然后为该领域的未来工作提供当前趋势和未解决的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于深度学习的视频人体动作识别技术，分析了当前最先进的方法及其在真实视频中的应用进展。
AI.motivation: 人体动作识别在智能监控、医疗健康等领域具有重要意义，而深度学习技术能有效提升复杂动作的识别准确率，因此需要系统梳理现有方法并探讨未来方向。
AI.method: 通过总结主流深度学习模型，分析其优缺点，并基于文献中报道的识别准确率进行定量比较，归纳当前技术趋势与未解决的问题。
AI.result: 识别出现阶段领先的动作识别深度架构，明确其优势与局限性，并提出未来研究需关注的开放性问题与改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著推动了动作识别技术发展，但真实场景下的动态复杂性、数据多样性等问题仍需进一步研究以提升实际应用效果。

authors_text: Roshan Sah,Raunak Srivastava,Kaushik Das
title: Design and Analysis of Cold Gas Thruster to De-Orbit the PSLV Debris
title_zh: PSLV碎片离轨冷气体推进器的设计与分析
comment: 11 pages, 19 figures, Accepted and Published in Small Satellite Conference 2022. link:- https://digitalcommons.usu.edu/smallsat/2022/all2022/9/
comments: 11 pages, 19 figures, Accepted and Published in Small Satellite Conference 2022. link:- https://digitalcommons.usu.edu/smallsat/2022/all2022/9/
abstract: Todayś world of spaceś primary concern is the uncontrolled growth of space debris and its probability of collision with spacecraft, particularly in the low earth orbit (LEO) regions. This paper is aimed to design an optimized micro-propulsion system, Cold Gas Thruster, to de-orbit the PSLV debris from 668km to 250 km height after capturing process. The propulsion system mainly consists of a storage tank, pipes, control valves, and a convergent-divergent nozzle. The paper gives an idea of the design of each component based on a continuous iterative process until the design thrust requirements are met. All the components are designed in the CATIA V5, and the structural analysis is done in the ANSYS tool for each component where our cylinder tank can withstand the high hoop stress generated on its wall of it. And flow analysis is done by using the K-$ε$ turbulence model for the CD nozzle, which provides the required thrust to de-orbit PSLV from a higher orbit to a lower orbit, after which the air drag will be enough to bring back to earthś atmosphere and burn it. Hohmannś orbit transfer method has been used to de-orbit the PSLV space debris, and it has been simulated by STK tools. And the result shows that our optimized designed thruster generates enough thrust to de-orbit the PSLV debris to a very low orbit.
summary: Todayś world of spaceś primary concern is the uncontrolled growth of space debris and its probability of collision with spacecraft, particularly in the low earth orbit (LEO) regions. This paper is aimed to design an optimized micro-propulsion system, Cold Gas Thruster, to de-orbit the PSLV debris from 668km to 250 km height after capturing process. The propulsion system mainly consists of a storage tank, pipes, control valves, and a convergent-divergent nozzle. The paper gives an idea of the design of each component based on a continuous iterative process until the design thrust requirements are met. All the components are designed in the CATIA V5, and the structural analysis is done in the ANSYS tool for each component where our cylinder tank can withstand the high hoop stress generated on its wall of it. And flow analysis is done by using the K-$ε$ turbulence model for the CD nozzle, which provides the required thrust to de-orbit PSLV from a higher orbit to a lower orbit, after which the air drag will be enough to bring back to earthś atmosphere and burn it. Hohmannś orbit transfer method has been used to de-orbit the PSLV space debris, and it has been simulated by STK tools. And the result shows that our optimized designed thruster generates enough thrust to de-orbit the PSLV debris to a very low orbit.
abstract_zh: 当今太空世界主要关注的是空间碎片不受控制的增长及其与航天器碰撞的可能性，特别是在低地球轨道（LEO）区域。本文旨在设计一种优化的微推进系统——冷气体推进器，在捕获过程后将 PSLV 碎片从 668 公里高度脱轨到 250 公里高度。推进系统主要由储罐、管道、控制阀、扩径喷嘴等组成。论文给出了基于连续迭代过程直到满足设计推力要求的每个组件的设计思路。所有组件均在 CATIA V5 中设计，并在 ANSYS 工具中对每个组件进行结构分析，其中我们的气缸罐可以承受其壁上产生的高环向应力。 CD喷嘴采用K-$ε$湍流模型进行流动分析，该模型提供了PSLV从较高轨道脱轨到较低轨道所需的推力，之后空气阻力足以将其带回地球大气层并燃烧。 Hohmannś轨道转移方法已被用于使PSLV空间碎片脱离轨道，并通过STK工具进行了模拟。结果表明，我们优化设计的推进器产生足够的推力，使 PSLV 碎片脱离轨道到非常低的轨道。

AI.tldr: 设计并分析冷气推进器以将PSLV残骸从668公里轨道降低至250公里高度，实现可控脱轨。
AI.motivation: 当前低地球轨道空间碎片激增，存在与航天器碰撞的高风险，需开发有效脱轨技术以降低风险。
AI.method: 基于迭代设计流程，采用CATIA V5完成推进器结构设计，通过ANSYS进行结构强度分析，利用K-ε湍流模型分析收敛-发散喷嘴流场，并结合霍曼轨道转移理论与STK工具进行脱轨模拟。
AI.result: 优化后的冷气推进器可产生足够推力将PSLV残骸降至250公里轨道，后续依赖大气阻力实现再入燃烧。
AI.conclusion: 所设计推进器满足脱轨推力需求，为轨道碎片主动移除提供了可行的工程方案。

search_text: Design and Analysis of Cold Gas Thruster to De-Orbit the PSLV Debris PSLV碎片离轨冷气体推进器的设计与分析 Todayś world of spaceś primary concern is the uncontrolled growth of space debris and its probability of collision with spacecraft, particularly in the low earth orbit (LEO) regions. This paper is aimed to design an optimized micro-propulsion system, Cold Gas Thruster, to de-orbit the PSLV debris from 668km to 250 km height after capturing process. The propulsion system mainly consists of a storage tank, pipes, control valves, and a convergent-divergent nozzle. The paper gives an idea of the design of each component based on a continuous iterative process until the design thrust requirements are met. All the components are designed in the CATIA V5, and the structural analysis is done in the ANSYS tool for each component where our cylinder tank can withstand the high hoop stress generated on its wall of it. And flow analysis is done by using the K-$ε$ turbulence model for the CD nozzle, which provides the required thrust to de-orbit PSLV from a higher orbit to a lower orbit, after which the air drag will be enough to bring back to earthś atmosphere and burn it. Hohmannś orbit transfer method has been used to de-orbit the PSLV space debris, and it has been simulated by STK tools. And the result shows that our optimized designed thruster generates enough thrust to de-orbit the PSLV debris to a very low orbit. 当今太空世界主要关注的是空间碎片不受控制的增长及其与航天器碰撞的可能性，特别是在低地球轨道（LEO）区域。本文旨在设计一种优化的微推进系统——冷气体推进器，在捕获过程后将 PSLV 碎片从 668 公里高度脱轨到 250 公里高度。推进系统主要由储罐、管道、控制阀、扩径喷嘴等组成。论文给出了基于连续迭代过程直到满足设计推力要求的每个组件的设计思路。所有组件均在 CATIA V5 中设计，并在 ANSYS 工具中对每个组件进行结构分析，其中我们的气缸罐可以承受其壁上产生的高环向应力。 CD喷嘴采用K-$ε$湍流模型进行流动分析，该模型提供了PSLV从较高轨道脱轨到较低轨道所需的推力，之后空气阻力足以将其带回地球大气层并燃烧。 Hohmannś轨道转移方法已被用于使PSLV空间碎片脱离轨道，并通过STK工具进行了模拟。结果表明，我们优化设计的推进器产生足够的推力，使 PSLV 碎片脱离轨道到非常低的轨道。 设计并分析冷气推进器以将PSLV残骸从668公里轨道降低至250公里高度，实现可控脱轨。 Roshan Sah,Raunak Srivastava,Kaushik Das cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Arjun Ashok,K J Joseph,Vineeth Balasubramanian
title: Class-Incremental Learning with Cross-Space Clustering and Controlled Transfer
title_zh: 具有跨空间聚类和受控迁移的类增量学习
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022; Project Page at http://cscct.github.io/
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022; Project Page at http://cscct.github.io/
abstract: In class-incremental learning, the model is expected to learn new classes continually while maintaining knowledge on previous classes. The challenge here lies in preserving the model's ability to effectively represent prior classes in the feature space, while adapting it to represent incoming new classes. We propose two distillation-based objectives for class incremental learning that leverage the structure of the feature space to maintain accuracy on previous classes, as well as enable learning the new classes. In our first objective, termed cross-space clustering (CSC), we propose to use the feature space structure of the previous model to characterize directions of optimization that maximally preserve the class: directions that all instances of a specific class should collectively optimize towards, and those that they should collectively optimize away from. Apart from minimizing forgetting, this indirectly encourages the model to cluster all instances of a class in the current feature space, and gives rise to a sense of herd-immunity, allowing all samples of a class to jointly combat the model from forgetting the class. Our second objective termed controlled transfer (CT) tackles incremental learning from an understudied perspective of inter-class transfer. CT explicitly approximates and conditions the current model on the semantic similarities between incrementally arriving classes and prior classes. This allows the model to learn classes in such a way that it maximizes positive forward transfer from similar prior classes, thus increasing plasticity, and minimizes negative backward transfer on dissimilar prior classes, whereby strengthening stability. We perform extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets, adding our method (CSCCT) on top of three prominent class-incremental learning methods. We observe consistent performance improvement on a variety of experimental settings.
summary: In class-incremental learning, the model is expected to learn new classes continually while maintaining knowledge on previous classes. The challenge here lies in preserving the model's ability to effectively represent prior classes in the feature space, while adapting it to represent incoming new classes. We propose two distillation-based objectives for class incremental learning that leverage the structure of the feature space to maintain accuracy on previous classes, as well as enable learning the new classes. In our first objective, termed cross-space clustering (CSC), we propose to use the feature space structure of the previous model to characterize directions of optimization that maximally preserve the class: directions that all instances of a specific class should collectively optimize towards, and those that they should collectively optimize away from. Apart from minimizing forgetting, this indirectly encourages the model to cluster all instances of a class in the current feature space, and gives rise to a sense of herd-immunity, allowing all samples of a class to jointly combat the model from forgetting the class. Our second objective termed controlled transfer (CT) tackles incremental learning from an understudied perspective of inter-class transfer. CT explicitly approximates and conditions the current model on the semantic similarities between incrementally arriving classes and prior classes. This allows the model to learn classes in such a way that it maximizes positive forward transfer from similar prior classes, thus increasing plasticity, and minimizes negative backward transfer on dissimilar prior classes, whereby strengthening stability. We perform extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets, adding our method (CSCCT) on top of three prominent class-incremental learning methods. We observe consistent performance improvement on a variety of experimental settings.
abstract_zh: 在课堂增量学习中，模型预计会不断学习新课程，同时保留先前课程的知识。这里的挑战在于保持模型有效表示特征空间中先前类的能力，同时适应它来表示传入的新类。我们为类增量学习提出了两个基于蒸馏的目标，它们利用特征空间的结构来保持先前类的准确性，并能够学习新类。在我们的第一个目标中，称为跨空间聚类（CSC），我们建议使用先前模型的特征空间结构来表征最大限度地保留类的优化方向：特定类的所有实例应共同优化的方向，以及它们应共同优化的方向。除了最大限度地减少遗忘之外，这还间接鼓励模型在当前特征空间中对某个类的所有实例进行聚类，并产生群体免疫感，允许某个类的所有样本共同对抗模型忘记该类。我们的第二个目标称为受控迁移（CT），从未充分研究的类间迁移的角度来解决增量学习问题。 CT 根据增量到达的类和先前类之间的语义相似性显式地近似和条件化当前模型。这使得模型能够以这样的方式学习类：最大化来自相似先前类的正向前迁移，从而增加可塑性，并最小化不同相似先前类的负向后迁移，从而增强稳定性。我们在两个基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验，在三种著名的类增量学习方法之上添加了我们的方法（CSCCT）。我们在各种实验设置中观察到一致的性能改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合跨空间聚类（CSC）和受控迁移（CT）的增量学习方法，旨在解决模型在持续学习新类别时遗忘旧类别的问题。
AI.motivation: 在增量学习中，模型需在学习新类别时保持对旧类别的识别能力，但传统方法易因特征空间干扰导致遗忘。本文希望通过利用特征空间结构设计新目标函数，提升模型稳定性与适应性。
AI.method: 提出两种基于知识蒸馏的目标：CSC通过聚类当前特征空间中同类样本的方向，增强类内一致性；CT通过语义相似性约束，促进相似类别的正向迁移并抑制不相关类别的负向干扰。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上，CSCCT方法在多种实验设置中均优于三种主流增量学习方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CSC与CT的结合有效平衡了模型的稳定性（保留旧知识）与可塑性（学习新知识），为增量学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tejan Karmali,Rishubh Parihar,Susmit Agrawal,Harsh Rangwani,Varun Jampani,Maneesh Singh,R. Venkatesh Babu
title: Hierarchical Semantic Regularization of Latent Spaces in StyleGANs
title_zh: StyleGAN 中潜在空间的分层语义正则化
abstract: Progress in GANs has enabled the generation of high-resolution photorealistic images of astonishing quality. StyleGANs allow for compelling attribute modification on such images via mathematical operations on the latent style vectors in the W/W+ space that effectively modulate the rich hierarchical representations of the generator. Such operations have recently been generalized beyond mere attribute swapping in the original StyleGAN paper to include interpolations. In spite of many significant improvements in StyleGANs, they are still seen to generate unnatural images. The quality of the generated images is predicated on two assumptions; (a) The richness of the hierarchical representations learnt by the generator, and, (b) The linearity and smoothness of the style spaces. In this work, we propose a Hierarchical Semantic Regularizer (HSR) which aligns the hierarchical representations learnt by the generator to corresponding powerful features learnt by pretrained networks on large amounts of data. HSR is shown to not only improve generator representations but also the linearity and smoothness of the latent style spaces, leading to the generation of more natural-looking style-edited images. To demonstrate improved linearity, we propose a novel metric - Attribute Linearity Score (ALS). A significant reduction in the generation of unnatural images is corroborated by improvement in the Perceptual Path Length (PPL) metric by 16.19% averaged across different standard datasets while simultaneously improving the linearity of attribute-change in the attribute editing tasks.
summary: Progress in GANs has enabled the generation of high-resolution photorealistic images of astonishing quality. StyleGANs allow for compelling attribute modification on such images via mathematical operations on the latent style vectors in the W/W+ space that effectively modulate the rich hierarchical representations of the generator. Such operations have recently been generalized beyond mere attribute swapping in the original StyleGAN paper to include interpolations. In spite of many significant improvements in StyleGANs, they are still seen to generate unnatural images. The quality of the generated images is predicated on two assumptions; (a) The richness of the hierarchical representations learnt by the generator, and, (b) The linearity and smoothness of the style spaces. In this work, we propose a Hierarchical Semantic Regularizer (HSR) which aligns the hierarchical representations learnt by the generator to corresponding powerful features learnt by pretrained networks on large amounts of data. HSR is shown to not only improve generator representations but also the linearity and smoothness of the latent style spaces, leading to the generation of more natural-looking style-edited images. To demonstrate improved linearity, we propose a novel metric - Attribute Linearity Score (ALS). A significant reduction in the generation of unnatural images is corroborated by improvement in the Perceptual Path Length (PPL) metric by 16.19% averaged across different standard datasets while simultaneously improving the linearity of attribute-change in the attribute editing tasks.
abstract_zh: GAN 的进步使得能够生成质量惊人的高分辨率真实感图像。 StyleGAN 允许通过对 W/W+ 空间中的潜在风格向量进行数学运算，对此类图像进行引人注目的属性修改，从而有效地调制生成器的丰富层次表示。此类操作最近已被推广到原始 StyleGAN 论文中的单纯属性交换之外，还包括插值。尽管 StyleGAN 取得了许多重大改进，但它们仍然会生成不自然的图像。生成图像的质量基于两个假设： (a) 生成器学习的层次表示的丰富性，以及 (b) 样式空间的线性度和平滑度。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种分层语义正则化器（HSR），它将生成器学习到的分层表示与预训练网络在大量数据上学习到的相应强大特征对齐。 HSR 不仅可以改善生成器表示，还可以改善潜在风格空间的线性度和平滑度，从而生成看起来更自然的风格编辑图像。为了证明改进的线性度，我们提出了一种新的指标 - 属性线性度得分（ALS）。不同标准数据集的感知路径长度 (PPL) 指标平均提高了 16.19%，同时提高了属性编辑任务中属性更改的线性度，这证实了非自然图像生成的显着减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层语义正则化方法（HSR），通过将StyleGAN生成器的分层表示与预训练网络的特征对齐，提升生成图像质量和风格编辑效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管StyleGAN在图像生成方面取得进展，但生成的图像仍存在不自然的问题，主要受限于生成器分层表示的丰富性及风格空间的线性和平滑性不足。
AI.method: 设计分层语义正则化（HSR）框架，利用预训练网络的强特征对齐生成器的分层表示，并提出属性线性度评分（ALS）指标评估风格空间线性性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，生成图像的感知路径长度（PPL）指标平均提升16.19%，同时显著改善属性编辑任务中属性变化的线性度。
AI.conclusion: HSR通过增强生成器表示并优化风格空间特性，有效提升了StyleGAN生成图像的自然度与风格编辑质量。

search_text: Hierarchical Semantic Regularization of Latent Spaces in StyleGANs StyleGAN 中潜在空间的分层语义正则化 Progress in GANs has enabled the generation of high-resolution photorealistic images of astonishing quality. StyleGANs allow for compelling attribute modification on such images via mathematical operations on the latent style vectors in the W/W+ space that effectively modulate the rich hierarchical representations of the generator. Such operations have recently been generalized beyond mere attribute swapping in the original StyleGAN paper to include interpolations. In spite of many significant improvements in StyleGANs, they are still seen to generate unnatural images. The quality of the generated images is predicated on two assumptions; (a) The richness of the hierarchical representations learnt by the generator, and, (b) The linearity and smoothness of the style spaces. In this work, we propose a Hierarchical Semantic Regularizer (HSR) which aligns the hierarchical representations learnt by the generator to corresponding powerful features learnt by pretrained networks on large amounts of data. HSR is shown to not only improve generator representations but also the linearity and smoothness of the latent style spaces, leading to the generation of more natural-looking style-edited images. To demonstrate improved linearity, we propose a novel metric - Attribute Linearity Score (ALS). A significant reduction in the generation of unnatural images is corroborated by improvement in the Perceptual Path Length (PPL) metric by 16.19% averaged across different standard datasets while simultaneously improving the linearity of attribute-change in the attribute editing tasks. Venkatesh Babu cs.CV

authors_text: Lin Li,Long Chen,Hanrong Shi,Wenxiao Wang,Jian Shao,Yi Yang,Jun Xiao
title: Label Semantic Knowledge Distillation for Unbiased Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 用于无偏场景图生成的标签语义知识蒸馏
abstract: The Scene Graph Generation (SGG) task aims to detect all the objects and their pairwise visual relationships in a given image. Although SGG has achieved remarkable progress over the last few years, almost all existing SGG models follow the same training paradigm: they treat both object and predicate classification in SGG as a single-label classification problem, and the ground-truths are one-hot target labels. However, this prevalent training paradigm has overlooked two characteristics of current SGG datasets: 1) For positive samples, some specific subject-object instances may have multiple reasonable predicates. 2) For negative samples, there are numerous missing annotations. Regardless of the two characteristics, SGG models are easy to be confused and make wrong predictions. To this end, we propose a novel model-agnostic Label Semantic Knowledge Distillation (LS-KD) for unbiased SGG. Specifically, LS-KD dynamically generates a soft label for each subject-object instance by fusing a predicted Label Semantic Distribution (LSD) with its original one-hot target label. LSD reflects the correlations between this instance and multiple predicate categories. Meanwhile, we propose two different strategies to predict LSD: iterative self-KD and synchronous self-KD. Extensive ablations and results on three SGG tasks have attested to the superiority and generality of our proposed LS-KD, which can consistently achieve decent trade-off performance between different predicate categories.
summary: The Scene Graph Generation (SGG) task aims to detect all the objects and their pairwise visual relationships in a given image. Although SGG has achieved remarkable progress over the last few years, almost all existing SGG models follow the same training paradigm: they treat both object and predicate classification in SGG as a single-label classification problem, and the ground-truths are one-hot target labels. However, this prevalent training paradigm has overlooked two characteristics of current SGG datasets: 1) For positive samples, some specific subject-object instances may have multiple reasonable predicates. 2) For negative samples, there are numerous missing annotations. Regardless of the two characteristics, SGG models are easy to be confused and make wrong predictions. To this end, we propose a novel model-agnostic Label Semantic Knowledge Distillation (LS-KD) for unbiased SGG. Specifically, LS-KD dynamically generates a soft label for each subject-object instance by fusing a predicted Label Semantic Distribution (LSD) with its original one-hot target label. LSD reflects the correlations between this instance and multiple predicate categories. Meanwhile, we propose two different strategies to predict LSD: iterative self-KD and synchronous self-KD. Extensive ablations and results on three SGG tasks have attested to the superiority and generality of our proposed LS-KD, which can consistently achieve decent trade-off performance between different predicate categories.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成（SGG）任务旨在检测给定图像中的所有对象及其成对视觉关系。尽管 SGG 在过去几年中取得了显着的进步，但几乎所有现有的 SGG 模型都遵循相同的训练范式：它们将 SGG 中的对象和谓词分类视为单标签分类问题，而真实情况是单热门目标标签。然而，这种流行的训练范式忽略了当前SGG数据集的两个特征：1）对于正样本，一些特定的主客体实例可能有多个合理的谓词。 2）对于负样本，存在大量缺失的注释。无论这两个特征如何，SGG 模型都很容易被混淆并做出错误的预测。为此，我们为无偏 SGG 提出了一种新颖的与模型无关的标签语义知识蒸馏（LS-KD）。具体来说，LS-KD 通过将预测的标签语义分布 (LSD) 与其原始的单热目标标签融合，为每个主客体实例动态生成一个软标签。 LSD反映了该实例与多个谓词类别之间的相关性。同时，我们提出了两种不同的LSD预测策略：迭代self-KD和同步self-KD。三个 SGG 任务的广泛消融和结果证明了我们提出的 LS-KD 的优越性和通用性，它可以在不同谓词类别之间始终实现良好的权衡性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无偏场景图生成方法，通过标签语义知识蒸馏解决现有模型在谓词分类中的偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SGG模型将谓词分类视为单标签问题，忽略数据集中正样本存在多合理谓词、负样本存在标注缺失的特点，导致模型预测混淆。
AI.method: 提出模型无关的标签语义知识蒸馏（LS-KD）方法，通过融合预测的标签语义分布（LSD）与原始标签生成软标签，并设计迭代自蒸馏和同步自蒸馏两种策略。
AI.result: 在三个SGG任务上的实验验证了LS-KD的优越性和通用性，能有效平衡不同谓词类别的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: LS-KD通过建模标签语义关联性，有效缓解了SGG中的预测偏差问题，为无偏场景图生成提供了新思路。

Extensive ablations and results on three SGG tasks have attested to the superiority and generality of our proposed LS-KD, which can consistently achieve decent trade-off performance between different predicate categories. 场景图生成（SGG）任务旨在检测给定图像中的所有对象及其成对视觉关系。尽管 SGG 在过去几年中取得了显着的进步，但几乎所有现有的 SGG 模型都遵循相同的训练范式：它们将 SGG 中的对象和谓词分类视为单标签分类问题，而真实情况是单热门目标标签。然而，这种流行的训练范式忽略了当前SGG数据集的两个特征：1）对于正样本，一些特定的主客体实例可能有多个合理的谓词。 2）对于负样本，存在大量缺失的注释。无论这两个特征如何，SGG 模型都很容易被混淆并做出错误的预测。为此，我们为无偏 SGG 提出了一种新颖的与模型无关的标签语义知识蒸馏（LS-KD）。具体来说，LS-KD 通过将预测的标签语义分布 (LSD) 与其原始的单热目标标签融合，为每个主客体实例动态生成一个软标签。 LSD反映了该实例与多个谓词类别之间的相关性。同时，我们提出了两种不同的LSD预测策略：迭代self-KD和同步self-KD。三个 SGG 任务的广泛消融和结果证明了我们提出的 LS-KD 的优越性和通用性，它可以在不同谓词类别之间始终实现良好的权衡性能。 本文提出一种无偏场景图生成方法，通过标签语义知识蒸馏解决现有模型在谓词分类中的偏差问题。 Lin Li,Long Chen,Hanrong Shi,Wenxiao Wang,Jian Shao,Yi Yang,Jun Xiao cs.CV

authors_text: Huairui Wang,Zhenzhong Chen
title: Exploring Long- and Short-Range Temporal Information for Learned Video Compression
title_zh: 探索学习视频压缩的长程和短程时间信息
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.04589
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2207.04589
abstract: Learned video compression methods have gained a variety of interest in the video coding community since they have matched or even exceeded the rate-distortion (RD) performance of traditional video codecs. However, many current learning-based methods are dedicated to utilizing short-range temporal information, thus limiting their performance. In this paper, we focus on exploiting the unique characteristics of video content and further exploring temporal information to enhance compression performance. Specifically, for long-range temporal information exploitation, we propose temporal prior that can update continuously within the group of pictures (GOP) during inference. In that case temporal prior contains valuable temporal information of all decoded images within the current GOP. As for short-range temporal information, we propose a progressive guided motion compensation to achieve robust and effective compensation. In detail, we design a hierarchical structure to achieve multi-scale compensation. More importantly, we use optical flow guidance to generate pixel offsets between feature maps at each scale, and the compensation results at each scale will be used to guide the following scale's compensation. Sufficient experimental results demonstrate that our method can obtain better RD performance than state-of-the-art video compression approaches. The code is publicly available on: https://github.com/Huairui/LSTVC.
summary: Learned video compression methods have gained a variety of interest in the video coding community since they have matched or even exceeded the rate-distortion (RD) performance of traditional video codecs. However, many current learning-based methods are dedicated to utilizing short-range temporal information, thus limiting their performance. In this paper, we focus on exploiting the unique characteristics of video content and further exploring temporal information to enhance compression performance. Specifically, for long-range temporal information exploitation, we propose temporal prior that can update continuously within the group of pictures (GOP) during inference. In that case temporal prior contains valuable temporal information of all decoded images within the current GOP. As for short-range temporal information, we propose a progressive guided motion compensation to achieve robust and effective compensation. In detail, we design a hierarchical structure to achieve multi-scale compensation. More importantly, we use optical flow guidance to generate pixel offsets between feature maps at each scale, and the compensation results at each scale will be used to guide the following scale's compensation. Sufficient experimental results demonstrate that our method can obtain better RD performance than state-of-the-art video compression approaches. The code is publicly available on: https://github.com/Huairui/LSTVC.
abstract_zh: 学习的视频压缩方法在视频编码社区中引起了广泛的兴趣，因为它们已经匹配甚至超过了传统视频编解码器的率失真（RD）性能。然而，当前许多基于学习的方法致力于利用短程时间信息，从而限制了它们的性能。在本文中，我们专注于利用视频内容的独特特征，并进一步探索时间信息以增强压缩性能。具体来说，对于远程时间信息利用，我们提出了可以在推理过程中在图片组（GOP）内连续更新的时间先验。在这种情况下，时间先验包含当前 GOP 内所有解码图像的有价值的时间信息。对于短程时间信息，我们提出了一种渐进引导运动补偿，以实现鲁棒且有效的补偿。具体来说，我们设计了一个层次结构来实现多尺度补偿。更重要的是，我们使用光流引导来生成每个尺度的特征图之间的像素偏移，每个尺度的补偿结果将用于指导后续尺度的补偿。足够的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以获得比最先进的视频压缩方法更好的 RD 性能。该代码公开于：https://github.com/Huairui/LSTVC。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过探索长时和短时时间信息，提升学习型视频压缩的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有学习型视频压缩方法主要利用短时时间信息，限制了压缩效果，因此需要更全面地利用视频内容的时间特性。
AI.method: 提出动态更新的长时时间先验机制以捕捉GOP内全局信息，并设计分层结构与光流引导的多尺度渐进运动补偿以增强短时信息利用。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在率失真性能上优于现有最先进视频压缩方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模长时与短时时间信息，可有效提升学习型视频压缩的性能。

search_text: Exploring Long- and Short-Range Temporal Information for Learned Video Compression 探索学习视频压缩的长程和短程时间信息 Learned video compression methods have gained a variety of interest in the video coding community since they have matched or even exceeded the rate-distortion (RD) performance of traditional video codecs. However, many current learning-based methods are dedicated to utilizing short-range temporal information, thus limiting their performance. In this paper, we focus on exploiting the unique characteristics of video content and further exploring temporal information to enhance compression performance. Specifically, for long-range temporal information exploitation, we propose temporal prior that can update continuously within the group of pictures (GOP) during inference. In that case temporal prior contains valuable temporal information of all decoded images within the current GOP. As for short-range temporal information, we propose a progressive guided motion compensation to achieve robust and effective compensation. In detail, we design a hierarchical structure to achieve multi-scale compensation. More importantly, we use optical flow guidance to generate pixel offsets between feature maps at each scale, and the compensation results at each scale will be used to guide the following scale's compensation. Sufficient experimental results demonstrate that our method can obtain better RD performance than state-of-the-art video compression approaches. The code is publicly available on: https://github.com/Huairui/LSTVC. 学习的视频压缩方法在视频编码社区中引起了广泛的兴趣，因为它们已经匹配甚至超过了传统视频编解码器的率失真（RD）性能。然而，当前许多基于学习的方法致力于利用短程时间信息，从而限制了它们的性能。在本文中，我们专注于利用视频内容的独特特征，并进一步探索时间信息以增强压缩性能。具体来说，对于远程时间信息利用，我们提出了可以在推理过程中在图片组（GOP）内连续更新的时间先验。在这种情况下，时间先验包含当前 GOP 内所有解码图像的有价值的时间信息。对于短程时间信息，我们提出了一种渐进引导运动补偿，以实现鲁棒且有效的补偿。具体来说，我们设计了一个层次结构来实现多尺度补偿。更重要的是，我们使用光流引导来生成每个尺度的特征图之间的像素偏移，每个尺度的补偿结果将用于指导后续尺度的补偿。足够的实验结果表明，我们的方法可以获得比最先进的视频压缩方法更好的 RD 性能。该代码公开于：https://github.com/Huairui/LSTVC。 本文旨在通过探索长时和短时时间信息，提升学习型视频压缩的性能。 Huairui Wang,Zhenzhong Chen eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Arjun Ashok,Chaitanya Devaguptapu,Vineeth Balasubramanian
title: Learning Modular Structures That Generalize Out-of-Distribution
title_zh: 学习概括分布外的模块化结构
comment: Accepted at AAAI 2022 Student Abstract and Poster Program
comments: Accepted at AAAI 2022 Student Abstract and Poster Program
abstract: Out-of-distribution (O.O.D.) generalization remains to be a key challenge for real-world machine learning systems. We describe a method for O.O.D. generalization that, through training, encourages models to only preserve features in the network that are well reused across multiple training domains. Our method combines two complementary neuron-level regularizers with a probabilistic differentiable binary mask over the network, to extract a modular sub-network that achieves better O.O.D. performance than the original network. Preliminary evaluation on two benchmark datasets corroborates the promise of our method.
summary: Out-of-distribution (O.O.D.) generalization remains to be a key challenge for real-world machine learning systems. We describe a method for O.O.D. generalization that, through training, encourages models to only preserve features in the network that are well reused across multiple training domains. Our method combines two complementary neuron-level regularizers with a probabilistic differentiable binary mask over the network, to extract a modular sub-network that achieves better O.O.D. performance than the original network. Preliminary evaluation on two benchmark datasets corroborates the promise of our method.
abstract_zh: 分布外（O.O.D.）泛化仍然是现实世界机器学习系统的一个关键挑战。我们描述了一种 O.O.D 方法。泛化，通过训练，鼓励模型只保留网络中可以在多个训练领域重用的特征。我们的方法将两个互补的神经元级正则化器与网络上的概率可微二元掩码相结合，以提取实现更好 O.O.D 的模块化子网络。性能优于原网络。对两个基准数据集的初步评估证实了我们方法的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过模块化结构提升分布外泛化能力的方法。
AI.motivation: 分布外泛化是现实世界机器学习系统的关键挑战，现有模型难以有效复用跨域特征。
AI.method: 结合两种神经元级正则化器与概率可微二进制掩码，提取模块化子网络以保留跨域复用特征。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上的初步实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为提升分布外泛化提供了新思路，但需更多实验验证其普适性。

authors_text: Yunpeng Bai,Chao Dong,Cairong Wang
title: PS-NeRV: Patch-wise Stylized Neural Representations for Videos
title_zh: PS-NeRV：视频的分片风格化神经表示
abstract: We study how to represent a video with implicit neural representations (INRs). Classical INRs methods generally utilize MLPs to map input coordinates to output pixels. While some recent works have tried to directly reconstruct the whole image with CNNs. However, we argue that both the above pixel-wise and image-wise strategies are not favorable to video data. Instead, we propose a patch-wise solution, PS-NeRV, which represents videos as a function of patches and the corresponding patch coordinate. It naturally inherits the advantages of image-wise methods, and achieves excellent reconstruction performance with fast decoding speed. The whole method includes conventional modules, like positional embedding, MLPs and CNNs, while also introduces AdaIN to enhance intermediate features. These simple yet essential changes could help the network easily fit high-frequency details. Extensive experiments have demonstrated its effectiveness in several video-related tasks, such as video compression and video inpainting.
summary: We study how to represent a video with implicit neural representations (INRs). Classical INRs methods generally utilize MLPs to map input coordinates to output pixels. While some recent works have tried to directly reconstruct the whole image with CNNs. However, we argue that both the above pixel-wise and image-wise strategies are not favorable to video data. Instead, we propose a patch-wise solution, PS-NeRV, which represents videos as a function of patches and the corresponding patch coordinate. It naturally inherits the advantages of image-wise methods, and achieves excellent reconstruction performance with fast decoding speed. The whole method includes conventional modules, like positional embedding, MLPs and CNNs, while also introduces AdaIN to enhance intermediate features. These simple yet essential changes could help the network easily fit high-frequency details. Extensive experiments have demonstrated its effectiveness in several video-related tasks, such as video compression and video inpainting.
abstract_zh: 我们研究如何用隐式神经表征（INR）来表征视频。经典的 INR 方法通常利用 MLP 将输入坐标映射到输出像素。而最近的一些工作尝试用 CNN 直接重建整个图像。然而，我们认为上述像素级和图像级策略都不利于视频数据。相反，我们提出了一种基于补丁的解决方案 PS-NeRV，它将视频表示为补丁和相应补丁坐标的函数。它自然地继承了image-wise方法的优点，并以快速的解码速度实现了优异的重建性能。整个方法包括传统的模块，如位置嵌入、MLP 和 CNN，同时还引入了 AdaIN 来增强中间特征。这些简单但重要的改变可以帮助网络轻松适应高频细节。大量的实验证明了它在视频压缩和视频修复等多个视频相关任务中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分块的神经表示方法PS-NeRV，用于更高效地表示和重建视频内容。
AI.motivation: 传统像素级和图像级神经表示方法在处理视频时存在重建性能与解码速度的局限性，难以有效捕捉视频动态细节。
AI.method: 通过将视频分解为分块表示，结合位置嵌入、MLP/CNN结构及AdaIN模块，提升高频细节拟合能力并保持快速解码。
AI.result: 在视频压缩和修复等任务中验证了方法的有效性，实现了高质量重建与加速解码的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 分块策略有效继承了图像级方法优势，通过模块化改进显著提升了视频神经表示的性能与实用性。

authors_text: Satheesh K. Perepu,Jean P. Martins,Ricardo Souza S,Kaushik Dey
title: Multi-agent reinforcement learning for intent-based service assurance in cellular networks
title_zh: 蜂窝网络中基于意图的服务保证的多代理强化学习
abstract: Recently, intent-based management has received good attention in telecom networks owing to stringent performance requirements for many of the use cases. Several approaches in the literature employ traditional closed-loop driven methods to fulfill the intents on the KPIs. However, these methods consider every closed-loop independent of each other which degrades the combined performance. Also, such existing methods are not easily scalable. Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) techniques have shown significant promise in many areas in which traditional closed-loop control falls short, typically for complex coordination and conflict management among loops. In this work, we propose a method based on MARL to achieve intent-based management without the need for knowing a model of the underlying system. Moreover, when there are conflicting intents, the MARL agents can implicitly incentivize the loops to cooperate and promote trade-offs, without human interaction, by prioritizing the important KPIs. Experiments have been performed on a network emulator for optimizing KPIs of three services. Results obtained demonstrate that the proposed system performs quite well and is able to fulfill all existing intents when there are enough resources or prioritize the KPIs when resources are scarce.
summary: Recently, intent-based management has received good attention in telecom networks owing to stringent performance requirements for many of the use cases. Several approaches in the literature employ traditional closed-loop driven methods to fulfill the intents on the KPIs. However, these methods consider every closed-loop independent of each other which degrades the combined performance. Also, such existing methods are not easily scalable. Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) techniques have shown significant promise in many areas in which traditional closed-loop control falls short, typically for complex coordination and conflict management among loops. In this work, we propose a method based on MARL to achieve intent-based management without the need for knowing a model of the underlying system. Moreover, when there are conflicting intents, the MARL agents can implicitly incentivize the loops to cooperate and promote trade-offs, without human interaction, by prioritizing the important KPIs. Experiments have been performed on a network emulator for optimizing KPIs of three services. Results obtained demonstrate that the proposed system performs quite well and is able to fulfill all existing intents when there are enough resources or prioritize the KPIs when resources are scarce.
abstract_zh: 最近，由于许多用例的严格性能要求，基于意图的管理在电信网络中受到了广泛关注。文献中的几种方法采用传统的闭环驱动方法来实现 KPI 的意图。然而，这些方法考虑每个闭环彼此独立，这降低了组合性能。此外，此类现有方法不易扩展。多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 技术在传统闭环控制不足的许多领域（通常用于循环之间的复杂协调和冲突管理）显示出巨大的前景。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 MARL 的方法来实现基于意图的管理，而无需了解底层系统的模型。此外，当存在相互冲突的意图时，MARL 代理可以通过优先考虑重要的 KPI，隐式地激励循环进行合作并促进权衡，而无需人工交互。在网络模拟器上进行了实验，以优化三种服务的 KPI。获得的结果表明，所提出的系统性能良好，并且能够在资源充足时实现所有现有意图，或者在资源稀缺时优先考虑 KPI。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于多智能体强化学习（MARL）的方法，用于实现蜂窝网络中意图驱动的服务保障，解决传统闭环控制方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统闭环控制方法在处理多意图时独立运作，导致性能下降且难以扩展，而MARL在复杂协调和冲突管理中表现出潜力。
AI.method: 采用MARL技术，无需系统模型，通过优先级KPI隐式激励智能体协作，解决冲突意图下的资源分配问题。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在资源充足时满足所有服务意图，资源稀缺时有效优先关键KPI，整体性能优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: MARL能有效解决意图管理中的协调与冲突问题，为蜂窝网络服务保障提供可扩展的智能解决方案。

search_text: Multi-agent reinforcement learning for intent-based service assurance in cellular networks 蜂窝网络中基于意图的服务保证的多代理强化学习 Recently, intent-based management has received good attention in telecom networks owing to stringent performance requirements for many of the use cases. Several approaches in the literature employ traditional closed-loop driven methods to fulfill the intents on the KPIs. However, these methods consider every closed-loop independent of each other which degrades the combined performance. Also, such existing methods are not easily scalable. Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) techniques have shown significant promise in many areas in which traditional closed-loop control falls short, typically for complex coordination and conflict management among loops. In this work, we propose a method based on MARL to achieve intent-based management without the need for knowing a model of the underlying system. Moreover, when there are conflicting intents, the MARL agents can implicitly incentivize the loops to cooperate and promote trade-offs, without human interaction, by prioritizing the important KPIs. Experiments have been performed on a network emulator for optimizing KPIs of three services. Results obtained demonstrate that the proposed system performs quite well and is able to fulfill all existing intents when there are enough resources or prioritize the KPIs when resources are scarce. 最近，由于许多用例的严格性能要求，基于意图的管理在电信网络中受到了广泛关注。文献中的几种方法采用传统的闭环驱动方法来实现 KPI 的意图。然而，这些方法考虑每个闭环彼此独立，这降低了组合性能。此外，此类现有方法不易扩展。多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 技术在传统闭环控制不足的许多领域（通常用于循环之间的复杂协调和冲突管理）显示出巨大的前景。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于 MARL 的方法来实现基于意图的管理，而无需了解底层系统的模型。此外，当存在相互冲突的意图时，MARL 代理可以通过优先考虑重要的 KPI，隐式地激励循环进行合作并促进权衡，而无需人工交互。在网络模拟器上进行了实验，以优化三种服务的 KPI。获得的结果表明，所提出的系统性能良好，并且能够在资源充足时实现所有现有意图，或者在资源稀缺时优先考虑 KPI。 本文提出基于多智能体强化学习（MARL）的方法，用于实现蜂窝网络中意图驱动的服务保障，解决传统闭环控制方法的不足。 Satheesh K. Perepu,Jean P. Martins,Ricardo Souza S,Kaushik Dey cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yifu Zhang,Chunyu Wang,Xinggang Wang,Wenjun Zeng,Wenyu Liu
title: Robust Multi-Object Tracking by Marginal Inference
title_zh: 通过边缘推理进行鲁棒多目标跟踪
abstract: Multi-object tracking in videos requires to solve a fundamental problem of one-to-one assignment between objects in adjacent frames. Most methods address the problem by first discarding impossible pairs whose feature distances are larger than a threshold, followed by linking objects using Hungarian algorithm to minimize the overall distance. However, we find that the distribution of the distances computed from Re-ID features may vary significantly for different videos. So there isn't a single optimal threshold which allows us to safely discard impossible pairs. To address the problem, we present an efficient approach to compute a marginal probability for each pair of objects in real time. The marginal probability can be regarded as a normalized distance which is significantly more stable than the original feature distance. As a result, we can use a single threshold for all videos. The approach is general and can be applied to the existing trackers to obtain about one point improvement in terms of IDF1 metric. It achieves competitive results on MOT17 and MOT20 benchmarks. In addition, the computed probability is more interpretable which facilitates subsequent post-processing operations.
summary: Multi-object tracking in videos requires to solve a fundamental problem of one-to-one assignment between objects in adjacent frames. Most methods address the problem by first discarding impossible pairs whose feature distances are larger than a threshold, followed by linking objects using Hungarian algorithm to minimize the overall distance. However, we find that the distribution of the distances computed from Re-ID features may vary significantly for different videos. So there isn't a single optimal threshold which allows us to safely discard impossible pairs. To address the problem, we present an efficient approach to compute a marginal probability for each pair of objects in real time. The marginal probability can be regarded as a normalized distance which is significantly more stable than the original feature distance. As a result, we can use a single threshold for all videos. The approach is general and can be applied to the existing trackers to obtain about one point improvement in terms of IDF1 metric. It achieves competitive results on MOT17 and MOT20 benchmarks. In addition, the computed probability is more interpretable which facilitates subsequent post-processing operations.
abstract_zh: 视频中的多目标跟踪需要解决相邻帧中的目标之间的一对一分配的基本问题。大多数方法通过首先丢弃特征距离大于阈值的不可能对来解决该问题，然后使用匈牙利算法链接对象以最小化总体距离。然而，我们发现对于不同的视频，根据 Re-ID 特征计算的距离分布可能会有很大差异。因此，没有一个最佳阈值可以让我们安全地丢弃不可能的对。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种有效的方法来实时计算每对对象的边际概率。边缘概率可以看作是比原始特征距离更加稳定的归一化距离。因此，我们可以对所有视频使用单一阈值。该方法是通用的，可以应用于现有的跟踪器，以在 IDF1 指标方面获得约 1 点的改进。它在 MOT17 和 MOT20 基准测试中取得了具有竞争力的结果。此外，计算出的概率更易于解释，有利于后续的后处理操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于边缘推断的鲁棒多目标跟踪方法，通过实时计算物体对的边缘概率解决传统阈值法在不同视频中稳定性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标跟踪方法依赖固定阈值筛选不可能配对，但Re-ID特征距离分布随视频变化导致阈值难以统一，影响跟踪鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出实时计算物体对的边缘概率作为归一化距离，该概率通过边际推断获得，具有跨视频稳定性，替代原特征距离进行配对筛选。
AI.result: 方法在MOT17和MOT20基准测试中取得竞争力结果，使现有跟踪器IDF1指标提升约1点，且概率输出增强后处理可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 边缘概率方法解决了传统阈值法的跨视频适应性问题，提供更稳定可靠的配对依据，具有通用性和实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yukio Ohsawa,Kaira Sekiguchi,Tomohide Maekawa,Hiroki Yamaguchi,Son Yeon Hyuk,Sae Kondo
title: Data Leaves: Scenario-oriented Metadata for Data Federative Innovation
title_zh: 数据离开：面向场景的元数据，实现数据联邦创新
abstract: A method for representing the digest information of each dataset is proposed, oriented to the aid of innovative thoughts and the communication of data users who attempt to create valuable products, services, and business models using or combining datasets. Compared with methods for connecting datasets via shared attributes (i.e., variables), this method connects datasets via events, situations, or actions in a scenario that is supposed to be active in the real world. This method reflects the consideration of the fitness of each metadata to the feature concept, which is an abstract of the information or knowledge expected to be acquired from data; thus, the users of the data acquire practical knowledge that fits the requirements of real businesses and real life, as well as grounds for realistic application of AI technologies to data.
summary: A method for representing the digest information of each dataset is proposed, oriented to the aid of innovative thoughts and the communication of data users who attempt to create valuable products, services, and business models using or combining datasets. Compared with methods for connecting datasets via shared attributes (i.e., variables), this method connects datasets via events, situations, or actions in a scenario that is supposed to be active in the real world. This method reflects the consideration of the fitness of each metadata to the feature concept, which is an abstract of the information or knowledge expected to be acquired from data; thus, the users of the data acquire practical knowledge that fits the requirements of real businesses and real life, as well as grounds for realistic application of AI technologies to data.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种表示每个数据集的摘要信息的方法，旨在帮助尝试使用或组合数据集创建有价值的产品、服务和商业模型的数据用户的创新思想和交流。与通过共享属性（即变量）连接数据集的方法相比，该方法通过现实世界中应该活跃的场景中的事件、情况或动作来连接数据集。该方法体现了对每个元数据与特征概念的适合度的考虑，特征概念是期望从数据中获取的信息或知识的抽象；从而，数据的使用者获得了符合实际业务和现实生活需求的实用知识，以及人工智能技术在数据上的实际应用的基础。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于场景的元数据方法，用于数据联邦创新，帮助用户创建有价值的产品和服务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过共享属性连接数据集，难以反映数据在实际业务场景中的适用性，限制了用户获取符合实际需求的知识和AI技术应用。
AI.method: 通过事件、情境或行动等场景元素连接数据集，反映元数据与预期信息特征的适配性，从而提升数据在实际业务中的适用性。
AI.result: 用户能够获取符合实际业务需求的知识，并为AI技术的现实应用提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了数据在实际场景中的适用性，为数据联邦创新提供了新的元数据表示框架。

Compared with methods for connecting datasets via shared attributes (i.e., variables), this method connects datasets via events, situations, or actions in a scenario that is supposed to be active in the real world. This method reflects the consideration of the fitness of each metadata to the feature concept, which is an abstract of the information or knowledge expected to be acquired from data; thus, the users of the data acquire practical knowledge that fits the requirements of real businesses and real life, as well as grounds for realistic application of AI technologies to data. 提出了一种表示每个数据集的摘要信息的方法，旨在帮助尝试使用或组合数据集创建有价值的产品、服务和商业模型的数据用户的创新思想和交流。与通过共享属性（即变量）连接数据集的方法相比，该方法通过现实世界中应该活跃的场景中的事件、情况或动作来连接数据集。该方法体现了对每个元数据与特征概念的适合度的考虑，特征概念是期望从数据中获取的信息或知识的抽象；从而，数据的使用者获得了符合实际业务和现实生活需求的实用知识，以及人工智能技术在数据上的实际应用的基础。 提出一种基于场景的元数据方法，用于数据联邦创新，帮助用户创建有价值的产品和服务。 Yukio Ohsawa,Kaira Sekiguchi,Tomohide Maekawa,Hiroki Yamaguchi,Son Yeon Hyuk,Sae Kondo cs.DB,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhengyang Shen,Tao Hong,Qi She,Jinwen Ma,Zhouchen Lin
title: PDO-s3DCNNs: Partial Differential Operator Based Steerable 3D CNNs
title_zh: PDO-s3DCNN：基于偏微分算子的可操纵 3D CNN
abstract: Steerable models can provide very general and flexible equivariance by formulating equivariance requirements in the language of representation theory and feature fields, which has been recognized to be effective for many vision tasks. However, deriving steerable models for 3D rotations is much more difficult than that in the 2D case, due to more complicated mathematics of 3D rotations. In this work, we employ partial differential operators (PDOs) to model 3D filters, and derive general steerable 3D CNNs, which are called PDO-s3DCNNs. We prove that the equivariant filters are subject to linear constraints, which can be solved efficiently under various conditions. As far as we know, PDO-s3DCNNs are the most general steerable CNNs for 3D rotations, in the sense that they cover all common subgroups of $SO(3)$ and their representations, while existing methods can only be applied to specific groups and representations. Extensive experiments show that our models can preserve equivariance well in the discrete domain, and outperform previous works on SHREC'17 retrieval and ISBI 2012 segmentation tasks with a low network complexity.
summary: Steerable models can provide very general and flexible equivariance by formulating equivariance requirements in the language of representation theory and feature fields, which has been recognized to be effective for many vision tasks. However, deriving steerable models for 3D rotations is much more difficult than that in the 2D case, due to more complicated mathematics of 3D rotations. In this work, we employ partial differential operators (PDOs) to model 3D filters, and derive general steerable 3D CNNs, which are called PDO-s3DCNNs. We prove that the equivariant filters are subject to linear constraints, which can be solved efficiently under various conditions. As far as we know, PDO-s3DCNNs are the most general steerable CNNs for 3D rotations, in the sense that they cover all common subgroups of $SO(3)$ and their representations, while existing methods can only be applied to specific groups and representations. Extensive experiments show that our models can preserve equivariance well in the discrete domain, and outperform previous works on SHREC'17 retrieval and ISBI 2012 segmentation tasks with a low network complexity.
abstract_zh: 可操纵模型可以通过用表示理论和特征域的语言制定等方差要求来提供非常通用和灵活的等方差，这已被认为对许多视觉任务有效。然而，由于 3D 旋转的数学更加复杂，推导 3D 旋转的可操纵模型比 2D 情况要困难得多。在这项工作中，我们采用偏微分算子（PDO）对 3D 滤波器进行建模，并推导出通用的可操纵 3D CNN，称为 PDO-s3DCNN。 We prove that the equivariant filters are subject to linear constraints, which can be solved efficiently under various conditions.据我们所知，PDO-s3DCNN 是最通用的 3D 旋转可操纵 CNN，因为它们涵盖了 $SO(3)$ 的所有常见子组及其表示，而现有方法只能应用于特定的组和表示。大量实验表明，我们的模型可以在离散域中很好地保持等方差，并且在网络复杂度较低的情况下优于之前在 SHREC'17 检索和 ISBI 2012 分割任务上的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于偏微分算子（PDO）的可旋转3D卷积神经网络（PDO-s3DCNNs），以解决3D旋转下的可微分性建模问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D可旋转模型局限于特定旋转子群和表示，难以满足复杂任务需求，且3D旋转数学复杂度高，导致模型设计困难。
AI.method: 通过偏微分算子建模3D滤波器，推导出满足线性约束的等变滤波器，覆盖SO(3)所有常见子群及其表示，并高效求解约束条件。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在离散域中有效保持等变性，在SHREC'17检索和ISBI 2012分割任务中优于现有方法，且网络复杂度更低。
AI.conclusion: PDO-s3DCNNs是当前最通用的3D可旋转CNN，适用于多种旋转子群和表示，为3D视觉任务提供了高效且灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Sarmad N. Mohammed,Semra Gündüç
title: TPM: Transition Probability Matrix -- Graph Structural Feature based Embedding
title_zh: TPM：转移概率矩阵——基于图结构特征的嵌入
abstract: In this work, Transition Probability Matrix (TPM) is proposed as a new method for extracting the features of nodes in the graph. The proposed method uses random walks to capture the connectivity structure of a node's close neighborhood. The information obtained from random walks is converted to anonymous walks to extract the topological features of nodes. In the embedding process of nodes, anonymous walks are used since they capture the topological similarities of connectivities better than random walks. Therefore the obtained embedding vectors have richer information about the underlying connectivity structure. The method is applied to node classification and link prediction tasks. The performance of the proposed algorithm is superior to the state-of-the-art algorithms in the recent literature. Moreover, the extracted information about the connectivity structure of similar networks is used to link prediction and node classification tasks for a completely new graph.
summary: In this work, Transition Probability Matrix (TPM) is proposed as a new method for extracting the features of nodes in the graph. The proposed method uses random walks to capture the connectivity structure of a node's close neighborhood. The information obtained from random walks is converted to anonymous walks to extract the topological features of nodes. In the embedding process of nodes, anonymous walks are used since they capture the topological similarities of connectivities better than random walks. Therefore the obtained embedding vectors have richer information about the underlying connectivity structure. The method is applied to node classification and link prediction tasks. The performance of the proposed algorithm is superior to the state-of-the-art algorithms in the recent literature. Moreover, the extracted information about the connectivity structure of similar networks is used to link prediction and node classification tasks for a completely new graph.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，提出了转移概率矩阵（TPM）作为一种提取图中节点特征的新方法。所提出的方法使用随机游走来捕获节点的近邻的连接结构。将随机游走获得的信息转换为匿名游走以提取节点的拓扑特征。在节点的嵌入过程中，使用匿名游走，因为它们比随机游走更好地捕获连通性的拓扑相似性。因此，获得的嵌入向量具有更丰富的关于底层连接结构的信息。该方法应用于节点分类和链路预测任务。所提出的算法的性能优于最近文献中最先进的算法。此外，提取的有关相似网络连接结构的信息用于链接预测和节点分类任务以形成全新的图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于转移概率矩阵（TPM）的图结构特征嵌入方法，用于节点分类和链接预测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效捕捉节点连接结构的拓扑相似性，需更高效提取图结构特征以提升任务性能。
AI.method: 通过随机游走获取节点邻域连接信息，转化为匿名游走以提取拓扑特征，并利用匿名游走进行节点嵌入。
AI.result: TPM在节点分类和链接预测任务中优于现有算法，且能利用相似网络结构信息处理全新图数据。
AI.conclusion: TPM方法能更丰富地表征连接结构，提升图任务性能，并具备跨网络特征迁移潜力。

authors_text: Sebastian Lutz,Richard Blythman,Koustav Ghosal,Matthew Moynihan,Ciaran Simms,Aljosa Smolic
title: Jointformer: Single-Frame Lifting Transformer with Error Prediction and Refinement for 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: Jointformer：具有误差预测和细化功能的单帧提升变压器，用于 3D 人体姿势估计
abstract: Monocular 3D human pose estimation technologies have the potential to greatly increase the availability of human movement data. The best-performing models for single-image 2D-3D lifting use graph convolutional networks (GCNs) that typically require some manual input to define the relationships between different body joints. We propose a novel transformer-based approach that uses the more generalised self-attention mechanism to learn these relationships within a sequence of tokens representing joints. We find that the use of intermediate supervision, as well as residual connections between the stacked encoders benefits performance. We also suggest that using error prediction as part of a multi-task learning framework improves performance by allowing the network to compensate for its confidence level. We perform extensive ablation studies to show that each of our contributions increases performance. Furthermore, we show that our approach outperforms the recent state of the art for single-frame 3D human pose estimation by a large margin. Our code and trained models are made publicly available on Github.
summary: Monocular 3D human pose estimation technologies have the potential to greatly increase the availability of human movement data. The best-performing models for single-image 2D-3D lifting use graph convolutional networks (GCNs) that typically require some manual input to define the relationships between different body joints. We propose a novel transformer-based approach that uses the more generalised self-attention mechanism to learn these relationships within a sequence of tokens representing joints. We find that the use of intermediate supervision, as well as residual connections between the stacked encoders benefits performance. We also suggest that using error prediction as part of a multi-task learning framework improves performance by allowing the network to compensate for its confidence level. We perform extensive ablation studies to show that each of our contributions increases performance. Furthermore, we show that our approach outperforms the recent state of the art for single-frame 3D human pose estimation by a large margin. Our code and trained models are made publicly available on Github.
abstract_zh: Monocular 3D human pose estimation technologies have the potential to greatly increase the availability of human movement data.单图像 2D-3D 提升的最佳模型使用图卷积网络 (GCN)，该网络通常需要一些手动输入来定义不同身体关节之间的关系。我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新颖方法，该方法使用更通用的自注意力机制来学习代表关节的标记序列中的这些关系。 We find that the use of intermediate supervision, as well as residual connections between the stacked encoders benefits performance.我们还建议使用错误预测作为多任务学习框架的一部分，通过允许网络补偿其置信水平来提高性能。 We perform extensive ablation studies to show that each of our contributions increases performance. Furthermore, we show that our approach outperforms the recent state of the art for single-frame 3D human pose estimation by a large margin.我们的代码和经过训练的模型在 Github 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于Transformer的单帧3D人体姿态估计方法，结合错误预测与优化。
AI.motivation: 现有模型依赖手动定义关节关系，而Transformer的自注意力机制能自动学习这些关系，提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用Transformer自注意力机制学习关节关系，结合中间监督、残差连接及多任务学习中的错误预测模块。
AI.result: 在单帧3D人体姿态估计任务中，该方法显著优于现有最先进模型，并通过消融实验证明各模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法通过Transformer架构和错误预测机制有效提升3D姿态估计性能，代码和模型已开源。
