search_text: Jointformer: Single-Frame Lifting Transformer with Error Prediction and Refinement for 3D Human Pose Estimation Jointformer：具有误差预测和细化功能的单帧提升变压器，用于 3D 人体姿势估计 Monocular 3D human pose estimation technologies have the potential to greatly increase the availability of human movement data. The best-performing models for single-image 2D-3D lifting use graph convolutional networks (GCNs) that typically require some manual input to define the relationships between different body joints. We propose a novel transformer-based approach that uses the more generalised self-attention mechanism to learn these relationships within a sequence of tokens representing joints. We find that the use of intermediate supervision, as well as residual connections between the stacked encoders benefits performance. We also suggest that using error prediction as part of a multi-task learning framework improves performance by allowing the network to compensate for its confidence level. We perform extensive ablation studies to show that each of our contributions increases performance. Furthermore, we show that our approach outperforms the recent state of the art for single-frame 3D human pose estimation by a large margin. Our code and trained models are made publicly available on Github. Monocular 3D human pose estimation technologies have the potential to greatly increase the availability of human movement data.单图像 2D-3D 提升的最佳模型使用图卷积网络 (GCN)，该网络通常需要一些手动输入来定义不同身体关节之间的关系。我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新颖方法，该方法使用更通用的自注意力机制来学习代表关节的标记序列中的这些关系。 We find that the use of intermediate supervision, as well as residual connections between the stacked encoders benefits performance.我们还建议使用错误预测作为多任务学习框架的一部分，通过允许网络补偿其置信水平来提高性能。 We perform extensive ablation studies to show that each of our contributions increases performance. Furthermore, we show that our approach outperforms the recent state of the art for single-frame 3D human pose estimation by a large margin.我们的代码和经过训练的模型在 Github 上公开发布。 提出一种基于Transformer的单帧3D人体姿态估计方法，结合错误预测与优化。 Sebastian Lutz,Richard Blythman,Koustav Ghosal,Matthew Moynihan,Ciaran Simms,Aljosa Smolic cs.CV

authors_text: Andreas Papadimitriou,Hedyeh Jafari,Sina Sharif Mansouri,George Nikolakopoulos
title: Multi-Stage NMPC for a MAV based Collision Free Navigation under Varying Communication Delays
title_zh: 用于不同通信延迟下基于 MAV 的无碰撞导航的多级 NMPC
abstract: Time delays in communication networks are one of the main concerns in deploying robots with computation boards on the edge. This article proposes a multi-stage Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) that is capable of handling varying network-induced time delays for establishing a control framework being able to guarantee collision-free Micro Aerial Vehicles (MAVs) navigation. This study introduces a novel approach that considers different sampling times by a tree of discretization scenarios contrary to the existing typical multi-stage NMPC where system uncertainties are modeled by a tree of scenarios. Additionally, the proposed method considers adaptive weights for the multi-stage NMPC scenarios based on the probability of time delays in the communication link. As a result of the multi-stage NMPC, the obtained optimal control action is valid for multiple sampling times. Finally, the overall effectiveness of the proposed novel control framework is demonstrated in various tests and different simulation environments.
summary: Time delays in communication networks are one of the main concerns in deploying robots with computation boards on the edge. This article proposes a multi-stage Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC) that is capable of handling varying network-induced time delays for establishing a control framework being able to guarantee collision-free Micro Aerial Vehicles (MAVs) navigation. This study introduces a novel approach that considers different sampling times by a tree of discretization scenarios contrary to the existing typical multi-stage NMPC where system uncertainties are modeled by a tree of scenarios. Additionally, the proposed method considers adaptive weights for the multi-stage NMPC scenarios based on the probability of time delays in the communication link. As a result of the multi-stage NMPC, the obtained optimal control action is valid for multiple sampling times. Finally, the overall effectiveness of the proposed novel control framework is demonstrated in various tests and different simulation environments.
abstract_zh: 通信网络中的时间延迟是在边缘部署带有计算板的机器人的主要问题之一。本文提出了一种多级非线性模型预测控制（NMPC），它能够处理不同的网络引起的时间延迟，以建立能够保证无碰撞微型飞行器（MAV）导航的控制框架。本研究引入了一种新颖的方法，该方法通过离散化场景树考虑不同的采样时间，这与现有典型的多阶段 NMPC 不同，其中系统不确定性通过场景树建模。此外，所提出的方法根据通信链路中的时间延迟概率考虑多级 NMPC 场景的自适应权重。由于多级NMPC，所获得的最优控制动作对于多个采样时间都是有效的。最后，所提出的新型控制框架的整体有效性在各种测试和不同的模拟环境中得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）框架，用于在通信延迟变化情况下实现微型飞行器（MAV）的防撞导航。
AI.motivation: 通信网络中的时延是部署边缘计算机器人时的主要挑战，传统方法难以处理动态变化的通信延迟导致的导航安全问题。
AI.method: 通过构建基于离散化场景树的多阶段NMPC，结合通信延迟概率的自适应权重分配，实现多采样时间下的最优控制策略。
AI.result: 仿真测试验证了该框架在不同延迟场景下均能有效保证MAV的碰撞规避能力与导航稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多阶段NMPC方法通过动态场景建模与权重调整，显著提升了通信延迟环境下MAV导航的可靠性与安全性。

authors_text: Shubham Kumar Gupta,Azeem Ahmad,Prakhar Kumar,Frank Melandso,Anowarul Habib
title: Image denoising in acoustic field microscopy
title_zh: 声场显微镜中的图像去噪
abstract: Scanning acoustic microscopy (SAM) has been employed since microscopic images are widely used for biomedical or materials research. Acoustic imaging is an important and well-established method used in nondestructive testing (NDT), bio-medical imaging, and structural health monitoring.The imaging is frequently carried out with signals of low amplitude, which might result in leading that are noisy and lacking in details of image information. In this work, we attempted to analyze SAM images acquired from low amplitude signals and employed a block matching filter over time domain signals to obtain a denoised image. We have compared the images with conventional filters applied over time domain signals, such as the gaussian filter, median filter, wiener filter, and total variation filter. The noted outcomes are shown in this article.
summary: Scanning acoustic microscopy (SAM) has been employed since microscopic images are widely used for biomedical or materials research. Acoustic imaging is an important and well-established method used in nondestructive testing (NDT), bio-medical imaging, and structural health monitoring.The imaging is frequently carried out with signals of low amplitude, which might result in leading that are noisy and lacking in details of image information. In this work, we attempted to analyze SAM images acquired from low amplitude signals and employed a block matching filter over time domain signals to obtain a denoised image. We have compared the images with conventional filters applied over time domain signals, such as the gaussian filter, median filter, wiener filter, and total variation filter. The noted outcomes are shown in this article.
abstract_zh: 由于显微图像广泛用于生物医学或材料研究，因此采用了扫描声学显微镜（SAM）。声学成像是一种重要且成熟的方法，用于无损检测（NDT）、生物医学成像和结构健康监测。成像经常使用低幅度信号进行，这可能会导致图像信息中存在噪声且缺乏细节。在这项工作中，我们尝试分析从低幅度信号获取的 SAM 图像，并在时域信号上使用块匹配滤波器来获得去噪图像。我们将图像与应用于时域信号的传统滤波器（例如高斯滤波器、中值滤波器、维纳滤波器和全变差滤波器）进行了比较。本文显示了所指出的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过块匹配滤波器对低振幅信号下的扫描声学显微镜图像进行去噪处理。
AI.motivation: 低振幅信号导致的声学显微镜图像噪声大且细节缺失，影响生物医学及材料研究的准确性。
AI.method: 采用时间域信号块匹配滤波器，并与高斯滤波器、中值滤波器、维纳滤波器和总变分滤波器进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验结果表明块匹配滤波器在去噪效果上优于传统滤波方法，保留了更多图像细节。
AI.conclusion: 块匹配滤波器为低振幅声学显微镜图像的去噪提供了有效解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Kaifeng Yang,Guozhi Dong,Michael Affenzeller
title: A Parallel Technique for Multi-objective Bayesian Global Optimization: Using a Batch Selection of Probability of Improvement
title_zh: 多目标贝叶斯全局优化的并行技术：使用改进概率的批量选择
abstract: Bayesian global optimization (BGO) is an efficient surrogate-assisted technique for problems involving expensive evaluations. A parallel technique can be used to parallelly evaluate the true-expensive objective functions in one iteration to boost the execution time. An effective and straightforward approach is to design an acquisition function that can evaluate the performance of a bath of multiple solutions, instead of a single point/solution, in one iteration. This paper proposes five alternatives of \emph{Probability of Improvement} (PoI) with multiple points in a batch (q-PoI) for multi-objective Bayesian global optimization (MOBGO), taking the covariance among multiple points into account. Both exact computational formulas and the Monte Carlo approximation algorithms for all proposed q-PoIs are provided. Based on the distribution of the multiple points relevant to the Pareto-front, the position-dependent behavior of the five q-PoIs is investigated. Moreover, the five q-PoIs are compared with the other nine state-of-the-art and recently proposed batch MOBGO algorithms on twenty bio-objective benchmarks. The empirical experiments on different variety of benchmarks are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of two greedy q-PoIs ($\kpoi_{\mbox{best}}$ and $\kpoi_{\mbox{all}}$) on low-dimensional problems and the effectiveness of two explorative q-PoIs ($\kpoi_{\mbox{one}}$ and $\kpoi_{\mbox{worst}}$) on high-dimensional problems with difficult-to-approximate Pareto front boundaries.
summary: Bayesian global optimization (BGO) is an efficient surrogate-assisted technique for problems involving expensive evaluations. A parallel technique can be used to parallelly evaluate the true-expensive objective functions in one iteration to boost the execution time. An effective and straightforward approach is to design an acquisition function that can evaluate the performance of a bath of multiple solutions, instead of a single point/solution, in one iteration. This paper proposes five alternatives of \emph{Probability of Improvement} (PoI) with multiple points in a batch (q-PoI) for multi-objective Bayesian global optimization (MOBGO), taking the covariance among multiple points into account. Both exact computational formulas and the Monte Carlo approximation algorithms for all proposed q-PoIs are provided. Based on the distribution of the multiple points relevant to the Pareto-front, the position-dependent behavior of the five q-PoIs is investigated. Moreover, the five q-PoIs are compared with the other nine state-of-the-art and recently proposed batch MOBGO algorithms on twenty bio-objective benchmarks. The empirical experiments on different variety of benchmarks are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of two greedy q-PoIs ($\kpoi_{\mbox{best}}$ and $\kpoi_{\mbox{all}}$) on low-dimensional problems and the effectiveness of two explorative q-PoIs ($\kpoi_{\mbox{one}}$ and $\kpoi_{\mbox{worst}}$) on high-dimensional problems with difficult-to-approximate Pareto front boundaries.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯全局优化 (BGO) 是一种有效的替代辅助技术，适用于涉及昂贵评估的问题。并行技术可用于在一次迭代中并行评估真正昂贵的目标函数，以缩短执行时间。一种有效且直接的方法是设计一个采集函数，该函数可以在一次迭代中评估多个解决方案而不是单个点/解决方案的性能。本文提出了用于多目标贝叶斯全局优化（MOBGO）的批量多点（q-PoI）的 \emph{改进概率}（PoI）的五种替代方案，考虑了多点之间的协方差。提供了所有提出的 q-PoI 的精确计算公式和蒙特卡罗近似算法。基于与 Pareto 前沿相关的多个点的分布，研究了五个 q-PoI 的位置相关行为。此外，在 20 个生物目标基准上，将这 5 个 q-PoI 与其他 9 个最先进的和最近提出的批量 MOBGO 算法进行了比较。对不同基准的实证实验证明了两个贪婪 q-PoI（$\kpoi_{\mbox{best}}$ 和 $\kpoi_{\mbox{all}}$）在低维问题上的有效性以及两个探索性 q-PoI（$\kpoi_{\mbox{one}}$ 和 $\kpoi_{\mbox{worst}}$）在高维问题上的有效性难以近似的帕累托前沿边界。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于多目标贝叶斯全局优化的并行技术，通过批量选择概率改进方法（q-PoI）提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯全局优化在处理昂贵评估时效率不足，而现有批量优化方法在多目标场景下难以兼顾探索与利用，需改进获取函数以适应并行计算需求。
AI.method: 设计五种考虑多点协方差的q-PoI变体，提供精确公式与蒙特卡洛近似算法，并基于帕累托前沿分布分析其位置相关行为，最终在20个双目标基准问题上对比九种先进算法。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种贪婪型q-PoI（kpoi_best和kpoi_all）在低维问题中表现优异，两种探索型q-PoI（kpoi_one和kpoi_worst）在高维复杂帕累托前沿问题中更有效，整体性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过批量选择策略有效平衡了多目标优化中的探索与利用，为处理高维复杂问题提供了新的并行优化思路。

search_text: A Parallel Technique for Multi-objective Bayesian Global Optimization: Using a Batch Selection of Probability of Improvement 多目标贝叶斯全局优化的并行技术：使用改进概率的批量选择 Bayesian global optimization (BGO) is an efficient surrogate-assisted technique for problems involving expensive evaluations. A parallel technique can be used to parallelly evaluate the true-expensive objective functions in one iteration to boost the execution time. An effective and straightforward approach is to design an acquisition function that can evaluate the performance of a bath of multiple solutions, instead of a single point/solution, in one iteration. This paper proposes five alternatives of \emph{Probability of Improvement} (PoI) with multiple points in a batch (q-PoI) for multi-objective Bayesian global optimization (MOBGO), taking the covariance among multiple points into account. Both exact computational formulas and the Monte Carlo approximation algorithms for all proposed q-PoIs are provided. Based on the distribution of the multiple points relevant to the Pareto-front, the position-dependent behavior of the five q-PoIs is investigated. Moreover, the five q-PoIs are compared with the other nine state-of-the-art and recently proposed batch MOBGO algorithms on twenty bio-objective benchmarks. The empirical experiments on different variety of benchmarks are conducted to demonstrate the effectiveness of two greedy q-PoIs ($\kpoi_{\mbox{best}}$ and $\kpoi_{\mbox{all}}$) on low-dimensional problems and the effectiveness of two explorative q-PoIs ($\kpoi_{\mbox{one}}$ and $\kpoi_{\mbox{worst}}$) on high-dimensional problems with difficult-to-approximate Pareto front boundaries. 贝叶斯全局优化 (BGO) 是一种有效的替代辅助技术，适用于涉及昂贵评估的问题。并行技术可用于在一次迭代中并行评估真正昂贵的目标函数，以缩短执行时间。一种有效且直接的方法是设计一个采集函数，该函数可以在一次迭代中评估多个解决方案而不是单个点/解决方案的性能。本文提出了用于多目标贝叶斯全局优化（MOBGO）的批量多点（q-PoI）的 \emph{改进概率}（PoI）的五种替代方案，考虑了多点之间的协方差。提供了所有提出的 q-PoI 的精确计算公式和蒙特卡罗近似算法。基于与 Pareto 前沿相关的多个点的分布，研究了五个 q-PoI 的位置相关行为。此外，在 20 个生物目标基准上，将这 5 个 q-PoI 与其他 9 个最先进的和最近提出的批量 MOBGO 算法进行了比较。对不同基准的实证实验证明了两个贪婪 q-PoI（$\kpoi_{\mbox{best}}$ 和 $\kpoi_{\mbox{all}}$）在低维问题上的有效性以及两个探索性 q-PoI（$\kpoi_{\mbox{one}}$ 和 $\kpoi_{\mbox{worst}}$）在高维问题上的有效性难以近似的帕累托前沿边界。 本文提出一种用于多目标贝叶斯全局优化的并行技术，通过批量选择概率改进方法（q-PoI）提升计算效率。 Kaifeng Yang,Guozhi Dong,Michael Affenzeller cs.AI

authors_text: Raphael Baena,Lucas Drumetz,Vincent Gripon
title: Preserving Fine-Grain Feature Information in Classification via Entropic Regularization
title_zh: 通过熵正则化在分类中保留细粒度特征信息
abstract: Labeling a classification dataset implies to define classes and associated coarse labels, that may approximate a smoother and more complicated ground truth. For example, natural images may contain multiple objects, only one of which is labeled in many vision datasets, or classes may result from the discretization of a regression problem. Using cross-entropy to train classification models on such coarse labels is likely to roughly cut through the feature space, potentially disregarding the most meaningful such features, in particular losing information on the underlying fine-grain task. In this paper we are interested in the problem of solving fine-grain classification or regression, using a model trained on coarse-grain labels only. We show that standard cross-entropy can lead to overfitting to coarse-related features. We introduce an entropy-based regularization to promote more diversity in the feature space of trained models, and empirically demonstrate the efficacy of this methodology to reach better performance on the fine-grain problems. Our results are supported through theoretical developments and empirical validation.
summary: Labeling a classification dataset implies to define classes and associated coarse labels, that may approximate a smoother and more complicated ground truth. For example, natural images may contain multiple objects, only one of which is labeled in many vision datasets, or classes may result from the discretization of a regression problem. Using cross-entropy to train classification models on such coarse labels is likely to roughly cut through the feature space, potentially disregarding the most meaningful such features, in particular losing information on the underlying fine-grain task. In this paper we are interested in the problem of solving fine-grain classification or regression, using a model trained on coarse-grain labels only. We show that standard cross-entropy can lead to overfitting to coarse-related features. We introduce an entropy-based regularization to promote more diversity in the feature space of trained models, and empirically demonstrate the efficacy of this methodology to reach better performance on the fine-grain problems. Our results are supported through theoretical developments and empirical validation.
abstract_zh: 标记分类数据集意味着定义类和关联的粗标签，这可能近似于更平滑和更复杂的基本事实。例如，自然图像可能包含多个对象，在许多视觉数据集中只有其中一个被标记，或者类可能是由回归问题的离散化产生的。使用交叉熵在此类粗标签上训练分类模型可能会粗略地切入特征空间，可能会忽略最有意义的此类特征，特别是丢失有关底层细粒度任务的信息。在本文中，我们感兴趣的是使用仅在粗粒度标签上训练的模型来解决细粒度分类或回归的问题。我们证明标准交叉熵可能导致对粗相关特征的过度拟合。我们引入基于熵的正则化来促进训练模型的特征空间的更多多样性，并凭经验证明该方法在细粒度问题上获得更好性能的有效性。我们的结果得到了理论发展和实证验证的支持。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过熵正则化方法，在仅使用粗粒度标签训练分类模型时保留细粒度特征信息以提升细粒度任务性能。
AI.motivation: 传统交叉熵损失在粗粒度标签训练中易导致模型过拟合于粗粒度特征，从而丢失细粒度任务的关键信息。
AI.method: 提出基于熵的正则化方法，通过增加特征空间多样性来抑制对粗粒度特征的过拟合。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验验证表明该方法能有效提升细粒度分类/回归任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: 熵正则化为解决粗标签训练下的细粒度任务提供了有效的新思路。

authors_text: Zhongzhan Huang,Senwei Liang,Hong Zhang,Haizhao Yang,Liang Lin
title: On Fast Simulation of Dynamical System with Neural Vector Enhanced Numerical Solver
title_zh: 神经向量增强数值求解器动力系统快速仿真研究
abstract: The large-scale simulation of dynamical systems is critical in numerous scientific and engineering disciplines. However, traditional numerical solvers are limited by the choice of step sizes when estimating integration, resulting in a trade-off between accuracy and computational efficiency. To address this challenge, we introduce a deep learning-based corrector called Neural Vector (NeurVec), which can compensate for integration errors and enable larger time step sizes in simulations. Our extensive experiments on a variety of complex dynamical system benchmarks demonstrate that NeurVec exhibits remarkable generalization capability on a continuous phase space, even when trained using limited and discrete data. NeurVec significantly accelerates traditional solvers, achieving speeds tens to hundreds of times faster while maintaining high levels of accuracy and stability. Moreover, NeurVec's simple-yet-effective design, combined with its ease of implementation, has the potential to establish a new paradigm for fast-solving differential equations based on deep learning.
summary: The large-scale simulation of dynamical systems is critical in numerous scientific and engineering disciplines. However, traditional numerical solvers are limited by the choice of step sizes when estimating integration, resulting in a trade-off between accuracy and computational efficiency. To address this challenge, we introduce a deep learning-based corrector called Neural Vector (NeurVec), which can compensate for integration errors and enable larger time step sizes in simulations. Our extensive experiments on a variety of complex dynamical system benchmarks demonstrate that NeurVec exhibits remarkable generalization capability on a continuous phase space, even when trained using limited and discrete data. NeurVec significantly accelerates traditional solvers, achieving speeds tens to hundreds of times faster while maintaining high levels of accuracy and stability. Moreover, NeurVec's simple-yet-effective design, combined with its ease of implementation, has the potential to establish a new paradigm for fast-solving differential equations based on deep learning.
abstract_zh: 动力系统的大规模模拟在许多科学和工程学科中至关重要。然而，传统的数值求解器在估计积分时受到步长选择的限制，导致精度和计算效率之间的权衡。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了一种基于深度学习的校正器，称为神经向量（NeurVec），它可以补偿积分误差并在模拟中实现更大的时间步长。我们对各种复杂动力系统基准进行的广泛实验表明，即使使用有限和离散数据进行训练，NeurVec 在连续相空间上也表现出卓越的泛化能力。 NeurVec 显着加速了传统求解器的速度，速度提高了数十倍至数百倍，同时保持了高水平的准确性和稳定性。此外，NeurVec 简单而有效的设计，加上易于实施，有潜力为基于深度学习的快速求解微分方程建立新的范式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的NeurVec方法，通过补偿积分误差来加速动力系统仿真。
AI.motivation: 传统数值求解器在积分时因步长选择存在精度与计算效率的权衡问题，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计神经网络校正器NeurVec，在离散数据训练下实现连续相空间的误差补偿，支持更大时间步长。
AI.result: 实验表明NeurVec在保持高精度稳定性的前提下，速度提升达数十至数百倍，并具备良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: NeurVec通过简单高效的架构为基于深度学习的微分方程求解提供了新范式，具有广泛的应用前景。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的NeurVec方法，通过补偿积分误差来加速动力系统仿真。
motivation: 传统数值求解器在积分时因步长选择存在精度与计算效率的权衡问题，亟需更高效的解决方案。

search_text: On Fast Simulation of Dynamical System with Neural Vector Enhanced Numerical Solver 神经向量增强数值求解器动力系统快速仿真研究 The large-scale simulation of dynamical systems is critical in numerous scientific and engineering disciplines. However, traditional numerical solvers are limited by the choice of step sizes when estimating integration, resulting in a trade-off between accuracy and computational efficiency. To address this challenge, we introduce a deep learning-based corrector called Neural Vector (NeurVec), which can compensate for integration errors and enable larger time step sizes in simulations. Our extensive experiments on a variety of complex dynamical system benchmarks demonstrate that NeurVec exhibits remarkable generalization capability on a continuous phase space, even when trained using limited and discrete data. NeurVec significantly accelerates traditional solvers, achieving speeds tens to hundreds of times faster while maintaining high levels of accuracy and stability. Moreover, NeurVec's simple-yet-effective design, combined with its ease of implementation, has the potential to establish a new paradigm for fast-solving differential equations based on deep learning. 动力系统的大规模模拟在许多科学和工程学科中至关重要。然而，传统的数值求解器在估计积分时受到步长选择的限制，导致精度和计算效率之间的权衡。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了一种基于深度学习的校正器，称为神经向量（NeurVec），它可以补偿积分误差并在模拟中实现更大的时间步长。我们对各种复杂动力系统基准进行的广泛实验表明，即使使用有限和离散数据进行训练，NeurVec 在连续相空间上也表现出卓越的泛化能力。 NeurVec 显着加速了传统求解器的速度，速度提高了数十倍至数百倍，同时保持了高水平的准确性和稳定性。此外，NeurVec 简单而有效的设计，加上易于实施，有潜力为基于深度学习的快速求解微分方程建立新的范式。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的NeurVec方法，通过补偿积分误差来加速动力系统仿真。 Zhongzhan Huang,Senwei Liang,Hong Zhang,Haizhao Yang,Liang Lin cs.CE,cs.AI,cs.LG,math.NA

authors_text: Zesheng Ye,Lina Yao,Yu Zhang,Sylvia Gustin
title: See What You See: Self-supervised Cross-modal Retrieval of Visual Stimuli from Brain Activity
title_zh: 所见即所得：从大脑活动中进行视觉刺激的自我监督跨模式检索
abstract: Recent studies demonstrate the use of a two-stage supervised framework to generate images that depict human perception to visual stimuli from EEG, referring to EEG-visual reconstruction. They are, however, unable to reproduce the exact visual stimulus, since it is the human-specified annotation of images, not their data, that determines what the synthesized images are. Moreover, synthesized images often suffer from noisy EEG encodings and unstable training of generative models, making them hard to recognize. Instead, we present a single-stage EEG-visual retrieval paradigm where data of two modalities are correlated, as opposed to their annotations, allowing us to recover the exact visual stimulus for an EEG clip. We maximize the mutual information between the EEG encoding and associated visual stimulus through optimization of a contrastive self-supervised objective, leading to two additional benefits. One, it enables EEG encodings to handle visual classes beyond seen ones during training, since learning is not directed at class annotations. In addition, the model is no longer required to generate every detail of the visual stimulus, but rather focuses on cross-modal alignment and retrieves images at the instance level, ensuring distinguishable model output. Empirical studies are conducted on the largest single-subject EEG dataset that measures brain activities evoked by image stimuli. We demonstrate the proposed approach completes an instance-level EEG-visual retrieval task which existing methods cannot. We also examine the implications of a range of EEG and visual encoder structures. Furthermore, for a mostly studied semantic-level EEG-visual classification task, despite not using class annotations, the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art supervised EEG-visual reconstruction approaches, particularly on the capability of open class recognition.

They are, however, unable to reproduce the exact visual stimulus, since it is the human-specified annotation of images, not their data, that determines what the synthesized images are. Moreover, synthesized images often suffer from noisy EEG encodings and unstable training of generative models, making them hard to recognize. Instead, we present a single-stage EEG-visual retrieval paradigm where data of two modalities are correlated, as opposed to their annotations, allowing us to recover the exact visual stimulus for an EEG clip. We maximize the mutual information between the EEG encoding and associated visual stimulus through optimization of a contrastive self-supervised objective, leading to two additional benefits. One, it enables EEG encodings to handle visual classes beyond seen ones during training, since learning is not directed at class annotations. In addition, the model is no longer required to generate every detail of the visual stimulus, but rather focuses on cross-modal alignment and retrieves images at the instance level, ensuring distinguishable model output. Empirical studies are conducted on the largest single-subject EEG dataset that measures brain activities evoked by image stimuli. We demonstrate the proposed approach completes an instance-level EEG-visual retrieval task which existing methods cannot. We also examine the implications of a range of EEG and visual encoder structures. Furthermore, for a mostly studied semantic-level EEG-visual classification task, despite not using class annotations, the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art supervised EEG-visual reconstruction approaches, particularly on the capability of open class recognition.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，使用两阶段监督框架来生成描述人类对脑电图视觉刺激的感知的图像，即脑电图视觉重建。然而，它们无法重现准确的视觉刺激，因为决定合成图像的是人类指定的图像注释，而不是他们的数据。此外，合成图像经常受到脑电图编码的噪声和生成模型训练不稳定的影响，使得它们难以识别。相反，我们提出了一种单阶段脑电图视觉检索范例，其中两种模式的数据是相关的，而不是它们的注释，使我们能够恢复脑电图片段的精确视觉刺激。我们通过优化对比自我监督目标来最大化脑电图编码和相关视觉刺激之间的互信息，从而带来两个额外的好处。第一，它使脑电图编码能够处理训练期间看到的视觉类之外的视觉类，因为学习不是针对类注释的。此外，模型不再需要生成视觉刺激的每个细节，而是专注于跨模态对齐并在实例级别检索图像，确保可区分的模型输出。实证研究是在最大的单受试者脑电图数据集上进行的，该数据集测量图像刺激引起的大脑活动。我们证明了所提出的方法完成了现有方法无法完成的实例级脑电图视觉检索任务。我们还研究了一系列脑电图和视觉编码器结构的含义。此外，对于主要研究的语义级脑电图视觉分类任务，尽管不使用类注释，所提出的方法优于最先进的监督脑电图视觉重建方法，特别是在开放类识别的能力方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督学习的单阶段EEG-视觉检索框架，通过最大化EEG编码与视觉刺激之间的互信息，实现从脑电数据中精确检索对应视觉刺激。
AI.motivation: 现有基于监督框架的EEG视觉重建方法依赖图像标注，无法生成精确的视觉刺激，且受EEG噪声和生成模型不稳定性影响，检索效果受限。
AI.method: 设计单阶段对比自监督目标，通过最大化EEG编码与视觉刺激间的互信息，实现跨模态对齐。模型无需生成细节，专注于实例级检索，避免依赖类别标注。
AI.result: 在单被试EEG数据集上验证了方法的有效性，实现了现有方法无法完成的实例级检索任务，在开放类别识别中超越了监督重建方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过数据关联而非标注驱动学习，提升了跨模态检索的泛化能力，尤其在开放类别场景下表现优异。

authors_text: Yujiao Shi,Xin Yu,Shan Wang,Hongdong Li
title: CVLNet: Cross-View Semantic Correspondence Learning for Video-based Camera Localization
title_zh: CVLNet：基于视频的相机定位的跨视图语义对应学习
abstract: This paper tackles the problem of Cross-view Video-based camera Localization (CVL). The task is to localize a query camera by leveraging information from its past observations, i.e., a continuous sequence of images observed at previous time stamps, and matching them to a large overhead-view satellite image. The critical challenge of this task is to learn a powerful global feature descriptor for the sequential ground-view images while considering its domain alignment with reference satellite images. For this purpose, we introduce CVLNet, which first projects the sequential ground-view images into an overhead view by exploring the ground-and-overhead geometric correspondences and then leverages the photo consistency among the projected images to form a global representation. In this way, the cross-view domain differences are bridged. Since the reference satellite images are usually pre-cropped and regularly sampled, there is always a misalignment between the query camera location and its matching satellite image center. Motivated by this, we propose estimating the query camera's relative displacement to a satellite image before similarity matching. In this displacement estimation process, we also consider the uncertainty of the camera location. For example, a camera is unlikely to be on top of trees. To evaluate the performance of the proposed method, we collect satellite images from Google Map for the KITTI dataset and construct a new cross-view video-based localization benchmark dataset, KITTI-CVL. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the effectiveness of video-based localization over single image-based localization and the superiority of each proposed module over other alternatives.
summary: This paper tackles the problem of Cross-view Video-based camera Localization (CVL). The task is to localize a query camera by leveraging information from its past observations, i.e., a continuous sequence of images observed at previous time stamps, and matching them to a large overhead-view satellite image. The critical challenge of this task is to learn a powerful global feature descriptor for the sequential ground-view images while considering its domain alignment with reference satellite images. For this purpose, we introduce CVLNet, which first projects the sequential ground-view images into an overhead view by exploring the ground-and-overhead geometric correspondences and then leverages the photo consistency among the projected images to form a global representation. In this way, the cross-view domain differences are bridged. Since the reference satellite images are usually pre-cropped and regularly sampled, there is always a misalignment between the query camera location and its matching satellite image center. Motivated by this, we propose estimating the query camera's relative displacement to a satellite image before similarity matching. In this displacement estimation process, we also consider the uncertainty of the camera location. For example, a camera is unlikely to be on top of trees. To evaluate the performance of the proposed method, we collect satellite images from Google Map for the KITTI dataset and construct a new cross-view video-based localization benchmark dataset, KITTI-CVL. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the effectiveness of video-based localization over single image-based localization and the superiority of each proposed module over other alternatives.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了基于跨视图视频的相机定位（CVL）问题。任务是通过利用过去观测的信息（即在先前时间戳观察到的连续图像序列）并将其与大型俯视卫星图像进行匹配来定位查询摄像机。这项任务的关键挑战是学习连续地景图像的强大全局特征描述符，同时考虑其与参考卫星图像的域对齐。为此，我们引入了 CVLNet，它首先通过探索地面和俯视的几何对应关系将连续的地面视图图像投影到俯视视图中，然后利用投影图像之间的照片一致性来形成全局表示。这样，跨视图域的差异就被弥合了。由于参考卫星图像通常是预先裁剪并定期采样的，因此查询相机位置与其匹配的卫星图像中心之间总是存在偏差。受此启发，我们建议在相似性匹配之前估计查询相机与卫星图像的相对位移。在这个位移估计过程中，我们还考虑了相机位置的不确定性。例如，相机不太可能位于树顶上。为了评估所提出方法的性能，我们从 Google Map 收集 KITTI 数据集的卫星图像，并构建一个新的基于跨视图视频的定位基准数据集 KITTI-CVL。大量的实验证明了基于视频的定位相对于基于单个图像的定位的有效性，以及每个提出的模块相对于其他替代方案的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CVLNet，通过跨视角语义对应学习解决基于视频的相机定位问题，利用历史观测图像序列与卫星图像进行匹配。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理地面视角图像与卫星图像间的领域差异及查询相机位置与卫星图像中心的对齐问题，需提升跨视角特征对齐与定位精度。
AI.method: 通过地面-俯视几何对应关系将连续地面图像投影到俯视视角，结合光一致性生成全局特征表示，并估计相机相对于卫星图像的相对位移以修正对齐误差。
AI.result: 构建KITTI-CVL数据集，实验表明视频基定位优于单图像方法，所提模块在跨视角对齐与定位精度上均优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: CVLNet通过跨视角特征学习与位移估计有效缓解领域差异，为视频基相机定位提供了新思路与基准数据集。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出CVLNet，通过跨视角语义对应学习解决基于视频的相机定位问题，利用历史观测图像序列与卫星图像进行匹配。

search_text: CVLNet: Cross-View Semantic Correspondence Learning for Video-based Camera Localization CVLNet：基于视频的相机定位的跨视图语义对应学习 This paper tackles the problem of Cross-view Video-based camera Localization (CVL). The task is to localize a query camera by leveraging information from its past observations, i.e., a continuous sequence of images observed at previous time stamps, and matching them to a large overhead-view satellite image. The critical challenge of this task is to learn a powerful global feature descriptor for the sequential ground-view images while considering its domain alignment with reference satellite images. For this purpose, we introduce CVLNet, which first projects the sequential ground-view images into an overhead view by exploring the ground-and-overhead geometric correspondences and then leverages the photo consistency among the projected images to form a global representation. In this way, the cross-view domain differences are bridged. Since the reference satellite images are usually pre-cropped and regularly sampled, there is always a misalignment between the query camera location and its matching satellite image center. Motivated by this, we propose estimating the query camera's relative displacement to a satellite image before similarity matching. In this displacement estimation process, we also consider the uncertainty of the camera location. For example, a camera is unlikely to be on top of trees. To evaluate the performance of the proposed method, we collect satellite images from Google Map for the KITTI dataset and construct a new cross-view video-based localization benchmark dataset, KITTI-CVL. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the effectiveness of video-based localization over single image-based localization and the superiority of each proposed module over other alternatives. 本文解决了基于跨视图视频的相机定位（CVL）问题。任务是通过利用过去观测的信息（即在先前时间戳观察到的连续图像序列）并将其与大型俯视卫星图像进行匹配来定位查询摄像机。这项任务的关键挑战是学习连续地景图像的强大全局特征描述符，同时考虑其与参考卫星图像的域对齐。为此，我们引入了 CVLNet，它首先通过探索地面和俯视的几何对应关系将连续的地面视图图像投影到俯视视图中，然后利用投影图像之间的照片一致性来形成全局表示。这样，跨视图域的差异就被弥合了。由于参考卫星图像通常是预先裁剪并定期采样的，因此查询相机位置与其匹配的卫星图像中心之间总是存在偏差。受此启发，我们建议在相似性匹配之前估计查询相机与卫星图像的相对位移。在这个位移估计过程中，我们还考虑了相机位置的不确定性。例如，相机不太可能位于树顶上。为了评估所提出方法的性能，我们从 Google Map 收集 KITTI 数据集的卫星图像，并构建一个新的基于跨视图视频的定位基准数据集 KITTI-CVL。大量的实验证明了基于视频的定位相对于基于单个图像的定位的有效性，以及每个提出的模块相对于其他替代方案的优越性。 本文提出CVLNet，通过跨视角语义对应学习解决基于视频的相机定位问题，利用历史观测图像序列与卫星图像进行匹配。 Yujiao Shi,Xin Yu,Shan Wang,Hongdong Li cs.CV

authors_text: Mohammad Hossein Nasseri,Mohammadreza Babaee,Hadi Moradi,Reshad Hosseini
title: Fast Online and Relational Tracking
title_zh: 快速在线和关系跟踪
abstract: To overcome challenges in multiple object tracking task, recent algorithms use interaction cues alongside motion and appearance features. These algorithms use graph neural networks or transformers to extract interaction features that lead to high computation costs. In this paper, a novel interaction cue based on geometric features is presented aiming to detect occlusion and re-identify lost targets with low computational cost. Moreover, in most algorithms, camera motion is considered negligible, which is a strong assumption that is not always true and leads to ID Switch or mismatching of targets. In this paper, a method for measuring camera motion and removing its effect is presented that efficiently reduces the camera motion effect on tracking. The proposed algorithm is evaluated on MOT17 and MOT20 datasets and it achieves the state-of-the-art performance of MOT17 and comparable results on MOT20. The code is also publicly available.
summary: To overcome challenges in multiple object tracking task, recent algorithms use interaction cues alongside motion and appearance features. These algorithms use graph neural networks or transformers to extract interaction features that lead to high computation costs. In this paper, a novel interaction cue based on geometric features is presented aiming to detect occlusion and re-identify lost targets with low computational cost. Moreover, in most algorithms, camera motion is considered negligible, which is a strong assumption that is not always true and leads to ID Switch or mismatching of targets. In this paper, a method for measuring camera motion and removing its effect is presented that efficiently reduces the camera motion effect on tracking. The proposed algorithm is evaluated on MOT17 and MOT20 datasets and it achieves the state-of-the-art performance of MOT17 and comparable results on MOT20. The code is also publicly available.
abstract_zh: To overcome challenges in multiple object tracking task, recent algorithms use interaction cues alongside motion and appearance features. These algorithms use graph neural networks or transformers to extract interaction features that lead to high computation costs.本文提出了一种基于几何特征的新型交互线索，旨在以较低的计算成本检测遮挡并重新识别丢失的目标。此外，在大多数算法中，相机运动被认为可以忽略不计，这是一个强有力的假设，但并不总是正确，并会导致 ID Switch 或目标不匹配。本文提出了一种测量相机运动并消除其影响的方法，可以有效减少相机运动对跟踪的影响。所提出的算法在 MOT17 和 MOT20 数据集上进行了评估，它实现了 MOT17 的最先进性能以及 MOT20 上的可比结果。该代码也是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于几何特征的交互提示和相机运动消除方法，解决多目标跟踪中的遮挡、ID切换问题，并保持低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有算法依赖高计算成本的图神经网络或Transformer，且忽略相机运动导致跟踪错误，需更高效且鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计几何特征交互提示检测遮挡与重识别，结合相机运动测量模型消除其影响，实现在线跟踪。
AI.result: 在MOT17数据集上达到SOTA性能，在MOT20上表现相当，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了计算效率与跟踪鲁棒性，为实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Tongyi Luo,Jia Xiao,Chuncao Zhang,Siheng Chen,Yuan Tian,Guangjun Yu,Kang Dang,Xiaowei Ding
title: Weakly Supervised Online Action Detection for Infant General Movements
title_zh: 婴儿全身运动的弱监督在线动作检测
abstract: To make the earlier medical intervention of infants' cerebral palsy (CP), early diagnosis of brain damage is critical. Although general movements assessment(GMA) has shown promising results in early CP detection, it is laborious. Most existing works take videos as input to make fidgety movements(FMs) classification for the GMA automation. Those methods require a complete observation of videos and can not localize video frames containing normal FMs. Therefore we propose a novel approach named WO-GMA to perform FMs localization in the weakly supervised online setting. Infant body keypoints are first extracted as the inputs to WO-GMA. Then WO-GMA performs local spatio-temporal extraction followed by two network branches to generate pseudo clip labels and model online actions. With the clip-level pseudo labels, the action modeling branch learns to detect FMs in an online fashion. Experimental results on a dataset with 757 videos of different infants show that WO-GMA can get state-of-the-art video-level classification and cliplevel detection results. Moreover, only the first 20% duration of the video is needed to get classification results as good as fully observed, implying a significantly shortened FMs diagnosis time. Code is available at: https://github.com/scofiedluo/WO-GMA.
summary: To make the earlier medical intervention of infants' cerebral palsy (CP), early diagnosis of brain damage is critical. Although general movements assessment(GMA) has shown promising results in early CP detection, it is laborious. Most existing works take videos as input to make fidgety movements(FMs) classification for the GMA automation. Those methods require a complete observation of videos and can not localize video frames containing normal FMs. Therefore we propose a novel approach named WO-GMA to perform FMs localization in the weakly supervised online setting. Infant body keypoints are first extracted as the inputs to WO-GMA. Then WO-GMA performs local spatio-temporal extraction followed by two network branches to generate pseudo clip labels and model online actions. With the clip-level pseudo labels, the action modeling branch learns to detect FMs in an online fashion. Experimental results on a dataset with 757 videos of different infants show that WO-GMA can get state-of-the-art video-level classification and cliplevel detection results. Moreover, only the first 20% duration of the video is needed to get classification results as good as fully observed, implying a significantly shortened FMs diagnosis time. Code is available at: https://github.com/scofiedluo/WO-GMA.
abstract_zh: 为了对婴儿脑瘫（CP）进行早期医学干预，脑损伤的早期诊断至关重要。尽管一般运动评估（GMA）在早期脑瘫检测中显示出可喜的结果，但它是费力的。大多数现有作品都以视频作为输入，为 GMA 自动化进行烦躁动作（FM）分类。这些方法需要对视频进行完整的观察，并且无法定位包含正常FM的视频帧。因此，我们提出了一种名为 WO-GMA 的新方法，在弱监督的在线环境中执行 FM 本地化。首先提取婴儿身体关键点作为 WO-GMA 的输入。然后 WO-GMA 执行局部时空提取，然后通过两个网络分支生成伪剪辑标签并建模在线动作。通过剪辑级伪标签，动作建模分支学习以在线方式检测 FM。在包含 757 个不同婴儿视频的数据集上的实验结果表明，WO-GMA 可以获得最先进的视频级分类和剪辑级检测结果。此外，只需视频的前 20% 时长即可获得与充分观察一样好的分类结果，这意味着 FM 诊断时间显着缩短。代码位于：https://github.com/scofiedluo/WO-GMA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督在线动作检测方法WO-GMA，用于婴儿通用运动评估中的异常动作定位，以加速脑瘫早期诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需完整观察视频且无法定位正常运动帧，导致诊断效率低，亟需更高效的在线检测方案。
AI.method: 提取婴儿关键点后，通过局部时空特征提取与双分支网络生成伪剪辑标签，实现在线动作建模与异常运动检测。
AI.result: 在757个婴儿视频数据集上达到最先进分类与检测效果，仅需视频前20%时长即可获得与全视频相当的诊断准确率。
AI.conclusion: WO-GMA显著缩短诊断时间，为脑瘫早期干预提供高效自动化工具，具有重要临床应用价值。

Experimental results on a dataset with 757 videos of different infants show that WO-GMA can get state-of-the-art video-level classification and cliplevel detection results. Moreover, only the first 20% duration of the video is needed to get classification results as good as fully observed, implying a significantly shortened FMs diagnosis time. Code is available at: https://github.com/scofiedluo/WO-GMA. 为了对婴儿脑瘫（CP）进行早期医学干预，脑损伤的早期诊断至关重要。尽管一般运动评估（GMA）在早期脑瘫检测中显示出可喜的结果，但它是费力的。大多数现有作品都以视频作为输入，为 GMA 自动化进行烦躁动作（FM）分类。这些方法需要对视频进行完整的观察，并且无法定位包含正常FM的视频帧。因此，我们提出了一种名为 WO-GMA 的新方法，在弱监督的在线环境中执行 FM 本地化。首先提取婴儿身体关键点作为 WO-GMA 的输入。然后 WO-GMA 执行局部时空提取，然后通过两个网络分支生成伪剪辑标签并建模在线动作。通过剪辑级伪标签，动作建模分支学习以在线方式检测 FM。在包含 757 个不同婴儿视频的数据集上的实验结果表明，WO-GMA 可以获得最先进的视频级分类和剪辑级检测结果。此外，只需视频的前 20% 时长即可获得与充分观察一样好的分类结果，这意味着 FM 诊断时间显着缩短。代码位于：https://github.com/scofiedluo/WO-GMA。 本文提出一种弱监督在线动作检测方法WO-GMA，用于婴儿通用运动评估中的异常动作定位，以加速脑瘫早期诊断。 Tongyi Luo,Jia Xiao,Chuncao Zhang,Siheng Chen,Yuan Tian,Guangjun Yu,Kang Dang,Xiaowei Ding cs.CV,cs.AI,eess.IV

authors_text: Yongjun Chen,Jia Li,Zhiwei Liu,Nitish Shirish Keskar,Huan Wang,Julian McAuley,Caiming Xiong
title: Generating Negative Samples for Sequential Recommendation
title_zh: 生成负样本以进行顺序推荐
abstract: To make Sequential Recommendation (SR) successful, recent works focus on designing effective sequential encoders, fusing side information, and mining extra positive self-supervision signals. The strategy of sampling negative items at each time step is less explored. Due to the dynamics of users' interests and model updates during training, considering randomly sampled items from a user's non-interacted item set as negatives can be uninformative. As a result, the model will inaccurately learn user preferences toward items. Identifying informative negatives is challenging because informative negative items are tied with both dynamically changed interests and model parameters (and sampling process should also be efficient). To this end, we propose to Generate Negative Samples (items) for SR (GenNi). A negative item is sampled at each time step based on the current SR model's learned user preferences toward items. An efficient implementation is proposed to further accelerate the generation process, making it scalable to large-scale recommendation tasks. Extensive experiments on four public datasets verify the importance of providing high-quality negative samples for SR and demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of GenNi.
summary: To make Sequential Recommendation (SR) successful, recent works focus on designing effective sequential encoders, fusing side information, and mining extra positive self-supervision signals. The strategy of sampling negative items at each time step is less explored. Due to the dynamics of users' interests and model updates during training, considering randomly sampled items from a user's non-interacted item set as negatives can be uninformative. As a result, the model will inaccurately learn user preferences toward items. Identifying informative negatives is challenging because informative negative items are tied with both dynamically changed interests and model parameters (and sampling process should also be efficient). To this end, we propose to Generate Negative Samples (items) for SR (GenNi). A negative item is sampled at each time step based on the current SR model's learned user preferences toward items. An efficient implementation is proposed to further accelerate the generation process, making it scalable to large-scale recommendation tasks. Extensive experiments on four public datasets verify the importance of providing high-quality negative samples for SR and demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of GenNi.
abstract_zh: 为了使顺序推荐（SR）取得成功，最近的工作重点是设计有效的顺序编码器、融合辅助信息和挖掘额外的积极自我监督信号。在每个时间步对负项进行采样的策略较少被探索。由于训练期间用户兴趣和模型更新的动态性，将用户非交互项目集中随机采样的项目视为负数可能无法提供信息。因此，模型将不准确地了解用户对物品的偏好。识别信息性负项具有挑战性，因为信息性负项与动态变化的兴趣和模型参数相关（并且采样过程也应该是有效的）。为此，我们建议为SR（GenNi）生成负样本（项目）。根据当前 SR 模型学习到的用户对项目的偏好，在每个时间步对负项目进行采样。提出了一种有效的实现方式，以进一步加速生成过程，使其可扩展到大规模推荐任务。在四个公共数据集上进行的大量实验验证了为 SR 提供​​高质量负样本的重要性，并证明了 GenNi 的有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为序列推荐系统生成高质量的负样本，以提升推荐效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态用户兴趣和模型更新下，随机采样的负样本不够有效，影响模型学习用户偏好。
AI.method: 提出GenNi方法，根据当前模型的用户偏好动态生成负样本，并优化生成效率以适应大规模任务。
AI.result: 实验验证了高质量负样本对序列推荐的重要性，并证明GenNi在效果和效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效解决了序列推荐中负样本生成的挑战，提升了推荐系统的性能。

authors_text: Junkun Yuan,Xu Ma,Defang Chen,Kun Kuang,Fei Wu,Lanfen Lin
title: Label-Efficient Domain Generalization via Collaborative Exploration and Generalization
title_zh: 通过协作探索和泛化实现标签高效的领域泛​​化
abstract: Considerable progress has been made in domain generalization (DG) which aims to learn a generalizable model from multiple well-annotated source domains to unknown target domains. However, it can be prohibitively expensive to obtain sufficient annotation for source datasets in many real scenarios. To escape from the dilemma between domain generalization and annotation costs, in this paper, we introduce a novel task named label-efficient domain generalization (LEDG) to enable model generalization with label-limited source domains. To address this challenging task, we propose a novel framework called Collaborative Exploration and Generalization (CEG) which jointly optimizes active exploration and semi-supervised generalization. Specifically, in active exploration, to explore class and domain discriminability while avoiding information divergence and redundancy, we query the labels of the samples with the highest overall ranking of class uncertainty, domain representativeness, and information diversity. In semi-supervised generalization, we design MixUp-based intra- and inter-domain knowledge augmentation to expand domain knowledge and generalize domain invariance. We unify active exploration and semi-supervised generalization in a collaborative way and promote mutual enhancement between them, boosting model generalization with limited annotation. Extensive experiments show that CEG yields superior generalization performance. In particular, CEG can even use only 5% data annotation budget to achieve competitive results compared to the previous DG methods with fully labeled data on PACS dataset.
summary: Considerable progress has been made in domain generalization (DG) which aims to learn a generalizable model from multiple well-annotated source domains to unknown target domains. However, it can be prohibitively expensive to obtain sufficient annotation for source datasets in many real scenarios. To escape from the dilemma between domain generalization and annotation costs, in this paper, we introduce a novel task named label-efficient domain generalization (LEDG) to enable model generalization with label-limited source domains. To address this challenging task, we propose a novel framework called Collaborative Exploration and Generalization (CEG) which jointly optimizes active exploration and semi-supervised generalization. Specifically, in active exploration, to explore class and domain discriminability while avoiding information divergence and redundancy, we query the labels of the samples with the highest overall ranking of class uncertainty, domain representativeness, and information diversity. In semi-supervised generalization, we design MixUp-based intra- and inter-domain knowledge augmentation to expand domain knowledge and generalize domain invariance. We unify active exploration and semi-supervised generalization in a collaborative way and promote mutual enhancement between them, boosting model generalization with limited annotation. Extensive experiments show that CEG yields superior generalization performance. In particular, CEG can even use only 5% data annotation budget to achieve competitive results compared to the previous DG methods with fully labeled data on PACS dataset.
abstract_zh: 领域泛化（DG）领域已经取得了相当大的进展，其目的是学习从多个注释良好的源域到未知目标域的可泛化模型。然而，在许多实际场景中，为源数据集获得足够的注释可能会非常昂贵。为了摆脱域泛化和注释成本之间的困境，在本文中，我们引入了一种名为标签高效域泛化（LEDG）的新任务，以实现标签有限源域的模型泛化。为了解决这一具有挑战性的任务，我们提出了一种称为协作探索和泛化（CEG）的新颖框架，它联合优化了主动探索和半监督泛化。具体来说，在主动探索中，为了探索类和领域的可辨别性，同时避免信息发散和冗余，我们查询类不确定性、领域代表性和信息多样性总体排名最高的样本标签。在半监督泛化中，我们设计了基于 MixUp 的域内和域间知识增强，以扩展领域知识并泛化领域不变性。我们以协作的方式统一主动探索和半监督泛化，并促进它们之间的相互增强，以有限的注释促进模型泛化。大量实验表明 CEG 具有优异的泛化性能。特别是，与之前在 PACS 数据集上完全标记数据的 DG 方法相比，CEG 甚至可以仅使用 5% 的数据注释预算就获得有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为协作探索与泛化（CEG）的框架，旨在解决在源域标注数据有限的情况下实现领域泛化（DG）的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统领域泛化方法依赖大量标注的源域数据，但在实际场景中获取足够标注数据成本高昂，因此需要一种在标注数据有限的情况下仍能有效泛化的解决方案。
AI.method: CEG框架结合主动探索与半监督泛化：主动探索阶段通过查询类不确定性、领域代表性和信息多样性综合排名最高的样本标签；半监督泛化阶段设计基于MixUp的域内和域间知识增强策略，提升领域不变性。
AI.result: 实验表明，CEG在PACS数据集上仅使用5%的标注数据预算即可达到与全标注数据方法相当的泛化性能，优于现有DG方法。
AI.conclusion: CEG通过协作优化主动探索与半监督泛化，在标注数据有限的情况下显著提升了领域泛化能力，为标签高效领域泛化提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Raja Sunkara,Tie Luo
title: No More Strided Convolutions or Pooling: A New CNN Building Block for Low-Resolution Images and Small Objects
title_zh: 不再需要跨步卷积或池化：用于低分辨率图像和小物体的新 CNN 构建块
comment: European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECML PKDD), 2022
comments: European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECML PKDD), 2022
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have made resounding success in many computer vision tasks such as image classification and object detection. However, their performance degrades rapidly on tougher tasks where images are of low resolution or objects are small. In this paper, we point out that this roots in a defective yet common design in existing CNN architectures, namely the use of strided convolution and/or pooling layers, which results in a loss of fine-grained information and learning of less effective feature representations. To this end, we propose a new CNN building block called SPD-Conv in place of each strided convolution layer and each pooling layer (thus eliminates them altogether). SPD-Conv is comprised of a space-to-depth (SPD) layer followed by a non-strided convolution (Conv) layer, and can be applied in most if not all CNN architectures. We explain this new design under two most representative computer vision tasks: object detection and image classification. We then create new CNN architectures by applying SPD-Conv to YOLOv5 and ResNet, and empirically show that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art deep learning models, especially on tougher tasks with low-resolution images and small objects. We have open-sourced our code at https://github.com/LabSAINT/SPD-Conv.
summary: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have made resounding success in many computer vision tasks such as image classification and object detection. However, their performance degrades rapidly on tougher tasks where images are of low resolution or objects are small. In this paper, we point out that this roots in a defective yet common design in existing CNN architectures, namely the use of strided convolution and/or pooling layers, which results in a loss of fine-grained information and learning of less effective feature representations. To this end, we propose a new CNN building block called SPD-Conv in place of each strided convolution layer and each pooling layer (thus eliminates them altogether). SPD-Conv is comprised of a space-to-depth (SPD) layer followed by a non-strided convolution (Conv) layer, and can be applied in most if not all CNN architectures. We explain this new design under two most representative computer vision tasks: object detection and image classification. We then create new CNN architectures by applying SPD-Conv to YOLOv5 and ResNet, and empirically show that our approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art deep learning models, especially on tougher tasks with low-resolution images and small objects. We have open-sourced our code at https://github.com/LabSAINT/SPD-Conv.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）在图像分类和目标检测等许多计算机视觉任务中取得了巨大的成功。 However, their performance degrades rapidly on tougher tasks where images are of low resolution or objects are small.在本文中，我们指出，这源于现有 CNN 架构中一个有缺陷但常见的设计，即使用跨步卷积和/或池化层，这会导致细粒度信息的丢失和学习效率较低的特征表示。为此，我们提出了一种名为 SPD-Conv 的新 CNN 构建块来代替每个跨步卷积层和每个池化层（从而完全消除它们）。 SPD-Conv 由空间到深度 (SPD) 层和非跨步卷积 (Conv) 层组成，可应用于大多数（如果不是全部）CNN 架构。 We explain this new design under two most representative computer vision tasks: object detection and image classification.然后，我们通过将 SPD-Conv 应用于 YOLOv5 和 ResNet 来创建新的 CNN 架构，并凭经验证明我们的方法显着优于最先进的深度学习模型，特别是在低分辨率图像和小物体的更艰巨的任务上。 We have open-sourced our code at https://github.com/LabSAINT/SPD-Conv.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型CNN构建模块SPD-Conv，用于替代传统卷积神经网络中的步长卷积和池化层，以提升低分辨率图像和小目标检测任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN架构中步长卷积和池化层会导致细粒度信息丢失，从而在低分辨率图像和小目标检测任务中表现不佳，亟需改进网络设计以保留关键特征。
AI.method: 设计SPD-Conv模块，由空间到深度（SPD）层和非步长卷积层组成，完全替代步长卷积和池化层，并将其应用于YOLOv5和ResNet架构进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，SPD-Conv在低分辨率图像和小目标检测任务中显著优于现有先进模型，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SPD-Conv通过消除步长卷积和池化层的信息损失，有效提升了CNN在低分辨率和小目标场景下的特征表达能力与检测精度。

authors_text: Jinng Yi,Zhenzhong Chen
title: Debiased Cross-modal Matching for Content-based Micro-video Background Music Recommendation
title_zh: 基于内容的微视频背景音乐推荐的去偏跨模态匹配
abstract: Micro-video background music recommendation is a complicated task where the matching degree between videos and uploader-selected background music is a major issue. However, the selection of the user-generated content (UGC) is biased caused by knowledge limitations and historical preferences among music of each uploader. In this paper, we propose a Debiased Cross-Modal (DebCM) matching model to alleviate the influence of such selection bias. Specifically, we design a teacher-student network to utilize the matching of segments of music videos, which is professional-generated content (PGC) with specialized music-matching techniques, to better alleviate the bias caused by insufficient knowledge of users. The PGC data is captured by a teacher network to guide the matching of uploader-selected UGC data of the student network by KL-based knowledge transfer. In addition, uploaders' personal preferences of music genres are identified as confounders that spuriously correlate music embeddings and background music selections, resulting in the learned recommender system to over-recommend music from the majority groups. To resolve such confounders in the UGC data of the student network, backdoor adjustment is utilized to deconfound the spurious correlation between music embeddings and prediction scores. We further utilize Monte Carlo (MC) estimator with batch-level average as the approximations to avoid integrating the entire confounder space calculated by the adjustment. Extensive experiments on the TT-150k-genre dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method towards the selection bias. The code is publicly available on: \url{https://github.com/jing-1/DebCM}.
summary: Micro-video background music recommendation is a complicated task where the matching degree between videos and uploader-selected background music is a major issue. However, the selection of the user-generated content (UGC) is biased caused by knowledge limitations and historical preferences among music of each uploader. In this paper, we propose a Debiased Cross-Modal (DebCM) matching model to alleviate the influence of such selection bias. Specifically, we design a teacher-student network to utilize the matching of segments of music videos, which is professional-generated content (PGC) with specialized music-matching techniques, to better alleviate the bias caused by insufficient knowledge of users. The PGC data is captured by a teacher network to guide the matching of uploader-selected UGC data of the student network by KL-based knowledge transfer. In addition, uploaders' personal preferences of music genres are identified as confounders that spuriously correlate music embeddings and background music selections, resulting in the learned recommender system to over-recommend music from the majority groups. To resolve such confounders in the UGC data of the student network, backdoor adjustment is utilized to deconfound the spurious correlation between music embeddings and prediction scores. We further utilize Monte Carlo (MC) estimator with batch-level average as the approximations to avoid integrating the entire confounder space calculated by the adjustment. Extensive experiments on the TT-150k-genre dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method towards the selection bias. The code is publicly available on: \url{https://github.com/jing-1/DebCM}.
abstract_zh: 微视频背景音乐推荐是一项复杂的任务，其中视频与上传者选择的背景音乐之间的匹配度是一个主要问题。然而，由于知识限制和每个上传者对音乐的历史偏好，用户生成内容（UGC）的选择存在偏差。在本文中，我们提出了一种去偏跨模态（DebCM）匹配模型来减轻这种选择偏差的影响。具体来说，我们设计了一个师生网络来利用音乐视频片段的匹配，这是具有专门的音乐匹配技术的专业生成内容（PGC），以更好地缓解由于用户知识不足而造成的偏差。 PGC 数据由教师网络捕获，通过基于 KL 的知识转移指导上传者选择的学生网络 UGC 数据的匹配。此外，上传者对音乐流派的个人偏好被认为是混淆因素，它们将音乐嵌入和背景音乐选择虚假关联，导致学习推荐系统过度推荐来自大多数群体的音乐。为了解决学生网络 UGC 数据中的此类混杂因素，利用后门调整来消除音乐嵌入和预测分数之间的虚假相关性。我们进一步利用蒙特卡罗（MC）估计器以批次级平均值作为近似值，以避免对调整计算出的整个混杂空间进行积分。对 TT-150k-genre 数据集的大量实验证明了所提出的方法对选择偏差的有效性。该代码可在以下位置公开获取：\url{https://github.com/jing-1/DebCM}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种去偏跨模态匹配模型（DebCM），用于解决用户生成内容（UGC）中因用户知识局限和历史偏好导致的微视频背景音乐推荐偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 用户自主选择的背景音乐存在选择偏差，导致推荐系统过度推荐主流音乐类型，影响推荐多样性与准确性。
AI.method: 设计教师-学生网络，利用专业生成内容（PGC）指导学生网络匹配UGC数据；通过KL散度知识迁移和后门调整消除音乐嵌入与推荐得分间的虚假相关性，并采用蒙特卡洛估计器优化计算效率。
AI.result: 在TT-150k-genre数据集上实验表明，DebCM有效缓解了选择偏差，提升了推荐性能。
AI.conclusion: DebCM通过去偏机制和跨模态匹配优化，显著改善了微视频背景音乐推荐中的选择偏差问题，代码已开源。

authors_text: Honghui Yang,Zili Liu,Xiaopei Wu,Wenxiao Wang,Wei Qian,Xiaofei He,Deng Cai
title: Graph R-CNN: Towards Accurate 3D Object Detection with Semantic-Decorated Local Graph
title_zh: 图 R-CNN：利用语义装饰局部图实现准确的 3D 对象检测
abstract: Two-stage detectors have gained much popularity in 3D object detection. Most two-stage 3D detectors utilize grid points, voxel grids, or sampled keypoints for RoI feature extraction in the second stage. Such methods, however, are inefficient in handling unevenly distributed and sparse outdoor points. This paper solves this problem in three aspects. 1) Dynamic Point Aggregation. We propose the patch search to quickly search points in a local region for each 3D proposal. The dynamic farthest voxel sampling is then applied to evenly sample the points. Especially, the voxel size varies along the distance to accommodate the uneven distribution of points. 2) RoI-graph Pooling. We build local graphs on the sampled points to better model contextual information and mine point relations through iterative message passing. 3) Visual Features Augmentation. We introduce a simple yet effective fusion strategy to compensate for sparse LiDAR points with limited semantic cues. Based on these modules, we construct our Graph R-CNN as the second stage, which can be applied to existing one-stage detectors to consistently improve the detection performance. Extensive experiments show that Graph R-CNN outperforms the state-of-the-art 3D detection models by a large margin on both the KITTI and Waymo Open Dataset. And we rank first place on the KITTI BEV car detection leaderboard. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/Nightmare-n/GraphRCNN}.
summary: Two-stage detectors have gained much popularity in 3D object detection. Most two-stage 3D detectors utilize grid points, voxel grids, or sampled keypoints for RoI feature extraction in the second stage. Such methods, however, are inefficient in handling unevenly distributed and sparse outdoor points. This paper solves this problem in three aspects. 1) Dynamic Point Aggregation. We propose the patch search to quickly search points in a local region for each 3D proposal. The dynamic farthest voxel sampling is then applied to evenly sample the points. Especially, the voxel size varies along the distance to accommodate the uneven distribution of points. 2) RoI-graph Pooling. We build local graphs on the sampled points to better model contextual information and mine point relations through iterative message passing. 3) Visual Features Augmentation. We introduce a simple yet effective fusion strategy to compensate for sparse LiDAR points with limited semantic cues. Based on these modules, we construct our Graph R-CNN as the second stage, which can be applied to existing one-stage detectors to consistently improve the detection performance. Extensive experiments show that Graph R-CNN outperforms the state-of-the-art 3D detection models by a large margin on both the KITTI and Waymo Open Dataset. And we rank first place on the KITTI BEV car detection leaderboard. Code will be available at \url{https://github.com/Nightmare-n/GraphRCNN}.
abstract_zh: 两级检测器在 3D 物体检测中非常受欢迎。大多数两级 3D 检测器在第二级中利用网格点、体素网格或采样关键点进行 RoI 特征提取。然而，这些方法在处理分布不均匀和稀疏的室外点时效率低下。本文从三个方面解决这个问题。 1）动态点聚合。我们提出补丁搜索来快速搜索每个 3D 建议的局部区域中的点。然后应用动态最远体素采样来均匀地采样点。特别是，体素大小沿距离变化，以适应点的不均匀分布。 2）RoI图池化。我们在采样点上构建局部图，以通过迭代消息传递更好地建模上下文信息并挖掘点关系。 3）视觉特征增强。我们引入了一种简单而有效的融合策略来补偿语义线索有限的稀疏激光雷达点。基于这些模块，我们构建了 Graph R-CNN 作为第二阶段，它可以应用于现有的单阶段检测器，以持续提高检测性能。大量实验表明，Graph R-CNN 在 KITTI 和 Waymo 开放数据集上都大幅优于最先进的 3D 检测模型。我们在 KITTI BEV 汽车检测排行榜上名列第一。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Nightmare-n/GraphRCNN} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Graph R-CNN方法，通过动态点聚合、RoI图池化和视觉特征增强，解决户外稀疏点云的3D目标检测问题。
AI.motivation: 传统两阶段3D检测器在处理稀疏和分布不均的户外点云时效率低下，需改进特征提取与上下文建模。
AI.method: 1) 动态点聚合：通过局部区域点搜索和自适应体素采样；2) RoI图池化：构建局部图进行消息传递；3) 特征增强：融合LiDAR点与语义信息。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Waymo数据集上显著优于现有方法，KITTI BEV汽车检测排名第一。
AI.conclusion: Graph R-CNN有效提升了稀疏点云下的3D检测性能，可广泛应用于现有单阶段检测器。

search_text: Graph R-CNN: Towards Accurate 3D Object Detection with Semantic-Decorated Local Graph 图 R-CNN：利用语义装饰局部图实现准确的 3D 对象检测 Two-stage detectors have gained much popularity in 3D object detection. Most two-stage 3D detectors utilize grid points, voxel grids, or sampled keypoints for RoI feature extraction in the second stage. Such methods, however, are inefficient in handling unevenly distributed and sparse outdoor points. This paper solves this problem in three aspects. 1) Dynamic Point Aggregation. We propose the patch search to quickly search points in a local region for each 3D proposal. The dynamic farthest voxel sampling is then applied to evenly sample the points. Especially, the voxel size varies along the distance to accommodate the uneven distribution of points. 2) RoI-graph Pooling. We build local graphs on the sampled points to better model contextual information and mine point relations through iterative message passing. 3) Visual Features Augmentation. We introduce a simple yet effective fusion strategy to compensate for sparse LiDAR points with limited semantic cues. Based on these modules, we construct our Graph R-CNN as the second stage, which can be applied to existing one-stage detectors to consistently improve the detection performance. Extensive experiments show that Graph R-CNN outperforms the state-of-the-art 3D detection models by a large margin on both the KITTI and Waymo Open Dataset. And we rank first place on the KITTI BEV car detection leaderboard. authors_text: Keshav Bhandari,Bin Duan,Gaowen Liu,Hugo Latapie,Ziliang Zong,Yan Yan
title: Learning Omnidirectional Flow in 360-degree Video via Siamese Representation
title_zh: 通过连体表示学习 360 度视频中的全向流
abstract: Optical flow estimation in omnidirectional videos faces two significant issues: the lack of benchmark datasets and the challenge of adapting perspective video-based methods to accommodate the omnidirectional nature. This paper proposes the first perceptually natural-synthetic omnidirectional benchmark dataset with a 360-degree field of view, FLOW360, with 40 different videos and 4,000 video frames. We conduct comprehensive characteristic analysis and comparisons between our dataset and existing optical flow datasets, which manifest perceptual realism, uniqueness, and diversity. To accommodate the omnidirectional nature, we present a novel Siamese representation Learning framework for Omnidirectional Flow (SLOF). We train our network in a contrastive manner with a hybrid loss function that combines contrastive loss and optical flow loss. Extensive experiments verify the proposed framework's effectiveness and show up to 40% performance improvement over the state-of-the-art approaches. Our FLOW360 dataset and code are available at https://siamlof.github.io/.
summary: Optical flow estimation in omnidirectional videos faces two significant issues: the lack of benchmark datasets and the challenge of adapting perspective video-based methods to accommodate the omnidirectional nature. This paper proposes the first perceptually natural-synthetic omnidirectional benchmark dataset with a 360-degree field of view, FLOW360, with 40 different videos and 4,000 video frames. We conduct comprehensive characteristic analysis and comparisons between our dataset and existing optical flow datasets, which manifest perceptual realism, uniqueness, and diversity. To accommodate the omnidirectional nature, we present a novel Siamese representation Learning framework for Omnidirectional Flow (SLOF). We train our network in a contrastive manner with a hybrid loss function that combines contrastive loss and optical flow loss. Extensive experiments verify the proposed framework's effectiveness and show up to 40% performance improvement over the state-of-the-art approaches. Our FLOW360 dataset and code are available at https://siamlof.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 全向视频中的光流估计面临两个重大问题：缺乏基准数据集以及采用基于透视视频的方法来适应全向性质的挑战。本文提出了第一个具有 360 度视野的感知自然合成全向基准数据集 FLOW360，包含 40 个不同的视频和 4000 个视频帧。我们对我们的数据集和现有光流数据集进行了全面的特征分析和比较，表现出感知真实性、独特性和多样性。为了适应全向性质，我们提出了一种新颖的全向流连体表示学习框架（SLOF）。我们使用结合对比损失和光流损失的混合损失函数以对比方式训练我们的网络。大量实验验证了所提出的框架的有效性，并显示与最先进的方法相比，性能提高了 40%。我们的 FLOW360 数据集和代码可在 https://siamlof.github.io/ 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于360度视频全向光流估计的新型Siamese表示学习框架SLOF，并构建了首个感知自然-合成的全向光流基准数据集FLOW360。
AI.motivation: 全向视频光流估计面临缺乏基准数据集以及现有透视视频方法难以适应全向特性的双重挑战。
AI.method: 设计了结合对比损失和光流损失的混合损失函数，提出基于Siamese网络结构的全向光流学习框架SLOF，并构建包含40个视频4000帧的FLOW360数据集。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中实现比现有方法最高40%的性能提升，数据集和代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过提出新型数据集和学习框架，有效解决了全向视频光流估计的关键技术难题，推动了相关研究的发展。

authors_text: B. G. Palm,F. M. Bayer,R. J. Cintra
title: Improved Point Estimation for the Rayleigh Regression Model
title_zh: 瑞利回归模型的改进点估计
abstract: The Rayleigh regression model was recently proposed for modeling amplitude values of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) image pixels. However, inferences from such model are based on the maximum likelihood estimators, which can be biased for small signal lengths. The Rayleigh regression model for SAR images often takes into account small pixel windows, which may lead to inaccurate results. In this letter, we introduce bias-adjusted estimators tailored for the Rayleigh regression model based on: (i) the Cox and Snell's method; (ii) the Firth's scheme; and (iii) the parametric bootstrap method. We present numerical experiments considering synthetic and actual SAR data sets. The bias-adjusted estimators yield nearly unbiased estimates and accurate modeling results.
summary: The Rayleigh regression model was recently proposed for modeling amplitude values of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) image pixels. However, inferences from such model are based on the maximum likelihood estimators, which can be biased for small signal lengths. The Rayleigh regression model for SAR images often takes into account small pixel windows, which may lead to inaccurate results. In this letter, we introduce bias-adjusted estimators tailored for the Rayleigh regression model based on: (i) the Cox and Snell's method; (ii) the Firth's scheme; and (iii) the parametric bootstrap method. We present numerical experiments considering synthetic and actual SAR data sets. The bias-adjusted estimators yield nearly unbiased estimates and accurate modeling results.
abstract_zh: 最近提出了瑞利回归模型，用于对合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像像素的幅度值进行建模。然而，此类模型的推论基于最大似然估计，对于小信号长度可能存在偏差。 The Rayleigh regression model for SAR images often takes into account small pixel windows, which may lead to inaccurate results. In this letter, we introduce bias-adjusted estimators tailored for the Rayleigh regression model based on: (i) the Cox and Snell's method; (ii) 弗斯计划； (iii) 参数引导方法。 We present numerical experiments considering synthetic and actual SAR data sets.偏差调整估计器产生几乎无偏差的估计和准确的建模结果。

AI.tldr: 改进瑞利回归模型的点估计方法以解决小样本下的偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有瑞利回归模型在处理SAR图像小像素窗口时，最大似然估计存在偏差导致结果不准确。
AI.method: 基于Cox-Snell方法、Firth方案及参数引导法提出偏差校正估计器。
AI.result: 数值实验表明校正后估计器在合成与实际SAR数据中均实现近无偏估计与准确建模。
AI.conclusion: 提出的偏差校正方法有效提升了瑞利回归模型在小样本场景下的估计精度与可靠性。

search_text: Improved Point Estimation for the Rayleigh Regression Model 瑞利回归模型的改进点估计 The Rayleigh regression model was recently proposed for modeling amplitude values of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) image pixels. However, inferences from such model are based on the maximum likelihood estimators, which can be biased for small signal lengths. The Rayleigh regression model for SAR images often takes into account small pixel windows, which may lead to inaccurate results. In this letter, we introduce bias-adjusted estimators tailored for the Rayleigh regression model based on: (i) the Cox and Snell's method; (ii) the Firth's scheme; and (iii) the parametric bootstrap method. We present numerical experiments considering synthetic and actual SAR data sets. The bias-adjusted estimators yield nearly unbiased estimates and accurate modeling results. 最近提出了瑞利回归模型，用于对合成孔径雷达（SAR）图像像素的幅度值进行建模。然而，此类模型的推论基于最大似然估计，对于小信号长度可能存在偏差。 The Rayleigh regression model for SAR images often takes into account small pixel windows, which may lead to inaccurate results. In this letter, we introduce bias-adjusted estimators tailored for the Rayleigh regression model based on: (i) the Cox and Snell's method; (ii) 弗斯计划； (iii) 参数引导方法。 We present numerical experiments considering synthetic and actual SAR data sets.偏差调整估计器产生几乎无偏差的估计和准确的建模结果。 改进瑞利回归模型的点估计方法以解决小样本下的偏差问题。 B. G. Palm,F. M. Bayer,R. J. Cintra stat.ME,cs.CV,eess.IV,physics.data-an,stat.AP

authors_text: Zikui Cai,Chengyu Song,Srikanth Krishnamurthy,Amit Roy-Chowdhury,M. Salman Asif
title: Blackbox Attacks via Surrogate Ensemble Search
title_zh: 通过代理集成搜索进行黑盒攻击
comment: Our code is available at https://github.com/CSIPlab/BASES
comments: Our code is available at https://github.com/CSIPlab/BASES
abstract: Blackbox adversarial attacks can be categorized into transfer- and query-based attacks. Transfer methods do not require any feedback from the victim model, but provide lower success rates compared to query-based methods. Query attacks often require a large number of queries for success. To achieve the best of both approaches, recent efforts have tried to combine them, but still require hundreds of queries to achieve high success rates (especially for targeted attacks). In this paper, we propose a novel method for Blackbox Attacks via Surrogate Ensemble Search (BASES) that can generate highly successful blackbox attacks using an extremely small number of queries. We first define a perturbation machine that generates a perturbed image by minimizing a weighted loss function over a fixed set of surrogate models. To generate an attack for a given victim model, we search over the weights in the loss function using queries generated by the perturbation machine. Since the dimension of the search space is small (same as the number of surrogate models), the search requires a small number of queries. We demonstrate that our proposed method achieves better success rate with at least 30x fewer queries compared to state-of-the-art methods on different image classifiers trained with ImageNet. In particular, our method requires as few as 3 queries per image (on average) to achieve more than a 90% success rate for targeted attacks and 1-2 queries per image for over a 99% success rate for untargeted attacks. Our method is also effective on Google Cloud Vision API and achieved a 91% untargeted attack success rate with 2.9 queries per image. We also show that the perturbations generated by our proposed method are highly transferable and can be adopted for hard-label blackbox attacks. We also show effectiveness of BASES for hiding attacks on object detectors.

Transfer methods do not require any feedback from the victim model, but provide lower success rates compared to query-based methods. Query attacks often require a large number of queries for success. To achieve the best of both approaches, recent efforts have tried to combine them, but still require hundreds of queries to achieve high success rates (especially for targeted attacks). In this paper, we propose a novel method for Blackbox Attacks via Surrogate Ensemble Search (BASES) that can generate highly successful blackbox attacks using an extremely small number of queries. We first define a perturbation machine that generates a perturbed image by minimizing a weighted loss function over a fixed set of surrogate models. To generate an attack for a given victim model, we search over the weights in the loss function using queries generated by the perturbation machine. Since the dimension of the search space is small (same as the number of surrogate models), the search requires a small number of queries. We demonstrate that our proposed method achieves better success rate with at least 30x fewer queries compared to state-of-the-art methods on different image classifiers trained with ImageNet. In particular, our method requires as few as 3 queries per image (on average) to achieve more than a 90% success rate for targeted attacks and 1-2 queries per image for over a 99% success rate for untargeted attacks. Our method is also effective on Google Cloud Vision API and achieved a 91% untargeted attack success rate with 2.9 queries per image. We also show that the perturbations generated by our proposed method are highly transferable and can be adopted for hard-label blackbox attacks. We also show effectiveness of BASES for hiding attacks on object detectors.
abstract_zh: Blackbox adversarial attacks can be categorized into transfer- and query-based attacks. Transfer methods do not require any feedback from the victim model, but provide lower success rates compared to query-based methods. Query attacks often require a large number of queries for success.为了实现这两种方法的最佳效果，最近的努力尝试将它们结合起来，但仍然需要数百次查询才能实现高成功率（特别是对于有针对性的攻击）。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过代理集成搜索（BASES）进行黑盒攻击的新方法，该方法可以使用极少量的查询生成非常成功的黑盒攻击。我们首先定义一个扰动机，它通过最小化一组固定代理模型上的加权损失函数来生成扰动图像。为了针对给定的受害者模型生成攻击，我们使用扰动机生成的查询来搜索损失函数中的权重。 Since the dimension of the search space is small (same as the number of surrogate models), the search requires a small number of queries.我们证明，与使用 ImageNet 训练的不同图像分类器上最先进的方法相比，我们提出的方法实现了更高的成功率，查询次数至少减少了 30 倍。特别是，我们的方法只需每个图像 3 次查询（平均）即可实现目标攻击超过 90% 的成功率，并且每个图像需要 1-2 次查询即可实现非目标攻击超过 99% 的成功率。 Our method is also effective on Google Cloud Vision API and achieved a 91% untargeted attack success rate with 2.9 queries per image. We also show that the perturbations generated by our proposed method are highly transferable and can be adopted for hard-label blackbox attacks. We also show effectiveness of BASES for hiding attacks on object detectors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为BASES的新方法，通过代理模型集成搜索实现高效黑盒攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒攻击方法要么需要大量查询（如查询型攻击），要么成功率较低（如迁移攻击），而现有结合方法仍需数百次查询才能达到高成功率。
AI.method: 定义扰动生成器通过最小化加权损失函数生成对抗样本，并在损失函数权重空间进行搜索，利用少量查询优化攻击效果。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类器上，针对攻击仅需3次查询即可实现90%成功率，无目标攻击仅需1-2次查询达99%成功率，对Google Cloud Vision API攻击成功率91%。
AI.conclusion: BASES通过降低搜索维度显著减少查询次数，在保持高成功率的同时提升黑盒攻击效率，并适用于目标检测器的隐蔽攻击。

authors_text: Veena Kaustaban,Qinle Ba,Ipshita Bhattacharya,Nahil Sobh,Satarupa Mukherjee,Jim Martin,Mohammad Saleh Miri,Christoph Guetter,Amal Chaturvedi
title: Continual Learning for Tumor Classification in Histopathology Images
title_zh: 组织病理学图像中肿瘤分类的持续学习
comment: Accepted by MOVI, a MICCAI2022 workshop: https://sites.google.com/view/movi2022
comments: Accepted by MOVI, a MICCAI2022 workshop: https://sites.google.com/view/movi2022
abstract: Recent years have seen great advancements in the development of deep learning models for histopathology image analysis in digital pathology applications, evidenced by the increasingly common deployment of these models in both research and clinical settings. Although such models have shown unprecedented performance in solving fundamental computational tasks in DP applications, they suffer from catastrophic forgetting when adapted to unseen data with transfer learning. With an increasing need for deep learning models to handle ever changing data distributions, including evolving patient population and new diagnosis assays, continual learning models that alleviate model forgetting need to be introduced in DP based analysis. However, to our best knowledge, there is no systematic study of such models for DP-specific applications. Here, we propose CL scenarios in DP settings, where histopathology image data from different sources/distributions arrive sequentially, the knowledge of which is integrated into a single model without training all the data from scratch. We then established an augmented dataset for colorectal cancer H&E classification to simulate shifts of image appearance and evaluated CL model performance in the proposed CL scenarios. We leveraged a breast tumor H&E dataset along with the colorectal cancer to evaluate CL from different tumor types. In addition, we evaluated CL methods in an online few-shot setting under the constraints of annotation and computational resources. We revealed promising results of CL in DP applications, potentially paving the way for application of these methods in clinical practice.

Although such models have shown unprecedented performance in solving fundamental computational tasks in DP applications, they suffer from catastrophic forgetting when adapted to unseen data with transfer learning. With an increasing need for deep learning models to handle ever changing data distributions, including evolving patient population and new diagnosis assays, continual learning models that alleviate model forgetting need to be introduced in DP based analysis. However, to our best knowledge, there is no systematic study of such models for DP-specific applications. Here, we propose CL scenarios in DP settings, where histopathology image data from different sources/distributions arrive sequentially, the knowledge of which is integrated into a single model without training all the data from scratch. We then established an augmented dataset for colorectal cancer H&E classification to simulate shifts of image appearance and evaluated CL model performance in the proposed CL scenarios. We leveraged a breast tumor H&E dataset along with the colorectal cancer to evaluate CL from different tumor types. In addition, we evaluated CL methods in an online few-shot setting under the constraints of annotation and computational resources. We revealed promising results of CL in DP applications, potentially paving the way for application of these methods in clinical practice.
abstract_zh: 近年来，数字病理学应用中用于组织病理学图像分析的深度学习模型的开发取得了巨大进步，这些模型在研究和临床环境中越来越普遍的部署就证明了这一点。尽管此类模型在解决 DP 应用中的基本计算任务方面表现出了前所未有的性能，但当通过迁移学习适应不可见的数据时，它们会遭受灾难性的遗忘。随着对深度学习模型处理不断变化的数据分布的需求不断增加，包括不断变化的患者群体和新的诊断分析，需要在基于 DP 的分析中引入减轻模型遗忘的持续学习模型。 However, to our best knowledge, there is no systematic study of such models for DP-specific applications.在这里，我们提出了 DP 设置中的 CL 场景，其中来自不同来源/分布的组织病理学图像数据按顺序到达，其知识被集成到单个模型中，而无需从头开始训练所有数据。然后，我们建立了结直肠癌 H&E 分类的增强数据集，以模拟图像外观的变化，并评估了所提出的 CL 场景中的 CL 模型性能。 We leveraged a breast tumor H&E dataset along with the colorectal cancer to evaluate CL from different tumor types. In addition, we evaluated CL methods in an online few-shot setting under the constraints of annotation and computational resources. We revealed promising results of CL in DP applications, potentially paving the way for application of these methods in clinical practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将持续学习（CL）应用于数字病理学中的肿瘤分类，解决模型在面对新数据时的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在数字病理学中部署时，因数据分布变化（如新诊断方法或患者群体演变）易出现灾难性遗忘，而针对病理学场景的持续学习研究尚不系统。
AI.method: 构建增强的结直肠癌H&E染色数据集模拟图像分布变化，结合乳腺肿瘤数据集评估跨肿瘤类型的持续学习性能，并在标注与计算资源受限的在线少样本场景下测试CL方法。
AI.result: 实验表明持续学习方法在数字病理学任务中表现良好，为临床实践中的模型更新提供了可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 持续学习可有效应对数字病理学中数据分布动态变化的挑战，为临床场景下的模型部署奠定基础。
