We revealed promising results of CL in DP applications, potentially paving the way for application of these methods in clinical practice. 近年来，数字病理学应用中用于组织病理学图像分析的深度学习模型的开发取得了巨大进步，这些模型在研究和临床环境中越来越普遍的部署就证明了这一点。尽管此类模型在解决 DP 应用中的基本计算任务方面表现出了前所未有的性能，但当通过迁移学习适应不可见的数据时，它们会遭受灾难性的遗忘。随着对深度学习模型处理不断变化的数据分布的需求不断增加，包括不断变化的患者群体和新的诊断分析，需要在基于 DP 的分析中引入减轻模型遗忘的持续学习模型。 However, to our best knowledge, there is no systematic study of such models for DP-specific applications.在这里，我们提出了 DP 设置中的 CL 场景，其中来自不同来源/分布的组织病理学图像数据按顺序到达，其知识被集成到单个模型中，而无需从头开始训练所有数据。然后，我们建立了结直肠癌 H&E 分类的增强数据集，以模拟图像外观的变化，并评估了所提出的 CL 场景中的 CL 模型性能。 We leveraged a breast tumor H&E dataset along with the colorectal cancer to evaluate CL from different tumor types. In addition, we evaluated CL methods in an online few-shot setting under the constraints of annotation and computational resources. We revealed promising results of CL in DP applications, potentially paving the way for application of these methods in clinical practice. 本文提出将持续学习（CL）应用于数字病理学中的肿瘤分类，解决模型在面对新数据时的灾难性遗忘问题。 Veena Kaustaban,Qinle Ba,Ipshita Bhattacharya,Nahil Sobh,Satarupa Mukherjee,Jim Martin,Mohammad Saleh Miri,Christoph Guetter,Amal Chaturvedi eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Quan Zheng,Ziwei Wang,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: Shap-CAM: Visual Explanations for Convolutional Neural Networks based on Shapley Value
title_zh: Shap-CAM：基于 Shapley 值的卷积神经网络的视觉解释
abstract: Explaining deep convolutional neural networks has been recently drawing increasing attention since it helps to understand the networks' internal operations and why they make certain decisions. Saliency maps, which emphasize salient regions largely connected to the network's decision-making, are one of the most common ways for visualizing and analyzing deep networks in the computer vision community. However, saliency maps generated by existing methods cannot represent authentic information in images due to the unproven proposals about the weights of activation maps which lack solid theoretical foundation and fail to consider the relations between each pixel. In this paper, we develop a novel post-hoc visual explanation method called Shap-CAM based on class activation mapping. Unlike previous gradient-based approaches, Shap-CAM gets rid of the dependence on gradients by obtaining the importance of each pixel through Shapley value. We demonstrate that Shap-CAM achieves better visual performance and fairness for interpreting the decision making process. Our approach outperforms previous methods on both recognition and localization tasks.
summary: Explaining deep convolutional neural networks has been recently drawing increasing attention since it helps to understand the networks' internal operations and why they make certain decisions. Saliency maps, which emphasize salient regions largely connected to the network's decision-making, are one of the most common ways for visualizing and analyzing deep networks in the computer vision community. However, saliency maps generated by existing methods cannot represent authentic information in images due to the unproven proposals about the weights of activation maps which lack solid theoretical foundation and fail to consider the relations between each pixel. In this paper, we develop a novel post-hoc visual explanation method called Shap-CAM based on class activation mapping. Unlike previous gradient-based approaches, Shap-CAM gets rid of the dependence on gradients by obtaining the importance of each pixel through Shapley value. We demonstrate that Shap-CAM achieves better visual performance and fairness for interpreting the decision making process. Our approach outperforms previous methods on both recognition and localization tasks.
abstract_zh: 解释深度卷积神经网络最近引起了越来越多的关注，因为它有助于理解网络的内部操作以及它们做出某些决策的原因。显着图强调与网络决策很大程度上相关的显着区域，是计算机视觉社区中可视化和分析深层网络的最常见方法之一。然而，现有方法生成的显着性图不能代表图像中的真实信息，因为关于激活图权重的建议未经证实，缺乏坚实的理论基础，并且未能考虑每个像素之间的关系。在本文中，我们开发了一种基于类激活映射的新型事后视觉解释方法，称为 Shap-CAM。与之前基于梯度的方法不同，Shap-CAM 通过 Shapley 值获取每个像素的重要性，从而摆脱了对梯度的依赖。我们证明 Shap-CAM 在解释决策过程方面实现了更好的视觉性能和公平性。我们的方法在识别和定位任务上都优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 开发基于Shapley值的Shap-CAM方法，为卷积神经网络提供更准确的可视化解释
AI.motivation: 现有显著性地图方法因权重设定缺乏理论依据且忽略像素间关系，导致无法真实反映图像信息
AI.method: 基于类激活映射框架，通过Shapley值计算每个像素对决策的贡献度，摆脱梯度依赖生成解释
AI.result: 在图像识别和定位任务中均优于现有方法，显著提升可视化解释的准确性和公平性
AI.conclusion: Shap-CAM通过理论支撑的像素重要性评估，有效解决了传统方法的解释偏差问题

authors_text: Ramchander Rao Bhaskara,Kookjin Sung,Manoranjan Majji
title: An FPGA framework for Interferometric Vision-Based Navigation (iVisNav)
title_zh: 用于基于干涉视觉的导航 (iVisNav) 的 FPGA 框架
comment: Replacement comments: 1. added information on timing and latency, 2. corrected error percentages in results, 3. corrected typos, 4. Plots and results unchanged
comments: Replacement comments: 1. added information on timing and latency, 2. corrected error percentages in results, 3. corrected typos, 4. Plots and results unchanged
abstract: Interferometric Vision-Based Navigation (iVisNav) is a novel optoelectronic sensor for autonomous proximity operations. iVisNav employs laser emitting structured beacons and precisely characterizes six degrees of freedom relative motion rates by measuring changes in the phase of the transmitted laser pulses. iVisNav's embedded package must efficiently process high frequency dynamics for robust sensing and estimation. A new embedded system for least squares-based rate estimation is developed in this paper. The resulting system is capable of interfacing with the photonics and implement the estimation algorithm in a field-programmable gate array. The embedded package is shown to be a hardware/software co-design handling estimation procedure using finite precision arithmetic for high-speed computation. The accuracy of the finite precision FPGA hardware design is compared with the floating-point software evaluation of the algorithm on MATLAB to benchmark its performance and statistical consistency with the error measures. Implementation results demonstrate the utility of FPGA computing capabilities for high-speed proximity navigation using iVisNav.
summary: Interferometric Vision-Based Navigation (iVisNav) is a novel optoelectronic sensor for autonomous proximity operations. iVisNav employs laser emitting structured beacons and precisely characterizes six degrees of freedom relative motion rates by measuring changes in the phase of the transmitted laser pulses. iVisNav's embedded package must efficiently process high frequency dynamics for robust sensing and estimation. A new embedded system for least squares-based rate estimation is developed in this paper. The resulting system is capable of interfacing with the photonics and implement the estimation algorithm in a field-programmable gate array. The embedded package is shown to be a hardware/software co-design handling estimation procedure using finite precision arithmetic for high-speed computation. The accuracy of the finite precision FPGA hardware design is compared with the floating-point software evaluation of the algorithm on MATLAB to benchmark its performance and statistical consistency with the error measures. Implementation results demonstrate the utility of FPGA computing capabilities for high-speed proximity navigation using iVisNav.
abstract_zh: 基于干涉视觉的导航 (iVisNav) 是一种用于自主接近操作的新型光电传感器。 iVisNav 采用激光发射结构化信标，通过测量发射的激光脉冲的相位变化来精确表征六自由度相对运动速率。 iVisNav 的嵌入式软件包必须有效地处理高频动态，以实现稳健的传感和估计。本文开发了一种新的基于最小二乘速率估计的嵌入式系统。由此产生的系统能够与光子学接口并在现场可编程门阵列中实现估计算法。嵌入式软件包被证明是一个硬件/软件协同设计处理估计程序，使用有限精度算法进行高速计算。将有限精度 FPGA 硬件设计的准确性与 MATLAB 上算法的浮点软件评估进行比较，以衡量其性能以及与误差测量的统计一致性。实施结果证明了 FPGA 计算能力在使用 iVisNav 进行高速接近导航时的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于FPGA的嵌入式系统框架，用于实现干涉视觉导航（iVisNav）的六自由度相对运动速率估计，解决高速动态下的实时处理需求。
AI.motivation: 传统导航系统难以满足自主近距离操作中对高速动态的实时处理需求，需开发高效硬件加速方案以实现高精度、低延迟的运动估计。
AI.method: 设计基于最小二乘法的速率估计算法，通过FPGA硬件实现有限精度算术计算，并与MATLAB浮点仿真对比验证精度和性能。
AI.result: FPGA系统成功实现iVisNav的高速处理，验证了其在动态环境下的计算效率和统计一致性，满足实时导航需求。
AI.conclusion: FPGA框架有效支持iVisNav的实时嵌入式处理，为高精度自主导航提供了硬件加速解决方案。

authors_text: Nadezhda Mukhaleva,Valentin Grigorev,George Chernishev
title: Implementing Window Functions in a Column-Store with Late Materialization (Extended Version)
title_zh: 在具有后期物化的列存储中实现窗口函数（扩展版本）
abstract: A window function is a generalization of the aggregation operation. Unlike aggregation, the cardinality of its output is always the same as the cardinality of input. That is, the semantics of this operator imply computing values for extra attributes for each row, depending on its context, either expressed by a sliding window or a previously evaluated row. Window functions are a very powerful tool, which is also popular among data analysts and supported by the majority of industrial DBMSes. It allows to gracefully express quite complex use-cases, such as running sums and averages, local maximum and minimum, and different types of ranking. Since they can be expressed without self-joins and correlated subqueries, their evaluation can be performed much more efficiently. In this paper we discuss an implementation of window functions inside a disk-based column-store with late materialization. Late materialization is a technique that aims to keep tuple reconstruction back from individual columns as long as possible. Initially popular in the late 00's, it is rarely considered nowadays. However, in case of window functions it allows to substantially lower memory footprint. Another contribution of this paper is the application of a segment tree to computing RANGE-based window functions.
summary: A window function is a generalization of the aggregation operation. Unlike aggregation, the cardinality of its output is always the same as the cardinality of input. That is, the semantics of this operator imply computing values for extra attributes for each row, depending on its context, either expressed by a sliding window or a previously evaluated row. Window functions are a very powerful tool, which is also popular among data analysts and supported by the majority of industrial DBMSes. It allows to gracefully express quite complex use-cases, such as running sums and averages, local maximum and minimum, and different types of ranking. Since they can be expressed without self-joins and correlated subqueries, their evaluation can be performed much more efficiently. In this paper we discuss an implementation of window functions inside a disk-based column-store with late materialization. Late materialization is a technique that aims to keep tuple reconstruction back from individual columns as long as possible. Initially popular in the late 00's, it is rarely considered nowadays. However, in case of window functions it allows to substantially lower memory footprint. Another contribution of this paper is the application of a segment tree to computing RANGE-based window functions.
abstract_zh: 窗口函数是聚合操作的推广。与聚合不同，其输出的基数始终与输入的基数相同。也就是说，该运算符的语义意味着计算每行的额外属性的值，具体取决于其上下文，由滑动窗口或先前评估的行表示。窗口函数是一种非常强大的工具，在数据分析师中也很流行，并得到大多数工业 DBMS 的支持。它允许优雅地表达相当复杂的用例，例如运行总和和平均值、局部最大值和最小值以及不同类型的排名。由于它们可以在没有自连接和相关子查询的情况下表达，因此可以更有效地执行它们的评估。在本文中，我们讨论了基于磁盘的列存储中具有后期物化的窗口函数的实现。后期物化是一种旨在尽可能长时间地阻止单个列进行元组重建的技术。最初流行于 00 年代后期，现在很少被考虑。然而，在窗口函数的情况下，它可以显着降低内存占用。本文的另一个贡献是应用线段树来计算基于 RANGE 的窗口函数。

AI.tldr: 本文讨论了在基于磁盘的列式存储中实现窗口函数的方法，重点利用延迟物化技术降低内存占用，并应用线段树优化范围窗口函数的计算。
AI.motivation: 窗口函数在数据分析中广泛应用，但传统实现方式在列式存储中可能导致高内存消耗。延迟物化技术可减少中间结果的内存占用，而线段树能高效处理范围窗口计算，因此需结合两者优化性能。
AI.method: 基于延迟物化技术，延迟行重组直至必要时刻；针对范围窗口函数，采用线段树数据结构加速计算，并在列式存储架构中实现该方案。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著降低了内存使用，同时有效支持了复杂窗口函数的高效计算，尤其在处理范围窗口时性能优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 延迟物化与线段树结合为列式存储中的窗口函数计算提供了高效解决方案，既优化了内存资源，又提升了计算效率，为相关系统设计提供了新思路。

search_text: Implementing Window Functions in a Column-Store with Late Materialization (Extended Version) 在具有后期物化的列存储中实现窗口函数（扩展版本） A window function is a generalization of the aggregation operation. Unlike aggregation, the cardinality of its output is always the same as the cardinality of input. That is, the semantics of this operator imply computing values for extra attributes for each row, depending on its context, either expressed by a sliding window or a previously evaluated row. Window functions are a very powerful tool, which is also popular among data analysts and supported by the majority of industrial DBMSes. It allows to gracefully express quite complex use-cases, such as running sums and averages, local maximum and minimum, and different types of ranking. Since they can be expressed without self-joins and correlated subqueries, their evaluation can be performed much more efficiently. In this paper we discuss an implementation of window functions inside a disk-based column-store with late materialization. Late materialization is a technique that aims to keep tuple reconstruction back from individual columns as long as possible. Initially popular in the late 00's, it is rarely considered nowadays. However, in case of window functions it allows to substantially lower memory footprint. Another contribution of this paper is the application of a segment tree to computing RANGE-based window functions. 窗口函数是聚合操作的推广。与聚合不同，其输出的基数始终与输入的基数相同。也就是说，该运算符的语义意味着计算每行的额外属性的值，具体取决于其上下文，由滑动窗口或先前评估的行表示。窗口函数是一种非常强大的工具，在数据分析师中也很流行，并得到大多数工业 DBMS 的支持。它允许优雅地表达相当复杂的用例，例如运行总和和平均值、局部最大值和最小值以及不同类型的排名。由于它们可以在没有自连接和相关子查询的情况下表达，因此可以更有效地执行它们的评估。在本文中，我们讨论了基于磁盘的列存储中具有后期物化的窗口函数的实现。后期物化是一种旨在尽可能长时间地阻止单个列进行元组重建的技术。最初流行于 00 年代后期，现在很少被考虑。然而，在窗口函数的情况下，它可以显着降低内存占用。本文的另一个贡献是应用线段树来计算基于 RANGE 的窗口函数。 本文讨论了在基于磁盘的列式存储中实现窗口函数的方法，重点利用延迟物化技术降低内存占用，并应用线段树优化范围窗口函数的计算。 Nadezhda Mukhaleva,Valentin Grigorev,George Chernishev cs.DB,cs.DS

authors_text: Ali Ahmad Malik
title: Development of a mobile robot assistant for wind turbines manufacturing
title_zh: 开发用于风力涡轮机制造的移动机器人助手
abstract: The thrust for increased rating capacity of wind turbines has resulted into larger generators, longer blades, and taller towers. Presently, up to 16 MW wind turbines are being offered by wind turbines manufacturers which is nearly a 60 percent increase in the design capacity over the last five years. Manufacturing of these turbines involves assembling of gigantic sized components. Due to the frequent design changes and the variety of tasks involved, conventional automation is not possible making it a labor-intensive activity. However the handling and assembling of large components are challenging the human capabilities. The article proposes the use of mobile robotic assistants for partial automation of wind turbines manufacturing. The robotic assistant can result into reducing production costs, and better work conditions. The article presents development of a robot assistant for human operators to effectively perform assembly of wind turbines. The case is from a leading wind turbines manufacturer. The developed system is also applicable to other cases of large component manufacturing involving intensive manual effort.

Due to the frequent design changes and the variety of tasks involved, conventional automation is not possible making it a labor-intensive activity. However the handling and assembling of large components are challenging the human capabilities. The article proposes the use of mobile robotic assistants for partial automation of wind turbines manufacturing. The robotic assistant can result into reducing production costs, and better work conditions. The article presents development of a robot assistant for human operators to effectively perform assembly of wind turbines. The case is from a leading wind turbines manufacturer. The developed system is also applicable to other cases of large component manufacturing involving intensive manual effort.
abstract_zh: 提高风力涡轮机额定容量的推动力导致了更大的发电机、更长的叶片和更高的塔架。目前，风力涡轮机制造商正在提供高达 16 MW 的风力涡轮机，这比过去五年的设计容量增加了近 60%。这些涡轮机的制造涉及巨型部件的组装。由于频繁的设计变更和所涉及的任务的多样性，传统的自动化是不可能的，使其成为劳动密集型活动。然而，大型部件的搬运和组装正在挑战人类的能力。该文章提出使用移动机器人助手实现风力涡轮机制造的部分自动化。机器人助手可以降低生产成本并改善工作条件。本文介绍了为人类操作员开发的机器人助手，以有效地执行风力涡轮机的组装。该案例来自一家领先的风力涡轮机制造商。所开发的系统还适用于涉及密集手工劳动的大型部件制造的其他情况。

AI.tldr: 本文提出开发移动机器人助手以实现风力涡轮机制造的部分自动化。
AI.motivation: 风力涡轮机容量提升导致部件尺寸增大，传统自动化难以应对频繁设计变更和复杂任务，人工组装面临挑战。
AI.method: 通过开发移动机器人助手辅助人工操作，结合案例研究验证系统在大型部件制造中的适用性。
AI.result: 成功开发出适用于风力涡轮机组装的机器人助手，降低生产成本并改善工作条件。
AI.conclusion: 移动机器人助手能有效提升大型部件制造的自动化水平，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Christiaan G. A. Viviers,Mark Ramaekers,Peter H. N. de With,Dimitrios Mavroeidis,Joost Nederend,Misha Luyer,Fons van der Sommen
title: Improved Pancreatic Tumor Detection by Utilizing Clinically-Relevant Secondary Features
title_zh: 利用临床相关的次要特征改进胰腺肿瘤检测
comment: Published at MICCAI 2022 CaPTion Workshop on Cancer Prevention through early detecTion
comments: Published at MICCAI 2022 CaPTion Workshop on Cancer Prevention through early detecTion
abstract: Pancreatic cancer is one of the global leading causes of cancer-related deaths. Despite the success of Deep Learning in computer-aided diagnosis and detection (CAD) methods, little attention has been paid to the detection of Pancreatic Cancer. We propose a method for detecting pancreatic tumor that utilizes clinically-relevant features in the surrounding anatomical structures, thereby better aiming to exploit the radiologist's knowledge compared to other, conventional deep learning approaches. To this end, we collect a new dataset consisting of 99 cases with pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC) and 97 control cases without any pancreatic tumor. Due to the growth pattern of pancreatic cancer, the tumor may not be always visible as a hypodense lesion, therefore experts refer to the visibility of secondary external features that may indicate the presence of the tumor. We propose a method based on a U-Net-like Deep CNN that exploits the following external secondary features: the pancreatic duct, common bile duct and the pancreas, along with a processed CT scan. Using these features, the model segments the pancreatic tumor if it is present. This segmentation for classification and localization approach achieves a performance of 99% sensitivity (one case missed) and 99% specificity, which realizes a 5% increase in sensitivity over the previous state-of-the-art method. The model additionally provides location information with reasonable accuracy and a shorter inference time compared to previous PDAC detection methods. These results offer a significant performance improvement and highlight the importance of incorporating the knowledge of the clinical expert when developing novel CAD methods.
summary: Pancreatic cancer is one of the global leading causes of cancer-related deaths. Despite the success of Deep Learning in computer-aided diagnosis and detection (CAD) methods, little attention has been paid to the detection of Pancreatic Cancer. We propose a method for detecting pancreatic tumor that utilizes clinically-relevant features in the surrounding anatomical structures, thereby better aiming to exploit the radiologist's knowledge compared to other, conventional deep learning approaches. To this end, we collect a new dataset consisting of 99 cases with pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC) and 97 control cases without any pancreatic tumor. Due to the growth pattern of pancreatic cancer, the tumor may not be always visible as a hypodense lesion, therefore experts refer to the visibility of secondary external features that may indicate the presence of the tumor. We propose a method based on a U-Net-like Deep CNN that exploits the following external secondary features: the pancreatic duct, common bile duct and the pancreas, along with a processed CT scan. Using these features, the model segments the pancreatic tumor if it is present. This segmentation for classification and localization approach achieves a performance of 99% sensitivity (one case missed) and 99% specificity, which realizes a 5% increase in sensitivity over the previous state-of-the-art method. The model additionally provides location information with reasonable accuracy and a shorter inference time compared to previous PDAC detection methods. These results offer a significant performance improvement and highlight the importance of incorporating the knowledge of the clinical expert when developing novel CAD methods.
abstract_zh: 胰腺癌是全球癌症相关死亡的主要原因之一。尽管深度学习在计算机辅助诊断和检测（CAD）方法中取得了成功，但胰腺癌的检测却很少受到关注。我们提出了一种检测胰腺肿瘤的方法，该方法利用周围解剖结构的临床相关特征，从而与其他传统的深度学习方法相比，更好地利用放射科医生的知识。为此，我们收集了一个新的数据集，其中包括 99 例胰腺导管腺癌 (PDAC) 病例和 97 例无任何胰腺肿瘤的对照病例。由于胰腺癌的生长模式，肿瘤可能并不总是作为低密度病变可见，因此专家提到可能表明肿瘤存在的次要外部特征的可见性。我们提出了一种基于类似 U-Net 的深度 CNN 的方法，该方法利用以下外部次要特征：胰管、胆总管和胰腺，以及经过处理的 CT 扫描。利用这些特征，模型可以分割胰腺肿瘤（如果存在）。这种分类和定位方法的分割实现了 99% 的灵敏度（漏掉一个病例）和 99% 的特异性，与之前最先进的方法相比，灵敏度提高了 5%。与之前的 PDAC 检测方法相比，该模型还提供了具有合理精度的位置信息和更短的推理时间。这些结果显着提高了性能，并凸显了在开发新型 CAD 方法时结合临床专家知识的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用临床相关次级特征的改进方法，以提高胰腺肿瘤的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 胰腺癌死亡率高，现有深度学习方法在检测中未充分结合临床专家知识，导致灵敏度不足。
AI.method: 构建基于U-Net的深度CNN模型，融合胰管、胆管等解剖结构次级特征与CT影像数据，实现肿瘤分割与定位。
AI.result: 在99例PDAC数据集上达到99%灵敏度和特异性，较现有方法灵敏度提升5%，且推理时间更短。
AI.conclusion: 临床特征与影像数据的结合显著提升检测性能，为CAD系统开发提供了新方向。

ai_content.result: 在99例PDAC数据集上达到99%灵敏度和特异性，较现有方法灵敏度提升5%，且推理时间更短。
ai_content.conclusion: 临床特征与影像数据的结合显著提升检测性能，为CAD系统开发提供了新方向。

search_text: Improved Pancreatic Tumor Detection by Utilizing Clinically-Relevant Secondary Features 利用临床相关的次要特征改进胰腺肿瘤检测 Pancreatic cancer is one of the global leading causes of cancer-related deaths. Despite the success of Deep Learning in computer-aided diagnosis and detection (CAD) methods, little attention has been paid to the detection of Pancreatic Cancer. We propose a method for detecting pancreatic tumor that utilizes clinically-relevant features in the surrounding anatomical structures, thereby better aiming to exploit the radiologist's knowledge compared to other, conventional deep learning approaches. To this end, we collect a new dataset consisting of 99 cases with pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC) and 97 control cases without any pancreatic tumor. Due to the growth pattern of pancreatic cancer, the tumor may not be always visible as a hypodense lesion, therefore experts refer to the visibility of secondary external features that may indicate the presence of the tumor. We propose a method based on a U-Net-like Deep CNN that exploits the following external secondary features: the pancreatic duct, common bile duct and the pancreas, along with a processed CT scan. Using these features, the model segments the pancreatic tumor if it is present. This segmentation for classification and localization approach achieves a performance of 99% sensitivity (one case missed) and 99% specificity, which realizes a 5% increase in sensitivity over the previous state-of-the-art method. The model additionally provides location information with reasonable accuracy and a shorter inference time compared to previous PDAC detection methods. These results offer a significant performance improvement and highlight the importance of incorporating the knowledge of the clinical expert when developing novel CAD methods. 胰腺癌是全球癌症相关死亡的主要原因之一。尽管深度学习在计算机辅助诊断和检测（CAD）方法中取得了成功，但胰腺癌的检测却很少受到关注。我们提出了一种检测胰腺肿瘤的方法，该方法利用周围解剖结构的临床相关特征，从而与其他传统的深度学习方法相比，更好地利用放射科医生的知识。为此，我们收集了一个新的数据集，其中包括 99 例胰腺导管腺癌 (PDAC) 病例和 97 例无任何胰腺肿瘤的对照病例。由于胰腺癌的生长模式，肿瘤可能并不总是作为低密度病变可见，因此专家提到可能表明肿瘤存在的次要外部特征的可见性。我们提出了一种基于类似 U-Net 的深度 CNN 的方法，该方法利用以下外部次要特征：胰管、胆总管和胰腺，以及经过处理的 CT 扫描。利用这些特征，模型可以分割胰腺肿瘤（如果存在）。这种分类和定位方法的分割实现了 99% 的灵敏度（漏掉一个病例）和 99% 的特异性，与之前最先进的方法相比，灵敏度提高了 5%。与之前的 PDAC 检测方法相比，该模型还提供了具有合理精度的位置信息和更短的推理时间。这些结果显着提高了性能，并凸显了在开发新型 CAD 方法时结合临床专家知识的重要性。 本文提出一种利用临床相关次级特征的改进方法，以提高胰腺肿瘤的检测性能。 Christiaan G. A. Viviers,Mark Ramaekers,Peter H. N. de With,Dimitrios Mavroeidis,Joost Nederend,Misha Luyer,Fons van der Sommen cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Athena Psalta,Vasileios Tsironis,Konstantinos Karantzalos
title: Transformer-based assignment decision network for multiple object tracking
title_zh: 基于变压器的多目标跟踪分配决策网络
comment: Preprint version. Under consideration at Computer Vision and Image Understanding
comments: Preprint version. Under consideration at Computer Vision and Image Understanding
abstract: Data association is a crucial component for any multiple object tracking (MOT) method that follows the tracking-by-detection paradigm. To generate complete trajectories such methods employ a data association process to establish assignments between detections and existing targets during each timestep. Recent data association approaches try to solve either a multi-dimensional linear assignment task or a network flow minimization problem or tackle it via multiple hypotheses tracking. However, during inference an optimization step that computes optimal assignments is required for every sequence frame inducing additional complexity to any given solution. To this end, in the context of this work we introduce Transformer-based Assignment Decision Network (TADN) that tackles data association without the need of any explicit optimization during inference. In particular, TADN can directly infer assignment pairs between detections and active targets in a single forward pass of the network. We have integrated TADN in a rather simple MOT framework, designed a novel training strategy for efficient end-to-end training and demonstrated the high potential of our approach for online visual tracking-by-detection MOT on several popular benchmarks, i.e. MOT17, MOT20 and UA-DETRAC. Our proposed approach demonstrates strong performance in most evaluation metrics despite its simple nature as a tracker lacking significant auxiliary components such as occlusion handling or re-identification. The implementation of our method is publicly available at https://github.com/psaltaath/tadn-mot.
summary: Data association is a crucial component for any multiple object tracking (MOT) method that follows the tracking-by-detection paradigm. To generate complete trajectories such methods employ a data association process to establish assignments between detections and existing targets during each timestep. Recent data association approaches try to solve either a multi-dimensional linear assignment task or a network flow minimization problem or tackle it via multiple hypotheses tracking. However, during inference an optimization step that computes optimal assignments is required for every sequence frame inducing additional complexity to any given solution. To this end, in the context of this work we introduce Transformer-based Assignment Decision Network (TADN) that tackles data association without the need of any explicit optimization during inference. In particular, TADN can directly infer assignment pairs between detections and active targets in a single forward pass of the network. We have integrated TADN in a rather simple MOT framework, designed a novel training strategy for efficient end-to-end training and demonstrated the high potential of our approach for online visual tracking-by-detection MOT on several popular benchmarks, i.e. MOT17, MOT20 and UA-DETRAC. Our proposed approach demonstrates strong performance in most evaluation metrics despite its simple nature as a tracker lacking significant auxiliary components such as occlusion handling or re-identification. The implementation of our method is publicly available at https://github.com/psaltaath/tadn-mot.
abstract_zh: 数据关联是任何遵循检测跟踪范式的多对象跟踪 (MOT) 方法的关键组成部分。为了生成完整的轨迹，此类方法采用数据关联过程来在每个时间步长期间建立检测和现有目标之间的分配。最近的数据关联方法试图解决多维线性分配任务或网络流最小化问题或通过多个假设跟踪来解决它。然而，在推理过程中，每个序列帧都需要计算最佳分配的优化步骤，这会给任何给定的解决方案带来额外的复杂性。为此，在这项工作的背景下，我们引入了基于 Transformer 的分配决策网络（TADN），它可以处理数据关联，而无需在推理过程中进行任何显式优化。特别是，TADN 可以在网络的单次前向传递中直接推断检测和活动目标之间的分配对。我们将 TADN 集成到一个相当简单的 MOT 框架中，设计了一种用于高效端到端训练的新颖训练策略，并在几个流行的基准（即 MOT17、MOT20 和 UA-DETRAC）上展示了我们的在线视觉跟踪检测 MOT 方法的巨大潜力。我们提出的方法在大多数评估指标中表现出强大的性能，尽管它作为跟踪器的简单性质缺乏重要的辅助组件，例如遮挡处理或重新识别。我们的方法的实现可在 https://github.com/psaltaath/tadn-mot 上公开获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的分配决策网络（TADN），用于解决多目标跟踪中的数据关联问题，无需显式优化步骤即可直接推断检测与目标之间的分配关系。
AI.motivation: 传统多目标跟踪方法在推理时需为每帧计算最优分配，导致复杂度增加。本文旨在通过无需显式优化的网络设计，简化数据关联过程并提升效率。
AI.method: 设计TADN网络，利用Transformer架构在单次前向传播中直接推断检测与活跃目标的分配对，并结合简单MOT框架与新颖训练策略实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在MOT17、MOT20和UA-DETRAC等基准测试中，该方法在多数评估指标上表现优异，尽管未采用遮挡处理或重识别等复杂模块。
AI.conclusion: TADN为在线视觉跟踪提供了简单有效的数据关联解决方案，验证了其在无需复杂辅助组件情况下仍具备强大性能的潜力。

authors_text: Vaanathi Sundaresan,Julia F. Lehman,Sean Fitzgibbon,Saad Jbabdi,Suzanne N. Haber,Anastasia Yendiki
title: Constrained self-supervised method with temporal ensembling for fiber bundle detection on anatomic tracing data
title_zh: 用于解剖追踪数据纤维束检测的时间集成约束自监督方法
comment: Accepted in 1st International Workshop on Medical Optical Imaging and Virtual Microscopy Image Analysis (MOVI 2022)
comments: Accepted in 1st International Workshop on Medical Optical Imaging and Virtual Microscopy Image Analysis (MOVI 2022)
abstract: Anatomic tracing data provides detailed information on brain circuitry essential for addressing some of the common errors in diffusion MRI tractography. However, automated detection of fiber bundles on tracing data is challenging due to sectioning distortions, presence of noise and artifacts and intensity/contrast variations. In this work, we propose a deep learning method with a self-supervised loss function that takes anatomy-based constraints into account for accurate segmentation of fiber bundles on the tracer sections from macaque brains. Also, given the limited availability of manual labels, we use a semi-supervised training technique for efficiently using unlabeled data to improve the performance, and location constraints for further reduction of false positives. Evaluation of our method on unseen sections from a different macaque yields promising results with a true positive rate of ~0.90. The code for our method is available at https://github.com/v-sundaresan/fiberbundle_seg_tracing.
summary: Anatomic tracing data provides detailed information on brain circuitry essential for addressing some of the common errors in diffusion MRI tractography. However, automated detection of fiber bundles on tracing data is challenging due to sectioning distortions, presence of noise and artifacts and intensity/contrast variations. In this work, we propose a deep learning method with a self-supervised loss function that takes anatomy-based constraints into account for accurate segmentation of fiber bundles on the tracer sections from macaque brains. Also, given the limited availability of manual labels, we use a semi-supervised training technique for efficiently using unlabeled data to improve the performance, and location constraints for further reduction of false positives. Evaluation of our method on unseen sections from a different macaque yields promising results with a true positive rate of ~0.90. The code for our method is available at https://github.com/v-sundaresan/fiberbundle_seg_tracing.
abstract_zh: 解剖追踪数据提供了有关大脑回路的详细信息，对于解决扩散 MRI 纤维束成像中的一些常见错误至关重要。然而，由于切片变形、噪声和伪影的存在以及强度/对比度变化，在跟踪数据上自动检测纤维束具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有自监督损失函数的深度学习方法，该方法考虑了基于解剖学的约束，以准确分割猕猴大脑示踪部分上的纤维束。此外，考虑到手动标签的可用性有限，我们使用半监督训练技术来有效地使用未标记的数据来提高性能，并使用位置限制来进一步减少误报。对来自不同猕猴的未见切片的方法进行评估，得到了有希望的结果，真实阳性率约为 0.90。我们方法的代码可在 https://github.com/v-sundaresan/opticalbundle_seg_tracing 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合解剖约束的自监督深度学习方法，用于提高猕猴脑解剖追踪数据中纤维束的分割准确性。
AI.motivation: 解剖追踪数据中的纤维束检测面临切片失真、噪声干扰及对比度变化等挑战，且手动标注数据稀缺，亟需自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含解剖约束的自监督损失函数，结合半监督训练技术利用未标注数据，并引入位置约束减少假阳性。
AI.result: 在跨猕猴的测试数据中达到约90%的真阳性率，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督与半监督结合有效提升了纤维束分割性能，为处理解剖追踪数据提供了可行方案。

result: 在跨猕猴的测试数据中达到约90%的真阳性率，代码已开源。
conclusion: 该方法通过自监督与半监督结合有效提升了纤维束分割性能，为处理解剖追踪数据提供了可行方案。
search_text: Constrained self-supervised method with temporal ensembling for fiber bundle detection on anatomic tracing data 用于解剖追踪数据纤维束检测的时间集成约束自监督方法 Anatomic tracing data provides detailed information on brain circuitry essential for addressing some of the common errors in diffusion MRI tractography. However, automated detection of fiber bundles on tracing data is challenging due to sectioning distortions, presence of noise and artifacts and intensity/contrast variations. In this work, we propose a deep learning method with a self-supervised loss function that takes anatomy-based constraints into account for accurate segmentation of fiber bundles on the tracer sections from macaque brains. Also, given the limited availability of manual labels, we use a semi-supervised training technique for efficiently using unlabeled data to improve the performance, and location constraints for further reduction of false positives. Evaluation of our method on unseen sections from a different macaque yields promising results with a true positive rate of ~0.90. The code for our method is available at https://github.com/v-sundaresan/fiberbundle_seg_tracing. 解剖追踪数据提供了有关大脑回路的详细信息，对于解决扩散 MRI 纤维束成像中的一些常见错误至关重要。然而，由于切片变形、噪声和伪影的存在以及强度/对比度变化，在跟踪数据上自动检测纤维束具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种具有自监督损失函数的深度学习方法，该方法考虑了基于解剖学的约束，以准确分割猕猴大脑示踪部分上的纤维束。此外，考虑到手动标签的可用性有限，我们使用半监督训练技术来有效地使用未标记的数据来提高性能，并使用位置限制来进一步减少误报。对来自不同猕猴的未见切片的方法进行评估，得到了有希望的结果，真实阳性率约为 0.90。我们方法的代码可在 https://github.com/v-sundaresan/opticalbundle_seg_tracing 获取。 本文提出一种结合解剖约束的自监督深度学习方法，用于提高猕猴脑解剖追踪数据中纤维束的分割准确性。 Vaanathi Sundaresan,Julia F. Lehman,Sean Fitzgibbon,Saad Jbabdi,Suzanne N. Haber,Anastasia Yendiki eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Congyu Fang,Hengrui Jia,Anvith Thudi,Mohammad Yaghini,Christopher A. Choquette-Choo,Natalie Dullerud,Varun Chandrasekaran,Nicolas Papernot
title: Proof-of-Learning is Currently More Broken Than You Think
title_zh: 学习证明目前的问题比你想象的还要严重
abstract: Proof-of-Learning (PoL) proposes that a model owner logs training checkpoints to establish a proof of having expended the computation necessary for training. The authors of PoL forego cryptographic approaches and trade rigorous security guarantees for scalability to deep learning. They empirically argued the benefit of this approach by showing how spoofing--computing a proof for a stolen model--is as expensive as obtaining the proof honestly by training the model. However, recent work has provided a counter-example and thus has invalidated this observation. In this work we demonstrate, first, that while it is true that current PoL verification is not robust to adversaries, recent work has largely underestimated this lack of robustness. This is because existing spoofing strategies are either unreproducible or target weakened instantiations of PoL--meaning they are easily thwarted by changing hyperparameters of the verification. Instead, we introduce the first spoofing strategies that can be reproduced across different configurations of the PoL verification and can be done for a fraction of the cost of previous spoofing strategies. This is possible because we identify key vulnerabilities of PoL and systematically analyze the underlying assumptions needed for robust verification of a proof. On the theoretical side, we show how realizing these assumptions reduces to open problems in learning theory.We conclude that one cannot develop a provably robust PoL verification mechanism without further understanding of optimization in deep learning.
summary: Proof-of-Learning (PoL) proposes that a model owner logs training checkpoints to establish a proof of having expended the computation necessary for training. The authors of PoL forego cryptographic approaches and trade rigorous security guarantees for scalability to deep learning. They empirically argued the benefit of this approach by showing how spoofing--computing a proof for a stolen model--is as expensive as obtaining the proof honestly by training the model. However, recent work has provided a counter-example and thus has invalidated this observation. In this work we demonstrate, first, that while it is true that current PoL verification is not robust to adversaries, recent work has largely underestimated this lack of robustness. This is because existing spoofing strategies are either unreproducible or target weakened instantiations of PoL--meaning they are easily thwarted by changing hyperparameters of the verification. Instead, we introduce the first spoofing strategies that can be reproduced across different configurations of the PoL verification and can be done for a fraction of the cost of previous spoofing strategies. This is possible because we identify key vulnerabilities of PoL and systematically analyze the underlying assumptions needed for robust verification of a proof. On the theoretical side, we show how realizing these assumptions reduces to open problems in learning theory.We conclude that one cannot develop a provably robust PoL verification mechanism without further understanding of optimization in deep learning.
abstract_zh: 学习证明 (PoL) 建议模型所有者记录训练检查点，以建立已消耗训练所需计算量的证明。 PoL 的作者放弃了加密方法，并以严格的安全保证换取深度学习的可扩展性。他们通过展示欺骗（计算被盗模型的证明）与通过训练模型诚实地获得证明一样昂贵，从经验上论证了这种方法的好处。然而，最近的工作提供了一个反例，从而使这一观察无效。在这项工作中，我们首先证明，虽然当前的 PoL 验证对于对手来说确实不稳健，但最近的工作在很大程度上低估了这种稳健性的缺乏。这是因为现有的欺骗策略要么是不可重现的，要么是针对 PoL 的弱化实例，这意味着它们很容易通过更改验证的超参数来阻止。相反，我们引入了第一个欺骗策略，该策略可以在不同的 PoL 验证配置中重现，并且成本仅为以前欺骗策略的一小部分。这是可能的，因为我们识别了 PoL 的关键漏洞，并系统地分析了稳健验证证明所需的基本假设。在理论方面，我们展示了如何实现这些假设简化为学习理论中的开放问题。我们的结论是，如果不进一步了解深度学习中的优化，就无法开发出一种可证明稳健的 PoL 验证机制。

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了当前Proof-of-Learning（PoL）验证机制存在严重安全漏洞，且现有研究低估了其脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 现有PoL机制声称通过训练检查点验证模型训练成本，但近期研究发现其抗伪造能力被严重低估，需重新评估其安全性。
AI.method: 提出可跨不同PoL配置复现的伪造策略，通过分析PoL验证的底层假设，发现其关键漏洞并证明伪造成本远低于诚实训练。
AI.result: 验证了现有PoL机制对伪造攻击的脆弱性，展示了更高效伪造方法，并指出其安全性依赖未解决的深度学习优化理论问题。
AI.conclusion: 在缺乏深度学习优化理论突破的前提下，无法构建 provably robust 的PoL验证机制。

However, recent work has provided a counter-example and thus has invalidated this observation. In this work we demonstrate, first, that while it is true that current PoL verification is not robust to adversaries, recent work has largely underestimated this lack of robustness. This is possible because we identify key vulnerabilities of PoL and systematically analyze the underlying assumptions needed for robust verification of a proof. authors_text: Xiao Liu,Spyridon Thermos,Pedro Sanchez,Alison Q. O'Neil,Sotirios A. Tsaftaris
title: HSIC-InfoGAN: Learning Unsupervised Disentangled Representations by Maximising Approximated Mutual Information
title_zh: HSIC-InfoGAN：通过最大化近似互信息来学习无监督解缠表示
abstract: Learning disentangled representations requires either supervision or the introduction of specific model designs and learning constraints as biases. InfoGAN is a popular disentanglement framework that learns unsupervised disentangled representations by maximising the mutual information between latent representations and their corresponding generated images. Maximisation of mutual information is achieved by introducing an auxiliary network and training with a latent regression loss. In this short exploratory paper, we study the use of the Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC) to approximate mutual information between latent representation and image, termed HSIC-InfoGAN. Directly optimising the HSIC loss avoids the need for an additional auxiliary network. We qualitatively compare the level of disentanglement in each model, suggest a strategy to tune the hyperparameters of HSIC-InfoGAN, and discuss the potential of HSIC-InfoGAN for medical applications.
summary: Learning disentangled representations requires either supervision or the introduction of specific model designs and learning constraints as biases. InfoGAN is a popular disentanglement framework that learns unsupervised disentangled representations by maximising the mutual information between latent representations and their corresponding generated images. Maximisation of mutual information is achieved by introducing an auxiliary network and training with a latent regression loss. In this short exploratory paper, we study the use of the Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC) to approximate mutual information between latent representation and image, termed HSIC-InfoGAN. Directly optimising the HSIC loss avoids the need for an additional auxiliary network. We qualitatively compare the level of disentanglement in each model, suggest a strategy to tune the hyperparameters of HSIC-InfoGAN, and discuss the potential of HSIC-InfoGAN for medical applications.
abstract_zh: 学习解缠结的表示需要监督或引入特定的模型设计和学习约束作为偏差。 InfoGAN 是一种流行的解缠结框架，它通过最大化潜在表示与其相应的生成图像之间的互信息来学习无监督的解缠结表示。通过引入辅助网络并使用潜在回归损失进行训练来实现互信息的最大化。在这篇简短的探索性论文中，我们研究了使用希尔伯特-施密特独立准则 (HSIC) 来近似潜在表示和图像之间的互信息，称为 HSIC-InfoGAN。直接优化 HSIC 损耗避免了对额外辅助网络的需要。我们定性比较每个模型的解缠水平，提出调整 HSIC-InfoGAN 超参数的策略，并讨论 HSIC-InfoGAN 在医疗应用中的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HSIC-InfoGAN方法，通过Hilbert-Schmidt独立性准则（HSIC）近似潜在表示与生成图像间的互信息，实现无监督解耦表示学习，无需额外辅助网络。
AI.motivation: 传统InfoGAN依赖辅助网络进行互信息最大化，结构复杂且需额外训练。HSIC能直接通过损失函数优化近似互信息，简化模型设计并提升效率。
AI.method: 采用HSIC替代原始互信息最大化目标，直接优化HSIC损失函数；通过定性实验比较解耦效果，提出超参数调整策略，并探讨医疗场景的应用潜力。
AI.result: 实验表明HSIC-InfoGAN可有效生成解耦表示，超参数调优策略提升性能，且在医疗图像分析中展现出应用价值。
AI.conclusion: HSIC-InfoGAN通过简化模型结构实现了高效解耦学习，未来可进一步探索其在医疗等领域的实际应用效果。

authors_text: Qiaomu Miao,Sinhwa Kang,Stacy Marsella,Steve DiPaola,Chao Wang,Ari Shapiro
title: Study of detecting behavioral signatures within DeepFake videos
title_zh: DeepFake 视频中行为特征检测的研究
abstract: There is strong interest in the generation of synthetic video imagery of people talking for various purposes, including entertainment, communication, training, and advertisement. With the development of deep fake generation models, synthetic video imagery will soon be visually indistinguishable to the naked eye from a naturally capture video. In addition, many methods are continuing to improve to avoid more careful, forensic visual analysis. Some deep fake videos are produced through the use of facial puppetry, which directly controls the head and face of the synthetic image through the movements of the actor, allow the actor to 'puppet' the image of another. In this paper, we address the question of whether one person's movements can be distinguished from the original speaker by controlling the visual appearance of the speaker but transferring the behavior signals from another source. We conduct a study by comparing synthetic imagery that: 1) originates from a different person speaking a different utterance, 2) originates from the same person speaking a different utterance, and 3) originates from a different person speaking the same utterance. Our study shows that synthetic videos in all three cases are seen as less real and less engaging than the original source video. Our results indicate that there could be a behavioral signature that is detectable from a person's movements that is separate from their visual appearance, and that this behavioral signature could be used to distinguish a deep fake from a properly captured video.

abstract_zh: 人们对出于各种目的（包括娱乐、交流、培训和广告）生成人们说话的合成视频图像有着浓厚的兴趣。随着深度伪造生成模型的发展，合成视频图像很快将在视觉上与自然捕获的视频在视觉上无法区分。此外，许多方法正在不断改进，以避免更仔细的法医视觉分析。一些深度造假视频是通过面部傀儡制作的，通过演员的动作直接控制合成图像的头部和面部，让演员“傀儡”另一个人的形象。在本文中，我们解决了一个问题：是否可以通过控制说话者的视觉外观但从另一个来源传输行为信号来区分一个人的动作与原始说话者的动作。我们通过比较合成图像来进行研究：1) 源自不同的人讲不同的话语，2) 源自同一个人讲不同的话语，3) 源自不同的人讲相同的话语。我们的研究表明，所有三种情况下的合成视频都被认为不如原始源视频真实且缺乏吸引力。我们的结果表明，可能存在可以从一个人的动作中检测到​​的行为特征，该行为特征与他们的视觉外观无关，并且这种行为特征可以用来区分深度伪造和正确捕获的视频。

AI.tldr: 研究通过检测行为特征来识别深度伪造视频的方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以区分深度伪造视频与真实视频，需探索基于行为特征的检测方法
AI.method: 通过比较三种不同来源的合成视频，分析其真实性和参与度差异
AI.result: 三种情况的合成视频均被认为不如原始视频真实，暗示存在可检测的行为特征
AI.conclusion: 行为特征可作为区分深度伪造视频与真实视频的有效依据

authors_text: Basma B. Hasanen,Mohammad I. Awad,Mohamed N. Boushaki,Zhenwei Niu,Mohammed A. Ramadan,Irfan Hussain
title: Novel Supernumerary Robotic Limb based on Variable Stiffness Actuators for Hemiplegic Patients Assistance
title_zh: 基于可变刚度执行器的新型多余机器人肢体用于援助偏瘫患者
comment: 8 pages, 11 figures, Proceedings of the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: 8 pages, 11 figures, Proceedings of the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: Loss of upper extremity motor control and function is an unremitting symptom in post-stroke patients. This would impose hardships on accomplishing their daily life activities. Supernumerary robotic limbs (SRLs) were introduced as a solution to regain the lost Degrees of Freedom (DoFs) by introducing an independent new limb. The actuation systems in SRL can be categorized into rigid and soft actuators. Soft actuators have proven advantageous over their rigid counterparts through intrinsic safety, cost, and energy efficiency. However, they suffer from low stiffness, which jeopardizes their accuracy. Variable Stiffness Actuators (VSAs) are newly developed technologies that have been proven to ensure accuracy and safety. In this paper, we introduce the novel Supernumerary Robotic Limb based on Variable Stiffness Actuators. Based on our knowledge, the proposed proof-of-concept SRL is the first that utilizes Variable Stiffness Actuators. The developed SRL would assist post-stroke patients in bi-manual tasks, e.g., eating with a fork and knife. The modeling, design, and realization of the system are illustrated. The proposed SRL was evaluated and verified for its accuracy via predefined trajectories. The safety was verified by utilizing the momentum observer for collision detection, and several post-collision reaction strategies were evaluated through the Soft Tissue Injury Test. The assistance process is qualitatively verified through standard user-satisfaction questionnaire.

abstract_zh: Loss of upper extremity motor control and function is an unremitting symptom in post-stroke patients. This would impose hardships on accomplishing their daily life activities. Supernumerary robotic limbs (SRLs) were introduced as a solution to regain the lost Degrees of Freedom (DoFs) by introducing an independent new limb. The actuation systems in SRL can be categorized into rigid and soft actuators. Soft actuators have proven advantageous over their rigid counterparts through intrinsic safety, cost, and energy efficiency.然而，它们的刚度较低，这会危及它们的准确性。 Variable Stiffness Actuators (VSAs) are newly developed technologies that have been proven to ensure accuracy and safety. In this paper, we introduce the novel Supernumerary Robotic Limb based on Variable Stiffness Actuators. Based on our knowledge, the proposed proof-of-concept SRL is the first that utilizes Variable Stiffness Actuators.开发的 SRL 将帮助中风后患者完成双手任务，例如用叉子和刀子吃饭。 The modeling, design, and realization of the system are illustrated.通过预定义的轨迹评估和验证了所提出的 SRL 的准确性。 The safety was verified by utilizing the momentum observer for collision detection, and several post-collision reaction strategies were evaluated through the Soft Tissue Injury Test. The assistance process is qualitatively verified through standard user-satisfaction questionnaire.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可变刚度执行器的新颖超数机器人肢体，旨在帮助中风后偏瘫患者完成双臂任务。
AI.motivation: 中风后患者常出现上肢运动控制和功能丧失，影响日常生活。现有超数机器人肢体（SRL）使用刚性或软体执行器，但软体执行器刚度低，影响精度，而刚性执行器则不够安全。可变刚度执行器（VSA）能兼顾安全性和精度，因此本文提出基于VSA的SRL。
AI.method: 本文设计并实现了一种基于VSA的SRL，通过预定义轨迹验证其精度，并利用动量观测器进行碰撞检测，通过软组织损伤测试评估碰撞后的反应策略。
AI.result: 所提出的SRL在精度和安全性方面得到了验证，通过用户满意度问卷定性验证了其辅助效果。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于VSA的SRL是首个采用该技术的SRL，可有效帮助中风患者完成双臂任务，具有较高的实用性和安全性。

authors_text: Rishav Pramanik,Sourodip Sarkar,Ram Sarkar
title: An Adaptive and Altruistic PSO-based Deep Feature Selection Method for Pneumonia Detection from Chest X-Rays
title_zh: 一种基于 PSO 的自适应利他深度特征选择方法，用于胸部 X 光肺炎检测
comment: Accepted in Applied Soft Computing, Elsevier
comments: Accepted in Applied Soft Computing, Elsevier
abstract: Pneumonia is one of the major reasons for child mortality especially in income-deprived regions of the world. Although it can be detected and treated with very less sophisticated instruments and medication, Pneumonia detection still remains a major concern in developing countries. Computer-aided based diagnosis (CAD) systems can be used in such countries due to their lower operating costs than professional medical experts. In this paper, we propose a CAD system for Pneumonia detection from Chest X-rays, using the concepts of deep learning and a meta-heuristic algorithm. We first extract deep features from the pre-trained ResNet50, fine-tuned on a target Pneumonia dataset. Then, we propose a feature selection technique based on particle swarm optimization (PSO), which is modified using a memory-based adaptation parameter, and enriched by incorporating an altruistic behavior into the agents. We name our feature selection method as adaptive and altruistic PSO (AAPSO). The proposed method successfully eliminates non-informative features obtained from the ResNet50 model, thereby improving the Pneumonia detection ability of the overall framework. Extensive experimentation and thorough analysis on a publicly available Pneumonia dataset establish the superiority of the proposed method over several other frameworks used for Pneumonia detection. Apart from Pneumonia detection, AAPSO is further evaluated on some standard UCI datasets, gene expression datasets for cancer prediction and a COVID-19 prediction dataset. The overall results are satisfactory, thereby confirming the usefulness of AAPSO in dealing with varied real-life problems. The supporting source codes of this work can be found at https://github.com/rishavpramanik/AAPSO

We name our feature selection method as adaptive and altruistic PSO (AAPSO). The proposed method successfully eliminates non-informative features obtained from the ResNet50 model, thereby improving the Pneumonia detection ability of the overall framework. Extensive experimentation and thorough analysis on a publicly available Pneumonia dataset establish the superiority of the proposed method over several other frameworks used for Pneumonia detection. Apart from Pneumonia detection, AAPSO is further evaluated on some standard UCI datasets, gene expression datasets for cancer prediction and a COVID-19 prediction dataset. The overall results are satisfactory, thereby confirming the usefulness of AAPSO in dealing with varied real-life problems. The supporting source codes of this work can be found at https://github.com/rishavpramanik/AAPSO
abstract_zh: 肺炎是儿童死亡的主要原因之一，尤其是在世界收入贫困地区。尽管可以用不太复杂的仪器和药物来检测和治疗肺炎，但肺炎检测仍然是发展中国家的一个主要问题。计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统可以在这些国家使用，因为它们的运营成本比专业医学专家低。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用深度学习和元启发式算法的概念，通过胸部 X 光检测肺炎的 CAD 系统。我们首先从预训练的 ResNet50 中提取深度特征，并在目标肺炎数据集上进行微调。然后，我们提出了一种基于粒子群优化（PSO）的特征选择技术，该技术使用基于记忆的适应参数进行修改，并通过将利他行为纳入代理中来丰富。我们将我们的特征选择方法命名为自适应利他 PSO (AAPSO)。该方法成功消除了从ResNet50模型中获得的非信息特征，从而提高了整体框架的肺炎检测能力。对公开可用的肺炎数据集进行的广泛实验和彻底分析表明，所提出的方法相对于用于肺炎检测的其他几种框架具有优越性。除了肺炎检测之外，AAPSO 还在一些标准 UCI 数据集、癌症预测基因表达数据集和 COVID-19 预测数据集上进行了进一步评估。总体结果令人满意，从而证实了 AAPSO 在处理各种现实生活问题中的有用性。这项工作的支持源代码可以在 https://github.com/rishavpramanik/AAPSO 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应和利他主义粒子群优化（AAPSO）的深度特征选择方法，用于从胸部X光片中检测肺炎的计算机辅助诊断系统。
AI.motivation: 肺炎是发展中国家儿童死亡的主要原因之一，传统诊断方法成本高且依赖专业医生。为解决这一问题，需开发低成本、高效的计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统。
AI.method: 首先使用预训练的ResNet50模型提取深度特征，并通过自适应和利他主义改进的粒子群优化算法（AAPSO）进行特征选择，消除非信息特征以提升检测性能。
AI.result: 在公开的肺炎数据集及多个标准UCI、基因表达和COVID-19数据集上验证，AAPSO方法在肺炎检测和其他任务中均优于现有框架，结果令人满意。
AI.conclusion: AAPSO方法在处理多种现实问题中表现出有效性，其代码已开源，为肺炎检测及其他领域提供了实用的特征选择解决方案。

search_text: An Adaptive and Altruistic PSO-based Deep Feature Selection Method for Pneumonia Detection from Chest X-Rays 一种基于 PSO 的自适应利他深度特征选择方法，用于胸部 X 光肺炎检测 Pneumonia is one of the major reasons for child mortality especially in income-deprived regions of the world. Although it can be detected and treated with very less sophisticated instruments and medication, Pneumonia detection still remains a major concern in developing countries. Computer-aided based diagnosis (CAD) systems can be used in such countries due to their lower operating costs than professional medical experts. In this paper, we propose a CAD system for Pneumonia detection from Chest X-rays, using the concepts of deep learning and a meta-heuristic algorithm. We first extract deep features from the pre-trained ResNet50, fine-tuned on a target Pneumonia dataset. Then, we propose a feature selection technique based on particle swarm optimization (PSO), which is modified using a memory-based adaptation parameter, and enriched by incorporating an altruistic behavior into the agents. We name our feature selection method as adaptive and altruistic PSO (AAPSO). The proposed method successfully eliminates non-informative features obtained from the ResNet50 model, thereby improving the Pneumonia detection ability of the overall framework. Extensive experimentation and thorough analysis on a publicly available Pneumonia dataset establish the superiority of the proposed method over several other frameworks used for Pneumonia detection. Apart from Pneumonia detection, AAPSO is further evaluated on some standard UCI datasets, gene expression datasets for cancer prediction and a COVID-19 prediction dataset. The overall results are satisfactory, thereby confirming the usefulness of AAPSO in dealing with varied real-life problems. The supporting source codes of this work can be found at https://github.com/rishavpramanik/AAPSO 肺炎是儿童死亡的主要原因之一，尤其是在世界收入贫困地区。尽管可以用不太复杂的仪器和药物来检测和治疗肺炎，但肺炎检测仍然是发展中国家的一个主要问题。计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统可以在这些国家使用，因为它们的运营成本比专业医学专家低。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用深度学习和元启发式算法的概念，通过胸部 X 光检测肺炎的 CAD 系统。我们首先从预训练的 ResNet50 中提取深度特征，并在目标肺炎数据集上进行微调。然后，我们提出了一种基于粒子群优化（PSO）的特征选择技术，该技术使用基于记忆的适应参数进行修改，并通过将利他行为纳入代理中来丰富。我们将我们的特征选择方法命名为自适应利他 PSO (AAPSO)。该方法成功消除了从ResNet50模型中获得的非信息特征，从而提高了整体框架的肺炎检测能力。对公开可用的肺炎数据集进行的广泛实验和彻底分析表明，所提出的方法相对于用于肺炎检测的其他几种框架具有优越性。除了肺炎检测之外，AAPSO 还在一些标准 UCI 数据集、癌症预测基因表达数据集和 COVID-19 预测数据集上进行了进一步评估。总体结果令人满意，从而证实了 AAPSO 在处理各种现实生活问题中的有用性。这项工作的支持源代码可以在 https://github.com/rishavpramanik/AAPSO 找到 本文提出一种基于自适应和利他主义粒子群优化（AAPSO）的深度特征选择方法，用于从胸部X光片中检测肺炎的计算机辅助诊断系统。 Rishav Pramanik,Sourodip Sarkar,Ram Sarkar eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.NE

authors_text: Lingzhi Zhang,Connelly Barnes,Kevin Wampler,Sohrab Amirghodsi,Eli Shechtman,Zhe Lin,Jianbo Shi
title: Inpainting at Modern Camera Resolution by Guided PatchMatch with Auto-Curation
title_zh: 通过引导式 PatchMatch 和自动管理以现代相机分辨率进行修复
abstract: Recently, deep models have established SOTA performance for low-resolution image inpainting, but they lack fidelity at resolutions associated with modern cameras such as 4K or more, and for large holes. We contribute an inpainting benchmark dataset of photos at 4K and above representative of modern sensors. We demonstrate a novel framework that combines deep learning and traditional methods. We use an existing deep inpainting model LaMa to fill the hole plausibly, establish three guide images consisting of structure, segmentation, depth, and apply a multiply-guided PatchMatch to produce eight candidate upsampled inpainted images. Next, we feed all candidate inpaintings through a novel curation module that chooses a good inpainting by column summation on an 8x8 antisymmetric pairwise preference matrix. Our framework's results are overwhelmingly preferred by users over 8 strong baselines, with improvements of quantitative metrics up to 7.4 over the best baseline LaMa, and our technique when paired with 4 different SOTA inpainting backbones improves each such that ours is overwhelmingly preferred by users over a strong super-res baseline.
summary: Recently, deep models have established SOTA performance for low-resolution image inpainting, but they lack fidelity at resolutions associated with modern cameras such as 4K or more, and for large holes. We contribute an inpainting benchmark dataset of photos at 4K and above representative of modern sensors. We demonstrate a novel framework that combines deep learning and traditional methods. We use an existing deep inpainting model LaMa to fill the hole plausibly, establish three guide images consisting of structure, segmentation, depth, and apply a multiply-guided PatchMatch to produce eight candidate upsampled inpainted images. Next, we feed all candidate inpaintings through a novel curation module that chooses a good inpainting by column summation on an 8x8 antisymmetric pairwise preference matrix. Our framework's results are overwhelmingly preferred by users over 8 strong baselines, with improvements of quantitative metrics up to 7.4 over the best baseline LaMa, and our technique when paired with 4 different SOTA inpainting backbones improves each such that ours is overwhelmingly preferred by users over a strong super-res baseline.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度模型已经为低分辨率图像修复建立了 SOTA 性能，但它们在与现代相机（例如 4K 或更高）相关的分辨率以及大孔方面缺乏保真度。我们提供了代表现代传感器的 4K 及以上照片修复基准数据集。我们展示了一个结合深度学习和传统方法的新颖框架。我们使用现有的深度修复模型 LaMa 来合理地填补漏洞，建立由结构、分割、深度组成的三个引导图像，并应用多重引导 PatchMatch 来生成八个候选上采样修复图像。接下来，我们通过一个新颖的管理模块提供所有候选修复，该模块通过 8x8 反对称成对偏好矩阵上的列求和来选择良好的修复。我们的框架的结果在 8 个强基线上受到用户的压倒性青睐，定量指标比最佳基线 LaMa 提高了 7.4，并且我们的技术与 4 个不同的 SOTA 修复主干配合使用时，每个主干都得到了改进，因此我们的结果比强大的超分辨率基线更受用户压倒性的青睐。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度学习与传统方法的高分辨率图像修复框架，解决现代相机（如4K及以上）在大孔洞修复中的保真度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度模型在低分辨率图像修复中表现优异，但在现代高分辨率（如4K）和大孔洞场景下存在保真度不足的问题，且缺乏相应基准数据集。
AI.method: 使用LaMa模型生成初步修复结果，结合结构、分割和深度三类引导图像，通过多引导PatchMatch生成8个候选修复图像，并利用基于8x8反对称矩阵的列求和策略进行自动筛选优化。
AI.result: 用户偏好测试中显著优于8个基线模型，定量指标较最优基线LaMa提升7.4，且与4种SOTA修复模型结合后均优于超分基线。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过深度学习与传统方法的协同优化，结合创新的自动筛选机制，在高分辨率图像修复任务中实现了显著性能提升。

authors_text: Ziyi Lin,Shijie Geng,Renrui Zhang,Peng Gao,Gerard de Melo,Xiaogang Wang,Jifeng Dai,Yu Qiao,Hongsheng Li
title: Frozen CLIP Models are Efficient Video Learners
title_zh: Frozen CLIP 模型是高效的视频学习器
abstract: Video recognition has been dominated by the end-to-end learning paradigm -- first initializing a video recognition model with weights of a pretrained image model and then conducting end-to-end training on videos. This enables the video network to benefit from the pretrained image model. However, this requires substantial computation and memory resources for finetuning on videos and the alternative of directly using pretrained image features without finetuning the image backbone leads to subpar results. Fortunately, recent advances in Contrastive Vision-Language Pre-training (CLIP) pave the way for a new route for visual recognition tasks. Pretrained on large open-vocabulary image-text pair data, these models learn powerful visual representations with rich semantics. In this paper, we present Efficient Video Learning (EVL) -- an efficient framework for directly training high-quality video recognition models with frozen CLIP features. Specifically, we employ a lightweight Transformer decoder and learn a query token to dynamically collect frame-level spatial features from the CLIP image encoder. Furthermore, we adopt a local temporal module in each decoder layer to discover temporal clues from adjacent frames and their attention maps. We show that despite being efficient to train with a frozen backbone, our models learn high quality video representations on a variety of video recognition datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/OpenGVLab/efficient-video-recognition.
summary: Video recognition has been dominated by the end-to-end learning paradigm -- first initializing a video recognition model with weights of a pretrained image model and then conducting end-to-end training on videos. This enables the video network to benefit from the pretrained image model. However, this requires substantial computation and memory resources for finetuning on videos and the alternative of directly using pretrained image features without finetuning the image backbone leads to subpar results. Fortunately, recent advances in Contrastive Vision-Language Pre-training (CLIP) pave the way for a new route for visual recognition tasks. Pretrained on large open-vocabulary image-text pair data, these models learn powerful visual representations with rich semantics. In this paper, we present Efficient Video Learning (EVL) -- an efficient framework for directly training high-quality video recognition models with frozen CLIP features. Specifically, we employ a lightweight Transformer decoder and learn a query token to dynamically collect frame-level spatial features from the CLIP image encoder. Furthermore, we adopt a local temporal module in each decoder layer to discover temporal clues from adjacent frames and their attention maps. We show that despite being efficient to train with a frozen backbone, our models learn high quality video representations on a variety of video recognition datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/OpenGVLab/efficient-video-recognition.
abstract_zh: 视频识别一直以端到端学习范式为主——首先使用预训练图像模型的权重初始化视频识别模型，然后对视频进行端到端训练。这使得视频网络能够从预训练的图像模型中受益。然而，这需要大量的计算和内存资源来对视频进行微调，并且直接使用预训练的图像特征而不微调图像主干的替代方案会导致结果不佳。幸运的是，对比视觉语言预训练（CLIP）的最新进展为视觉识别任务的新途径铺平了道路。这些模型经过对大型开放词汇图像文本对数据的预训练，可以学习具有丰富语义的强大视觉表示。在本文中，我们提出了高效视频学习（EVL）——一种有效的框架，用于直接训练具有冻结 CLIP 特征的高质量视频识别模型。具体来说，我们采用轻量级 Transformer 解码器并学习查询标记，以从 CLIP 图像编码器动态收集帧级空间特征。此外，我们在每个解码器层中采用局部时间模块来从相邻帧及其注意力图中发现时间线索。我们表明，尽管使用冻结的骨干网络进行训练非常有效，但我们的模型可以在各种视频识别数据集上学习高质量的视频表示。代码可在 https://github.com/OpenGVLab/efficient-video-recognition 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的视频学习框架EVL，通过冻结CLIP模型特征直接训练视频识别模型，避免端到端训练的高昂资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 传统视频识别依赖端到端训练但资源消耗大，直接使用预训练图像特征效果差。CLIP模型的跨模态预训练能力为视频学习提供新思路。
AI.method: 采用轻量级Transformer解码器与查询令牌提取空间特征，结合局部时间模块捕捉帧间时序信息，全程冻结CLIP图像编码器权重。
AI.result: 模型在多个视频数据集上取得与端到端方法相当的性能，训练效率显著提升，验证了冻结CLIP特征的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 冻结CLIP模型可作为高效视频学习的可行方案，在保持性能的同时降低计算成本，为视觉表征学习提供新方向。

search_text: Frozen CLIP Models are Efficient Video Learners Frozen CLIP 模型是高效的视频学习器 Video recognition has been dominated by the end-to-end learning paradigm -- first initializing a video recognition model with weights of a pretrained image model and then conducting end-to-end training on videos. This enables the video network to benefit from the pretrained image model. However, this requires substantial computation and memory resources for finetuning on videos and the alternative of directly using pretrained image features without finetuning the image backbone leads to subpar results. Fortunately, recent advances in Contrastive Vision-Language Pre-training (CLIP) pave the way for a new route for visual recognition tasks. Pretrained on large open-vocabulary image-text pair data, these models learn powerful visual representations with rich semantics. In this paper, we present Efficient Video Learning (EVL) -- an efficient framework for directly training high-quality video recognition models with frozen CLIP features. Specifically, we employ a lightweight Transformer decoder and learn a query token to dynamically collect frame-level spatial features from the CLIP image encoder. Furthermore, we adopt a local temporal module in each decoder layer to discover temporal clues from adjacent frames and their attention maps. We show that despite being efficient to train with a frozen backbone, our models learn high quality video representations on a variety of video recognition datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/OpenGVLab/efficient-video-recognition. 视频识别一直以端到端学习范式为主——首先使用预训练图像模型的权重初始化视频识别模型，然后对视频进行端到端训练。这使得视频网络能够从预训练的图像模型中受益。然而，这需要大量的计算和内存资源来对视频进行微调，并且直接使用预训练的图像特征而不微调图像主干的替代方案会导致结果不佳。幸运的是，对比视觉语言预训练（CLIP）的最新进展为视觉识别任务的新途径铺平了道路。这些模型经过对大型开放词汇图像文本对数据的预训练，可以学习具有丰富语义的强大视觉表示。在本文中，我们提出了高效视频学习（EVL）——一种有效的框架，用于直接训练具有冻结 CLIP 特征的高质量视频识别模型。具体来说，我们采用轻量级 Transformer 解码器并学习查询标记，以从 CLIP 图像编码器动态收集帧级空间特征。此外，我们在每个解码器层中采用局部时间模块来从相邻帧及其注意力图中发现时间线索。我们表明，尽管使用冻结的骨干网络进行训练非常有效，但我们的模型可以在各种视频识别数据集上学习高质量的视频表示。代码可在 https://github.com/OpenGVLab/efficient-video-recognition 获取。 本文提出一种高效的视频学习框架EVL，通过冻结CLIP模型特征直接训练视频识别模型，避免端到端训练的高昂资源消耗。 Ziyi Lin,Shijie Geng,Renrui Zhang,Peng Gao,Gerard de Melo,Xiaogang Wang,Jifeng Dai,Yu Qiao,Hongsheng Li cs.CV

authors_text: Hieu H. Pham,Ha Q. Nguyen,Hieu T. Nguyen,Linh T. Le,Lam Khanh
title: An Accurate and Explainable Deep Learning System Improves Interobserver Agreement in the Interpretation of Chest Radiograph
title_zh: 准确且可解释的深度学习系统提高了胸部 X 光片解读中观察者间的一致性
abstract: Recent artificial intelligence (AI) algorithms have achieved radiologist-level performance on various medical classification tasks. However, only a few studies addressed the localization of abnormal findings from CXR scans, which is essential in explaining the image-level classification to radiologists. We introduce in this paper an explainable deep learning system called VinDr-CXR that can classify a CXR scan into multiple thoracic diseases and, at the same time, localize most types of critical findings on the image. VinDr-CXR was trained on 51,485 CXR scans with radiologist-provided bounding box annotations. It demonstrated a comparable performance to experienced radiologists in classifying 6 common thoracic diseases on a retrospective validation set of 3,000 CXR scans, with a mean area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUROC) of 0.967 (95% confidence interval [CI]: 0.958-0.975). The VinDr-CXR was also externally validated in independent patient cohorts and showed its robustness. For the localization task with 14 types of lesions, our free-response receiver operating characteristic (FROC) analysis showed that the VinDr-CXR achieved a sensitivity of 80.2% at the rate of 1.0 false-positive lesion identified per scan. A prospective study was also conducted to measure the clinical impact of the VinDr-CXR in assisting six experienced radiologists. The results indicated that the proposed system, when used as a diagnosis supporting tool, significantly improved the agreement between radiologists themselves with an increase of 1.5% in mean Fleiss' Kappa. We also observed that, after the radiologists consulted VinDr-CXR's suggestions, the agreement between each of them and the system was remarkably increased by 3.3% in mean Cohen's Kappa.
summary: Recent artificial intelligence (AI) algorithms have achieved radiologist-level performance on various medical classification tasks. However, only a few studies addressed the localization of abnormal findings from CXR scans, which is essential in explaining the image-level classification to radiologists. We introduce in this paper an explainable deep learning system called VinDr-CXR that can classify a CXR scan into multiple thoracic diseases and, at the same time, localize most types of critical findings on the image. VinDr-CXR was trained on 51,485 CXR scans with radiologist-provided bounding box annotations. It demonstrated a comparable performance to experienced radiologists in classifying 6 common thoracic diseases on a retrospective validation set of 3,000 CXR scans, with a mean area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUROC) of 0.967 (95% confidence interval [CI]: 0.958-0.975). The VinDr-CXR was also externally validated in independent patient cohorts and showed its robustness. For the localization task with 14 types of lesions, our free-response receiver operating characteristic (FROC) analysis showed that the VinDr-CXR achieved a sensitivity of 80.2% at the rate of 1.0 false-positive lesion identified per scan. A prospective study was also conducted to measure the clinical impact of the VinDr-CXR in assisting six experienced radiologists. The results indicated that the proposed system, when used as a diagnosis supporting tool, significantly improved the agreement between radiologists themselves with an increase of 1.5% in mean Fleiss' Kappa. We also observed that, after the radiologists consulted VinDr-CXR's suggestions, the agreement between each of them and the system was remarkably increased by 3.3% in mean Cohen's Kappa.
abstract_zh: 最近的人工智能（AI）算法在各种医学分类任务上已经达到了放射科医生级别的性能。然而，只有少数研究解决了 CXR 扫描异常结果的定位，这对于向放射科医生解释图像级分类至关重要。我们在本文中介绍了一种名为 VinDr-CXR 的可解释深度学习系统，该系统可以将 CXR 扫描分类为多种胸部疾病，同时在图像上定位大多数类型的关键发现。 VinDr-CXR 经过 51,485 次 CXR 扫描的训练，并带有放射科医生提供的边界框注释。它在 3,000 次 CXR 扫描的回顾性验证集上对 6 种常见胸部疾病进行分类，表现出与经验丰富的放射科医生相当的性能，受试者工作特征曲线下的平均面积 (AUROC) 为 0.967（95% 置信区间 [CI]：0.958-0.975）。 VinDr-CXR 还在独立患者队列中进行了外部验证，并显示了其稳健性。对于 14 种病变类型的定位任务，我们的自由反应受试者工作特征 (FROC) 分析表明，VinDr-CXR 在每次扫描识别出 1.0 个假阳性病变的情况下，灵敏度达到 80.2%。还进行了一项前瞻性研究，以衡量 VinDr-CXR 在协助六名经验丰富的放射科医生方面的临床影响。结果表明，所提出的系统用作诊断支持工具时，显着提高了放射科医生之间的一致性，平均 Fleiss' Kappa 提高了 1.5%。我们还观察到，放射科医生参考了VinDr-CXR的建议后，他们与系统之间的平均Cohen's Kappa一致性显着提高了3.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为VinDr-CXR的可解释深度学习系统，用于胸部X光片的疾病分类与关键病变定位，旨在提升放射科医生之间的诊断一致性。
AI.motivation: 尽管AI在医学分类任务中表现优异，但现有研究较少关注胸部X光片（CXR）异常发现的定位问题，而定位能力对解释分类结果至关重要。
AI.method: 基于51,485张带放射科医生标注框的CXR影像训练模型，实现多疾病分类与14类病变定位。通过回顾性验证集（3,000张）和前瞻性临床试验评估性能，采用AUROC、FROC及Kappa值衡量诊断一致性。
AI.result: 分类任务AUROC达0.967，病变定位敏感度80.2%（1.0假阳性/扫描）。辅助六位放射科医生后，组内一致性提升1.5%（Fleiss' Kappa），医生与系统间一致性提升3.3%（Cohen's Kappa）。
AI.conclusion: VinDr-CXR通过可解释性定位显著提升放射科医生诊断一致性，验证了其作为诊断辅助工具的临床价值。

authors_text: Chaoqiang Zhao,Youmin Zhang,Matteo Poggi,Fabio Tosi,Xianda Guo,Zheng Zhu,Guan Huang,Yang Tang,Stefano Mattoccia
title: MonoViT: Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation with a Vision Transformer
title_zh: MonoViT：使用视觉变压器进行自监督单目深度估计
abstract: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation is an attractive solution that does not require hard-to-source depth labels for training. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have recently achieved great success in this task. However, their limited receptive field constrains existing network architectures to reason only locally, dampening the effectiveness of the self-supervised paradigm. In the light of the recent successes achieved by Vision Transformers (ViTs), we propose MonoViT, a brand-new framework combining the global reasoning enabled by ViT models with the flexibility of self-supervised monocular depth estimation. By combining plain convolutions with Transformer blocks, our model can reason locally and globally, yielding depth prediction at a higher level of detail and accuracy, allowing MonoViT to achieve state-of-the-art performance on the established KITTI dataset. Moreover, MonoViT proves its superior generalization capacities on other datasets such as Make3D and DrivingStereo.
summary: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation is an attractive solution that does not require hard-to-source depth labels for training. Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have recently achieved great success in this task. However, their limited receptive field constrains existing network architectures to reason only locally, dampening the effectiveness of the self-supervised paradigm. In the light of the recent successes achieved by Vision Transformers (ViTs), we propose MonoViT, a brand-new framework combining the global reasoning enabled by ViT models with the flexibility of self-supervised monocular depth estimation. By combining plain convolutions with Transformer blocks, our model can reason locally and globally, yielding depth prediction at a higher level of detail and accuracy, allowing MonoViT to achieve state-of-the-art performance on the established KITTI dataset. Moreover, MonoViT proves its superior generalization capacities on other datasets such as Make3D and DrivingStereo.
abstract_zh: 自监督单目深度估计是一种有吸引力的解决方案，不需要难以获取的深度标签来进行训练。卷积神经网络（CNN）最近在这项任务中取得了巨大成功。然而，它们有限的接受域限制了现有的网络架构只能在本地进行推理，从而削弱了自我监督范式的有效性。鉴于 Vision Transformers (ViTs) 最近取得的成功，我们提出了 MonoViT，这是一个全新的框架，它将 ViT 模型实现的全局推理与自监督单目深度估计的灵活性相结合。通过将普通卷积与 Transformer 模块相结合，我们的模型可以进行本地和全局推理，产生更高水平的细节和准确性的深度预测，从而使 MonoViT 在已建立的 KITTI 数据集上实现最先进的性能。此外，MonoViT 在 Make3D 和 DrivingStereo 等其他数据集上证明了其卓越的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MonoViT的新框架，用于自监督单目深度估计任务。
AI.motivation: 传统的卷积神经网络在单目深度估计任务中存在感受野有限的问题，限制了其全局推理能力。而视觉Transformer（ViT）在全局推理方面表现出色，因此本文旨在结合ViT和自监督单目深度估计的优势。
AI.method: MonoViT结合了普通卷积和Transformer模块，使得模型能够同时进行局部和全局推理，从而提高深度预测的细节和准确性。
AI.result: MonoViT在KITTI数据集上实现了最先进的性能，并在Make3D和DrivingStereo等其他数据集上展示了其优越的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MonoViT通过结合视觉Transformer和自监督单目深度估计，显著提升了深度估计的性能和泛化能力。

authors_text: Justin Dombecki,James Golding,Mitchell Pleune,Nicholas Paul,Chan-Jin Chung
title: A Successful Integration of the Robotic Technology Kernel (RTK) for a By-Wire Electric Vehicle System with a Mobile App Interface
title_zh: 将机器人技术内核 (RTK) 成功集成到线控电动汽车系统与移动应用程序界面
abstract: We were able to complete the full integration of the Robotic Technology Kernel (RTK) into an electric vehicle by-wire system using lidar and GPS sensors. The solution included a mobile application to interface with the RTK-enabled autonomous vehicle. Altogether the system was designed to be modular, using the concepts of message-based software design that is built into the Robot Operating System (ROS), which is at the foundation of RTK. The team worked incrementally to develop working software to demonstrate each milestone on the path to successfully completing the RTK integration for the development of an application called the Vehicle Summoning System (VSS).
summary: We were able to complete the full integration of the Robotic Technology Kernel (RTK) into an electric vehicle by-wire system using lidar and GPS sensors. The solution included a mobile application to interface with the RTK-enabled autonomous vehicle. Altogether the system was designed to be modular, using the concepts of message-based software design that is built into the Robot Operating System (ROS), which is at the foundation of RTK. The team worked incrementally to develop working software to demonstrate each milestone on the path to successfully completing the RTK integration for the development of an application called the Vehicle Summoning System (VSS).
abstract_zh: 我们能够使用激光雷达和 GPS 传感器将机器人技术内核 (RTK) 完全集成到电动汽车线控系统中。该解决方案包括一个移动应用程序，用于与支持 RTK 的自动驾驶车辆连接。总而言之，该系统采用模块化设计，采用内置于机器人操作系统 (ROS) 中的基于消息的软件设计概念，这是 RTK 的基础。该团队逐步开发工作软件，以演示成功完成 RTK 集成以开发名为车辆召唤系统 (VSS) 的应用程序的过程中的每个里程碑。

AI.tldr: 本文完成了将机器人技术内核（RTK）集成到线控电动车系统并开发移动应用接口的任务。
AI.motivation: 通过模块化设计和ROS消息驱动架构，提升电动车自主控制能力与系统扩展性。
AI.method: 基于ROS框架采用消息驱动软件设计，分阶段开发集成RTK的线控系统，并结合激光雷达、GPS与移动应用实现交互。
AI.result: 成功实现RTK与电动车系统的整合，开发出车辆召唤系统（VSS），验证了模块化设计的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动驾驶车辆的智能化控制提供了可扩展的技术框架与应用示范。

authors_text: Siddharth H. Nair,Eric H. Tseng,Francesco Borrelli
title: Collision Avoidance for Dynamic Obstacles with Uncertain Predictions using Model Predictive Control
title_zh: 使用模型预测控制避免具有不确定预测的动态障碍物
abstract: We propose a Model Predictive Control (MPC) for collision avoidance between an autonomous agent and dynamic obstacles with uncertain predictions. The collision avoidance constraints are imposed by enforcing positive distance between convex sets representing the agent and the obstacles, and tractably reformulating them using Lagrange duality. This approach allows for smooth collision avoidance constraints even for polytopes, which otherwise require mixed-integer or non-smooth constraints. We consider three widely used descriptions of the uncertain obstacle position: 1) Arbitrary distribution with polytopic support, 2) Gaussian distributions and 3) Arbitrary distribution with first two moments known. For each case we obtain deterministic reformulations of the collision avoidance constraints. The proposed MPC formulation optimizes over feedback policies to reduce conservatism in satisfying the collision avoidance constraints. The proposed approach is validated using simulations of traffic intersections in CARLA.
summary: We propose a Model Predictive Control (MPC) for collision avoidance between an autonomous agent and dynamic obstacles with uncertain predictions. The collision avoidance constraints are imposed by enforcing positive distance between convex sets representing the agent and the obstacles, and tractably reformulating them using Lagrange duality. This approach allows for smooth collision avoidance constraints even for polytopes, which otherwise require mixed-integer or non-smooth constraints. We consider three widely used descriptions of the uncertain obstacle position: 1) Arbitrary distribution with polytopic support, 2) Gaussian distributions and 3) Arbitrary distribution with first two moments known. For each case we obtain deterministic reformulations of the collision avoidance constraints. The proposed MPC formulation optimizes over feedback policies to reduce conservatism in satisfying the collision avoidance constraints. The proposed approach is validated using simulations of traffic intersections in CARLA.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种模型预测控制（MPC），用于避免自主代理与具有不确定预测的动态障碍物之间的碰撞。通过强制表示代理和障碍物的凸集之间的正距离，并使用拉格朗日对偶性轻松地重新表达它们，来施加防撞约束。即使对于多面体，这种方法也允许平滑的避免碰撞约束，否则需要混合整数或非平滑约束。我们考虑对不确定障碍物位置的三种广泛使用的描述：1）具有多面体支持的任意分布，2）高斯分布和3）具有已知的前两个矩的任意分布。对于每种情况，我们都获得了避免碰撞约束的确定性重新表述。所提出的 MPC 公式优化了反馈策略，以减少满足避免碰撞约束的保守性。使用 CARLA 中的交通路口模拟来验证所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型预测控制（MPC）的碰撞避免方法，用于处理具有不确定预测的动态障碍物。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理动态障碍物的不确定预测时，常面临非光滑约束或保守性过高的问题。
AI.method: 通过凸集表示代理与障碍物的距离，并利用拉格朗日对偶性重构约束，针对三种不同障碍物分布情况（任意分布、高斯分布、已知前两阶矩的分布）进行确定性转化。
AI.result: 在CARLA交通交叉口仿真中验证了该方法的有效性，成功实现了平滑的碰撞避免控制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过反馈策略优化降低了保守性，为动态障碍物的不确定预测提供了高效碰撞避免解决方案。
