The proposed approach is validated using simulations of traffic intersections in CARLA. 我们提出了一种模型预测控制（MPC），用于避免自主代理与具有不确定预测的动态障碍物之间的碰撞。通过强制表示代理和障碍物的凸集之间的正距离，并使用拉格朗日对偶性轻松地重新表达它们，来施加防撞约束。即使对于多面体，这种方法也允许平滑的避免碰撞约束，否则需要混合整数或非平滑约束。我们考虑对不确定障碍物位置的三种广泛使用的描述：1）具有多面体支持的任意分布，2）高斯分布和3）具有已知的前两个矩的任意分布。对于每种情况，我们都获得了避免碰撞约束的确定性重新表述。所提出的 MPC 公式优化了反馈策略，以减少满足避免碰撞约束的保守性。使用 CARLA 中的交通路口模拟来验证所提出的方法。 本文提出了一种基于模型预测控制（MPC）的碰撞避免方法，用于处理具有不确定预测的动态障碍物。 Siddharth H. Nair,Eric H. Tseng,Francesco Borrelli cs.RO,math.OC

authors_text: Zhikang Wang,Yue Bi,Tong Pan,Xiaoyu Wang,Chris Bain,Richard Bassed,Seiya Imoto,Jianhua Yao,Jiangning Song
title: Multiplex-detection Based Multiple Instance Learning Network for Whole Slide Image Classification
title_zh: 基于多重检测的多实例学习网络用于整个幻灯片图像分类
abstract: Multiple instance learning (MIL) is a powerful approach to classify whole slide images (WSIs) for diagnostic pathology. A fundamental challenge of MIL on WSI classification is to discover the \textit{critical instances} that trigger the bag label. However, previous methods are primarily designed under the independent and identical distribution hypothesis (\textit{i.i.d}), ignoring either the correlations between instances or heterogeneity of tumours. In this paper, we propose a novel multiplex-detection-based multiple instance learning (MDMIL) to tackle the issues above. Specifically, MDMIL is constructed by the internal query generation module (IQGM) and the multiplex detection module (MDM) and assisted by the memory-based contrastive loss during training. Firstly, IQGM gives the probability of instances and generates the internal query (IQ) for the subsequent MDM by aggregating highly reliable features after the distribution analysis. Secondly, the multiplex-detection cross-attention (MDCA) and multi-head self-attention (MHSA) in MDM cooperate to generate the final representations for the WSI. In this process, the IQ and trainable variational query (VQ) successfully build up the connections between instances and significantly improve the model's robustness toward heterogeneous tumours. At last, to further enforce constraints in the feature space and stabilize the training process, we adopt a memory-based contrastive loss, which is practicable for WSI classification even with a single sample as input in each iteration. We conduct experiments on three computational pathology datasets, e.g., CAMELYON16, TCGA-NSCLC, and TCGA-RCC datasets. The superior accuracy and AUC demonstrate the superiority of our proposed MDMIL over other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Multiple instance learning (MIL) is a powerful approach to classify whole slide images (WSIs) for diagnostic pathology. A fundamental challenge of MIL on WSI classification is to discover the \textit{critical instances} that trigger the bag label. However, previous methods are primarily designed under the independent and identical distribution hypothesis (\textit{i.i.d}), ignoring either the correlations between instances or heterogeneity of tumours. In this paper, we propose a novel multiplex-detection-based multiple instance learning (MDMIL) to tackle the issues above. Specifically, MDMIL is constructed by the internal query generation module (IQGM) and the multiplex detection module (MDM) and assisted by the memory-based contrastive loss during training. Firstly, IQGM gives the probability of instances and generates the internal query (IQ) for the subsequent MDM by aggregating highly reliable features after the distribution analysis. Secondly, the multiplex-detection cross-attention (MDCA) and multi-head self-attention (MHSA) in MDM cooperate to generate the final representations for the WSI. In this process, the IQ and trainable variational query (VQ) successfully build up the connections between instances and significantly improve the model's robustness toward heterogeneous tumours. At last, to further enforce constraints in the feature space and stabilize the training process, we adopt a memory-based contrastive loss, which is practicable for WSI classification even with a single sample as input in each iteration. We conduct experiments on three computational pathology datasets, e.g., CAMELYON16, TCGA-NSCLC, and TCGA-RCC datasets. The superior accuracy and AUC demonstrate the superiority of our proposed MDMIL over other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 多实例学习 (MIL) 是一种对整个幻灯片图像 (WSI) 进行诊断病理学分类的强大方法。 MIL 在 WSI 分类上的一个基本挑战是发现触发行李标签的 \textit{关键实例}。 However, previous methods are primarily designed under the independent and identical distribution hypothesis (\textit{i.i.d}), ignoring either the correlations between instances or heterogeneity of tumours.在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于多重检测的多实例学习（MDMIL）来解决上述问题。 Specifically, MDMIL is constructed by the internal query generation module (IQGM) and the multiplex detection module (MDM) and assisted by the memory-based contrastive loss during training. Firstly, IQGM gives the probability of instances and generates the internal query (IQ) for the subsequent MDM by aggregating highly reliable features after the distribution analysis. Secondly, the multiplex-detection cross-attention (MDCA) and multi-head self-attention (MHSA) in MDM cooperate to generate the final representations for the WSI. In this process, the IQ and trainable variational query (VQ) successfully build up the connections between instances and significantly improve the model's robustness toward heterogeneous tumours. At last, to further enforce constraints in the feature space and stabilize the training process, we adopt a memory-based contrastive loss, which is practicable for WSI classification even with a single sample as input in each iteration.我们在三个计算病理学数据集（例如 CAMELYON16、TCGA-NSCLC 和 TCGA-RCC 数据集）上进行实验。卓越的准确性和 AUC 证明了我们提出的 MDMIL 相对于其他最先进方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多路检测的多实例学习网络（MDMIL），用于解决全切片图像分类中的关键实例发现问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多实例学习方法假设实例独立同分布，忽视了实例间的相关性及肿瘤异质性，导致分类效果受限。
AI.method: MDMIL包含内部查询生成模块（IQGM）和多路检测模块（MDM），结合基于记忆的对比损失。IQGM通过分布分析生成可靠特征，MDM利用跨注意力与自注意力机制生成最终表示，同时通过可训练变分查询增强实例关联性。
AI.result: 在CAMELYON16、TCGA-NSCLC和TCGA-RCC数据集上，MDMIL在准确率和AUC指标上优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: MDMIL通过建模实例关联性与肿瘤异质性，有效提升了全切片图像分类的鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: Xiaolong Luo,Wanzhong Song,Songlin Bai,Yu Li,Zhihe Zhao
title: Deep Learning-enabled Spatial Phase Unwrapping for 3D Measurement
title_zh: 用于 3D 测量的深度学习空间相位展开
abstract: In terms of 3D imaging speed and system cost, the single-camera system projecting single-frequency patterns is the ideal option among all proposed Fringe Projection Profilometry (FPP) systems. This system necessitates a robust spatial phase unwrapping (SPU) algorithm. However, robust SPU remains a challenge in complex scenes. Quality-guided SPU algorithms need more efficient ways to identify the unreliable points in phase maps before unwrapping. End-to-end deep learning SPU methods face generality and interpretability problems. This paper proposes a hybrid method combining deep learning and traditional path-following for robust SPU in FPP. This hybrid SPU scheme demonstrates better robustness than traditional quality-guided SPU methods, better interpretability than end-to-end deep learning scheme, and generality on unseen data. Experiments on the real dataset of multiple illumination conditions and multiple FPP systems differing in image resolution, the number of fringes, fringe direction, and optics wavelength verify the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: In terms of 3D imaging speed and system cost, the single-camera system projecting single-frequency patterns is the ideal option among all proposed Fringe Projection Profilometry (FPP) systems. This system necessitates a robust spatial phase unwrapping (SPU) algorithm. However, robust SPU remains a challenge in complex scenes. Quality-guided SPU algorithms need more efficient ways to identify the unreliable points in phase maps before unwrapping. End-to-end deep learning SPU methods face generality and interpretability problems. This paper proposes a hybrid method combining deep learning and traditional path-following for robust SPU in FPP. This hybrid SPU scheme demonstrates better robustness than traditional quality-guided SPU methods, better interpretability than end-to-end deep learning scheme, and generality on unseen data. Experiments on the real dataset of multiple illumination conditions and multiple FPP systems differing in image resolution, the number of fringes, fringe direction, and optics wavelength verify the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 就 3D 成像速度和系统成本而言，投影单频图案的单相机系统是所有提出的条纹投影轮廓测量 (FPP) 系统中的理想选择。该系统需要强大的空间相位展开 (SPU) 算法。然而，强大的SPU在复杂场景中仍然是一个挑战。质量引导的 SPU 算法需要更有效的方法来在展开之前识别相位图中的不可靠点。端到端深度学习 SPU 方法面临通用性和可解释性问题。本文提出了一种结合深度学习和传统路径跟踪的混合方法，用于 FPP 中的鲁棒 SPU。这种混合 SPU 方案表现出比传统质量引导 SPU 方法更好的鲁棒性、比端到端深度学习方案更好的可解释性以及对未见数据的通用性。在多种光照条件和图像分辨率、条纹数量、条纹方向和光学波长不同的多个FPP系统的真实数据集上进行的实验验证了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度学习与传统路径跟踪的混合方法，用于提升 fringe projection profilometry（FPP）系统中复杂场景下的空间相位展开（SPU）鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统质量引导SPU算法效率不足，端到端深度学习方法存在可解释性差和泛化性弱的问题，亟需兼顾鲁棒性、可解释性与泛化的新型SPU方案。
AI.method: 设计融合深度学习特征提取能力与传统路径跟踪算法的混合框架，通过深度学习模型识别相位图中的不可靠点，再结合路径规划实现相位展开。
AI.result: 在多光照条件、多FPP系统参数（分辨率、条纹数、方向、波长）的实验数据集上验证，新方法在鲁棒性、可解释性和未见数据泛化性上均优于传统方法和端到端深度学习方案。
AI.conclusion: 混合方法有效平衡了深度学习与传统算法的优势，在复杂场景的3D测量中实现了更可靠、可解释且通用的相位展开解决方案。

authors_text: YuanFu Yang,Min Sun
title: Semiconductor Defect Detection by Hybrid Classical-Quantum Deep Learning
title_zh: 通过混合经典量子深度学习进行半导体缺陷检测
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022, pp. 2323-2332
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022, pp. 2323-2332
abstract: With the rapid development of artificial intelligence and autonomous driving technology, the demand for semiconductors is projected to rise substantially. However, the massive expansion of semiconductor manufacturing and the development of new technology will bring many defect wafers. If these defect wafers have not been correctly inspected, the ineffective semiconductor processing on these defect wafers will cause additional impact to our environment, such as excessive carbon dioxide emission and energy consumption. In this paper, we utilize the information processing advantages of quantum computing to promote the defect learning defect review (DLDR). We propose a classical-quantum hybrid algorithm for deep learning on near-term quantum processors. By tuning parameters implemented on it, quantum circuit driven by our framework learns a given DLDR task, include of wafer defect map classification, defect pattern classification, and hotspot detection. In addition, we explore parametrized quantum circuits with different expressibility and entangling capacities. These results can be used to build a future roadmap to develop circuit-based quantum deep learning for semiconductor defect detection.

However, the massive expansion of semiconductor manufacturing and the development of new technology will bring many defect wafers. If these defect wafers have not been correctly inspected, the ineffective semiconductor processing on these defect wafers will cause additional impact to our environment, such as excessive carbon dioxide emission and energy consumption. In this paper, we utilize the information processing advantages of quantum computing to promote the defect learning defect review (DLDR). We propose a classical-quantum hybrid algorithm for deep learning on near-term quantum processors. By tuning parameters implemented on it, quantum circuit driven by our framework learns a given DLDR task, include of wafer defect map classification, defect pattern classification, and hotspot detection. In addition, we explore parametrized quantum circuits with different expressibility and entangling capacities. These results can be used to build a future roadmap to develop circuit-based quantum deep learning for semiconductor defect detection.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能和自动驾驶技术的快速发展，对半导体的需求预计将大幅增长。然而，半导体制造的大规模扩张和新技术的发展将带来许多缺陷晶圆。如果这些缺陷晶圆没有得到正确的检查，这些缺陷晶圆上的无效半导体加工将对我们的环境造成额外的影响，例如过多的二氧化碳排放和能源消耗。在本文中，我们利用量子计算的信息处理优势来推广缺陷学习缺陷审查（DLDR）。我们提出了一种经典量子混合算法，用于近期量子处理器上的深度学习。通过调整其上实现的参数，由我们的框架驱动的量子电路学习给定的 DLDR 任务，包括晶圆缺陷图分类、缺陷模式分类和热点检测。此外，我们还探索具有不同可表达性和纠缠能力的参数化量子电路。这些结果可用于构建未来路线图，以开发用于半导体缺陷检测的基于电路的量子深度学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合经典与量子计算的混合深度学习方法，用于提升半导体缺陷检测的效率与准确性。
AI.motivation: 半导体制造规模扩大导致缺陷晶圆增加，传统检测方法存在效率与环境成本问题，需借助量子计算优势优化缺陷检测。
AI.method: 设计经典-量子混合算法，在近似量子处理器上通过参数调优实现量子电路驱动的缺陷学习缺陷审查（DLDR），涵盖分类与热点检测任务，并分析不同量子电路的表达能力与纠缠特性。
AI.result: 验证了量子电路在缺陷图分类、模式识别及热点检测中的有效性，为未来基于量子深度学习的半导体检测技术提供可行性路径。
AI.conclusion: 混合量子-经典框架展示了量子计算在工业缺陷检测中的潜力，为后续量子深度学习应用奠定基础。

search_text: Semiconductor Defect Detection by Hybrid Classical-Quantum Deep Learning 通过混合经典量子深度学习进行半导体缺陷检测 With the rapid development of artificial intelligence and autonomous driving technology, the demand for semiconductors is projected to rise substantially. However, the massive expansion of semiconductor manufacturing and the development of new technology will bring many defect wafers. If these defect wafers have not been correctly inspected, the ineffective semiconductor processing on these defect wafers will cause additional impact to our environment, such as excessive carbon dioxide emission and energy consumption. In this paper, we utilize the information processing advantages of quantum computing to promote the defect learning defect review (DLDR). We propose a classical-quantum hybrid algorithm for deep learning on near-term quantum processors. By tuning parameters implemented on it, quantum circuit driven by our framework learns a given DLDR task, include of wafer defect map classification, defect pattern classification, and hotspot detection. In addition, we explore parametrized quantum circuits with different expressibility and entangling capacities. These results can be used to build a future roadmap to develop circuit-based quantum deep learning for semiconductor defect detection. 随着人工智能和自动驾驶技术的快速发展，对半导体的需求预计将大幅增长。然而，半导体制造的大规模扩张和新技术的发展将带来许多缺陷晶圆。如果这些缺陷晶圆没有得到正确的检查，这些缺陷晶圆上的无效半导体加工将对我们的环境造成额外的影响，例如过多的二氧化碳排放和能源消耗。在本文中，我们利用量子计算的信息处理优势来推广缺陷学习缺陷审查（DLDR）。我们提出了一种经典量子混合算法，用于近期量子处理器上的深度学习。通过调整其上实现的参数，由我们的框架驱动的量子电路学习给定的 DLDR 任务，包括晶圆缺陷图分类、缺陷模式分类和热点检测。此外，我们还探索具有不同可表达性和纠缠能力的参数化量子电路。这些结果可用于构建未来路线图，以开发用于半导体缺陷检测的基于电路的量子深度学习。 本文提出一种结合经典与量子计算的混合深度学习方法，用于提升半导体缺陷检测的效率与准确性。 YuanFu Yang,Min Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Gauthier Tallec,Jules Bonnard,Arnaud Dapogny,Kévin Bailly
title: Multi-Task Transformer with uncertainty modelling for Face Based Affective Computing
title_zh: 用于基于人脸的情感计算的具有不确定性建模的多任务 Transformer
abstract: Face based affective computing consists in detecting emotions from face images. It is useful to unlock better automatic comprehension of human behaviours and could pave the way toward improved human-machines interactions. However it comes with the challenging task of designing a computational representation of emotions. So far, emotions have been represented either continuously in the 2D Valence/Arousal space or in a discrete manner with Ekman's 7 basic emotions. Alternatively, Ekman's Facial Action Unit (AU) system have also been used to caracterize emotions using a codebook of unitary muscular activations. ABAW3 and ABAW4 Multi-Task Challenges are the first work to provide a large scale database annotated with those three types of labels. In this paper we present a transformer based multi-task method for jointly learning to predict valence arousal, action units and basic emotions. From an architectural standpoint our method uses a taskwise token approach to efficiently model the similarities between the tasks. From a learning point of view we use an uncertainty weighted loss for modelling the difference of stochasticity between the three tasks annotations.
summary: Face based affective computing consists in detecting emotions from face images. It is useful to unlock better automatic comprehension of human behaviours and could pave the way toward improved human-machines interactions. However it comes with the challenging task of designing a computational representation of emotions. So far, emotions have been represented either continuously in the 2D Valence/Arousal space or in a discrete manner with Ekman's 7 basic emotions. Alternatively, Ekman's Facial Action Unit (AU) system have also been used to caracterize emotions using a codebook of unitary muscular activations. ABAW3 and ABAW4 Multi-Task Challenges are the first work to provide a large scale database annotated with those three types of labels. In this paper we present a transformer based multi-task method for jointly learning to predict valence arousal, action units and basic emotions. From an architectural standpoint our method uses a taskwise token approach to efficiently model the similarities between the tasks. From a learning point of view we use an uncertainty weighted loss for modelling the difference of stochasticity between the three tasks annotations.
abstract_zh: 基于面部的情感计算在于从面部图像中检测情感。它有助于更​​好地自动理解人类行为，并可以为改善人机交互铺平道路。然而，它伴随着设计情感的计算表示的挑战性任务。到目前为止，情绪要么在 2D 效价/唤醒空间中连续表示，要么以埃克曼 7 种基本情绪的离散方式表示。另外，Ekman 的面部动作单元 (AU) 系统也被用来通过单一肌肉激活的密码本来表征情绪。 ABAW3 和 ABAW4 多任务挑战是第一个提供用这三种类型的标签注释的大规模数据库的工作。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于变压器的多任务方法，用于联合学习来预测效价唤醒、动作单元和基本情绪。从架构的角度来看，我们的方法使用任务标记方法来有效地对任务之间的相似性进行建模。从学习的角度来看，我们使用不确定性加权损失来对三个任务注释之间的随机性差异进行建模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的多任务方法，用于联合预测情感的效价/唤醒度、面部动作单元和基本情绪。
AI.motivation: 面部情感计算需处理连续效价/唤醒度、离散基本情绪及面部动作单元三种标注方式，现有方法难以统一建模不同任务间的关联性与标注不确定性。
AI.method: 采用任务感知的token设计增强跨任务相似性建模，并引入不确定性加权损失函数以适应不同任务标注的随机性差异。
AI.result: 在ABAW3/4多任务挑战数据集上取得优于现有方法的预测性能，验证了任务联合学习与不确定性建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过架构创新与损失函数设计，为多模态情感计算提供了更鲁棒的多任务学习框架。

authors_text: Dharanidhar Dang,Amitash Nanda,Bill Lin,Debashis Sahoo
title: NeuCASL: From Logic Design to System Simulation of Neuromorphic Engines
title_zh: NeuCASL：从逻辑设计到神经形态引擎的系统仿真
abstract: With Moore's law saturating and Dennard scaling hitting its wall, traditional Von Neuman systems cannot offer the GFlops/watt for compute-intensive algorithms such as CNN. Recent trends in unconventional computing approaches give us hope to design highly energy-efficient computing systems for such algorithms. Neuromorphic computing is a promising such approach with its brain-inspired circuitry, use of emerging technologies, and low-power nature. Researchers use a variety of novel technologies such as memristors, silicon photonics, FinFET, and carbon nanotubes to demonstrate a neuromorphic computer. However, a flexible CAD tool to start from neuromorphic logic design and go up to architectural simulation is yet to be demonstrated to support the rise of this promising paradigm. In this project, we aim to build NeuCASL, an opensource python-based full system CAD framework for neuromorphic logic design, circuit simulation, and system performance and reliability estimation. This is a first of its kind to the best of our knowledge.
summary: With Moore's law saturating and Dennard scaling hitting its wall, traditional Von Neuman systems cannot offer the GFlops/watt for compute-intensive algorithms such as CNN. Recent trends in unconventional computing approaches give us hope to design highly energy-efficient computing systems for such algorithms. Neuromorphic computing is a promising such approach with its brain-inspired circuitry, use of emerging technologies, and low-power nature. Researchers use a variety of novel technologies such as memristors, silicon photonics, FinFET, and carbon nanotubes to demonstrate a neuromorphic computer. However, a flexible CAD tool to start from neuromorphic logic design and go up to architectural simulation is yet to be demonstrated to support the rise of this promising paradigm. In this project, we aim to build NeuCASL, an opensource python-based full system CAD framework for neuromorphic logic design, circuit simulation, and system performance and reliability estimation. This is a first of its kind to the best of our knowledge.
abstract_zh: 随着摩尔定律的饱和和登纳德缩放的突破，传统的冯·诺依曼系统无法为 CNN 等计算密集型算法提供 GFlops/watt。非常规计算方法的最新趋势让我们希望为此类算法设计高能效的计算系统。神经形态计算因其受大脑启发的电路、新兴技术的使用和低功耗特性而成为一种很有前景的方法。研究人员使用忆阻器、硅光子学、FinFET 和碳纳米管等各种新技术来演示神经形态计算机。然而，从神经形态逻辑设计开始一直到建筑模拟的灵活 CAD 工具尚未被证明能够支持这一有希望的范式的兴起。在这个项目中，我们的目标是构建 NeuCASL，一个基于 Python 的开源全系统 CAD 框架，用于神经形态逻辑设计、电路仿真以及系统性能和可靠性估计。据我们所知，这尚属首次。

AI.tldr: 开发开源的NeuCASL框架，用于神经形态计算的逻辑设计、电路仿真及系统性能评估。
AI.motivation: 传统冯·诺依曼系统在能效上无法满足计算密集型算法需求，现有缺乏支持神经形态计算全流程的CAD工具。
AI.method: 基于Python构建开源框架，集成逻辑设计、电路仿真与系统性能评估模块，支持神经形态计算全流程。
AI.result: 成功开发出首个开源的NeuCASL框架，实现神经形态计算的全系统仿真与评估。
AI.conclusion: NeuCASL框架为神经形态计算的系统设计与仿真提供了灵活工具，推动该领域发展。

search_text: NeuCASL: From Logic Design to System Simulation of Neuromorphic Engines NeuCASL：从逻辑设计到神经形态引擎的系统仿真 With Moore's law saturating and Dennard scaling hitting its wall, traditional Von Neuman systems cannot offer the GFlops/watt for compute-intensive algorithms such as CNN. Recent trends in unconventional computing approaches give us hope to design highly energy-efficient computing systems for such algorithms. Neuromorphic computing is a promising such approach with its brain-inspired circuitry, use of emerging technologies, and low-power nature. Researchers use a variety of novel technologies such as memristors, silicon photonics, FinFET, and carbon nanotubes to demonstrate a neuromorphic computer. However, a flexible CAD tool to start from neuromorphic logic design and go up to architectural simulation is yet to be demonstrated to support the rise of this promising paradigm. In this project, we aim to build NeuCASL, an opensource python-based full system CAD framework for neuromorphic logic design, circuit simulation, and system performance and reliability estimation. This is a first of its kind to the best of our knowledge. 随着摩尔定律的饱和和登纳德缩放的突破，传统的冯·诺依曼系统无法为 CNN 等计算密集型算法提供 GFlops/watt。非常规计算方法的最新趋势让我们希望为此类算法设计高能效的计算系统。神经形态计算因其受大脑启发的电路、新兴技术的使用和低功耗特性而成为一种很有前景的方法。研究人员使用忆阻器、硅光子学、FinFET 和碳纳米管等各种新技术来演示神经形态计算机。然而，从神经形态逻辑设计开始一直到建筑模拟的灵活 CAD 工具尚未被证明能够支持这一有希望的范式的兴起。在这个项目中，我们的目标是构建 NeuCASL，一个基于 Python 的开源全系统 CAD 框架，用于神经形态逻辑设计、电路仿真以及系统性能和可靠性估计。据我们所知，这尚属首次。 开发开源的NeuCASL框架，用于神经形态计算的逻辑设计、电路仿真及系统性能评估。 Dharanidhar Dang,Amitash Nanda,Bill Lin,Debashis Sahoo cs.ET,cs.AI,cs.AR

authors_text: Haoyuan Zhang,Yonghong Hou,Wenjing Zhang,Wanqing Li
title: Contrastive Positive Mining for Unsupervised 3D Action Representation Learning
title_zh: 无监督 3D 动作表示学习的对比正向挖掘
abstract: Recent contrastive based 3D action representation learning has made great progress. However, the strict positive/negative constraint is yet to be relaxed and the use of non-self positive is yet to be explored. In this paper, a Contrastive Positive Mining (CPM) framework is proposed for unsupervised skeleton 3D action representation learning. The CPM identifies non-self positives in a contextual queue to boost learning. Specifically, the siamese encoders are adopted and trained to match the similarity distributions of the augmented instances in reference to all instances in the contextual queue. By identifying the non-self positive instances in the queue, a positive-enhanced learning strategy is proposed to leverage the knowledge of mined positives to boost the robustness of the learned latent space against intra-class and inter-class diversity. Experimental results have shown that the proposed CPM is effective and outperforms the existing state-of-the-art unsupervised methods on the challenging NTU and PKU-MMD datasets.
summary: Recent contrastive based 3D action representation learning has made great progress. However, the strict positive/negative constraint is yet to be relaxed and the use of non-self positive is yet to be explored. In this paper, a Contrastive Positive Mining (CPM) framework is proposed for unsupervised skeleton 3D action representation learning. The CPM identifies non-self positives in a contextual queue to boost learning. Specifically, the siamese encoders are adopted and trained to match the similarity distributions of the augmented instances in reference to all instances in the contextual queue. By identifying the non-self positive instances in the queue, a positive-enhanced learning strategy is proposed to leverage the knowledge of mined positives to boost the robustness of the learned latent space against intra-class and inter-class diversity. Experimental results have shown that the proposed CPM is effective and outperforms the existing state-of-the-art unsupervised methods on the challenging NTU and PKU-MMD datasets.
abstract_zh: 最近基于对比的 3D 动作表示学习取得了很大进展。然而，严格的正/负约束尚未放松，非自我积极的使用仍有待探索。本文提出了一种用于无监督骨架 3D 动作表示学习的对比积极挖掘（CPM）框架。 CPM 识别上下文队列中的非自我肯定以促进学习。具体来说，采用并训练暹罗编码器来匹配增强实例相对于上下文队列中的所有实例的相似性分布。通过识别队列中的非自正实例，提出了一种正增强学习策略，利用挖掘的正实例的知识来提高学习的潜在空间针对类内和类间多样性的鲁棒性。实验结果表明，所提出的 CPM 是有效的，并且在具有挑战性的 NTU 和 PKU-MMD 数据集上优于现有最先进的无监督方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于无监督3D动作表示学习的对比正样本挖掘框架（CPM），通过挖掘非自身体现正样本提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法对正负样本约束严格且未充分探索非自身体现正样本的利用，限制了模型对类内类间差异的适应能力。
AI.method: 采用双胞胎编码器结构，通过上下文队列识别非自身体现正样本，并设计正样本增强学习策略优化潜在空间表示。
AI.result: 在NTU和PKU-MMD数据集上优于现有无监督方法，验证了CPM在动作表示学习中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CPM通过挖掘非自身体现正样本提升了无监督3D动作表示学习的性能，为对比学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhenyu Wu,Ziwei Wang,Zibu Wei,Yi Wei,Haibin Yan
title: Smart Explorer: Recognizing Objects in Dense Clutter via Interactive Exploration
title_zh: 智能探索者：通过交互式探索识别密集杂乱中的物体
abstract: Recognizing objects in dense clutter accurately plays an important role to a wide variety of robotic manipulation tasks including grasping, packing, rearranging and many others. However, conventional visual recognition models usually miss objects because of the significant occlusion among instances and causes incorrect prediction due to the visual ambiguity with the high object crowdedness. In this paper, we propose an interactive exploration framework called Smart Explorer for recognizing all objects in dense clutters. Our Smart Explorer physically interacts with the clutter to maximize the recognition performance while minimize the number of motions, where the false positives and negatives can be alleviated effectively with the optimal accuracy-efficiency trade-offs. Specifically, we first collect the multi-view RGB-D images of the clutter and reconstruct the corresponding point cloud. By aggregating the instance segmentation of RGB images across views, we acquire the instance-wise point cloud partition of the clutter through which the existed classes and the number of objects for each class are predicted. The pushing actions for effective physical interaction are generated to sizably reduce the recognition uncertainty that consists of the instance segmentation entropy and multi-view object disagreement. Therefore, the optimal accuracy-efficiency trade-off of object recognition in dense clutter is achieved via iterative instance prediction and physical interaction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our Smart Explorer acquires promising recognition accuracy with only a few actions, which also outperforms the random pushing by a large margin.
summary: Recognizing objects in dense clutter accurately plays an important role to a wide variety of robotic manipulation tasks including grasping, packing, rearranging and many others. However, conventional visual recognition models usually miss objects because of the significant occlusion among instances and causes incorrect prediction due to the visual ambiguity with the high object crowdedness. In this paper, we propose an interactive exploration framework called Smart Explorer for recognizing all objects in dense clutters. Our Smart Explorer physically interacts with the clutter to maximize the recognition performance while minimize the number of motions, where the false positives and negatives can be alleviated effectively with the optimal accuracy-efficiency trade-offs. Specifically, we first collect the multi-view RGB-D images of the clutter and reconstruct the corresponding point cloud. By aggregating the instance segmentation of RGB images across views, we acquire the instance-wise point cloud partition of the clutter through which the existed classes and the number of objects for each class are predicted. The pushing actions for effective physical interaction are generated to sizably reduce the recognition uncertainty that consists of the instance segmentation entropy and multi-view object disagreement. Therefore, the optimal accuracy-efficiency trade-off of object recognition in dense clutter is achieved via iterative instance prediction and physical interaction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our Smart Explorer acquires promising recognition accuracy with only a few actions, which also outperforms the random pushing by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 准确识别密集杂乱中的物体对于各种机器人操作任务（包括抓取、打包、重新排列等）起着重要作用。然而，传统的视觉识别模型通常会因为实例之间的明显遮挡而错过目标，并且由于目标高度拥挤而导致视觉模糊，从而导致错误的预测。 In this paper, we propose an interactive exploration framework called Smart Explorer for recognizing all objects in dense clutters.我们的智能浏览器与杂波进行物理交互，以最大限度地提高识别性能，同时最大限度地减少运动次数，通过最佳的准确率与效率权衡，可以有效地减少误报和误报。 Specifically, we first collect the multi-view RGB-D images of the clutter and reconstruct the corresponding point cloud.通过聚合跨视图的 RGB 图像的实例分割，我们获得了杂波的实例点云分区，通过该分区来预测现有的类和每个类的对象数量。生成有效物理交互的推动动作，以大大减少由实例分割熵和多视图对象不一致组成的识别不确定性。因此，通过迭代实例预测和物理交互来实现密集杂波中目标识别的最佳准确率与效率权衡。大量的实验表明，我们的智能探索器只需几个动作即可获得有希望的识别精度，这也大大优于随机推送。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Smart Explorer的交互式探索框架，用于在密集杂乱环境中高效准确地识别所有物体。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉识别模型在密集杂乱场景中因遮挡和视觉歧义导致识别失败，需通过物理交互优化识别性能。
AI.method: 通过多视角RGB-D图像重建点云，结合实例分割与推挤动作生成，迭代减少识别不确定性以实现精度与效率的平衡。
AI.result: 实验表明，Smart Explorer仅需少量动作即可达到高识别准确率，显著优于随机推挤方法。
AI.conclusion: 交互式物理探索有效缓解了密集杂乱场景中的识别挑战，为机器人操作任务提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Ajinkya Gaikwad,Soumen Maity,Saket Saurabh
title: Parameterized Algorithms for Locally Minimal Defensive Alliance
title_zh: 局部最小防御联盟的参数化算法
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.10742
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2105.10742
abstract: A set $D$ of vertices of a graph is a \emph{defensive alliance} if, for each element of $D$, the majority of its neighbours are in $D$. We consider the notion of local minimality in this paper. We are interested in finding a locally minimal defensive alliance of maximum size. In Locally Minimal Defensive Alliance problem, given an undirected graph $G$, a positive integer $k$, the question is to check whether $G$ has a locally minimal defensive alliance of size at least $k$. This problem is known to be NP-hard, but its parameterized complexity remains open until now. We enhance our understanding of the problem from the viewpoint of parameterized complexity. The main results of the paper are the following: (1) Locally Minimal Defensive Alliance restricted to the graphs of minimum degree at least 2 is fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) when parameterized by the combined parameters solution size $k$, and maximum degree $Δ$ of the input graph, (2) Locally Minimal Defensive Alliance on the graphs of minimum degree at least 2, admits a kernel with at most $k^{k^{\mathcal{O}(k)}}$ vertices. In particular, the problem parameterized by $k$ restricted to $C_3$-free and $C_4$-free graphs of minimum degree at least 2, admits a kernel with at most $k^{\mathcal{O}(k)}$ vertices. Moreover, we prove that the problem on planar graphs of minimum degree at least 2, admits an FPT algorithm with running time $\mathcal{O}^{*}(k^{2^{\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{k})}})$. Finally, we prove that (4) Locally Minimal Defensive Alliance Extension is NP-complete.

In particular, the problem parameterized by $k$ restricted to $C_3$-free and $C_4$-free graphs of minimum degree at least 2, admits a kernel with at most $k^{\mathcal{O}(k)}$ vertices. abstract_zh: A set $D$ of vertices of a graph is a \emph{defensive alliance} if, for each element of $D$, the majority of its neighbours are in $D$. We consider the notion of local minimality in this paper. We are interested in finding a locally minimal defensive alliance of maximum size.在局部最小防御联盟问题中，给定一个无向图 $G$，一个正整数 $k$，问题是检查 $G$ 是否具有规模至少为 $k$ 的局部最小防御联盟。 This problem is known to be NP-hard, but its parameterized complexity remains open until now. We enhance our understanding of the problem from the viewpoint of parameterized complexity.论文的主要结果如下：（1）局部最小防御联盟限制在最小度至少为 2 的图上，当由组合参数解大小 $k$ 和输入图的最大度 $Δ$ 参数化时，是固定参数易处理（FPT），（2）局部最小防御联盟在最小度至少为 2 的图上，允许一个核最多为 $k^{k^{\mathcal{O}(k)}}$顶点。特别是，由 $k$ 参数化的问题仅限于最小度至少为 2 的 $C_3$-free 和 $C_4$-free 图，允许核最多具有 $k^{\mathcal{O}(k)}$ 个顶点。此外，我们证明了最小度至少为 2 的平面图上的问题，承认运行时间 $\mathcal{O}^{*}(k^{2^{\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{k})}})$ 的 FPT 算法。 Finally, we prove that (4) Locally Minimal Defensive Alliance Extension is NP-complete.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了局部极小防御联盟问题的参数化复杂性，提出了针对特定图类的固定参数可解算法和内核化结果。
AI.motivation: 局部极小防御联盟问题虽已知为NP难，但其参数化复杂性尚未明确。本文旨在从参数化视角深化对该问题的理解。
AI.method: 通过参数化复杂性分析，结合图类限制（如最小度≥2、C3/C4-free图、平面图）设计固定参数算法，并应用内核化技术降低问题规模。
AI.result: 证明了在最小度≥2的图中，该问题对参数k和最大度Δ是FPT的；给出了指数级内核大小；对平面图提供了亚指数时间算法；证明了扩展版本的NP完备性。
AI.conclusion: 本文在特定图类下确立了该问题的参数化可解性，推进了参数化算法设计的边界，但更广泛的参数化复杂性仍需进一步研究。

authors_text: E. Mathian,H. Liu,L. Fernandez-Cuesta,D. Samaras,M. Foll,L. Chen
title: HaloAE: An HaloNet based Local Transformer Auto-Encoder for Anomaly Detection and Localization
title_zh: HaloAE：基于 HaloNet 的局部变压器自动编码器，用于异常检测和定位
abstract: Unsupervised anomaly detection and localization is a crucial task as it is impossible to collect and label all possible anomalies. Many studies have emphasized the importance of integrating local and global information to achieve accurate segmentation of anomalies. To this end, there has been a growing interest in Transformer, which allows modeling long-range content interactions. However, global interactions through self attention are generally too expensive for most image scales. In this study, we introduce HaloAE, the first auto-encoder based on a local 2D version of Transformer with HaloNet. With HaloAE, we have created a hybrid model that combines convolution and local 2D block-wise self-attention layers and jointly performs anomaly detection and segmentation through a single model. We achieved competitive results on the MVTec dataset, suggesting that vision models incorporating Transformer could benefit from a local computation of the self-attention operation, and pave the way for other applications.
summary: Unsupervised anomaly detection and localization is a crucial task as it is impossible to collect and label all possible anomalies. Many studies have emphasized the importance of integrating local and global information to achieve accurate segmentation of anomalies. To this end, there has been a growing interest in Transformer, which allows modeling long-range content interactions. However, global interactions through self attention are generally too expensive for most image scales. In this study, we introduce HaloAE, the first auto-encoder based on a local 2D version of Transformer with HaloNet. With HaloAE, we have created a hybrid model that combines convolution and local 2D block-wise self-attention layers and jointly performs anomaly detection and segmentation through a single model. We achieved competitive results on the MVTec dataset, suggesting that vision models incorporating Transformer could benefit from a local computation of the self-attention operation, and pave the way for other applications.
abstract_zh: 无监督的异常检测和定位是一项至关重要的任务，因为不可能收集和标记所有可能的异常。许多研究强调了整合局部和全局信息以实现异常准确分割的重要性。为此，人们对 Transformer 越来越感兴趣，它允许对远程内容交互进行建模。然而，对于大多数图像尺度来说，通过自注意力进行全局交互通常过于昂贵。在本研究中，我们介绍了 HaloAE，这是第一个基于 HaloNet 本地 2D 版本 Transformer 的自动编码器。通过 HaloAE，我们创建了一个混合模型，该模型结合了卷积和局部 2D 逐块自注意力层，并通过单个模型联合执行异常检测和分割。我们在 MVTec 数据集上取得了有竞争力的结果，这表明结合 Transformer 的视觉模型可以受益于自注意力操作的本地计算，并为其他应用铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HaloAE，一种基于HaloNet的局部Transformer自编码器，用于异常检测与定位。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效结合局部与全局信息，且全局自注意力计算成本过高，需更高效的模型实现精准异常分割。
AI.method: 融合卷积与局部2D块级自注意力层，构建混合模型实现异常检测与分割的联合优化。
AI.result: 在MVTec数据集上取得具有竞争力的结果，验证局部自注意力计算的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 视觉模型通过局部Transformer计算可提升效率，为其他应用奠定基础。

authors_text: Sean Cummins,Lorin Sweeney,Alan F. Smeaton
title: Analysing the Memorability of a Procedural Crime-Drama TV Series, CSI
title_zh: 分析程序犯罪电视剧《CSI》的记忆力
abstract: We investigate the memorability of a 5-season span of a popular crime-drama TV series, CSI, through the application of a vision transformer fine-tuned on the task of predicting video memorability. By investigating the popular genre of crime-drama TV through the use of a detailed annotated corpus combined with video memorability scores, we show how to extrapolate meaning from the memorability scores generated on video shots. We perform a quantitative analysis to relate video shot memorability to a variety of aspects of the show. The insights we present in this paper illustrate the importance of video memorability in applications which use multimedia in areas like education, marketing, indexing, as well as in the case here namely TV and film production.
summary: We investigate the memorability of a 5-season span of a popular crime-drama TV series, CSI, through the application of a vision transformer fine-tuned on the task of predicting video memorability. By investigating the popular genre of crime-drama TV through the use of a detailed annotated corpus combined with video memorability scores, we show how to extrapolate meaning from the memorability scores generated on video shots. We perform a quantitative analysis to relate video shot memorability to a variety of aspects of the show. The insights we present in this paper illustrate the importance of video memorability in applications which use multimedia in areas like education, marketing, indexing, as well as in the case here namely TV and film production.
abstract_zh: 我们通过应用针对预测视频记忆力任务进行微调的视觉变换器来研究流行犯罪电视剧《CSI》的 5 季跨度的记忆力。通过使用详细的注释语料库与视频记忆分数相结合来调查犯罪电视剧的流行类型，我们展示了如何从视频镜头生成的记忆分数中推断出含义。我们进行定量分析，将视频镜头的记忆力与节目的各个方面联系起来。我们在本文中提出的见解说明了视频可记忆性在教育、营销、索引等领域使用多媒体的应用程序中的重要性，以及这里的例子，即电视和电影制作。

AI.tldr: 通过微调视觉Transformer模型分析犯罪剧《CSI》视频片段的记忆性，探讨其与剧情元素的关系。
AI.motivation: 展示视频记忆性分析在多媒体应用（如教育、营销、影视制作）中的价值，并验证该方法对电视剧内容的适用性。
AI.method: 使用微调的视觉Transformer模型预测视频记忆性，结合标注语料库与定量分析，关联记忆性评分与剧情特征。
AI.result: 发现视频片段的记忆性与叙事结构、视觉元素及情节紧张度显著相关，为多媒体内容优化提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 视频记忆性分析可有效指导影视制作与多媒体应用，提升内容传播效果与用户留存率。

search_text: Analysing the Memorability of a Procedural Crime-Drama TV Series, CSI 分析程序犯罪电视剧《CSI》的记忆力 We investigate the memorability of a 5-season span of a popular crime-drama TV series, CSI, through the application of a vision transformer fine-tuned on the task of predicting video memorability. By investigating the popular genre of crime-drama TV through the use of a detailed annotated corpus combined with video memorability scores, we show how to extrapolate meaning from the memorability scores generated on video shots. We perform a quantitative analysis to relate video shot memorability to a variety of aspects of the show. The insights we present in this paper illustrate the importance of video memorability in applications which use multimedia in areas like education, marketing, indexing, as well as in the case here namely TV and film production. 我们通过应用针对预测视频记忆力任务进行微调的视觉变换器来研究流行犯罪电视剧《CSI》的 5 季跨度的记忆力。通过使用详细的注释语料库与视频记忆分数相结合来调查犯罪电视剧的流行类型，我们展示了如何从视频镜头生成的记忆分数中推断出含义。我们进行定量分析，将视频镜头的记忆力与节目的各个方面联系起来。我们在本文中提出的见解说明了视频可记忆性在教育、营销、索引等领域使用多媒体的应用程序中的重要性，以及这里的例子，即电视和电影制作。 通过微调视觉Transformer模型分析犯罪剧《CSI》视频片段的记忆性，探讨其与剧情元素的关系。 Sean Cummins,Lorin Sweeney,Alan F. Smeaton cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.MM

authors_text: Yaosi Hu,Zhenzhong Chen
title: Learning Human Cognitive Appraisal Through Reinforcement Memory Unit
title_zh: 通过强化记忆单元学习人类认知评估
abstract: We propose a novel memory-enhancing mechanism for recurrent neural networks that exploits the effect of human cognitive appraisal in sequential assessment tasks. We conceptualize the memory-enhancing mechanism as Reinforcement Memory Unit (RMU) that contains an appraisal state together with two positive and negative reinforcement memories. The two reinforcement memories are decayed or strengthened by stronger stimulus. Thereafter the appraisal state is updated through the competition of positive and negative reinforcement memories. Therefore, RMU can learn the appraisal variation under violent changing of the stimuli for estimating human affective experience. As shown in the experiments of video quality assessment and video quality of experience tasks, the proposed reinforcement memory unit achieves superior performance among recurrent neural networks, that demonstrates the effectiveness of RMU for modeling human cognitive appraisal.
summary: We propose a novel memory-enhancing mechanism for recurrent neural networks that exploits the effect of human cognitive appraisal in sequential assessment tasks. We conceptualize the memory-enhancing mechanism as Reinforcement Memory Unit (RMU) that contains an appraisal state together with two positive and negative reinforcement memories. The two reinforcement memories are decayed or strengthened by stronger stimulus. Thereafter the appraisal state is updated through the competition of positive and negative reinforcement memories. Therefore, RMU can learn the appraisal variation under violent changing of the stimuli for estimating human affective experience. As shown in the experiments of video quality assessment and video quality of experience tasks, the proposed reinforcement memory unit achieves superior performance among recurrent neural networks, that demonstrates the effectiveness of RMU for modeling human cognitive appraisal.
abstract_zh: 我们为循环神经网络提出了一种新颖的记忆增强机制，该机制利用了人类认知评估在顺序评估任务中的效果。我们将记忆增强机制概念化为强化记忆单元（RMU），其中包含评估状态以及两个正强化记忆和负强化记忆。这两种强化记忆会因更强的刺激而减弱或增强。此后，通过正负强化记忆的竞争来更新评价状态。因此，RMU可以学习刺激剧烈变化下的评价变化，从而估计人类情感体验。正如视频质量评估和体验任务视频质量的实验所示，所提出的强化记忆单元在循环神经网络中实现了优越的性能，这证明了 RMU 在模拟人类认知评估方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种强化记忆单元（RMU），通过模拟人类认知评估机制提升循环神经网络在序列任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有循环神经网络难以有效捕捉动态刺激变化下的人类情感评估过程，需设计新型记忆机制以模拟认知 appraisal 的动态调整特性。
AI.method: 构建包含评估状态与正负强化记忆的RMU模块，通过刺激强度调节记忆衰减/增强，并基于正负记忆竞争更新评估状态。
AI.result: 在视频质量评估与体验任务中，RMU相较传统RNN模型取得更优性能，验证了其对人类情感评估建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: RMU成功模拟人类认知 appraisal 机制，为情感计算与序列建模提供了新范式与技术路径。

authors_text: Benteng Ma,Yushi Wang,Shen Wang
title: Analyzing Deep Learning Based Brain Tumor Segmentation with Missing MRI Modalities
title_zh: 分析基于深度学习的缺少 MRI 模式的脑肿瘤分割
abstract: This technical report presents a comparative analysis of existing deep learning (DL) based approaches for brain tumor segmentation with missing MRI modalities. Approaches evaluated include the Adversarial Co-training Network (ACN) and a combination of mmGAN and DeepMedic. A more stable and easy-to-use version of mmGAN is also open-sourced at a GitHub repository. Using the BraTS2018 dataset, this work demonstrates that the state-of-the-art ACN performs better especially when T1c is missing. While a simple combination of mmGAN and DeepMedic also shows strong potentials when only one MRI modality is missing. Additionally, this work initiated discussions with future research directions for brain tumor segmentation with missing MRI modalities.
summary: This technical report presents a comparative analysis of existing deep learning (DL) based approaches for brain tumor segmentation with missing MRI modalities. Approaches evaluated include the Adversarial Co-training Network (ACN) and a combination of mmGAN and DeepMedic. A more stable and easy-to-use version of mmGAN is also open-sourced at a GitHub repository. Using the BraTS2018 dataset, this work demonstrates that the state-of-the-art ACN performs better especially when T1c is missing. While a simple combination of mmGAN and DeepMedic also shows strong potentials when only one MRI modality is missing. Additionally, this work initiated discussions with future research directions for brain tumor segmentation with missing MRI modalities.
abstract_zh: 该技术报告对现有基于深度学习 (DL) 的脑肿瘤分割方法（缺少 MRI 模式）进行了比较分析。评估的方法包括对抗性协同训练网络 (ACN) 以及 mmGAN 和 DeepMedic 的组合。更稳定且易于使用的 mmGAN 版本也在 GitHub 存储库中开源。使用 BraTS2018 数据集，这项工作证明了最先进的 ACN 表现更好，尤其是在缺少 T1c 时。当仅缺少一种 MRI 模式时，mmGAN 和 DeepMedic 的简单组合也显示出强大的潜力。此外，这项工作还引发了对缺少 MRI 模式的脑肿瘤分割的未来研究方向的讨论。

AI.tldr: 本文对比分析了基于深度学习的脑肿瘤分割方法在缺失MRI模态情况下的表现，评估了Adversarial Co-training Network (ACN)、mmGAN与DeepMedic组合等方法。
AI.motivation: MRI模态缺失是脑肿瘤分割中的常见问题，现有方法的有效性需系统评估以指导实际应用。
AI.method: 使用BraTS2018数据集，对比ACN、mmGAN与DeepMedic组合等方法，并开源改进版mmGAN。
AI.result: ACN在T1c缺失时表现最佳，mmGAN与DeepMedic组合在单一模态缺失时潜力显著。
AI.conclusion: ACN和mmGAN-DeepMedic组合各有优势，未来需进一步探索缺失模态下的分割策略。

ai_content.tldr: 本文对比分析了基于深度学习的脑肿瘤分割方法在缺失MRI模态情况下的表现，评估了Adversarial Co-training Network (ACN)、mmGAN与DeepMedic组合等方法。

authors_text: Bowen Yang,Qingwen Zhang,Ruoyu Geng,Lujia Wang,Ming Liu
title: Real-time Neural Dense Elevation Mapping for Urban Terrain with Uncertainty Estimations
title_zh: 具有不确定性估计的城市地形实时神经密集高程测绘
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: Having good knowledge of terrain information is essential for improving the performance of various downstream tasks on complex terrains, especially for the locomotion and navigation of legged robots. We present a novel framework for neural urban terrain reconstruction with uncertainty estimations. It generates dense robot-centric elevation maps online from sparse LiDAR observations. We design a novel pre-processing and point features representation approach that ensures high robustness and computational efficiency when integrating multiple point cloud frames. A Bayesian-GAN model then recovers the detailed terrain structures while simultaneously providing the pixel-wise reconstruction uncertainty. We evaluate the proposed pipeline through extensive simulation and real-world experiments. It demonstrates efficient terrain reconstruction with high quality and real-time performance on a mobile platform, which further benefits the downstream tasks of legged robots. (See https://kin-zhang.github.io/ndem/ for more details.)
summary: Having good knowledge of terrain information is essential for improving the performance of various downstream tasks on complex terrains, especially for the locomotion and navigation of legged robots. We present a novel framework for neural urban terrain reconstruction with uncertainty estimations. It generates dense robot-centric elevation maps online from sparse LiDAR observations. We design a novel pre-processing and point features representation approach that ensures high robustness and computational efficiency when integrating multiple point cloud frames. A Bayesian-GAN model then recovers the detailed terrain structures while simultaneously providing the pixel-wise reconstruction uncertainty. We evaluate the proposed pipeline through extensive simulation and real-world experiments. It demonstrates efficient terrain reconstruction with high quality and real-time performance on a mobile platform, which further benefits the downstream tasks of legged robots. (See https://kin-zhang.github.io/ndem/ for more details.)
abstract_zh: 充分了解地形信息对于提高复杂地形上各种下游任务的性能至关重要，特别是对于腿式机器人的运动和导航。我们提出了一种具有不确定性估计的神经城市地形重建的新颖框架。它根据稀疏的激光雷达观测结果在线生成密集的以机器人为中心的高程图。我们设计了一种新颖的预处理和点特征表示方法，可确保集成多个点云帧时的高鲁棒性和计算效率。然后，贝叶斯-GAN 模型恢复详细的地形结构，同时提供像素级重建不确定性。我们通过广泛的模拟和真实实验来评估拟议的管道。它在移动平台上展示了​​高质量和实时性能的高效地形重建，这进一步有利于腿式机器人的下游任务。 （有关更多详细信息，请参阅 https://kin-zhang.github.io/ndem/。）

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时神经密集高程映射框架，通过稀疏LiDAR观测生成机器人中心的城市地形高程图，并结合不确定性估计提升腿部机器人导航性能。
AI.motivation: 复杂地形的精确地形感知对腿部机器人移动和导航至关重要，但现有方法在实时性、稀疏点云处理效率及不确定性建模方面存在不足。
AI.method: 设计鲁棒的点云预处理与特征表示方法，结合贝叶斯-GAN模型实现地形细节重建与像素级不确定性估计，确保计算效率与实时性。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实场景实验中验证了方法的有效性，实现了移动平台上的高效高质量实时地形重建，显著提升腿部机器人下游任务表现。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为城市地形实时感知提供了新方案，其不确定性估计能力可增强机器人在复杂环境中的安全决策与运动规划。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种实时神经密集高程映射框架，通过稀疏LiDAR观测生成机器人中心的城市地形高程图，并结合不确定性估计提升腿部机器人导航性能。

ai_content.method: 设计鲁棒的点云预处理与特征表示方法，结合贝叶斯-GAN模型实现地形细节重建与像素级不确定性估计，确保计算效率与实时性。

search_text: Real-time Neural Dense Elevation Mapping for Urban Terrain with Uncertainty Estimations 具有不确定性估计的城市地形实时神经密集高程测绘 Having good knowledge of terrain information is essential for improving the performance of various downstream tasks on complex terrains, especially for the locomotion and navigation of legged robots. We present a novel framework for neural urban terrain reconstruction with uncertainty estimations. It generates dense robot-centric elevation maps online from sparse LiDAR observations. We design a novel pre-processing and point features representation approach that ensures high robustness and computational efficiency when integrating multiple point cloud frames. A Bayesian-GAN model then recovers the detailed terrain structures while simultaneously providing the pixel-wise reconstruction uncertainty. We evaluate the proposed pipeline through extensive simulation and real-world experiments. It demonstrates efficient terrain reconstruction with high quality and real-time performance on a mobile platform, which further benefits the downstream tasks of legged robots. (See https://kin-zhang.github.io/ndem/ for more details.) 充分了解地形信息对于提高复杂地形上各种下游任务的性能至关重要，特别是对于腿式机器人的运动和导航。我们提出了一种具有不确定性估计的神经城市地形重建的新颖框架。它根据稀疏的激光雷达观测结果在线生成密集的以机器人为中心的高程图。我们设计了一种新颖的预处理和点特征表示方法，可确保集成多个点云帧时的高鲁棒性和计算效率。然后，贝叶斯-GAN 模型恢复详细的地形结构，同时提供像素级重建不确定性。我们通过广泛的模拟和真实实验来评估拟议的管道。它在移动平台上展示了​​高质量和实时性能的高效地形重建，这进一步有利于腿式机器人的下游任务。 （有关更多详细信息，请参阅 https://kin-zhang.github.io/ndem/。） 本文提出一种实时神经密集高程映射框架，通过稀疏LiDAR观测生成机器人中心的城市地形高程图，并结合不确定性估计提升腿部机器人导航性能。 Bowen Yang,Qingwen Zhang,Ruoyu Geng,Lujia Wang,Ming Liu cs.RO

authors_text: Jiaxin Qi,Kaihua Tang,Qianru Sun,Xian-Sheng Hua,Hanwang Zhang
title: Class Is Invariant to Context and Vice Versa: On Learning Invariance for Out-Of-Distribution Generalization
title_zh: 类对于上下文是不变的，反之亦然：关于分布外泛化的学习不变性
abstract: Out-Of-Distribution generalization (OOD) is all about learning invariance against environmental changes. If the context in every class is evenly distributed, OOD would be trivial because the context can be easily removed due to an underlying principle: class is invariant to context. However, collecting such a balanced dataset is impractical. Learning on imbalanced data makes the model bias to context and thus hurts OOD. Therefore, the key to OOD is context balance. We argue that the widely adopted assumption in prior work, the context bias can be directly annotated or estimated from biased class prediction, renders the context incomplete or even incorrect. In contrast, we point out the everoverlooked other side of the above principle: context is also invariant to class, which motivates us to consider the classes (which are already labeled) as the varying environments to resolve context bias (without context labels). We implement this idea by minimizing the contrastive loss of intra-class sample similarity while assuring this similarity to be invariant across all classes. On benchmarks with various context biases and domain gaps, we show that a simple re-weighting based classifier equipped with our context estimation achieves state-of-the-art performance. We provide the theoretical justifications in Appendix and codes on https://github.com/simpleshinobu/IRMCon.
summary: Out-Of-Distribution generalization (OOD) is all about learning invariance against environmental changes. If the context in every class is evenly distributed, OOD would be trivial because the context can be easily removed due to an underlying principle: class is invariant to context. However, collecting such a balanced dataset is impractical. Learning on imbalanced data makes the model bias to context and thus hurts OOD. Therefore, the key to OOD is context balance. We argue that the widely adopted assumption in prior work, the context bias can be directly annotated or estimated from biased class prediction, renders the context incomplete or even incorrect. In contrast, we point out the everoverlooked other side of the above principle: context is also invariant to class, which motivates us to consider the classes (which are already labeled) as the varying environments to resolve context bias (without context labels). We implement this idea by minimizing the contrastive loss of intra-class sample similarity while assuring this similarity to be invariant across all classes. On benchmarks with various context biases and domain gaps, we show that a simple re-weighting based classifier equipped with our context estimation achieves state-of-the-art performance. We provide the theoretical justifications in Appendix and codes on https://github.com/simpleshinobu/IRMCon.
abstract_zh: 分布外泛化（OOD）就是学习针对环境变化的不变性。如果每个类中的上下文均匀分布，OOD 就会变得微不足道，因为由于一个基本原则，上下文可以很容易地被删除：类对于上下文是不变的。然而，收集这样一个平衡的数据集是不切实际的。对不平衡数据的学习会使模型对上下文产生偏差，从而损害 OOD。因此，OOD的关键是上下文平衡。我们认为，先前工作中广泛采用的假设是，上下文偏差可以直接注释或从有偏差的类预测中估计，导致上下文不完整甚至不正确。相比之下，我们指出了上述原则被忽视的另一面：上下文对于类来说也是不变的，这促使我们将类（已经被标记）视为变化的环境来解决上下文偏差（没有上下文标签）。我们通过最小化类内样本相似性的对比损失来实现这个想法，同时确保这种相似性在所有类中保持不变。在具有各种上下文偏差和领域差距的基准测试中，我们表明，配备我们的上下文估计的简单的基于重新加权的分类器实现了最先进的性能。我们在附录中提供了理论依据，并在 https://github.com/simpleshinobu/IRMCon 上提供了代码。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过学习不变性来提升模型在分布外数据上的泛化能力，提出了一种基于类与上下文相互不变性的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖于上下文偏差的标注或预测，但此类信息往往不完整或错误。作者指出类与上下文相互不变的原理被忽视，从而提出无需上下文标签即可解决偏差的新思路。
AI.method: 通过最小化类内样本相似性的对比损失，并确保这种相似性在所有类间保持不变，利用已标注的类别作为变化环境来消除上下文偏差。
AI.result: 在多种上下文偏差和领域差距的基准数据集上，基于简单重加权分类器的该方法达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 上下文平衡是分布外泛化的关键，本文方法通过类与上下文的双向不变性原理，在无上下文标签的情况下有效提升了模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Hyeonsu B. Kang,Joseph Chee Chang,Yongsung Kim,Aniket Kittur
title: Threddy: An Interactive System for Personalized Thread-based Exploration and Organization of Scientific Literature
title_zh: Threddy：用于个性化基于线程的探索和科学文献组织的交互式系统
abstract: Reviewing the literature to understand relevant threads of past work is a critical part of research and vehicle for learning. However, as the scientific literature grows the challenges for users to find and make sense of the many different threads of research grow as well. Previous work has helped scholars to find and group papers with citation information or textual similarity using standalone tools or overview visualizations. Instead, in this work we explore a tool integrated into users' reading process that helps them with leveraging authors' existing summarization of threads, typically in introduction or related work sections, in order to situate their own work's contributions. To explore this we developed a prototype that supports efficient extraction and organization of threads along with supporting evidence as scientists read research articles. The system then recommends further relevant articles based on user-created threads. We evaluate the system in a lab study and find that it helps scientists to follow and curate research threads without breaking out of their flow of reading, collect relevant papers and clips, and discover interesting new articles to further grow threads.
summary: Reviewing the literature to understand relevant threads of past work is a critical part of research and vehicle for learning. However, as the scientific literature grows the challenges for users to find and make sense of the many different threads of research grow as well. Previous work has helped scholars to find and group papers with citation information or textual similarity using standalone tools or overview visualizations. Instead, in this work we explore a tool integrated into users' reading process that helps them with leveraging authors' existing summarization of threads, typically in introduction or related work sections, in order to situate their own work's contributions. To explore this we developed a prototype that supports efficient extraction and organization of threads along with supporting evidence as scientists read research articles. The system then recommends further relevant articles based on user-created threads. We evaluate the system in a lab study and find that it helps scientists to follow and curate research threads without breaking out of their flow of reading, collect relevant papers and clips, and discover interesting new articles to further grow threads.
abstract_zh: 回顾文献以了解过去工作的相关线索是研究和学习工具的重要组成部分。然而，随着科学文献的增长，用户寻找和理解许多不同研究线索的挑战也随之增加。先前的工作已帮助学者使用独立工具或概述可视化来查找和分组具有引文信息或文本相似性的论文。相反，在这项工作中，我们探索了一种集成到用户阅读过程中的工具，帮助他们利用作者现有的线索总结（通常在介绍或相关工作部分），以便定位他们自己的工作贡献。为了探索这一点，我们开发了一个原型，支持高效提取和组织线程，并在科学家阅读研究文章时提供支持证据。然后，系统会根据用户创建的线程推荐进一步的相关文章。我们在实验室研究中评估了该系统，发现它可以帮助科学家在不中断阅读流程的情况下跟踪和策划研究线索，收集相关论文和剪辑，并发现有趣的新文章以进一步发展线索。

AI.tldr: 开发Threddy系统，帮助用户通过个性化主题线高效探索和组织科学文献
AI.motivation: 现有工具无法有效帮助用户在阅读过程中跟踪和理解研究主题，需集成化工具支持个性化探索
AI.method: 开发集成于阅读流程的原型系统，利用文献中的主题总结进行提取、组织，并基于用户主题推荐相关文章
AI.result: 实验表明系统能有效帮助科学家在不打断阅读流程的情况下管理主题、收集资料并发现新文献
AI.conclusion: Threddy系统通过集成化设计提升科学文献探索效率，促进研究者有效组织和扩展研究主题

The system then recommends further relevant articles based on user-created threads. We evaluate the system in a lab study and find that it helps scientists to follow and curate research threads without breaking out of their flow of reading, collect relevant papers and clips, and discover interesting new articles to further grow threads. 回顾文献以了解过去工作的相关线索是研究和学习工具的重要组成部分。然而，随着科学文献的增长，用户寻找和理解许多不同研究线索的挑战也随之增加。先前的工作已帮助学者使用独立工具或概述可视化来查找和分组具有引文信息或文本相似性的论文。相反，在这项工作中，我们探索了一种集成到用户阅读过程中的工具，帮助他们利用作者现有的线索总结（通常在介绍或相关工作部分），以便定位他们自己的工作贡献。为了探索这一点，我们开发了一个原型，支持高效提取和组织线程，并在科学家阅读研究文章时提供支持证据。然后，系统会根据用户创建的线程推荐进一步的相关文章。我们在实验室研究中评估了该系统，发现它可以帮助科学家在不中断阅读流程的情况下跟踪和策划研究线索，收集相关论文和剪辑，并发现有趣的新文章以进一步发展线索。 开发Threddy系统，帮助用户通过个性化主题线高效探索和组织科学文献 Hyeonsu B. Kang,Joseph Chee Chang,Yongsung Kim,Aniket Kittur cs.HC

authors_text: Yin Zhang,Can Xu,XianJun Wu,Yan Zhang,LiGang Dong,Weigang Wang
title: LFGCF: Light Folksonomy Graph Collaborative Filtering for Tag-Aware Recommendation
title_zh: LFGCF：用于标签感知推荐的轻量级图协同过滤
abstract: Tag-aware recommendation is a task of predicting a personalized list of items for a user by their tagging behaviors. It is crucial for many applications with tagging capabilities like last.fm or movielens. Recently, many efforts have been devoted to improving Tag-aware recommendation systems (TRS) with Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN), which has become new state-of-the-art for the general recommendation. However, some solutions are directly inherited from GCN without justifications, which is difficult to alleviate the sparsity, ambiguity, and redundancy issues introduced by tags, thus adding to difficulties of training and degrading recommendation performance. In this work, we aim to simplify the design of GCN to make it more concise for TRS. We propose a novel tag-aware recommendation model named Light Folksonomy Graph Collaborative Filtering (LFGCF), which only includes the essential GCN components. Specifically, LFGCF first constructs Folksonomy Graphs from the records of user assigning tags and item getting tagged. Then we leverage the simple design of aggregation to learn the high-order representations on Folksonomy Graphs and use the weighted sum of the embeddings learned at several layers for information updating. We share tags embeddings to bridge the information gap between users and items. Besides, a regularization function named TransRT is proposed to better depict user preferences and item features. Extensive hyperparameters experiments and ablation studies on three real-world datasets show that LFGCF uses fewer parameters and significantly outperforms most baselines for the tag-aware top-N recommendations.
summary: Tag-aware recommendation is a task of predicting a personalized list of items for a user by their tagging behaviors. It is crucial for many applications with tagging capabilities like last.fm or movielens. Recently, many efforts have been devoted to improving Tag-aware recommendation systems (TRS) with Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN), which has become new state-of-the-art for the general recommendation. However, some solutions are directly inherited from GCN without justifications, which is difficult to alleviate the sparsity, ambiguity, and redundancy issues introduced by tags, thus adding to difficulties of training and degrading recommendation performance. In this work, we aim to simplify the design of GCN to make it more concise for TRS. We propose a novel tag-aware recommendation model named Light Folksonomy Graph Collaborative Filtering (LFGCF), which only includes the essential GCN components. Specifically, LFGCF first constructs Folksonomy Graphs from the records of user assigning tags and item getting tagged. Then we leverage the simple design of aggregation to learn the high-order representations on Folksonomy Graphs and use the weighted sum of the embeddings learned at several layers for information updating. We share tags embeddings to bridge the information gap between users and items. Besides, a regularization function named TransRT is proposed to better depict user preferences and item features. Extensive hyperparameters experiments and ablation studies on three real-world datasets show that LFGCF uses fewer parameters and significantly outperforms most baselines for the tag-aware top-N recommendations.
abstract_zh: 标签感知推荐是通过用户的标签行为预测个性化项目列表的任务。这对于许多具有标记功能的应用程序（如 last.fm 或 movielens）至关重要。最近，人们致力于利用图卷积网络（GCN）改进标签感知推荐系统（TRS），这已成为一般推荐的新技术。然而，一些解决方案毫无道理地直接继承自GCN，这很难缓解标签引入的稀疏性、歧义性和冗余问题，从而增加了训练的难度并降低了推荐性能。在这项工作中，我们的目标是简化 GCN 的设计，使其对于 TRS 来说更加简洁。我们提出了一种新颖的标签感知推荐模型，名为 Light Folksonomy Graph Collaborative Filtering (LFGCF)，它只包含必要的 GCN 组件。具体来说，LFGCF 首先根据用户分配标签和项目被标记的记录构建 Folksonomy Graph。然后，我们利用简单的聚合设计来学习 Folksonomy Graph 上的高阶表示，并使用在多个层学习到的嵌入的加权和来进行信息更新。我们共享标签嵌入来弥合用户和项目之间的信息差距。此外，还提出了一种名为 TransRT 的正则化函数，以更好地描述用户偏好和项目特征。对三个真实世界数据集进行的广泛超参数实验和消融研究表明，LFGCF 使用更少的参数，并且显着优于标签感知前 N 个推荐的大多数基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级的标签感知推荐模型LFGCF，通过简化图卷积网络设计解决标签稀疏性、模糊性和冗余性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图卷积网络（GCN）的标签感知推荐系统存在参数冗余、难以缓解标签固有缺陷等问题，导致训练困难和推荐性能下降。
AI.method: 构建用户-标签-物品三元组的 Folksonomy 图，采用聚合操作学习高阶表示，通过共享标签嵌入连接用户与物品，并设计TransRT正则化函数优化表示学习。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上实验表明，LFGCF参数量更少且显著优于大多数基线模型，在标签感知Top-N推荐任务中表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 通过精简GCN架构并针对性设计模块，LFGCF有效解决了标签推荐中的核心挑战，为轻量化图神经网络推荐提供了新思路。

authors_text: Marie-Pierre Béal,Maxime Crochemore
title: Fast detection of specific fragments against a set of sequences
title_zh: 针对一组序列快速检测特定片段
abstract: We design alignment-free techniques for comparing a sequence or word, called a target, against a set of words, called a reference. A target-specific factor of a target $T$ against a reference $R$ is a factor $w$ of a word in $T$ which is not a factor of a word of $R$ and such that any proper factor of $w$ is a factor of a word of $R$. We first address the computation of the set of target-specific factors of a target $T$ against a reference $R$, where $T$ and $R$ are finite sets of sequences. The result is the construction of an automaton accepting the set of all considered target-specific factors. The construction algorithm runs in linear time according to the size of $T\cup R$. The second result consists of the design of an algorithm to compute all the occurrences in a single sequence $T$ of its target-specific factors against a reference $R$. The algorithm runs in real-time on the target sequence, independently of the number of occurrences of target-specific factors.
summary: We design alignment-free techniques for comparing a sequence or word, called a target, against a set of words, called a reference. A target-specific factor of a target $T$ against a reference $R$ is a factor $w$ of a word in $T$ which is not a factor of a word of $R$ and such that any proper factor of $w$ is a factor of a word of $R$. We first address the computation of the set of target-specific factors of a target $T$ against a reference $R$, where $T$ and $R$ are finite sets of sequences. The result is the construction of an automaton accepting the set of all considered target-specific factors. The construction algorithm runs in linear time according to the size of $T\cup R$. The second result consists of the design of an algorithm to compute all the occurrences in a single sequence $T$ of its target-specific factors against a reference $R$. The algorithm runs in real-time on the target sequence, independently of the number of occurrences of target-specific factors.
abstract_zh: 我们设计了免对齐技术，用于将序列或单词（称为目标）与一组单词（称为参考）进行比较。目标$T$相对于参考$R$的目标特定因子是$T$中的单词的因子$w$，其不是$R$的单词的因子，并且使得$w$的任何适当因子是$R$的单词的因子。我们首先针对参考 $R$ 计算目标 $T$ 的目标特定因素集，其中 $T$ 和 $R$ 是有限序列集。结果是构建一个接受所有考虑的特定目标因素集的自动机。构造算法根据$T\cup R$的大小以线性时间运行。第二个结果包括算法的设计，该算法根据参考 $R$ 计算其目标特定因素的单个序列 $T$ 中的所有出现情况。该算法在目标序列上实时运行，与目标特定因素的出现次数无关。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种无需比对的快速检测方法，用于在目标序列中识别相对于参考序列集的特异性片段。
AI.motivation: 传统序列比对方法计算成本高，难以高效处理大规模序列数据，需开发更高效的特异性片段检测技术。
AI.method: 通过构建自动机识别目标特异性因子，并设计实时算法在单个目标序列中定位所有特异性因子。
AI.result: 提出线性时间复杂度的自动机构建算法，以及与目标序列长度无关的实时检测算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模序列分析提供了高效、无需比对的特异性片段检测方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Shannan Guan,Haiyan Lu,Linchao Zhu,Gengfa Fang
title: AFE-CNN: 3D Skeleton-based Action Recognition with Action Feature Enhancement
title_zh: AFE-CNN：具有动作特征增强的基于 3D 骨架的动作识别
abstract: Existing 3D skeleton-based action recognition approaches reach impressive performance by encoding handcrafted action features to image format and decoding by CNNs. However, such methods are limited in two ways: a) the handcrafted action features are difficult to handle challenging actions, and b) they generally require complex CNN models to improve action recognition accuracy, which usually occur heavy computational burden. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a novel AFE-CNN, which devotes to enhance the features of 3D skeleton-based actions to adapt to challenging actions. We propose feature enhance modules from key joint, bone vector, key frame and temporal perspectives, thus the AFE-CNN is more robust to camera views and body sizes variation, and significantly improve the recognition accuracy on challenging actions. Moreover, our AFE-CNN adopts a light-weight CNN model to decode images with action feature enhanced, which ensures a much lower computational burden than the state-of-the-art methods. We evaluate the AFE-CNN on three benchmark skeleton-based action datasets: NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120, and UTKinect-Action3D, with extensive experimental results demonstrate our outstanding performance of AFE-CNN.
summary: Existing 3D skeleton-based action recognition approaches reach impressive performance by encoding handcrafted action features to image format and decoding by CNNs. However, such methods are limited in two ways: a) the handcrafted action features are difficult to handle challenging actions, and b) they generally require complex CNN models to improve action recognition accuracy, which usually occur heavy computational burden. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a novel AFE-CNN, which devotes to enhance the features of 3D skeleton-based actions to adapt to challenging actions. We propose feature enhance modules from key joint, bone vector, key frame and temporal perspectives, thus the AFE-CNN is more robust to camera views and body sizes variation, and significantly improve the recognition accuracy on challenging actions. Moreover, our AFE-CNN adopts a light-weight CNN model to decode images with action feature enhanced, which ensures a much lower computational burden than the state-of-the-art methods. We evaluate the AFE-CNN on three benchmark skeleton-based action datasets: NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120, and UTKinect-Action3D, with extensive experimental results demonstrate our outstanding performance of AFE-CNN.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于 3D 骨架的动作识别方法通过将手工制作的动作特征编码为图像格式并通过 CNN 进行解码，达到了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，此类方法在两个方面受到限制：a）手工制作的动作特征难以处理具有挑战性的动作，b）它们通常需要复杂的 CNN 模型来提高动作识别精度，这通常会带来沉重的计算负担。为了克服这些限制，我们引入了一种新颖的 AFE-CNN，它致力于增强基于 3D 骨架的动作的特征，以适应具有挑战性的动作。我们从关键关节、骨骼向量、关键帧和时间角度提出了特征增强模块，因此 AFE-CNN 对摄像机视图和身体尺寸变化更加鲁棒，并显着提高了对挑战性动作的识别精度。此外，我们的 AFE-CNN 采用轻量级 CNN 模型来解码增强了动作特征的图像，这确保了比最先进的方法低得多的计算负担。我们在三个基于骨架的基准动作数据集上评估了 AFE-CNN：NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120 和 UTKinect-Action3D，大量的实验结果证明了我们 AFE-CNN 的出色性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AFE-CNN，通过增强3D骨骼动作特征并采用轻量级CNN模型，提升复杂场景下的动作识别准确率并降低计算负担。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖手工设计的骨骼特征和复杂CNN模型，存在难以处理复杂动作及计算开销大的问题。
AI.method: 从关键关节、骨骼向量、关键帧和时序角度设计特征增强模块，结合轻量级CNN解码器实现高效识别。
AI.result: 在NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120和UTKinect-Action3D三个数据集上验证，复杂动作识别准确率显著提升且计算量低于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: AFE-CNN通过多维度特征增强和轻量化设计，在保持高识别精度的同时有效应对视角变化和身体尺度差异等挑战。

search_text: AFE-CNN: 3D Skeleton-based Action Recognition with Action Feature Enhancement AFE-CNN：具有动作特征增强的基于 3D 骨架的动作识别 Existing 3D skeleton-based action recognition approaches reach impressive performance by encoding handcrafted action features to image format and decoding by CNNs. However, such methods are limited in two ways: a) the handcrafted action features are difficult to handle challenging actions, and b) they generally require complex CNN models to improve action recognition accuracy, which usually occur heavy computational burden. To overcome these limitations, we introduce a novel AFE-CNN, which devotes to enhance the features of 3D skeleton-based actions to adapt to challenging actions. We propose feature enhance modules from key joint, bone vector, key frame and temporal perspectives, thus the AFE-CNN is more robust to camera views and body sizes variation, and significantly improve the recognition accuracy on challenging actions. Moreover, our AFE-CNN adopts a light-weight CNN model to decode images with action feature enhanced, which ensures a much lower computational burden than the state-of-the-art methods. We evaluate the AFE-CNN on three benchmark skeleton-based action datasets: NTU RGB+D, NTU RGB+D 120, and UTKinect-Action3D, with extensive experimental results demonstrate our outstanding performance of AFE-CNN. 现有的基于 3D 骨架的动作识别方法通过将手工制作的动作特征编码为图像格式并通过 CNN 进行解码，达到了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，此类方法在两个方面受到限制：a）手工制作的动作特征难以处理具有挑战性的动作，b）它们通常需要复杂的 CNN 模型来提高动作识别精度，这通常会带来沉重的计算负担。为了克服这些限制，我们引入了一种新颖的 AFE-CNN，它致力于增强基于 3D 骨架的动作的特征，以适应具有挑战性的动作。我们从关键关节、骨骼向量、关键帧和时间角度提出了特征增强模块，因此 AFE-CNN 对摄像机视图和身体尺寸变化更加鲁棒，并显着提高了对挑战性动作的识别精度。此外，我们的 AFE-CNN 采用轻量级 CNN 模型来解码增强了动作特征的图像，这确保了比最先进的方法低得多的计算负担。我们在三个基于骨架的基准动作数据集上评估了 AFE-CNN：NTU RGB+D、NTU RGB+D 120 和 UTKinect-Action3D，大量的实验结果证明了我们 AFE-CNN 的出色性能。 本文提出AFE-CNN，通过增强3D骨骼动作特征并采用轻量级CNN模型，提升复杂场景下的动作识别准确率并降低计算负担。 Shannan Guan,Haiyan Lu,Linchao Zhu,Gengfa Fang cs.CV

authors_text: Yonchanok Khaokaew,Indigo Holcombe-James,Mohammad Saiedur Rahaman,Jonathan Liono,Johanne R. Trippas,Damiano Spina,Nicholas Belkin,Peter Bailey,Paul N. Bennett,Yongli Ren,Mark Sanderson,Falk Scholer,Ryen W. White,Flora D. Salim
title: Imagining Future Digital Assistants at Work: A Study of Task Management Needs
title_zh: 想象未来工作中的数字助理：任务管理需求研究
abstract: Digital Assistants (DAs) can support workers in the workplace and beyond. However, target user needs are not fully understood, and the functions that workers would ideally want a DA to support require further study. A richer understanding of worker needs could help inform the design of future DAs. We investigate user needs of future workplace DAs using data from a user study of 40 workers over a four-week period. Our qualitative analysis confirms existing research and generates new insight on the role of DAs in managing people's time, tasks, and information. Placing these insights in relation to quantitative analysis of self-reported task data, we highlight how different occupation roles require DAs to take varied approaches to these domains and the effect of task characteristics on the imagined features. Our findings have implications for the design of future DAs in work settings, and we offer some recommendations for reduction to practice.
summary: Digital Assistants (DAs) can support workers in the workplace and beyond. However, target user needs are not fully understood, and the functions that workers would ideally want a DA to support require further study. A richer understanding of worker needs could help inform the design of future DAs. We investigate user needs of future workplace DAs using data from a user study of 40 workers over a four-week period. Our qualitative analysis confirms existing research and generates new insight on the role of DAs in managing people's time, tasks, and information. Placing these insights in relation to quantitative analysis of self-reported task data, we highlight how different occupation roles require DAs to take varied approaches to these domains and the effect of task characteristics on the imagined features. Our findings have implications for the design of future DAs in work settings, and we offer some recommendations for reduction to practice.
abstract_zh: 数字助理 (DA) 可以为工作场所内外的员工提供支持。然而，目标用户的需求尚未完全了解，工作人员理想地希望 DA 支持的功能需要进一步研究。对工人需求的更深入了解有助于为未来发展议程的设计提供信息。我们使用为期 4 周期间对 40 名员工进行的用户研究数据来调查未来工作场所 DA 的用户需求。我们的定性分析证实了现有的研究，并对 DA 在管理人们的时间、任务和信息方面的作用产生了新的见解。将这些见解与自我报告的任务数据的定量分析联系起来，我们强调了不同的职业角色如何要求 DA 对这些领域采取不同的方法，以及任务特征对想象特征的影响。我们的研究结果对工作环境中未来发展议程的设计具有影响，并且我们提供了一些减少实践的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文通过用户研究探讨未来职场数字助手在任务管理方面的需求，分析不同职业角色对数字助手功能的差异化需求。
AI.motivation: 现有数字助手功能未能充分满足用户需求，需深入研究工作者在任务管理、时间规划及信息处理方面的具体需求以指导未来设计。
AI.method: 对40名职场人士进行为期四周的用户研究，结合定性分析与定量分析（自我报告任务数据），探讨数字助手在不同职业场景中的应用需求。
AI.result: 研究发现不同职业角色对数字助手的任务管理方式存在差异，任务特征（如复杂度、优先级）显著影响用户对数字助手功能的想象与需求。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为未来数字助手的设计提供了实践建议，强调需根据职业角色和任务特性定制化功能，以提升职场效率。

authors_text: Fangzhou Gao,Meng Wang,Lianghao Zhang,Li Wang,Jiawan Zhang
title: Deep Uncalibrated Photometric Stereo via Inter-Intra Image Feature Fusion
title_zh: 通过帧内图像特征融合实现深度未校准光度立体
abstract: Uncalibrated photometric stereo is proposed to estimate the detailed surface normal from images under varying and unknown lightings. Recently, deep learning brings powerful data priors to this underdetermined problem. This paper presents a new method for deep uncalibrated photometric stereo, which efficiently utilizes the inter-image representation to guide the normal estimation. Previous methods use optimization-based neural inverse rendering or a single size-independent pooling layer to deal with multiple inputs, which are inefficient for utilizing information among input images. Given multi-images under different lighting, we consider the intra-image and inter-image variations highly correlated. Motivated by the correlated variations, we designed an inter-intra image feature fusion module to introduce the inter-image representation into the per-image feature extraction. The extra representation is used to guide the per-image feature extraction and eliminate the ambiguity in normal estimation. We demonstrate the effect of our design on a wide range of samples, especially on dark materials. Our method produces significantly better results than the state-of-the-art methods on both synthetic and real data.
summary: Uncalibrated photometric stereo is proposed to estimate the detailed surface normal from images under varying and unknown lightings. Recently, deep learning brings powerful data priors to this underdetermined problem. This paper presents a new method for deep uncalibrated photometric stereo, which efficiently utilizes the inter-image representation to guide the normal estimation. Previous methods use optimization-based neural inverse rendering or a single size-independent pooling layer to deal with multiple inputs, which are inefficient for utilizing information among input images. Given multi-images under different lighting, we consider the intra-image and inter-image variations highly correlated. Motivated by the correlated variations, we designed an inter-intra image feature fusion module to introduce the inter-image representation into the per-image feature extraction. The extra representation is used to guide the per-image feature extraction and eliminate the ambiguity in normal estimation. We demonstrate the effect of our design on a wide range of samples, especially on dark materials. Our method produces significantly better results than the state-of-the-art methods on both synthetic and real data.
abstract_zh: 提出了未校准的光度立体来估计变化和未知照明下的图像的详细表面法线。最近，深度学习为这个不确定的问题带来了强大的数据。本文提出了一种深度未校准光度立体的新方法，该方法有效地利用图像间表示来指导正常估计。以前的方法使用基于优化的神经逆渲染或单个大小无关的池化层来处理多个输入，这对于利用输入图像之间的信息效率低下。给定不同光照下的多图像，我们认为图像内和图像间的变化高度相关。受相关变化的启发，我们设计了一个帧内图像特征融合模块，将图像间表示引入到每图像特征提取中。额外的表示用于指导每图像特征提取并消除正常估计中的歧义。我们在各种样品上展示了我们的设计的效果，特别是在深色材料上。我们的方法在合成数据和真实数据上都比最先进的方法产生了明显更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的未校准光度立体视觉方法，通过融合图像间与图像内特征来更精确地估计表面法线。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在利用多图像间信息时效率低下，且难以处理暗色材料等复杂场景，需设计更有效的特征融合机制以提升法线估计精度。
AI.method: 设计了跨图像-内图像特征融合模块，将图像间表示引入单张图像特征提取过程，利用关联性消除法线估计的歧义性。
AI.result: 在合成数据与真实数据集上均显著优于现有方法，尤其在暗色材料等挑战性场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘图像间与图像内特征的关联性，所提方法有效提升了未校准光度立体视觉的表面法线估计性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的未校准光度立体视觉方法，通过融合图像间与图像内特征来更精确地估计表面法线。
