ai_content_json.method: 设计了跨图像-内图像特征融合模块，将图像间表示引入单张图像特征提取过程，利用关联性消除法线估计的歧义性。
ai_content_json.result: 在合成数据与真实数据集上均显著优于现有方法，尤其在暗色材料等挑战性场景中表现突出。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过挖掘图像间与图像内特征的关联性，所提方法有效提升了未校准光度立体视觉的表面法线估计性能。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的未校准光度立体视觉方法，通过融合图像间与图像内特征来更精确地估计表面法线。
motivation: 传统方法在利用多图像间信息时效率低下，且难以处理暗色材料等复杂场景，需设计更有效的特征融合机制以提升法线估计精度。
method: 设计了跨图像-内图像特征融合模块，将图像间表示引入单张图像特征提取过程，利用关联性消除法线估计的歧义性。
result: 在合成数据与真实数据集上均显著优于现有方法，尤其在暗色材料等挑战性场景中表现突出。
conclusion: 通过挖掘图像间与图像内特征的关联性，所提方法有效提升了未校准光度立体视觉的表面法线估计性能。
search_text: Deep Uncalibrated Photometric Stereo via Inter-Intra Image Feature Fusion 通过帧内图像特征融合实现深度未校准光度立体 Uncalibrated photometric stereo is proposed to estimate the detailed surface normal from images under varying and unknown lightings. Recently, deep learning brings powerful data priors to this underdetermined problem. This paper presents a new method for deep uncalibrated photometric stereo, which efficiently utilizes the inter-image representation to guide the normal estimation. Previous methods use optimization-based neural inverse rendering or a single size-independent pooling layer to deal with multiple inputs, which are inefficient for utilizing information among input images. Given multi-images under different lighting, we consider the intra-image and inter-image variations highly correlated. Motivated by the correlated variations, we designed an inter-intra image feature fusion module to introduce the inter-image representation into the per-image feature extraction. The extra representation is used to guide the per-image feature extraction and eliminate the ambiguity in normal estimation. We demonstrate the effect of our design on a wide range of samples, especially on dark materials. Our method produces significantly better results than the state-of-the-art methods on both synthetic and real data. 提出了未校准的光度立体来估计变化和未知照明下的图像的详细表面法线。最近，深度学习为这个不确定的问题带来了强大的数据。本文提出了一种深度未校准光度立体的新方法，该方法有效地利用图像间表示来指导正常估计。以前的方法使用基于优化的神经逆渲染或单个大小无关的池化层来处理多个输入，这对于利用输入图像之间的信息效率低下。给定不同光照下的多图像，我们认为图像内和图像间的变化高度相关。受相关变化的启发，我们设计了一个帧内图像特征融合模块，将图像间表示引入到每图像特征提取中。额外的表示用于指导每图像特征提取并消除正常估计中的歧义。我们在各种样品上展示了我们的设计的效果，特别是在深色材料上。我们的方法在合成数据和真实数据上都比最先进的方法产生了明显更好的结果。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的未校准光度立体视觉方法，通过融合图像间与图像内特征来更精确地估计表面法线。 Fangzhou Gao,Meng Wang,Lianghao Zhang,Li Wang,Jiawan Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Srinjoy Bhuiya,Ayushman Kumar,Sankalok Sen
title: Exploring the Effects of Data Augmentation for Drivable Area Segmentation
title_zh: 探索数据增强对可行驶区域分割的影响
comment: 16 pages, 10 figures, Presented at International Conference of Undergraduate Students, ICUS 2021
comments: 16 pages, 10 figures, Presented at International Conference of Undergraduate Students, ICUS 2021
abstract: The real-time segmentation of drivable areas plays a vital role in accomplishing autonomous perception in cars. Recently there have been some rapid strides in the development of image segmentation models using deep learning. However, most of the advancements have been made in model architecture design. In solving any supervised deep learning problem related to segmentation, the success of the model that one builds depends upon the amount and quality of input training data we use for that model. This data should contain well-annotated varied images for better working of the segmentation model. Issues like this pertaining to annotations in a dataset can lead the model to conclude with overwhelming Type I and II errors in testing and validation, causing malicious issues when trying to tackle real world problems. To address this problem and to make our model more accurate, dynamic, and robust, data augmentation comes into usage as it helps in expanding our sample training data and making it better and more diversified overall. Hence, in our study, we focus on investigating the benefits of data augmentation by analyzing pre-existing image datasets and performing augmentations accordingly. Our results show that the performance and robustness of existing state of the art (or SOTA) models can be increased dramatically without any increase in model complexity or inference time. The augmentations decided on and used in this paper were decided only after thorough research of several other augmentation methodologies and strategies and their corresponding effects that are in widespread usage today. All our results are being reported on the widely used Cityscapes Dataset.

Recently there have been some rapid strides in the development of image segmentation models using deep learning. However, most of the advancements have been made in model architecture design. This data should contain well-annotated varied images for better working of the segmentation model. Issues like this pertaining to annotations in a dataset can lead the model to conclude with overwhelming Type I and II errors in testing and validation, causing malicious issues when trying to tackle real world problems. To address this problem and to make our model more accurate, dynamic, and robust, data augmentation comes into usage as it helps in expanding our sample training data and making it better and more diversified overall. Hence, in our study, we focus on investigating the benefits of data augmentation by analyzing pre-existing image datasets and performing augmentations accordingly. Our results show that the performance and robustness of existing state of the art (or SOTA) models can be increased dramatically without any increase in model complexity or inference time. The augmentations decided on and used in this paper were decided only after thorough research of several other augmentation methodologies and strategies and their corresponding effects that are in widespread usage today. All our results are being reported on the widely used Cityscapes Dataset.
abstract_zh: 可驾驶区域的实时分割对于实现汽车自主感知起着至关重要的作用。最近，使用深度学习的图像分割模型的发展取得了一些快速进展。然而，大部分进步都是在模型架构设计方面取得的。在解决与分割相关的任何监督深度学习问题时，构建的模型的成功取决于我们用于该模型的输入训练数据的数量和质量。该数据应包含注释良好的各种图像，以便分割模型更好地工作。与数据集中的注释相关的此类问题可能会导致模型在测试和验证中得出压倒性的 I 型和 II 型错误，从而在尝试解决现实问题时导致恶意问题。为了解决这个问题并使我们的模型更加准确、动态和稳健，数据增强被使用，因为它有助于扩展我们的样本训练数据并使其整体上更好、更多样化。因此，在我们的研究中，我们专注于通过分析预先存在的图像数据集并相应地执行增强来研究数据增强的好处。我们的结果表明，现有最先进（或 SOTA）模型的性能和稳健性可以显着提高，而不会增加模型复杂性或推理时间。本文中决定和使用的增强是在对当今广泛使用的其他几种增强方法和策略及其相应效果进行深入研究后才决定的。我们所有的结果都在广泛使用的城市景观数据集上报告。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨数据增强在可行驶区域分割中的效果，旨在通过改进训练数据提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在分割模型架构上取得进展，但训练数据的质量和多样性仍是关键问题。标注不足会导致模型测试误差增加，而数据增强能有效扩展数据集并提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过分析现有图像数据集，采用经过研究验证的数据增强方法对Cityscapes数据集进行处理，并评估其对最新分割模型的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，在不增加模型复杂度或推理时间的前提下，数据增强显著提升了现有最先进模型的性能和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 数据增强是提升自动驾驶中可行驶区域分割模型的有效手段，为实际应用提供了可行的优化方案。

authors_text: Zhongwei Qiu,Qiansheng Yang,Jian Wang,Dongmei Fu
title: IVT: An End-to-End Instance-guided Video Transformer for 3D Pose Estimation
title_zh: IVT：用于 3D 姿势估计的端到端实例引导视频转换器
abstract: Video 3D human pose estimation aims to localize the 3D coordinates of human joints from videos. Recent transformer-based approaches focus on capturing the spatiotemporal information from sequential 2D poses, which cannot model the contextual depth feature effectively since the visual depth features are lost in the step of 2D pose estimation. In this paper, we simplify the paradigm into an end-to-end framework, Instance-guided Video Transformer (IVT), which enables learning spatiotemporal contextual depth information from visual features effectively and predicts 3D poses directly from video frames. In particular, we firstly formulate video frames as a series of instance-guided tokens and each token is in charge of predicting the 3D pose of a human instance. These tokens contain body structure information since they are extracted by the guidance of joint offsets from the human center to the corresponding body joints. Then, these tokens are sent into IVT for learning spatiotemporal contextual depth. In addition, we propose a cross-scale instance-guided attention mechanism to handle the variational scales among multiple persons. Finally, the 3D poses of each person are decoded from instance-guided tokens by coordinate regression. Experiments on three widely-used 3D pose estimation benchmarks show that the proposed IVT achieves state-of-the-art performances.
summary: Video 3D human pose estimation aims to localize the 3D coordinates of human joints from videos. Recent transformer-based approaches focus on capturing the spatiotemporal information from sequential 2D poses, which cannot model the contextual depth feature effectively since the visual depth features are lost in the step of 2D pose estimation. In this paper, we simplify the paradigm into an end-to-end framework, Instance-guided Video Transformer (IVT), which enables learning spatiotemporal contextual depth information from visual features effectively and predicts 3D poses directly from video frames. In particular, we firstly formulate video frames as a series of instance-guided tokens and each token is in charge of predicting the 3D pose of a human instance. These tokens contain body structure information since they are extracted by the guidance of joint offsets from the human center to the corresponding body joints. Then, these tokens are sent into IVT for learning spatiotemporal contextual depth. In addition, we propose a cross-scale instance-guided attention mechanism to handle the variational scales among multiple persons. Finally, the 3D poses of each person are decoded from instance-guided tokens by coordinate regression. Experiments on three widely-used 3D pose estimation benchmarks show that the proposed IVT achieves state-of-the-art performances.
abstract_zh: 视频 3D 人体姿势估计旨在从视频中定位人体关节的 3D 坐标。最近基于 Transformer 的方法侧重于从连续的 2D 姿势中捕获时空信息，但由于视觉深度特征在 2D 姿势估计步骤中丢失，因此无法有效地对上下文深度特征进行建模。在本文中，我们将范式简化为端到端框架，即实例引导视频变换器（IVT），它能够有效地从视觉特征中学习时空上下文深度信息，并直接从视频帧中预测 3D 姿势。特别是，我们首先将视频帧制定为一系列实例引导的令牌，每个令牌负责预测人类实例的 3D 姿势。这些标记包含身体结构信息，因为它们是通过从人体中心到相应身体关节的关节偏移的指导来提取的。然后，这些标记被发送到 IVT 以学习时空上下文深度。此外，我们提出了一种跨尺度实例引导的注意力机制来处理多人之间的变化尺度。最后，通过坐标回归从实例引导标记中解码每个人的 3D 姿势。对三个广泛使用的 3D 姿态估计基准的实验表明，所提出的 IVT 实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IVT（Instance-guided Video Transformer），一种端到端的视频变换器模型，用于直接从视频帧中学习时空上下文深度信息并预测3D人体姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的方法通过序列2D姿态捕捉时空信息，但无法有效建模上下文深度特征，因为视觉深度特征在2D姿态估计步骤中丢失。本文旨在通过端到端框架解决这一问题。
AI.method: 将视频帧表示为实例引导的标记序列，每个标记负责预测一个人的3D姿态。通过人体中心到关节的偏移量提取结构信息，并引入跨尺度实例引导注意力机制处理多人体尺度变化，最终通过坐标回归解码3D姿态。
AI.result: 在三个广泛使用的3D姿态估计基准测试中，IVT达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: IVT通过有效建模时空上下文深度信息和跨尺度注意力机制，显著提升了视频3D姿态估计的准确性。

method: 将视频帧表示为实例引导的标记序列，每个标记负责预测一个人的3D姿态。通过人体中心到关节的偏移量提取结构信息，并引入跨尺度实例引导注意力机制处理多人体尺度变化，最终通过坐标回归解码3D姿态。
result: 在三个广泛使用的3D姿态估计基准测试中，IVT达到最先进的性能。
conclusion: IVT通过有效建模时空上下文深度信息和跨尺度注意力机制，显著提升了视频3D姿态估计的准确性。
search_text: IVT: An End-to-End Instance-guided Video Transformer for 3D Pose Estimation IVT：用于 3D 姿势估计的端到端实例引导视频转换器 Video 3D human pose estimation aims to localize the 3D coordinates of human joints from videos. Recent transformer-based approaches focus on capturing the spatiotemporal information from sequential 2D poses, which cannot model the contextual depth feature effectively since the visual depth features are lost in the step of 2D pose estimation. In this paper, we simplify the paradigm into an end-to-end framework, Instance-guided Video Transformer (IVT), which enables learning spatiotemporal contextual depth information from visual features effectively and predicts 3D poses directly from video frames. In particular, we firstly formulate video frames as a series of instance-guided tokens and each token is in charge of predicting the 3D pose of a human instance. These tokens contain body structure information since they are extracted by the guidance of joint offsets from the human center to the corresponding body joints. Then, these tokens are sent into IVT for learning spatiotemporal contextual depth. In addition, we propose a cross-scale instance-guided attention mechanism to handle the variational scales among multiple persons. Finally, the 3D poses of each person are decoded from instance-guided tokens by coordinate regression. Experiments on three widely-used 3D pose estimation benchmarks show that the proposed IVT achieves state-of-the-art performances. 视频 3D 人体姿势估计旨在从视频中定位人体关节的 3D 坐标。最近基于 Transformer 的方法侧重于从连续的 2D 姿势中捕获时空信息，但由于视觉深度特征在 2D 姿势估计步骤中丢失，因此无法有效地对上下文深度特征进行建模。在本文中，我们将范式简化为端到端框架，即实例引导视频变换器（IVT），它能够有效地从视觉特征中学习时空上下文深度信息，并直接从视频帧中预测 3D 姿势。特别是，我们首先将视频帧制定为一系列实例引导的令牌，每个令牌负责预测人类实例的 3D 姿势。这些标记包含身体结构信息，因为它们是通过从人体中心到相应身体关节的关节偏移的指导来提取的。然后，这些标记被发送到 IVT 以学习时空上下文深度。此外，我们提出了一种跨尺度实例引导的注意力机制来处理多人之间的变化尺度。最后，通过坐标回归从实例引导标记中解码每个人的 3D 姿势。对三个广泛使用的 3D 姿态估计基准的实验表明，所提出的 IVT 实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出IVT（Instance-guided Video Transformer），一种端到端的视频变换器模型，用于直接从视频帧中学习时空上下文深度信息并预测3D人体姿态。 Zhongwei Qiu,Qiansheng Yang,Jian Wang,Dongmei Fu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Lubin Chang,Yarong Luo
title: Log-linear Error State Model Derivation without Approximation for INS
title_zh: 无需逼近 INS 的对数线性误差状态模型推导
abstract: Through assembling the navigation parameters as matrix Lie group state, the corresponding inertial navigation system (INS) kinematic model possesses a group-affine property. The Lie logarithm of the navigation state estimation error satisfies a log-linear autonomous differential equation. These log-linear models are still applicable even with arbitrarily large initial errors, which is very attractive for INS initial alignment. However, in existing works, the log-linear models are all derived based on first-order linearization approximation, which seemingly goes against their successful applications in INS initial alignment with large misalignments. In this work, it is shown that the log-linear models can also be derived without any approximation, the error dynamics for both left and right invariant error in continuous time are given in matrix Lie group SE_2 (3) for the first time. This work provides another evidence for the validity of the log-linear model in situations with arbitrarily large initial errors.
summary: Through assembling the navigation parameters as matrix Lie group state, the corresponding inertial navigation system (INS) kinematic model possesses a group-affine property. The Lie logarithm of the navigation state estimation error satisfies a log-linear autonomous differential equation. These log-linear models are still applicable even with arbitrarily large initial errors, which is very attractive for INS initial alignment. However, in existing works, the log-linear models are all derived based on first-order linearization approximation, which seemingly goes against their successful applications in INS initial alignment with large misalignments. In this work, it is shown that the log-linear models can also be derived without any approximation, the error dynamics for both left and right invariant error in continuous time are given in matrix Lie group SE_2 (3) for the first time. This work provides another evidence for the validity of the log-linear model in situations with arbitrarily large initial errors.
abstract_zh: 通过将导航参数组装为矩阵李群状态，相应的惯性导航系统（INS）运动学模型具有群仿射性质。导航状态估计误差的李对数满足对数线性自治微分方程。即使初始误差任意大，这些对数线性模型仍然适用，这对于 INS 初始对准非常有吸引力。然而，在现有的工作中，对数线性模型都是基于一阶线性化近似推导的，这似乎不利于其在INS初始对准中的成功应用，并存在较大的不对中。在这项工作中，结果表明，对数线性模型也可以在没有任何近似的情况下导出，连续时间内左右不变误差的误差动态首次在矩阵李群SE_2（3）中给出。这项工作为对数线性模型在初始误差任意大的情况下的有效性提供了另一个证据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需近似的对数线性误差状态模型推导方法，用于惯性导航系统（INS）。
AI.motivation: 现有对数线性模型依赖一阶线性化近似，但其在大初始误差场景下的成功应用存在矛盾，需验证模型的普适性。
AI.method: 通过将导航参数组装为矩阵李群状态，利用李对数推导误差动力学方程，并在连续时间下首次给出SE_2(3)中左右不变误差的动态模型。
AI.result: 首次在无需近似的情况下推导出适用于大初始误差的连续时间对数线性模型，验证了其在INS初始对准中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 对数线性模型在任意大初始误差场景下均适用，为INS初始对准提供了理论支持。

authors_text: Manuel Paredes,Marc Sartor,Cédric Masclet
title: Advantages in Using a Stock Spring Selection Tool that Manages the Uncertainty of the Designer Requirements
title_zh: 使用库存弹簧选择工具来管理设计人员要求的不确定性的优点
comment: ef:Evolutionary Design and Manufacture, Springer London, pp.69-80, 2000
comments: ef:Evolutionary Design and Manufacture, Springer London, pp.69-80, 2000
abstract: This paper analyses the advantages of using a stock spring selection tool that manages the uncertainty of designer requirements. Firstly, the manual search and its main drawbacks are described. Then a computer assisted stock spring selection tool is presented which performs all necessary calculations to extract the most suitable spring from within a database. The algorithm analyses data set with interval values using both multi-criteria analysis and fuzzy logic. Two examples, comparing manual and assisted search, are presented. They show not only that the results are significantly better using the assisted search but it helps designers to detail easily and precisely their specifications and thus increase design process flexibility.
summary: This paper analyses the advantages of using a stock spring selection tool that manages the uncertainty of designer requirements. Firstly, the manual search and its main drawbacks are described. Then a computer assisted stock spring selection tool is presented which performs all necessary calculations to extract the most suitable spring from within a database. The algorithm analyses data set with interval values using both multi-criteria analysis and fuzzy logic. Two examples, comparing manual and assisted search, are presented. They show not only that the results are significantly better using the assisted search but it helps designers to detail easily and precisely their specifications and thus increase design process flexibility.
abstract_zh: 本文分析了使用库存弹簧选择工具来管理设计人员要求的不确定性的优势。首先，描述了手动搜索及其主要缺点。然后提供计算机辅助库存弹簧选择工具，该工具执行所有必要的计算以从数据库中提取最合适的弹簧。该算法使用多标准分析和模糊逻辑来分析具有区间值的数据集。提供了两个示例，比较手动搜索和辅助搜索。他们表明，使用辅助搜索不仅可以得到更好的结果，而且可以帮助设计人员轻松、准确地详细说明其规格，从而提高设计过程的灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了使用库存弹簧选择工具在处理设计师需求不确定性方面的优势。
AI.motivation: 解决传统手动选择弹簧效率低、难以处理需求不确定性的痛点。
AI.method: 开发计算机辅助选择工具，结合多标准分析与模糊逻辑处理区间值数据集。
AI.result: 辅助搜索结果显著优于手动方式，且帮助设计师更精准定义需求，提升设计灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 计算机辅助工具能有效管理需求不确定性，提高弹簧选型效率与设计适应性。

authors_text: Jisheng Bai,Jianfeng Chen,Mou Wang,Muhammad Saad Ayub,Qingli Yan
title: SSDPT: Self-Supervised Dual-Path Transformer for Anomalous Sound Detection in Machine Condition Monitoring
title_zh: SSDPT：用于机器状态监测中异常声音检测的自监督双路变压器
abstract: Anomalous sound detection for machine condition monitoring has great potential in the development of Industry 4.0. However, these anomalous sounds of machines are usually unavailable in normal conditions. Therefore, the models employed have to learn acoustic representations with normal sounds for training, and detect anomalous sounds while testing. In this article, we propose a self-supervised dual-path Transformer (SSDPT) network to detect anomalous sounds in machine monitoring. The SSDPT network splits the acoustic features into segments and employs several DPT blocks for time and frequency modeling. DPT blocks use attention modules to alternately model the interactive information about the frequency and temporal components of the segmented acoustic features. To address the problem of lack of anomalous sound, we adopt a self-supervised learning approach to train the network with normal sound. Specifically, this approach randomly masks and reconstructs the acoustic features, and jointly classifies machine identity information to improve the performance of anomalous sound detection. We evaluated our method on the DCASE2021 task2 dataset. The experimental results show that the SSDPT network achieves a significant increase in the harmonic mean AUC score, in comparison to present state-of-the-art methods of anomalous sound detection.
summary: Anomalous sound detection for machine condition monitoring has great potential in the development of Industry 4.0. However, these anomalous sounds of machines are usually unavailable in normal conditions. Therefore, the models employed have to learn acoustic representations with normal sounds for training, and detect anomalous sounds while testing. In this article, we propose a self-supervised dual-path Transformer (SSDPT) network to detect anomalous sounds in machine monitoring. The SSDPT network splits the acoustic features into segments and employs several DPT blocks for time and frequency modeling. DPT blocks use attention modules to alternately model the interactive information about the frequency and temporal components of the segmented acoustic features. To address the problem of lack of anomalous sound, we adopt a self-supervised learning approach to train the network with normal sound. Specifically, this approach randomly masks and reconstructs the acoustic features, and jointly classifies machine identity information to improve the performance of anomalous sound detection. We evaluated our method on the DCASE2021 task2 dataset. The experimental results show that the SSDPT network achieves a significant increase in the harmonic mean AUC score, in comparison to present state-of-the-art methods of anomalous sound detection.
abstract_zh: 用于机器状态监测的异常声音检测在工业4.0的发展中具有巨大潜力。然而，这些机器的异常声音在正常情况下通常是听不到的。因此，所采用的模型必须学习正常声音的声学表示以进行训练，并在测试时检测异常声音。在本文中，我们提出了一种自监督双路变压器（SSDPT）网络来检测机器监控中的异常声音。 SSDPT 网络将声学特征分成多个片段，并采用多个 DPT 块进行时间和频率建模。 DPT 块使用注意力模块来交替建模有关分段声学特征的频率和时间分量的交互信息。为了解决缺乏异常声音的问题，我们采用自监督学习方法用正常声音来训练网络。具体来说，该方法随机屏蔽和重建声学特征，并对机器身份信息进行联合分类，以提高异常声音检测的性能。我们在 DCASE2021 task2 数据集上评估了我们的方法。实验结果表明，与目前最先进的异常声音检测方法相比，SSDPT 网络的调和平均 AUC 分数显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督双路径Transformer（SSDPT）网络，用于机器状态监测中的异常声音检测。
AI.motivation: 机器异常声音检测在工业4.0中具有重要意义，但异常声音数据通常难以获取，现有模型需依赖正常声音数据进行训练。
AI.method: SSDPT将声学特征分段处理，采用双路径Transformer块进行时频建模，通过自监督学习随机掩码并重建声学特征，同时结合机器身份分类任务优化模型性能。
AI.result: 在DCASE2021任务2数据集上，SSDPT的AUC谐波均值显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SSDPT通过自监督学习有效解决了异常声音数据匮乏的问题，验证了其在机械故障检测中的优越性。

search_text: SSDPT: Self-Supervised Dual-Path Transformer for Anomalous Sound Detection in Machine Condition Monitoring SSDPT：用于机器状态监测中异常声音检测的自监督双路变压器 Anomalous sound detection for machine condition monitoring has great potential in the development of Industry 4.0. However, these anomalous sounds of machines are usually unavailable in normal conditions. Therefore, the models employed have to learn acoustic representations with normal sounds for training, and detect anomalous sounds while testing. In this article, we propose a self-supervised dual-path Transformer (SSDPT) network to detect anomalous sounds in machine monitoring. The SSDPT network splits the acoustic features into segments and employs several DPT blocks for time and frequency modeling. DPT blocks use attention modules to alternately model the interactive information about the frequency and temporal components of the segmented acoustic features. To address the problem of lack of anomalous sound, we adopt a self-supervised learning approach to train the network with normal sound. Specifically, this approach randomly masks and reconstructs the acoustic features, and jointly classifies machine identity information to improve the performance of anomalous sound detection. We evaluated our method on the DCASE2021 task2 dataset. The experimental results show that the SSDPT network achieves a significant increase in the harmonic mean AUC score, in comparison to present state-of-the-art methods of anomalous sound detection. 用于机器状态监测的异常声音检测在工业4.0的发展中具有巨大潜力。然而，这些机器的异常声音在正常情况下通常是听不到的。因此，所采用的模型必须学习正常声音的声学表示以进行训练，并在测试时检测异常声音。在本文中，我们提出了一种自监督双路变压器（SSDPT）网络来检测机器监控中的异常声音。 SSDPT 网络将声学特征分成多个片段，并采用多个 DPT 块进行时间和频率建模。 DPT 块使用注意力模块来交替建模有关分段声学特征的频率和时间分量的交互信息。为了解决缺乏异常声音的问题，我们采用自监督学习方法用正常声音来训练网络。具体来说，该方法随机屏蔽和重建声学特征，并对机器身份信息进行联合分类，以提高异常声音检测的性能。我们在 DCASE2021 task2 数据集上评估了我们的方法。实验结果表明，与目前最先进的异常声音检测方法相比，SSDPT 网络的调和平均 AUC 分数显着提高。 本文提出了一种自监督双路径Transformer（SSDPT）网络，用于机器状态监测中的异常声音检测。 Jisheng Bai,Jianfeng Chen,Mou Wang,Muhammad Saad Ayub,Qingli Yan eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Asim Bashir Khajwal,Chih-Shen Cheng,Arash Noshadravan
title: Multi-view deep learning for reliable post-disaster damage classification
title_zh: 多视图深度学习可靠的灾后损失分类
comment: 13th International Workshop on Structural Health Monitoring (IWSHM 2021)
comments: 13th International Workshop on Structural Health Monitoring (IWSHM 2021)
abstract: This study aims to enable more reliable automated post-disaster building damage classification using artificial intelligence (AI) and multi-view imagery. The current practices and research efforts in adopting AI for post-disaster damage assessment are generally (a) qualitative, lacking refined classification of building damage levels based on standard damage scales, and (b) trained based on aerial or satellite imagery with limited views, which, although indicative, are not completely descriptive of the damage scale. To enable more accurate and reliable automated quantification of damage levels, the present study proposes the use of more comprehensive visual data in the form of multiple ground and aerial views of the buildings. To have such a spatially-aware damage prediction model, a Multi-view Convolution Neural Network (MV-CNN) architecture is used that combines the information from different views of a damaged building. This spatial 3D context damage information will result in more accurate identification of damages and reliable quantification of damage levels. The proposed model is trained and validated on reconnaissance visual dataset containing expert-labeled, geotagged images of the inspected buildings following hurricane Harvey. The developed model demonstrates reasonably good accuracy in predicting the damage levels and can be used to support more informed and reliable AI-assisted disaster management practices.

abstract_zh: 本研究旨在利用人工智能 (AI) 和多视图图像实现更可靠的自动化灾后建筑损坏分类。目前采用人工智能进行灾后损失评估的实践和研究工作通常是（a）定性的，缺乏根据标准损失规模对建筑物损失程度进行精细分类；（b）基于视角有限的航空或卫星图像进行训练，虽然具有指示性，但并不能完全描述损失规模。为了能够更准确、更可靠地自动量化损坏程度，本研究建议使用更全面的视觉数据，以建筑物的多个地面和鸟瞰图的形式。为了建立这样一个空间感知的损坏预测模型，需要使用多视图卷积神经网络 (MV-CNN) 架构，该架构结合了受损建筑物不同视图的信息。这种空间 3D 上下文损坏信息将导致更准确的损坏识别和损坏级别的可靠量化。所提出的模型在侦察视觉数据集上进行训练和验证，该数据集包含飓风哈维后检查建筑物的专家标记、地理标记图像。开发的模型在预测损失水平方面表现出相当好的准确性，可用于支持更明智、更可靠的人工智能辅助灾害管理实践。

AI.tldr: 利用多视角深度学习提升灾后建筑损害分类的可靠性
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏精细分类和全面视角，导致灾后损害评估准确性不足
AI.method: 采用多视角卷积神经网络（MV-CNN），整合不同视角的建筑图像，构建空间3D上下文信息以提升损害识别精度
AI.result: 模型在哈维飓风数据集上实现合理准确率，可有效支持AI辅助灾后管理决策
AI.conclusion: 多视角数据与深度学习结合能显著提升损害分类准确性，为智能灾后评估提供有效技术方案

authors_text: Anh-Tu Nguyen,Thao Nguyen,Huy-Khiem Le,Huy-Hieu Pham,Cuong Do
title: A novel deep learning-based approach for sleep apnea detection using single-lead ECG signals
title_zh: 一种基于深度学习的新型方法，使用单导联心电图信号检测睡眠呼吸暂停
comment: This work has been accepted for publication by the Asia Pacific Signal and Information Processing Association Annual Summit and Conference 2022 (APSIPA ASC 2022)
comments: This work has been accepted for publication by the Asia Pacific Signal and Information Processing Association Annual Summit and Conference 2022 (APSIPA ASC 2022)
abstract: Sleep apnea (SA) is a type of sleep disorder characterized by snoring and chronic sleeplessness, which can lead to serious conditions such as high blood pressure, heart failure, and cardiomyopathy (enlargement of the muscle tissue of the heart). The electrocardiogram (ECG) plays a critical role in identifying SA since it might reveal abnormal cardiac activity. Recent research on ECG-based SA detection has focused on feature engineering techniques that extract specific characteristics from multiple-lead ECG signals and use them as classification model inputs. In this study, a novel method of feature extraction based on the detection of S peaks is proposed to enhance the detection of adjacent SA segments using a single-lead ECG. In particular, ECG features collected from a single lead (V2) are used to identify SA episodes. On the extracted features, a CNN model is trained to detect SA. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method detects SA from single-lead ECG data is more accurate than existing state-of-the-art methods, with 91.13% classification accuracy, 92.58% sensitivity, and 88.75% specificity. Moreover, the further usage of features associated with the S peaks enhances the classification accuracy by 0.85%. Our findings indicate that the proposed machine learning system has the potential to be an effective method for detecting SA episodes.
summary: Sleep apnea (SA) is a type of sleep disorder characterized by snoring and chronic sleeplessness, which can lead to serious conditions such as high blood pressure, heart failure, and cardiomyopathy (enlargement of the muscle tissue of the heart). The electrocardiogram (ECG) plays a critical role in identifying SA since it might reveal abnormal cardiac activity. Recent research on ECG-based SA detection has focused on feature engineering techniques that extract specific characteristics from multiple-lead ECG signals and use them as classification model inputs. In this study, a novel method of feature extraction based on the detection of S peaks is proposed to enhance the detection of adjacent SA segments using a single-lead ECG. In particular, ECG features collected from a single lead (V2) are used to identify SA episodes. On the extracted features, a CNN model is trained to detect SA. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method detects SA from single-lead ECG data is more accurate than existing state-of-the-art methods, with 91.13% classification accuracy, 92.58% sensitivity, and 88.75% specificity. Moreover, the further usage of features associated with the S peaks enhances the classification accuracy by 0.85%. Our findings indicate that the proposed machine learning system has the potential to be an effective method for detecting SA episodes.
abstract_zh: 睡眠呼吸暂停 (SA) 是一种以打鼾和慢性失眠为特征的睡眠障碍，可导致高血压、心力衰竭和心肌病（心脏肌肉组织增大）等严重疾病。心电图 (ECG) 在识别 SA 中起着至关重要的作用，因为它可能揭示异常的心脏活动。基于心电图的 SA 检测的最新研究重点是特征工程技术，该技术从多导联心电图信号中提取特定特征并将其用作分类模型输入。在本研究中，提出了一种基于 S 峰值检测的特征提取新方法，以增强使用单导联心电图对相邻 SA 段的检测。特别是，从单导联 (V2) 收集的心电图特征用于识别 SA 发作。根据提取的特征，训练 CNN 模型来检测 SA。实验结果表明，该方法从单导联心电图数据中检测 SA 比现有最先进的方法更准确，分类准确度为 91.13%，灵敏度为 92.58%，特异性为 88.75%。此外，进一步使用与 S 峰相关的特征将分类精度提高了 0.85%。我们的研究结果表明，所提出的机器学习系统有可能成为检测 SA 事件的有效方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的单导联ECG信号睡眠呼吸暂停检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖多导联ECG特征工程，而单导联信号更易获取且成本更低，需提升单导联信号的特征提取与检测准确性。
AI.method: 通过检测S波峰提取单导联ECG（V2导联）特征，并利用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行分类，进一步结合S波相关特征优化模型。
AI.result: 在单导联ECG数据集上达到91.13%分类准确率、92.58%灵敏度和88.75%特异性，S波特征使准确率提升0.85%。
AI.conclusion: 该机器学习系统可有效检测睡眠呼吸暂停事件，具有临床应用潜力。

In this study, a novel method of feature extraction based on the detection of S peaks is proposed to enhance the detection of adjacent SA segments using a single-lead ECG. In particular, ECG features collected from a single lead (V2) are used to identify SA episodes. On the extracted features, a CNN model is trained to detect SA. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method detects SA from single-lead ECG data is more accurate than existing state-of-the-art methods, with 91.13% classification accuracy, 92.58% sensitivity, and 88.75% specificity. Moreover, the further usage of features associated with the S peaks enhances the classification accuracy by 0.85%. Our findings indicate that the proposed machine learning system has the potential to be an effective method for detecting SA episodes. 睡眠呼吸暂停 (SA) 是一种以打鼾和慢性失眠为特征的睡眠障碍，可导致高血压、心力衰竭和心肌病（心脏肌肉组织增大）等严重疾病。心电图 (ECG) 在识别 SA 中起着至关重要的作用，因为它可能揭示异常的心脏活动。基于心电图的 SA 检测的最新研究重点是特征工程技术，该技术从多导联心电图信号中提取特定特征并将其用作分类模型输入。在本研究中，提出了一种基于 S 峰值检测的特征提取新方法，以增强使用单导联心电图对相邻 SA 段的检测。特别是，从单导联 (V2) 收集的心电图特征用于识别 SA 发作。根据提取的特征，训练 CNN 模型来检测 SA。实验结果表明，该方法从单导联心电图数据中检测 SA 比现有最先进的方法更准确，分类准确度为 91.13%，灵敏度为 92.58%，特异性为 88.75%。此外，进一步使用与 S 峰相关的特征将分类精度提高了 0.85%。我们的研究结果表明，所提出的机器学习系统有可能成为检测 SA 事件的有效方法。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的单导联ECG信号睡眠呼吸暂停检测方法。 Anh-Tu Nguyen,Thao Nguyen,Huy-Khiem Le,Huy-Hieu Pham,Cuong Do cs.CV

authors_text: Muhammad Usman,Youcheng Sun,Divya Gopinath,Rishi Dange,Luca Manolache,Corina S. Pasareanu
title: An Overview of Structural Coverage Metrics for Testing Neural Networks
title_zh: 测试神经网络的结构覆盖指标概述
abstract: Deep neural network (DNN) models, including those used in safety-critical domains, need to be thoroughly tested to ensure that they can reliably perform well in different scenarios. In this article, we provide an overview of structural coverage metrics for testing DNN models, including neuron coverage (NC), k-multisection neuron coverage (kMNC), top-k neuron coverage (TKNC), neuron boundary coverage (NBC), strong neuron activation coverage (SNAC) and modified condition/decision coverage (MC/DC). We evaluate the metrics on realistic DNN models used for perception tasks (including LeNet-1, LeNet-4, LeNet-5, and ResNet20) as well as on networks used in autonomy (TaxiNet). We also provide a tool, DNNCov, which can measure the testing coverage for all these metrics. DNNCov outputs an informative coverage report to enable researchers and practitioners to assess the adequacy of DNN testing, compare different coverage measures, and to more conveniently inspect the model's internals during testing.
summary: Deep neural network (DNN) models, including those used in safety-critical domains, need to be thoroughly tested to ensure that they can reliably perform well in different scenarios. In this article, we provide an overview of structural coverage metrics for testing DNN models, including neuron coverage (NC), k-multisection neuron coverage (kMNC), top-k neuron coverage (TKNC), neuron boundary coverage (NBC), strong neuron activation coverage (SNAC) and modified condition/decision coverage (MC/DC). We evaluate the metrics on realistic DNN models used for perception tasks (including LeNet-1, LeNet-4, LeNet-5, and ResNet20) as well as on networks used in autonomy (TaxiNet). We also provide a tool, DNNCov, which can measure the testing coverage for all these metrics. DNNCov outputs an informative coverage report to enable researchers and practitioners to assess the adequacy of DNN testing, compare different coverage measures, and to more conveniently inspect the model's internals during testing.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）模型，包括用于安全关键领域的模型，需要经过彻底的测试，以确保它们能够在不同的场景中可靠地表现良好。在本文中，我们概述了用于测试 DNN 模型的结构覆盖指标，包括神经元覆盖率 (NC)、k 分段神经元覆盖率 (kMNC)、top-k 神经元覆盖率 (TKNC)、神经元边界覆盖率 (NBC)、强神经元激活覆盖率 (SNAC) 和修改的条件/决策覆盖率 (MC/DC)。我们评估用于感知任务的现实 DNN 模型（包括 LeNet-1、LeNet-4、LeNet-5 和 ResNet20）以及用于自治的网络 (TaxiNet) 的指标。我们还提供了一个工具 DNNCov，它可以测量所有这些指标的测试覆盖率。 DNNCov 输出内容丰富的覆盖率报告，使研究人员和从业者能够评估 DNN 测试的充分性、比较不同的覆盖率度量，并在测试期间更方便地检查模型的内部结构。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了用于测试神经网络的结构覆盖度量，并介绍了评估这些度量的工具DNNCov。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络（DNN）模型需要在各种场景下进行彻底测试以确保其可靠性，因此需要有效的结构覆盖度量来评估测试的充分性。
AI.method: 本文综述了多种结构覆盖度量（如神经元覆盖、k多分割神经元覆盖等），并在实际的感知任务DNN模型（如LeNet-1、ResNet20）和自动驾驶网络（TaxiNet）上进行了评估，并开发了DNNCov工具来测量这些度量。
AI.result: DNNCov工具能够生成详细的覆盖报告，帮助研究人员和从业者评估DNN测试的充分性、比较不同覆盖度量，并更方便地检查测试过程中的模型内部。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了多种结构覆盖度量的综述，并通过DNNCov工具支持这些度量的评估，有助于提高DNN测试的可靠性和效率。

authors_text: Dat T. Ngo,Thao T. B. Nguyen,Hieu T. Nguyen,Dung B. Nguyen,Ha Q. Nguyen,Hieu H. Pham
title: Slice-level Detection of Intracranial Hemorrhage on CT Using Deep Descriptors of Adjacent Slices
title_zh: 使用相邻切片深度描述符的 CT 颅内出血的切片级检测
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 22nd IEEE Statistical Signal Processing (SSP) workshop
comments: Accepted for presentation at the 22nd IEEE Statistical Signal Processing (SSP) workshop
abstract: The rapid development in representation learning techniques such as deep neural networks and the availability of large-scale, well-annotated medical imaging datasets have to a rapid increase in the use of supervised machine learning in the 3D medical image analysis and diagnosis. In particular, deep convolutional neural networks (D-CNNs) have been key players and were adopted by the medical imaging community to assist clinicians and medical experts in disease diagnosis and treatment. However, training and inferencing deep neural networks such as D-CNN on high-resolution 3D volumes of Computed Tomography (CT) scans for diagnostic tasks pose formidable computational challenges. This challenge raises the need of developing deep learning-based approaches that are robust in learning representations in 2D images, instead 3D scans. In this work, we propose for the first time a new strategy to train \emph{slice-level} classifiers on CT scans based on the descriptors of the adjacent slices along the axis. In particular, each of which is extracted through a convolutional neural network (CNN). This method is applicable to CT datasets with per-slice labels such as the RSNA Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH) dataset, which aims to predict the presence of ICH and classify it into 5 different sub-types. We obtain a single model in the top 4% best-performing solutions of the RSNA ICH challenge, where model ensembles are allowed. Experiments also show that the proposed method significantly outperforms the baseline model on CQ500. The proposed method is general and can be applied to other 3D medical diagnosis tasks such as MRI imaging. To encourage new advances in the field, we will make our codes and pre-trained model available upon acceptance of the paper.
summary: The rapid development in representation learning techniques such as deep neural networks and the availability of large-scale, well-annotated medical imaging datasets have to a rapid increase in the use of supervised machine learning in the 3D medical image analysis and diagnosis. In particular, deep convolutional neural networks (D-CNNs) have been key players and were adopted by the medical imaging community to assist clinicians and medical experts in disease diagnosis and treatment. However, training and inferencing deep neural networks such as D-CNN on high-resolution 3D volumes of Computed Tomography (CT) scans for diagnostic tasks pose formidable computational challenges. This challenge raises the need of developing deep learning-based approaches that are robust in learning representations in 2D images, instead 3D scans. In this work, we propose for the first time a new strategy to train \emph{slice-level} classifiers on CT scans based on the descriptors of the adjacent slices along the axis. In particular, each of which is extracted through a convolutional neural network (CNN). This method is applicable to CT datasets with per-slice labels such as the RSNA Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH) dataset, which aims to predict the presence of ICH and classify it into 5 different sub-types. We obtain a single model in the top 4% best-performing solutions of the RSNA ICH challenge, where model ensembles are allowed. Experiments also show that the proposed method significantly outperforms the baseline model on CQ500. The proposed method is general and can be applied to other 3D medical diagnosis tasks such as MRI imaging. To encourage new advances in the field, we will make our codes and pre-trained model available upon acceptance of the paper.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络等表示学习技术的快速发展以及大规模、注释良好的医学成像数据集的可用性，使得监督机器学习在 3D 医学图像分析和诊断中的使用迅速增加。特别是，深度卷积神经网络（D-CNN）一直是关键参与者，并被医学成像界采用来协助临床医生和医学专家进行疾病诊断和治疗。然而，在用于诊断任务的高分辨率 3D 计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描上训练和推理深度神经网络（例如 D-CNN）带来了巨大的计算挑战。这一挑战提出了开发基于深度学习的方法的需求，这些方法在学习 2D 图像（而不是 3D 扫描）中的表示方面具有鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们首次提出了一种新策略，根据沿轴相邻切片的描述符在 CT 扫描上训练 \emph{切片级} 分类器。特别是，每一个都是通过卷积神经网络（CNN）提取的。该方法适用于带有每层标签的 CT 数据集，例如 RSNA 颅内出血 (ICH) 数据集，旨在预测 ICH 的存在并将其分为 5 种不同的子类型。我们在 RSNA ICH 挑战赛的前 4% 最佳表现解决方案中获得了一个单一模型，其中允许模型集成。实验还表明，所提出的方法在 CQ500 上显着优于基线模型。所提出的方法具有通用性，可以应用于其他 3D 医学诊断任务，例如 MRI 成像。为了鼓励该领域的新进展，我们将在论文被接受后提供我们的代码和预训练模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于相邻CT切片深度描述符的切片级颅内出血检测方法，通过卷积神经网络提取相邻切片特征以提高诊断性能。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率3D CT体积的深度神经网络训练和推理存在显著计算挑战，需开发更高效的2D图像表征学习方法以替代传统3D扫描分析。
AI.method: 首次提出利用相邻切片的卷积神经网络特征描述符训练切片级分类器，通过提取轴向相邻切片的CNN特征实现颅内出血检测与分类。
AI.result: 在RSNA ICH挑战赛中取得前4%的单模型性能，在CQ500数据集上显著优于基线模型，方法可扩展至其他3D医学诊断任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过有效利用相邻切片信息，在降低计算复杂度的同时提升检测性能，为医学影像分析提供通用解决方案，并开源代码促进领域发展。

Experiments also show that the proposed method significantly outperforms the baseline model on CQ500. The proposed method is general and can be applied to other 3D medical diagnosis tasks such as MRI imaging. To encourage new advances in the field, we will make our codes and pre-trained model available upon acceptance of the paper. 深度神经网络等表示学习技术的快速发展以及大规模、注释良好的医学成像数据集的可用性，使得监督机器学习在 3D 医学图像分析和诊断中的使用迅速增加。特别是，深度卷积神经网络（D-CNN）一直是关键参与者，并被医学成像界采用来协助临床医生和医学专家进行疾病诊断和治疗。然而，在用于诊断任务的高分辨率 3D 计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描上训练和推理深度神经网络（例如 D-CNN）带来了巨大的计算挑战。这一挑战提出了开发基于深度学习的方法的需求，这些方法在学习 2D 图像（而不是 3D 扫描）中的表示方面具有鲁棒性。在这项工作中，我们首次提出了一种新策略，根据沿轴相邻切片的描述符在 CT 扫描上训练 \emph{切片级} 分类器。特别是，每一个都是通过卷积神经网络（CNN）提取的。该方法适用于带有每层标签的 CT 数据集，例如 RSNA 颅内出血 (ICH) 数据集，旨在预测 ICH 的存在并将其分为 5 种不同的子类型。我们在 RSNA ICH 挑战赛的前 4% 最佳表现解决方案中获得了一个单一模型，其中允许模型集成。实验还表明，所提出的方法在 CQ500 上显着优于基线模型。所提出的方法具有通用性，可以应用于其他 3D 医学诊断任务，例如 MRI 成像。为了鼓励该领域的新进展，我们将在论文被接受后提供我们的代码和预训练模型。 本文提出一种基于相邻CT切片深度描述符的切片级颅内出血检测方法，通过卷积神经网络提取相邻切片特征以提高诊断性能。 Dat T. Ngo,Thao T. B. Nguyen,Hieu T. Nguyen,Dung B. Nguyen,Ha Q. Nguyen,Hieu H. Pham cs.CV

authors_text: Li Yang,Abdallah Shami,Gary Stevens,Stephen De Rusett
title: LCCDE: A Decision-Based Ensemble Framework for Intrusion Detection in The Internet of Vehicles
title_zh: LCCDE：基于决策的车联网入侵检测集成框架
comment: Accepted and to appear in IEEE GlobeCom 2022; Code is available at Github link: https://github.com/Western-OC2-Lab/Intrusion-Detection-System-Using-Machine-Learning
comments: Accepted and to appear in IEEE GlobeCom 2022; Code is available at Github link: https://github.com/Western-OC2-Lab/Intrusion-Detection-System-Using-Machine-Learning
abstract: Modern vehicles, including autonomous vehicles and connected vehicles, have adopted an increasing variety of functionalities through connections and communications with other vehicles, smart devices, and infrastructures. However, the growing connectivity of the Internet of Vehicles (IoV) also increases the vulnerabilities to network attacks. To protect IoV systems against cyber threats, Intrusion Detection Systems (IDSs) that can identify malicious cyber-attacks have been developed using Machine Learning (ML) approaches. To accurately detect various types of attacks in IoV networks, we propose a novel ensemble IDS framework named Leader Class and Confidence Decision Ensemble (LCCDE). It is constructed by determining the best-performing ML model among three advanced ML algorithms (XGBoost, LightGBM, and CatBoost) for every class or type of attack. The class leader models with their prediction confidence values are then utilized to make accurate decisions regarding the detection of various types of cyber-attacks. Experiments on two public IoV security datasets (Car-Hacking and CICIDS2017 datasets) demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed LCCDE for intrusion detection on both intra-vehicle and external networks.
summary: Modern vehicles, including autonomous vehicles and connected vehicles, have adopted an increasing variety of functionalities through connections and communications with other vehicles, smart devices, and infrastructures. However, the growing connectivity of the Internet of Vehicles (IoV) also increases the vulnerabilities to network attacks. To protect IoV systems against cyber threats, Intrusion Detection Systems (IDSs) that can identify malicious cyber-attacks have been developed using Machine Learning (ML) approaches. To accurately detect various types of attacks in IoV networks, we propose a novel ensemble IDS framework named Leader Class and Confidence Decision Ensemble (LCCDE). It is constructed by determining the best-performing ML model among three advanced ML algorithms (XGBoost, LightGBM, and CatBoost) for every class or type of attack. The class leader models with their prediction confidence values are then utilized to make accurate decisions regarding the detection of various types of cyber-attacks. Experiments on two public IoV security datasets (Car-Hacking and CICIDS2017 datasets) demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed LCCDE for intrusion detection on both intra-vehicle and external networks.
abstract_zh: 现代车辆，包括自动驾驶车辆和联网车辆，通过与其他车辆、智能设备和基础设施的连接和通信，采用了越来越多的功能。然而，车联网 (IoV) 连接性的不断增强也增加了网络攻击的脆弱性。为了保护车联网系统免受网络威胁，使用机器学习 (ML) 方法开发了可以识别恶意网络攻击的入侵检测系统 (IDS)。为了准确检测车联网网络中的各种类型的攻击，我们提出了一种新颖的集成 IDS 框架，名为领导类和置信决策集成（LCCDE）。它是通过针对每种类别或类型的攻击确定三种高级 ML 算法（XGBoost、LightGBM 和 CatBoost）中性能最佳的 ML 模型而构建的。然后，利用类别领导者模型及其预测置信度值来做出有关检测各种类型网络攻击的准确决策。在两个公共 IoV 安全数据集（Car-Hacking 和 CICIDS2017 数据集）上的实验证明了所提出的 LCCDE 对于车内和外部网络入侵检测的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于决策的集成框架LCCDE，用于提升车联网（IoV）环境下的入侵检测准确率。
AI.motivation: 车联网的高连通性导致网络攻击风险增加，传统单一机器学习模型难以准确检测多种攻击类型，需更高效的入侵检测方法。
AI.method: 通过对比XGBoost、LightGBM和CatBoost三种先进算法在每类攻击中的表现，选择性能最优模型作为该类别的'领导者'，结合其预测置信度进行集成决策。
AI.result: 在Car-Hacking和CICIDS2017两个公开数据集上的实验表明，LCCDE在车载网络和外部网络攻击检测中均表现出优越的检测效果。
AI.conclusion: LCCDE框架通过动态选择最优模型并融合置信度决策，有效提升了车联网入侵检测的准确性和鲁棒性，为IoV安全防护提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dirk Padfield,Daniel J. Liebling
title: Chronological Self-Training for Real-Time Speaker Diarization
title_zh: 按时间顺序进行实时说话人分类的自我训练
abstract: Diarization partitions an audio stream into segments based on the voices of the speakers. Real-time diarization systems that include an enrollment step should limit enrollment training samples to reduce user interaction time. Although training on a small number of samples yields poor performance, we show that the accuracy can be improved dramatically using a chronological self-training approach. We studied the tradeoff between training time and classification performance and found that 1 second is sufficient to reach over 95% accuracy. We evaluated on 700 audio conversation files of about 10 minutes each from 6 different languages and demonstrated average diarization error rates as low as 10%.
summary: Diarization partitions an audio stream into segments based on the voices of the speakers. Real-time diarization systems that include an enrollment step should limit enrollment training samples to reduce user interaction time. Although training on a small number of samples yields poor performance, we show that the accuracy can be improved dramatically using a chronological self-training approach. We studied the tradeoff between training time and classification performance and found that 1 second is sufficient to reach over 95% accuracy. We evaluated on 700 audio conversation files of about 10 minutes each from 6 different languages and demonstrated average diarization error rates as low as 10%.
abstract_zh: 分类根据说话者的声音将音频流划分为多个片段。包含注册步骤的实时分类系统应限制注册训练样本，以减少用户交互时间。尽管对少量样本进行训练的性能较差，但我们表明使用时间顺序自我训练方法可以显着提高准确性。我们研究了训练时间和分类性能之间的权衡，发现 1 秒足以达到 95% 以上的准确率。我们对来自 6 种不同语言的 700 个音频对话文件进行了评估，每个文件时长约 10 分钟，结果表明平均分类错误率低至 10%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间顺序自训练的实时说话人日记化方法，通过减少训练样本数量并提升准确率。
AI.motivation: 实时说话人日记化系统需缩短用户交互时间，但少量训练样本会导致性能下降，需探索高效训练方法。
AI.method: 采用时间顺序自训练策略，利用时间序列数据增强模型，在1秒训练时间内实现高准确率。
AI.result: 在6种语言的700个10分钟音频文件上测试，平均日记化错误率低至10%，准确率超95%。
AI.conclusion: 时间顺序自训练可在极短训练时间内实现高精度实时说话人日记化，适用于多语言场景。

authors_text: Ashish Rauniyar,Desta Haileselassie Hagos,Debesh Jha,Jan Erik Håkegård,Ulas Bagci,Danda B. Rawat,Vladimir Vlassov
title: Federated Learning for Medical Applications: A Taxonomy, Current Trends, Challenges, and Future Research Directions
title_zh: 医疗应用的联邦学习：分类、当前趋势、挑战和未来研究方向
comment: Accepted at IEEE Internet of Things Journal
comments: Accepted at IEEE Internet of Things Journal
abstract: With the advent of the IoT, AI, ML, and DL algorithms, the landscape of data-driven medical applications has emerged as a promising avenue for designing robust and scalable diagnostic and prognostic models from medical data. This has gained a lot of attention from both academia and industry, leading to significant improvements in healthcare quality. However, the adoption of AI-driven medical applications still faces tough challenges, including meeting security, privacy, and quality of service (QoS) standards. Recent developments in \ac{FL} have made it possible to train complex machine-learned models in a distributed manner and have become an active research domain, particularly processing the medical data at the edge of the network in a decentralized way to preserve privacy and address security concerns. To this end, in this paper, we explore the present and future of FL technology in medical applications where data sharing is a significant challenge. We delve into the current research trends and their outcomes, unravelling the complexities of designing reliable and scalable \ac{FL} models. Our paper outlines the fundamental statistical issues in FL, tackles device-related problems, addresses security challenges, and navigates the complexity of privacy concerns, all while highlighting its transformative potential in the medical field. Our study primarily focuses on medical applications of \ac{FL}, particularly in the context of global cancer diagnosis. We highlight the potential of FL to enable computer-aided diagnosis tools that address this challenge with greater effectiveness than traditional data-driven methods. We hope that this comprehensive review will serve as a checkpoint for the field, summarizing the current state-of-the-art and identifying open problems and future research directions.

We highlight the potential of FL to enable computer-aided diagnosis tools that address this challenge with greater effectiveness than traditional data-driven methods. We hope that this comprehensive review will serve as a checkpoint for the field, summarizing the current state-of-the-art and identifying open problems and future research directions.
abstract_zh: 随着物联网、人工智能、机器学习和深度学习算法的出现，数据驱动的医疗应用领域已成为根据医疗数据设计稳健且可扩展的诊断和预后模型的有前景的途径。这引起了学术界和工业界的广泛关注，导致医疗质量显着提高。然而，人工智能驱动的医疗应用程序的采用仍然面临严峻的挑战，包括满足安全、隐私和服务质量 (QoS) 标准。 \ac{FL} 的最新发展使得以分布式方式训练复杂的机器学习模型成为可能，并已成为一个活跃的研究领域，特别是以去中心化的方式处理网络边缘的医疗数据以保护隐私并解决安全问题。为此，在本文中，我们探讨了 FL 技术在医疗应用中的现状和未来，其中数据共享是一个重大挑战。我们深入研究当前的研究趋势及其结果，揭示设计可靠且可扩展的 \ac{FL} 模型的复杂性。我们的论文概述了 FL 的基本统计问题，解决了设备相关问题，解决了安全挑战，并解决了隐私问题的复杂性，同时强调了其在医疗领域的变革潜力。我们的研究主要集中于 \ac{FL} 的医学应用，特别是在全球癌症诊断的背景下。我们强调 FL 的潜力，使计算机辅助诊断工具能够比传统的数据驱动方法更有效地应对这一挑战。我们希望这次全面审查能够成为该领域的一个检查站，总结当前的最新技术并确定未解决的问题和未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了联邦学习（FL）在医疗领域的应用现状、挑战及未来方向，重点探讨其在癌症诊断等场景中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据共享面临隐私与安全挑战，而FL通过分布式学习保护数据隐私，为医疗AI提供新路径，需系统梳理其研究进展与问题。
AI.method: 通过文献分析法，分类归纳FL在医疗中的应用场景，探讨统计问题、设备限制、安全威胁及隐私保护等核心挑战，并结合癌症诊断案例验证其有效性。
AI.result: 总结FL在医疗中的关键技术趋势，识别出模型异质性、通信开销、恶意节点防御等关键问题，提出针对癌症诊断的FL框架优化方向。
AI.conclusion: FL有望成为隐私敏感医疗场景的核心技术，但需解决模型收敛性、跨机构协作机制等难题，未来应加强跨学科研究以推动临床落地。

search_text: Federated Learning for Medical Applications: A Taxonomy, Current Trends, Challenges, and Future Research Directions 医疗应用的联邦学习：分类、当前趋势、挑战和未来研究方向 With the advent of the IoT, AI, ML, and DL algorithms, the landscape of data-driven medical applications has emerged as a promising avenue for designing robust and scalable diagnostic and prognostic models from medical data. This has gained a lot of attention from both academia and industry, leading to significant improvements in healthcare quality. However, the adoption of AI-driven medical applications still faces tough challenges, including meeting security, privacy, and quality of service (QoS) standards. Recent developments in \ac{FL} have made it possible to train complex machine-learned models in a distributed manner and have become an active research domain, particularly processing the medical data at the edge of the network in a decentralized way to preserve privacy and address security concerns. To this end, in this paper, we explore the present and future of FL technology in medical applications where data sharing is a significant challenge. We delve into the current research trends and their outcomes, unravelling the complexities of designing reliable and scalable \ac{FL} models. Our paper outlines the fundamental statistical issues in FL, tackles device-related problems, addresses security challenges, and navigates the complexity of privacy concerns, all while highlighting its transformative potential in the medical field. Our study primarily focuses on medical applications of \ac{FL}, particularly in the context of global cancer diagnosis. We highlight the potential of FL to enable computer-aided diagnosis tools that address this challenge with greater effectiveness than traditional data-driven methods. We hope that this comprehensive review will serve as a checkpoint for the field, summarizing the current state-of-the-art and identifying open problems and future research directions. 随着物联网、人工智能、机器学习和深度学习算法的出现，数据驱动的医疗应用领域已成为根据医疗数据设计稳健且可扩展的诊断和预后模型的有前景的途径。这引起了学术界和工业界的广泛关注，导致医疗质量显着提高。然而，人工智能驱动的医疗应用程序的采用仍然面临严峻的挑战，包括满足安全、隐私和服务质量 (QoS) 标准。 \ac{FL} 的最新发展使得以分布式方式训练复杂的机器学习模型成为可能，并已成为一个活跃的研究领域，特别是以去中心化的方式处理网络边缘的医疗数据以保护隐私并解决安全问题。为此，在本文中，我们探讨了 FL 技术在医疗应用中的现状和未来，其中数据共享是一个重大挑战。我们深入研究当前的研究趋势及其结果，揭示设计可靠且可扩展的 \ac{FL} 模型的复杂性。我们的论文概述了 FL 的基本统计问题，解决了设备相关问题，解决了安全挑战，并解决了隐私问题的复杂性，同时强调了其在医疗领域的变革潜力。我们的研究主要集中于 \ac{FL} 的医学应用，特别是在全球癌症诊断的背景下。我们强调 FL 的潜力，使计算机辅助诊断工具能够比传统的数据驱动方法更有效地应对这一挑战。我们希望这次全面审查能够成为该领域的一个检查站，总结当前的最新技术并确定未解决的问题和未来的研究方向。 本文系统综述了联邦学习（FL）在医疗领域的应用现状、挑战及未来方向，重点探讨其在癌症诊断等场景中的潜力。 Ashish Rauniyar,Desta Haileselassie Hagos,Debesh Jha,Jan Erik Håkegård,Ulas Bagci,Danda B. Rawat,Vladimir Vlassov cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Jitesh Jain,Yuqian Zhou,Ning Yu,Humphrey Shi
title: Keys to Better Image Inpainting: Structure and Texture Go Hand in Hand
title_zh: 更好的图像修复的关键：结构和纹理齐头并进
abstract: Deep image inpainting has made impressive progress with recent advances in image generation and processing algorithms. We claim that the performance of inpainting algorithms can be better judged by the generated structures and textures. Structures refer to the generated object boundary or novel geometric structures within the hole, while texture refers to high-frequency details, especially man-made repeating patterns filled inside the structural regions. We believe that better structures are usually obtained from a coarse-to-fine GAN-based generator network while repeating patterns nowadays can be better modeled using state-of-the-art high-frequency fast fourier convolutional layers. In this paper, we propose a novel inpainting network combining the advantages of the two designs. Therefore, our model achieves a remarkable visual quality to match state-of-the-art performance in both structure generation and repeating texture synthesis using a single network. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the method, and our conclusions further highlight the two critical factors of image inpainting quality, structures, and textures, as the future design directions of inpainting networks.
summary: Deep image inpainting has made impressive progress with recent advances in image generation and processing algorithms. We claim that the performance of inpainting algorithms can be better judged by the generated structures and textures. Structures refer to the generated object boundary or novel geometric structures within the hole, while texture refers to high-frequency details, especially man-made repeating patterns filled inside the structural regions. We believe that better structures are usually obtained from a coarse-to-fine GAN-based generator network while repeating patterns nowadays can be better modeled using state-of-the-art high-frequency fast fourier convolutional layers. In this paper, we propose a novel inpainting network combining the advantages of the two designs. Therefore, our model achieves a remarkable visual quality to match state-of-the-art performance in both structure generation and repeating texture synthesis using a single network. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the method, and our conclusions further highlight the two critical factors of image inpainting quality, structures, and textures, as the future design directions of inpainting networks.
abstract_zh: 随着图像生成和处理算法的最新进展，深度图像修复取得了令人瞩目的进展。我们声称修复算法的性能可以通过生成的结构和纹理更好地判断。结构是指孔内生成的对象边界或新颖的几何结构，而纹理是指高频细节，尤其是填充在结构区域内的人造重复图案。我们相信，更好的结构通常是从从粗到细的基于 GAN 的生成网络获得的，而现在的重复模式可以使用最先进的高频快速傅里叶卷积层更好地建模。在本文中，我们结合了两种设计的优点，提出了一种新颖的修复网络。因此，我们的模型实现了卓越的视觉质量，在使用单个网络的结构生成和重复纹理合成方面达到了最先进的性能。大量的实验证明了该方法的有效性，我们的结论进一步强调了图像修复质量的两个关键因素：结构和纹理，作为修复网络的未来设计方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合结构与纹理生成的图像修复网络，以提升修复效果。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复算法在结构边界和重复纹理细节的生成上存在不足，需同时优化两者以提升整体质量。
AI.method: 融合粗到细的GAN生成结构和高频傅里叶卷积层建模纹理，设计统一网络同时处理结构与纹理。
AI.result: 在结构生成和重复纹理合成上达到SOTA水平，实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 图像修复质量的关键在于结构完整性与纹理细节的平衡，未来应以此为设计方向。

ai_content.conclusion: 图像修复质量的关键在于结构完整性与纹理细节的平衡，未来应以此为设计方向。

authors_text: Elhousni Mahdi,Huang Xinming
title: A Survey on Visual Map Localization Using LiDARs and Cameras
title_zh: 使用激光雷达和相机进行视觉地图定位的调查
abstract: As the autonomous driving industry is slowly maturing, visual map localization is quickly becoming the standard approach to localize cars as accurately as possible. Owing to the rich data returned by visual sensors such as cameras or LiDARs, researchers are able to build different types of maps with various levels of details, and use them to achieve high levels of vehicle localization accuracy and stability in urban environments. Contrary to the popular SLAM approaches, visual map localization relies on pre-built maps, and is focused solely on improving the localization accuracy by avoiding error accumulation or drift. We define visual map localization as a two-stage process. At the stage of place recognition, the initial position of the vehicle in the map is determined by comparing the visual sensor output with a set of geo-tagged map regions of interest. Subsequently, at the stage of map metric localization, the vehicle is tracked while it moves across the map by continuously aligning the visual sensors' output with the current area of the map that is being traversed. In this paper, we survey, discuss and compare the latest methods for LiDAR based, camera based and cross-modal visual map localization for both stages, in an effort to highlight the strength and weakness of each approach.
summary: As the autonomous driving industry is slowly maturing, visual map localization is quickly becoming the standard approach to localize cars as accurately as possible. Owing to the rich data returned by visual sensors such as cameras or LiDARs, researchers are able to build different types of maps with various levels of details, and use them to achieve high levels of vehicle localization accuracy and stability in urban environments. Contrary to the popular SLAM approaches, visual map localization relies on pre-built maps, and is focused solely on improving the localization accuracy by avoiding error accumulation or drift. We define visual map localization as a two-stage process. At the stage of place recognition, the initial position of the vehicle in the map is determined by comparing the visual sensor output with a set of geo-tagged map regions of interest. Subsequently, at the stage of map metric localization, the vehicle is tracked while it moves across the map by continuously aligning the visual sensors' output with the current area of the map that is being traversed. In this paper, we survey, discuss and compare the latest methods for LiDAR based, camera based and cross-modal visual map localization for both stages, in an effort to highlight the strength and weakness of each approach.
abstract_zh: 随着自动驾驶行业慢慢成熟，视觉地图定位正迅速成为尽可能准确地定位汽车的标准方法。由于相机或激光雷达等视觉传感器返回的丰富数据，研究人员能够构建具有不同细节级别的不同类型的地图，并利用它们在城市环境中实现高水平的车辆定位精度和稳定性。与流行的 SLAM 方法相反，视觉地图定位依赖于预先构建的地图，并且仅专注于通过避免误差累积或漂移来提高定位精度。我们将视觉地图定位定义为一个两阶段的过程。在地点识别阶段，通过将视觉传感器输出与一组地理标记的感兴趣的地图区域进行比较来确定车辆在地图中的初始位置。随后，在地图度量定位阶段，通过不断将视觉传感器的输出与正在遍历的地图的当前区域对齐，在车辆在地图上移动时对其进行跟踪。在本文中，我们调查、讨论和比较了两个阶段基于激光雷达、基于相机和跨模式视觉地图定位的最新方法，以突出每种方法的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于激光雷达和摄像头的视觉地图定位方法，比较了不同技术在定位精度和稳定性方面的优缺点。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶需要高精度车辆定位，传统SLAM方法存在误差累积问题，而视觉地图定位通过预构建地图可提升精度和稳定性。
AI.method: 将视觉地图定位分为地点识别和地图度量定位两阶段，分别对激光雷达、摄像头及跨模态方法进行文献综述与比较分析。
AI.result: 总结了各方法在复杂城市环境中的性能表现，指出跨模态方法在精度和鲁棒性上具有潜力，但存在计算成本高等挑战。

search_text: A Survey on Visual Map Localization Using LiDARs and Cameras 使用激光雷达和相机进行视觉地图定位的调查 As the autonomous driving industry is slowly maturing, visual map localization is quickly becoming the standard approach to localize cars as accurately as possible. Owing to the rich data returned by visual sensors such as cameras or LiDARs, researchers are able to build different types of maps with various levels of details, and use them to achieve high levels of vehicle localization accuracy and stability in urban environments. Contrary to the popular SLAM approaches, visual map localization relies on pre-built maps, and is focused solely on improving the localization accuracy by avoiding error accumulation or drift. We define visual map localization as a two-stage process. At the stage of place recognition, the initial position of the vehicle in the map is determined by comparing the visual sensor output with a set of geo-tagged map regions of interest. Subsequently, at the stage of map metric localization, the vehicle is tracked while it moves across the map by continuously aligning the visual sensors' output with the current area of the map that is being traversed. In this paper, we survey, discuss and compare the latest methods for LiDAR based, camera based and cross-modal visual map localization for both stages, in an effort to highlight the strength and weakness of each approach. 随着自动驾驶行业慢慢成熟，视觉地图定位正迅速成为尽可能准确地定位汽车的标准方法。由于相机或激光雷达等视觉传感器返回的丰富数据，研究人员能够构建具有不同细节级别的不同类型的地图，并利用它们在城市环境中实现高水平的车辆定位精度和稳定性。与流行的 SLAM 方法相反，视觉地图定位依赖于预先构建的地图，并且仅专注于通过避免误差累积或漂移来提高定位精度。我们将视觉地图定位定义为一个两阶段的过程。在地点识别阶段，通过将视觉传感器输出与一组地理标记的感兴趣的地图区域进行比较来确定车辆在地图中的初始位置。随后，在地图度量定位阶段，通过不断将视觉传感器的输出与正在遍历的地图的当前区域对齐，在车辆在地图上移动时对其进行跟踪。在本文中，我们调查、讨论和比较了两个阶段基于激光雷达、基于相机和跨模式视觉地图定位的最新方法，以突出每种方法的优点和缺点。 本文综述了基于激光雷达和摄像头的视觉地图定位方法，比较了不同技术在定位精度和稳定性方面的优缺点。 Elhousni Mahdi,Huang Xinming cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Aleksandar Stanić,Yujin Tang,David Ha,Jürgen Schmidhuber
title: Learning to Generalize with Object-centric Agents in the Open World Survival Game Crafter
title_zh: 学习在开放世界生存游戏 Crafter 中使用以对象为中心的代理进行泛化
abstract: Reinforcement learning agents must generalize beyond their training experience. Prior work has focused mostly on identical training and evaluation environments. Starting from the recently introduced Crafter benchmark, a 2D open world survival game, we introduce a new set of environments suitable for evaluating some agent's ability to generalize on previously unseen (numbers of) objects and to adapt quickly (meta-learning). In Crafter, the agents are evaluated by the number of unlocked achievements (such as collecting resources) when trained for 1M steps. We show that current agents struggle to generalize, and introduce novel object-centric agents that improve over strong baselines. We also provide critical insights of general interest for future work on Crafter through several experiments. We show that careful hyper-parameter tuning improves the PPO baseline agent by a large margin and that even feedforward agents can unlock almost all achievements by relying on the inventory display. We achieve new state-of-the-art performance on the original Crafter environment. Additionally, when trained beyond 1M steps, our tuned agents can unlock almost all achievements. We show that the recurrent PPO agents improve over feedforward ones, even with the inventory information removed. We introduce CrafterOOD, a set of 15 new environments that evaluate OOD generalization. On CrafterOOD, we show that the current agents fail to generalize, whereas our novel object-centric agents achieve state-of-the-art OOD generalization while also being interpretable. Our code is public.
summary: Reinforcement learning agents must generalize beyond their training experience. Prior work has focused mostly on identical training and evaluation environments. Starting from the recently introduced Crafter benchmark, a 2D open world survival game, we introduce a new set of environments suitable for evaluating some agent's ability to generalize on previously unseen (numbers of) objects and to adapt quickly (meta-learning). In Crafter, the agents are evaluated by the number of unlocked achievements (such as collecting resources) when trained for 1M steps. We show that current agents struggle to generalize, and introduce novel object-centric agents that improve over strong baselines. We also provide critical insights of general interest for future work on Crafter through several experiments. We show that careful hyper-parameter tuning improves the PPO baseline agent by a large margin and that even feedforward agents can unlock almost all achievements by relying on the inventory display. We achieve new state-of-the-art performance on the original Crafter environment. Additionally, when trained beyond 1M steps, our tuned agents can unlock almost all achievements. We show that the recurrent PPO agents improve over feedforward ones, even with the inventory information removed. We introduce CrafterOOD, a set of 15 new environments that evaluate OOD generalization. On CrafterOOD, we show that the current agents fail to generalize, whereas our novel object-centric agents achieve state-of-the-art OOD generalization while also being interpretable. Our code is public.
abstract_zh: 强化学习代理必须概括其训练经验之外的内容。之前的工作主要集中在相同的培训和评估环境上。从最近推出的 Crafter 基准（一款 2D 开放世界生存游戏）开始，我们引入了一组新的环境，适合评估某些智能体泛化先前未见过（数量）的对象并快速适应（元学习）的能力。在 Crafter 中，智能体根据训练 100 万步时解锁成就（例如收集资源）的数量进行评估。我们表明，当前的智能体很难泛化，并引入了新颖的以对象为中心的智能体，这些智能体在强基线上有所改进。我们还通过多项实验为 Crafter 的未来工作提供了普遍感兴趣的关键见解。我们表明，仔细的超参数调整可以大幅提高 PPO 基线智能体，甚至前馈智能体也可以依靠库存显示来解锁几乎所有成就。我们在原始 Crafter 环境中实现了最先进的新性能。此外，当训练超过 100 万步时，我们经过调整的代理可以解锁几乎所有成就。我们表明，即使删除了库存信息，循环 PPO 代理也比前馈代理有所改进。我们引入了 CrafterOOD，这是一组评估 OOD 泛化性的 15 个新环境。在 CrafterOOD 上，我们表明当前的代理无法泛化，而我们新颖的以对象为中心的代理实现了最先进的 OOD 泛化，同时也是可解释的。我们的代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于对象中心的智能体，以提升强化学习在开放世界生存游戏Crafter中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多在相同训练与测试环境中评估智能体，而实际场景需应对未见对象及快速适应。Crafter基准测试要求智能体通过解锁成就（如收集资源）评估泛化能力，但现有方法表现不足。
AI.method: 引入对象中心智能体，结合超参数调优、库存信息利用及递归PPO架构；设计CrafterOOD基准测试15个新环境以评估分布外泛化能力。
AI.result: 在原始Crafter环境中达到SOTA性能，调优后智能体可解锁几乎所有成就；在CrafterOOD中，对象中心智能体显著优于现有方法，且具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 对象中心方法与超参数调优有效提升泛化能力，CrafterOOD为未来研究提供关键评估框架，强调可解释性在开放世界任务中的重要性。

authors_text: Hang Hu,Zhao Song,Runzhou Tao,Zhaozhuo Xu,Junze Yin,Danyang Zhuo
title: Sublinear Time Algorithm for Online Weighted Bipartite Matching
title_zh: 在线加权二分匹配的次线性时间算法
abstract: Online bipartite matching is a fundamental problem in online algorithms. The goal is to match two sets of vertices to maximize the sum of the edge weights, where for one set of vertices, each vertex and its corresponding edge weights appear in a sequence. Currently, in the practical recommendation system or search engine, the weights are decided by the inner product between the deep representation of a user and the deep representation of an item. The standard online matching needs to pay $nd$ time to linear scan all the $n$ items, computing weight (assuming each representation vector has length $d$), and then deciding the matching based on the weights. However, in reality, the $n$ could be very large, e.g. in online e-commerce platforms. Thus, improving the time of computing weights is a problem of practical significance. In this work, we provide the theoretical foundation for computing the weights approximately. We show that, with our proposed randomized data structures, the weights can be computed in sublinear time while still preserving the competitive ratio of the matching algorithm.
summary: Online bipartite matching is a fundamental problem in online algorithms. The goal is to match two sets of vertices to maximize the sum of the edge weights, where for one set of vertices, each vertex and its corresponding edge weights appear in a sequence. Currently, in the practical recommendation system or search engine, the weights are decided by the inner product between the deep representation of a user and the deep representation of an item. The standard online matching needs to pay $nd$ time to linear scan all the $n$ items, computing weight (assuming each representation vector has length $d$), and then deciding the matching based on the weights. However, in reality, the $n$ could be very large, e.g. in online e-commerce platforms. Thus, improving the time of computing weights is a problem of practical significance. In this work, we provide the theoretical foundation for computing the weights approximately. We show that, with our proposed randomized data structures, the weights can be computed in sublinear time while still preserving the competitive ratio of the matching algorithm.
abstract_zh: 在线二分匹配是在线算法中的一个基本问题。目标是匹配两组顶点以最大化边权重之和，其中对于一组顶点，每个顶点及其相应的边权重出现在一个序列中。目前，在实际的推荐系统或搜索引擎中，权重是由用户的深度表示和项目的深度表示之间的内积决定的。标准的在线匹配需要花费$nd$时间线性扫描所有$n$个项目，计算权重（假设每个表示向量的长度为$d$），然后根据权重决定匹配。然而，实际上，$n$ 可能非常大，例如在在线电子商务平台上。因此，提高计算权值的时间是一个具有实际意义的问题。在这项工作中，我们为近似计算权重提供了理论基础。我们表明，利用我们提出的随机数据结构，可以在亚线性时间内计算权重，同时仍然保持匹配算法的竞争比。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在线加权二分图匹配的亚线性时间算法，通过随机数据结构近似计算权重以提升效率。
AI.motivation: 在线推荐系统或搜索引擎中，用户与物品的深度表示内积计算权重需线性时间，当物品数量极大时计算成本过高。
AI.method: 设计随机化数据结构，在不牺牲匹配算法竞争比的前提下，实现权重的亚线性时间近似计算。
AI.result: 理论证明该方法可在亚线性时间内完成权重计算，同时保持原有匹配算法的竞争比性能。
AI.conclusion: 为大规模在线匹配场景提供了计算效率与匹配质量兼顾的理论基础，具有重要实践价值。

search_text: Sublinear Time Algorithm for Online Weighted Bipartite Matching 在线加权二分匹配的次线性时间算法 Online bipartite matching is a fundamental problem in online algorithms. The goal is to match two sets of vertices to maximize the sum of the edge weights, where for one set of vertices, each vertex and its corresponding edge weights appear in a sequence. Currently, in the practical recommendation system or search engine, the weights are decided by the inner product between the deep representation of a user and the deep representation of an item. The standard online matching needs to pay $nd$ time to linear scan all the $n$ items, computing weight (assuming each representation vector has length $d$), and then deciding the matching based on the weights. However, in reality, the $n$ could be very large, e.g. in online e-commerce platforms. Thus, improving the time of computing weights is a problem of practical significance. In this work, we provide the theoretical foundation for computing the weights approximately. We show that, with our proposed randomized data structures, the weights can be computed in sublinear time while still preserving the competitive ratio of the matching algorithm. 在线二分匹配是在线算法中的一个基本问题。目标是匹配两组顶点以最大化边权重之和，其中对于一组顶点，每个顶点及其相应的边权重出现在一个序列中。目前，在实际的推荐系统或搜索引擎中，权重是由用户的深度表示和项目的深度表示之间的内积决定的。标准的在线匹配需要花费$nd$时间线性扫描所有$n$个项目，计算权重（假设每个表示向量的长度为$d$），然后根据权重决定匹配。然而，实际上，$n$ 可能非常大，例如在在线电子商务平台上。因此，提高计算权值的时间是一个具有实际意义的问题。在这项工作中，我们为近似计算权重提供了理论基础。我们表明，利用我们提出的随机数据结构，可以在亚线性时间内计算权重，同时仍然保持匹配算法的竞争比。 本文提出了一种在线加权二分图匹配的亚线性时间算法，通过随机数据结构近似计算权重以提升效率。 Hang Hu,Zhao Song,Runzhou Tao,Zhaozhuo Xu,Junze Yin,Danyang Zhuo cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Roi Ronen,Shahar Tsiper,Oron Anschel,Inbal Lavi,Amir Markovitz,R. Manmatha
title: GLASS: Global to Local Attention for Scene-Text Spotting
title_zh: GLASS：场景文本识别的全局到局部注意力
abstract: In recent years, the dominant paradigm for text spotting is to combine the tasks of text detection and recognition into a single end-to-end framework. Under this paradigm, both tasks are accomplished by operating over a shared global feature map extracted from the input image. Among the main challenges that end-to-end approaches face is the performance degradation when recognizing text across scale variations (smaller or larger text), and arbitrary word rotation angles. In this work, we address these challenges by proposing a novel global-to-local attention mechanism for text spotting, termed GLASS, that fuses together global and local features. The global features are extracted from the shared backbone, preserving contextual information from the entire image, while the local features are computed individually on resized, high-resolution rotated word crops. The information extracted from the local crops alleviates much of the inherent difficulties with scale and word rotation. We show a performance analysis across scales and angles, highlighting improvement over scale and angle extremities. In addition, we introduce an orientation-aware loss term supervising the detection task, and show its contribution to both detection and recognition performance across all angles. Finally, we show that GLASS is general by incorporating it into other leading text spotting architectures, improving their text spotting performance. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks, including the newly released TextOCR.
summary: In recent years, the dominant paradigm for text spotting is to combine the tasks of text detection and recognition into a single end-to-end framework. Under this paradigm, both tasks are accomplished by operating over a shared global feature map extracted from the input image. Among the main challenges that end-to-end approaches face is the performance degradation when recognizing text across scale variations (smaller or larger text), and arbitrary word rotation angles. In this work, we address these challenges by proposing a novel global-to-local attention mechanism for text spotting, termed GLASS, that fuses together global and local features. The global features are extracted from the shared backbone, preserving contextual information from the entire image, while the local features are computed individually on resized, high-resolution rotated word crops. The information extracted from the local crops alleviates much of the inherent difficulties with scale and word rotation. We show a performance analysis across scales and angles, highlighting improvement over scale and angle extremities. In addition, we introduce an orientation-aware loss term supervising the detection task, and show its contribution to both detection and recognition performance across all angles. Finally, we show that GLASS is general by incorporating it into other leading text spotting architectures, improving their text spotting performance. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks, including the newly released TextOCR.
abstract_zh: 近年来，文本识别的主导范式是将文本检测和识别任务结合到单个端到端框架中。在这种范式下，这两项任务都是通过对从输入图像中提取的共享全局特征图进行操作来完成的。端到端方法面临的主要挑战之一是在跨尺度变化（较小或较大的文本）和任意单词旋转角度识别文本时性能下降。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种新颖的文本识别全局到局部注意力机制（称为 GLASS）来应对这些挑战，该机制将全局和局部特征融合在一起。全局特征是从共享主干中提取的，保留整个图像的上下文信息，而局部特征是在调整大小的高分辨率旋转文字裁剪上单独计算的。从当地农作物中提取的信息缓解了规模和文字轮换方面的许多固有困难。我们展示了跨尺度和角度的性能分析，强调了尺度和角度极限的改进。此外，我们引入了一个方向感知损失项来监督检测任务，并展示了它对各个角度的检测和识别性能的贡献。最后，我们通过将 GLASS 合并到其他领先的文本识别架构中来展示 GLASS 的通用性，从而提高其文本识别性能。我们的方法在多个基准测试中取得了最先进的结果，包括新发布的 TextOCR。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GLASS方法，通过融合全局与局部特征解决场景文本检测与识别中的尺度变化和任意旋转角度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端文本识别框架在处理小尺度/大尺度文本及任意旋转角度时性能下降，需改进特征提取机制。
AI.method: 设计全局到局部注意力机制GLASS，结合共享主干网络的全局特征与高分辨率旋转文本块的局部特征，并引入方向感知损失函数。
AI.result: 在多尺度和旋转角度测试中表现优异，尤其在极端情况下提升显著，在TextOCR等基准数据集上达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: GLASS有效解决了文本尺度与旋转挑战，且可泛化到其他主流文本检测架构中提升性能。

Under this paradigm, both tasks are accomplished by operating over a shared global feature map extracted from the input image. Among the main challenges that end-to-end approaches face is the performance degradation when recognizing text across scale variations (smaller or larger text), and arbitrary word rotation angles. In this work, we address these challenges by proposing a novel global-to-local attention mechanism for text spotting, termed GLASS, that fuses together global and local features. The global features are extracted from the shared backbone, preserving contextual information from the entire image, while the local features are computed individually on resized, high-resolution rotated word crops. The information extracted from the local crops alleviates much of the inherent difficulties with scale and word rotation. We show a performance analysis across scales and angles, highlighting improvement over scale and angle extremities. In addition, we introduce an orientation-aware loss term supervising the detection task, and show its contribution to both detection and recognition performance across all angles. Finally, we show that GLASS is general by incorporating it into other leading text spotting architectures, improving their text spotting performance. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks, including the newly released TextOCR. 近年来，文本识别的主导范式是将文本检测和识别任务结合到单个端到端框架中。在这种范式下，这两项任务都是通过对从输入图像中提取的共享全局特征图进行操作来完成的。端到端方法面临的主要挑战之一是在跨尺度变化（较小或较大的文本）和任意单词旋转角度识别文本时性能下降。在这项工作中，我们通过提出一种新颖的文本识别全局到局部注意力机制（称为 GLASS）来应对这些挑战，该机制将全局和局部特征融合在一起。全局特征是从共享主干中提取的，保留整个图像的上下文信息，而局部特征是在调整大小的高分辨率旋转文字裁剪上单独计算的。从当地农作物中提取的信息缓解了规模和文字轮换方面的许多固有困难。我们展示了跨尺度和角度的性能分析，强调了尺度和角度极限的改进。此外，我们引入了一个方向感知损失项来监督检测任务，并展示了它对各个角度的检测和识别性能的贡献。最后，我们通过将 GLASS 合并到其他领先的文本识别架构中来展示 GLASS 的通用性，从而提高其文本识别性能。我们的方法在多个基准测试中取得了最先进的结果，包括新发布的 TextOCR。 本文提出GLASS方法，通过融合全局与局部特征解决场景文本检测与识别中的尺度变化和任意旋转角度问题。 Roi Ronen,Shahar Tsiper,Oron Anschel,Inbal Lavi,Amir Markovitz,R.
