search_text: Discover the Mysteries of the Maya: Selected Contributions from the Machine Learning Challenge & The Discovery Challenge Workshop at ECML PKDD 2021 探索玛雅人的奥秘：ECML PKDD 2021 机器学习挑战赛和发现挑战研讨会的精选贡献 The volume contains selected contributions from the Machine Learning Challenge "Discover the Mysteries of the Maya", presented at the Discovery Challenge Track of The European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECML PKDD 2021). Remote sensing has greatly accelerated traditional archaeological landscape surveys in the forested regions of the ancient Maya. Typical exploration and discovery attempts, beside focusing on whole ancient cities, focus also on individual buildings and structures. Recently, there have been several successful attempts of utilizing machine learning for identifying ancient Maya settlements. These attempts, while relevant, focus on narrow areas and rely on high-quality aerial laser scanning (ALS) data which covers only a fraction of the region where ancient Maya were once settled. Satellite image data, on the other hand, produced by the European Space Agency's (ESA) Sentinel missions, is abundant and, more importantly, publicly available. The "Discover the Mysteries of the Maya" challenge aimed at locating and identifying ancient Maya architectures (buildings, aguadas, and platforms) by performing integrated image segmentation of different types of satellite imagery (from Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2) data and ALS (lidar) data. 该卷包含来自机器学习挑战“发现玛雅之谜”的精选贡献，该挑战在欧洲机器学习和数据库知识发现原理与实践会议（ECML PKDD 2021）的发现挑战赛道上提出。遥感极大地加速了古玛雅森林地区的传统考古景观调查。典型的探索和发现尝试，除了关注整个古城外，还关注单个建筑物和结构。最近，利用机器学习来识别古代玛雅定居点的尝试已经取得了几次成功。这些尝试虽然相关，但重点关注狭窄区域，并依赖于高质量航空激光扫描 (ALS) 数据，这些数据仅覆盖古代玛雅人曾经定居的一小部分区域。另一方面，欧洲航天局 (ESA) 哨兵任务产生的卫星图像数据丰富，更重要的是，可以公开获取。 “探索玛雅之谜”挑战赛旨在通过对不同类型的卫星图像（来自 Sentinel-1 和 Sentinel-2）数据和 ALS（激光雷达）数据进行集成图像分割来定位和识别古代玛雅建筑（建筑物、阿瓜达和平台）。 本文集收录了ECML PKDD 2021会议上'发现玛雅文明之谜'机器学习挑战赛的成果，旨在通过整合卫星影像与激光雷达数据识别古代玛雅建筑。 Dragi Kocev,Nikola Simidjievski,Ana Kostovska,Ivica Dimitrovski,Žiga Kokalj cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: A Kishore Kumar,Shefali Waldekar,Md Sahidullah,Goutam Saha
title: Robust Acoustic Domain Identification with its Application to Speaker Diarization
title_zh: 鲁棒声域识别及其在说话人二值化中的应用
comment: Accepted for publication in International Journal of Speech Technology (Springer Nature)
comments: Accepted for publication in International Journal of Speech Technology (Springer Nature)
abstract: With the rise in multimedia content over the years, more variety is observed in the recording environments of audio. An audio processing system might benefit when it has a module to identify the acoustic domain at its front-end. In this paper, we demonstrate the idea of \emph{acoustic domain identification} (ADI) for \emph{speaker diarization}. For this, we first present a detailed study of the various domains of the third DIHARD challenge highlighting the factors that differentiated them from each other. Our main contribution is to develop a simple and efficient solution for ADI. In the present work, we explore speaker embeddings for this task. Next, we integrate the ADI module with the speaker diarization framework of the DIHARD III challenge. The performance substantially improved over that of the baseline when the thresholds for agglomerative hierarchical clustering were optimized according to the respective domains. We achieved a relative improvement of more than $5\%$ and $8\%$ in DER for core and full conditions, respectively, on Track 1 of the DIHARD III evaluation set.
summary: With the rise in multimedia content over the years, more variety is observed in the recording environments of audio. An audio processing system might benefit when it has a module to identify the acoustic domain at its front-end. In this paper, we demonstrate the idea of \emph{acoustic domain identification} (ADI) for \emph{speaker diarization}. For this, we first present a detailed study of the various domains of the third DIHARD challenge highlighting the factors that differentiated them from each other. Our main contribution is to develop a simple and efficient solution for ADI. In the present work, we explore speaker embeddings for this task. Next, we integrate the ADI module with the speaker diarization framework of the DIHARD III challenge. The performance substantially improved over that of the baseline when the thresholds for agglomerative hierarchical clustering were optimized according to the respective domains. We achieved a relative improvement of more than $5\%$ and $8\%$ in DER for core and full conditions, respectively, on Track 1 of the DIHARD III evaluation set.
abstract_zh: 多年来，随着多媒体内容的兴起，音频录制环境变得更加多样化。当音频处理系统在其前端有一个识别声学域的模块时，它可能会受益。在本文中，我们演示了用于 \emph{扬声器二值化} 的 \emph{声域识别} (ADI) 的想法。为此，我们首先对第三次 DIHARD 挑战的各个领域进行了详细研究，强调了它们之间的区别因素。我们的主要贡献是为 ADI 开发简单高效的解决方案。在目前的工作中，我们探索了用于此任务的说话人嵌入。接下来，我们将 ADI 模块与 DIHARD III 挑战赛的说话者分类框架集成。当根据各自的领域优化凝聚层次聚类的阈值时，性能比基线有了显着提高。在 DIHARD III 评估集的轨道 1 上，我们在核心条件和完整条件下的 DER 分别实现了超过 $5\%$ 和 $8\%$ 的相对改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于说话人分割的鲁棒声学域识别方法（ADI），通过优化聚类阈值提升系统性能。
AI.motivation: 随着多媒体内容增长，音频录制环境日益复杂，传统说话人分割系统难以适应不同声学域差异，需前端加入域识别模块以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于DIHARD III挑战赛数据，分析声学域差异特征，采用说话人嵌入技术构建ADI模块，并将其集成至分割框架中，通过域自适应优化聚类阈值。
AI.result: 在DIHARD III Track 1测试集上，核心场景DER降低5%，全场景降低8%，显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 声学域识别可有效增强说话人分割系统对复杂环境的适应能力，为多场景语音处理提供新思路。

authors_text: Jan Nikolas Morshuis,Sergios Gatidis,Matthias Hein,Christian F. Baumgartner
title: Adversarial Robustness of MR Image Reconstruction under Realistic Perturbations
title_zh: 现实扰动下 MR 图像重建的对抗鲁棒性
comment: Accepted at the MICCAI-2022 workshop: Machine Learning for Medical Image Reconstruction
comments: Accepted at the MICCAI-2022 workshop: Machine Learning for Medical Image Reconstruction
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) methods have shown promising results for solving ill-posed inverse problems such as MR image reconstruction from undersampled $k$-space data. However, these approaches currently have no guarantees for reconstruction quality and the reliability of such algorithms is only poorly understood. Adversarial attacks offer a valuable tool to understand possible failure modes and worst case performance of DL-based reconstruction algorithms. In this paper we describe adversarial attacks on multi-coil $k$-space measurements and evaluate them on the recently proposed E2E-VarNet and a simpler UNet-based model. In contrast to prior work, the attacks are targeted to specifically alter diagnostically relevant regions. Using two realistic attack models (adversarial $k$-space noise and adversarial rotations) we are able to show that current state-of-the-art DL-based reconstruction algorithms are indeed sensitive to such perturbations to a degree where relevant diagnostic information may be lost. Surprisingly, in our experiments the UNet and the more sophisticated E2E-VarNet were similarly sensitive to such attacks. Our findings add further to the evidence that caution must be exercised as DL-based methods move closer to clinical practice.
summary: Deep Learning (DL) methods have shown promising results for solving ill-posed inverse problems such as MR image reconstruction from undersampled $k$-space data. However, these approaches currently have no guarantees for reconstruction quality and the reliability of such algorithms is only poorly understood. Adversarial attacks offer a valuable tool to understand possible failure modes and worst case performance of DL-based reconstruction algorithms. In this paper we describe adversarial attacks on multi-coil $k$-space measurements and evaluate them on the recently proposed E2E-VarNet and a simpler UNet-based model. In contrast to prior work, the attacks are targeted to specifically alter diagnostically relevant regions. Using two realistic attack models (adversarial $k$-space noise and adversarial rotations) we are able to show that current state-of-the-art DL-based reconstruction algorithms are indeed sensitive to such perturbations to a degree where relevant diagnostic information may be lost. Surprisingly, in our experiments the UNet and the more sophisticated E2E-VarNet were similarly sensitive to such attacks. Our findings add further to the evidence that caution must be exercised as DL-based methods move closer to clinical practice.
abstract_zh: 深度学习 (DL) 方法在解决不适定逆问题（例如从欠采样 $k$ 空间数据重建 MR 图像）方面显示出了有希望的结果。然而，这些方法目前无法保证重建质量，并且人们对此类算法的可靠性知之甚少。对抗性攻击提供了一个有价值的工具来了解基于深度学习的重建算法的可能故障模式和最坏情况性能。在本文中，我们描述了对多线圈 $k$ 空间测量的对抗性攻击，并在最近提出的 E2E-VarNet 和更简单的基于 UNet 的模型上对其进行了评估。与之前的工作相比，这些攻击的目标是专门改变诊断相关区域。使用两种真实的攻击模型（对抗性 $k$ 空间噪声和对抗性旋转），我们能够证明当前最先进的基于深度学习的重建算法确实对此类扰动敏感，以至于相关诊断信息可能会丢失。令人惊讶的是，在我们的实验中，UNet 和更复杂的 E2E-VarNet 对此类攻击同样敏感。我们的研究结果进一步证明，随着基于深度学习的方法越来越接近临床实践，必须谨慎行事。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度学习方法在磁共振（MR）图像重建中对现实对抗扰动的鲁棒性，通过设计针对诊断相关区域的攻击模型评估E2E-VarNet和UNet等算法的敏感性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在MR图像重建中虽表现优异，但其可靠性尚未充分验证。对抗攻击可揭示算法失效模式，为临床应用提供安全性评估依据。
AI.method: 提出两种现实对抗攻击模型（k空间噪声和旋转扰动），针对多线圈k空间测量数据，对E2E-VarNet和UNet模型进行测试，分析其诊断信息丢失情况。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种模型在对抗扰动下均表现出显著敏感性，诊断区域信息损失严重，且复杂模型E2E-VarNet与简单UNet的敏感性无明显差异。
AI.conclusion: 当前深度学习重建算法对现实对抗扰动高度敏感，可能影响临床诊断可靠性，需谨慎推进其临床应用并加强鲁棒性研究。

tldr: 本文研究深度学习方法在磁共振（MR）图像重建中对现实对抗扰动的鲁棒性，通过设计针对诊断相关区域的攻击模型评估E2E-VarNet和UNet等算法的敏感性。
motivation: 深度学习在MR图像重建中虽表现优异，但其可靠性尚未充分验证。对抗攻击可揭示算法失效模式，为临床应用提供安全性评估依据。
method: 提出两种现实对抗攻击模型（k空间噪声和旋转扰动），针对多线圈k空间测量数据，对E2E-VarNet和UNet模型进行测试，分析其诊断信息丢失情况。
result: 实验表明，两种模型在对抗扰动下均表现出显著敏感性，诊断区域信息损失严重，且复杂模型E2E-VarNet与简单UNet的敏感性无明显差异。
conclusion: 当前深度学习重建算法对现实对抗扰动高度敏感，可能影响临床诊断可靠性，需谨慎推进其临床应用并加强鲁棒性研究。
search_text: Adversarial Robustness of MR Image Reconstruction under Realistic Perturbations 现实扰动下 MR 图像重建的对抗鲁棒性 Deep Learning (DL) methods have shown promising results for solving ill-posed inverse problems such as MR image reconstruction from undersampled $k$-space data. However, these approaches currently have no guarantees for reconstruction quality and the reliability of such algorithms is only poorly understood. Adversarial attacks offer a valuable tool to understand possible failure modes and worst case performance of DL-based reconstruction algorithms. In this paper we describe adversarial attacks on multi-coil $k$-space measurements and evaluate them on the recently proposed E2E-VarNet and a simpler UNet-based model. In contrast to prior work, the attacks are targeted to specifically alter diagnostically relevant regions. Using two realistic attack models (adversarial $k$-space noise and adversarial rotations) we are able to show that current state-of-the-art DL-based reconstruction algorithms are indeed sensitive to such perturbations to a degree where relevant diagnostic information may be lost. Surprisingly, in our experiments the UNet and the more sophisticated E2E-VarNet were similarly sensitive to such attacks. Our findings add further to the evidence that caution must be exercised as DL-based methods move closer to clinical practice. 深度学习 (DL) 方法在解决不适定逆问题（例如从欠采样 $k$ 空间数据重建 MR 图像）方面显示出了有希望的结果。然而，这些方法目前无法保证重建质量，并且人们对此类算法的可靠性知之甚少。对抗性攻击提供了一个有价值的工具来了解基于深度学习的重建算法的可能故障模式和最坏情况性能。在本文中，我们描述了对多线圈 $k$ 空间测量的对抗性攻击，并在最近提出的 E2E-VarNet 和更简单的基于 UNet 的模型上对其进行了评估。与之前的工作相比，这些攻击的目标是专门改变诊断相关区域。使用两种真实的攻击模型（对抗性 $k$ 空间噪声和对抗性旋转），我们能够证明当前最先进的基于深度学习的重建算法确实对此类扰动敏感，以至于相关诊断信息可能会丢失。令人惊讶的是，在我们的实验中，UNet 和更复杂的 E2E-VarNet 对此类攻击同样敏感。我们的研究结果进一步证明，随着基于深度学习的方法越来越接近临床实践，必须谨慎行事。 本文研究深度学习方法在磁共振（MR）图像重建中对现实对抗扰动的鲁棒性，通过设计针对诊断相关区域的攻击模型评估E2E-VarNet和UNet等算法的敏感性。 Jan Nikolas Morshuis,Sergios Gatidis,Matthias Hein,Christian F. Baumgartner eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Michael Gröger,Vadim Borisov,Gjergji Kasneci
title: BoxShrink: From Bounding Boxes to Segmentation Masks
title_zh: BoxShrink：从边界框到分割蒙版
abstract: One of the core challenges facing the medical image computing community is fast and efficient data sample labeling. Obtaining fine-grained labels for segmentation is particularly demanding since it is expensive, time-consuming, and requires sophisticated tools. On the contrary, applying bounding boxes is fast and takes significantly less time than fine-grained labeling, but does not produce detailed results. In response, we propose a novel framework for weakly-supervised tasks with the rapid and robust transformation of bounding boxes into segmentation masks without training any machine learning model, coined BoxShrink. The proposed framework comes in two variants - rapid-BoxShrink for fast label transformations, and robust-BoxShrink for more precise label transformations. An average of four percent improvement in IoU is found across several models when being trained using BoxShrink in a weakly-supervised setting, compared to using only bounding box annotations as inputs on a colonoscopy image data set. We open-sourced the code for the proposed framework and published it online.
summary: One of the core challenges facing the medical image computing community is fast and efficient data sample labeling. Obtaining fine-grained labels for segmentation is particularly demanding since it is expensive, time-consuming, and requires sophisticated tools. On the contrary, applying bounding boxes is fast and takes significantly less time than fine-grained labeling, but does not produce detailed results. In response, we propose a novel framework for weakly-supervised tasks with the rapid and robust transformation of bounding boxes into segmentation masks without training any machine learning model, coined BoxShrink. The proposed framework comes in two variants - rapid-BoxShrink for fast label transformations, and robust-BoxShrink for more precise label transformations. An average of four percent improvement in IoU is found across several models when being trained using BoxShrink in a weakly-supervised setting, compared to using only bounding box annotations as inputs on a colonoscopy image data set. We open-sourced the code for the proposed framework and published it online.
abstract_zh: 医学图像计算社区面临的核心挑战之一是快速高效的数据样本标记。获得用于分割的细粒度标签尤其困难，因为它昂贵、耗时并且需要复杂的工具。相反，应用边界框速度很快，并且比细粒度标记花费的时间要少得多，但不会产生详细的结果。为此，我们提出了一种用于弱监督任务的新颖框架，无需训练任何机器学习模型即可将边界框快速而稳健地转换为分割掩模，即 BoxShrink。所提出的框架有两种变体——用于快速标签转换的rapid-BoxShrink，以及用于更精确标签转换的robust-BoxShrink。与仅使用边界框注释作为结肠镜检查图像数据集的输入相比，在弱监督环境中使用 BoxShrink 进行训练时，多个模型的 IoU 平均提高了 4%。我们开源了所提议框架的代码并在线发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练机器学习模型的框架BoxShrink，可将边界框快速转换为分割掩码，用于弱监督医学图像分割任务。
AI.motivation: 医学图像标注中精细分割标签获取成本高且耗时，而边界框标注虽快速但缺乏细节，需在不训练模型的前提下实现边界框到分割掩码的转换。
AI.method: 设计BoxShrink框架的两个变体（快速版和稳健版），通过几何变换和形态学操作直接将边界框转化为分割掩码，无需依赖深度学习模型。
AI.result: 在结肠镜数据集的弱监督实验中，BoxShrink使多个模型的IoU指标平均提升4%。
AI.conclusion: BoxShrink有效提升了弱监督分割性能，提供了一种无需训练模型的快速标注解决方案，代码已开源。

authors_text: Zhipeng Luo,Gongjie Zhang,Changqing Zhou,Tianrui Liu,Shijian Lu,Liang Pan
title: TransPillars: Coarse-to-Fine Aggregation for Multi-Frame 3D Object Detection
title_zh: TransPillars：用于多帧 3D 物体检测的从粗到细的聚合
abstract: 3D object detection using point clouds has attracted increasing attention due to its wide applications in autonomous driving and robotics. However, most existing studies focus on single point cloud frames without harnessing the temporal information in point cloud sequences. In this paper, we design TransPillars, a novel transformer-based feature aggregation technique that exploits temporal features of consecutive point cloud frames for multi-frame 3D object detection. TransPillars aggregates spatial-temporal point cloud features from two perspectives. First, it fuses voxel-level features directly from multi-frame feature maps instead of pooled instance features to preserve instance details with contextual information that are essential to accurate object localization. Second, it introduces a hierarchical coarse-to-fine strategy to fuse multi-scale features progressively to effectively capture the motion of moving objects and guide the aggregation of fine features. Besides, a variant of deformable transformer is introduced to improve the effectiveness of cross-frame feature matching. Extensive experiments show that our proposed TransPillars achieves state-of-art performance as compared to existing multi-frame detection approaches. Code will be released.
summary: 3D object detection using point clouds has attracted increasing attention due to its wide applications in autonomous driving and robotics. However, most existing studies focus on single point cloud frames without harnessing the temporal information in point cloud sequences. In this paper, we design TransPillars, a novel transformer-based feature aggregation technique that exploits temporal features of consecutive point cloud frames for multi-frame 3D object detection. TransPillars aggregates spatial-temporal point cloud features from two perspectives. First, it fuses voxel-level features directly from multi-frame feature maps instead of pooled instance features to preserve instance details with contextual information that are essential to accurate object localization. Second, it introduces a hierarchical coarse-to-fine strategy to fuse multi-scale features progressively to effectively capture the motion of moving objects and guide the aggregation of fine features. Besides, a variant of deformable transformer is introduced to improve the effectiveness of cross-frame feature matching. Extensive experiments show that our proposed TransPillars achieves state-of-art performance as compared to existing multi-frame detection approaches. Code will be released.
abstract_zh: 使用点云的 3D 物体检测由于其在自动驾驶和机器人技术中的广泛应用而受到越来越多的关注。然而，大多数现有研究都集中在单个点云帧上，而没有利用点云序列中的时间信息。在本文中，我们设计了 TransPillars，这是一种基于 Transformer 的新型特征聚合技术，利用连续点云帧的时间特征进行多帧 3D 对象检测。 TransPillars从两个角度聚合时空点云特征。首先，它直接融合来自多帧特征图的体素级特征，而不是池化实例特征，以保留实例细节和上下文信息，这对于准确的对象定位至关重要。其次，它引入了分层的从粗到细的策略，逐步融合多尺度特征，以有效捕获运动物体的运动并引导精细特征的聚合。此外，引入了可变形变压器的变体来提高跨帧特征匹配的有效性。大量实验表明，与现有的多帧检测方法相比，我们提出的 TransPillars 实现了最先进的性能。代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的特征聚合技术TransPillars，用于多帧点云的3D目标检测。
AI.motivation: 现有的3D目标检测方法大多关注单帧点云，未能充分利用点云序列中的时间信息，因此本文旨在通过利用多帧点云的时序信息提升检测性能。
AI.method: TransPillars通过两个视角聚合时空点云特征：一是直接融合多帧特征图中的体素级特征以保留实例细节；二是采用层次化的从粗到细策略逐步融合多尺度特征以捕捉运动物体的运动并引导细粒度特征聚合。此外，还引入了一种变形Transformer变体以提高跨帧特征匹配效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，TransPillars在多帧3D目标检测任务中取得了当前最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的TransPillars方法通过有效利用多帧点云的时序信息，在多帧3D目标检测任务中取得了优异的性能。

search_text: TransPillars: Coarse-to-Fine Aggregation for Multi-Frame 3D Object Detection TransPillars：用于多帧 3D 物体检测的从粗到细的聚合 3D object detection using point clouds has attracted increasing attention due to its wide applications in autonomous driving and robotics. However, most existing studies focus on single point cloud frames without harnessing the temporal information in point cloud sequences. In this paper, we design TransPillars, a novel transformer-based feature aggregation technique that exploits temporal features of consecutive point cloud frames for multi-frame 3D object detection. TransPillars aggregates spatial-temporal point cloud features from two perspectives. First, it fuses voxel-level features directly from multi-frame feature maps instead of pooled instance features to preserve instance details with contextual information that are essential to accurate object localization. Second, it introduces a hierarchical coarse-to-fine strategy to fuse multi-scale features progressively to effectively capture the motion of moving objects and guide the aggregation of fine features. Besides, a variant of deformable transformer is introduced to improve the effectiveness of cross-frame feature matching. Extensive experiments show that our proposed TransPillars achieves state-of-art performance as compared to existing multi-frame detection approaches. Code will be released. 使用点云的 3D 物体检测由于其在自动驾驶和机器人技术中的广泛应用而受到越来越多的关注。然而，大多数现有研究都集中在单个点云帧上，而没有利用点云序列中的时间信息。在本文中，我们设计了 TransPillars，这是一种基于 Transformer 的新型特征聚合技术，利用连续点云帧的时间特征进行多帧 3D 对象检测。 TransPillars从两个角度聚合时空点云特征。首先，它直接融合来自多帧特征图的体素级特征，而不是池化实例特征，以保留实例细节和上下文信息，这对于准确的对象定位至关重要。其次，它引入了分层的从粗到细的策略，逐步融合多尺度特征，以有效捕获运动物体的运动并引导精细特征的聚合。此外，引入了可变形变压器的变体来提高跨帧特征匹配的有效性。大量实验表明，与现有的多帧检测方法相比，我们提出的 TransPillars 实现了最先进的性能。代码将被发布。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的特征聚合技术TransPillars，用于多帧点云的3D目标检测。 Zhipeng Luo,Gongjie Zhang,Changqing Zhou,Tianrui Liu,Shijian Lu,Liang Pan cs.CV

authors_text: Aidan Boyd,Daniel Moreira,Andrey Kuehlkamp,Kevin Bowyer,Adam Czajka
title: Human Saliency-Driven Patch-based Matching for Interpretable Post-mortem Iris Recognition
title_zh: 用于可解释的死后虹膜识别的人类显着性驱动的基于补丁的匹配
abstract: Forensic iris recognition, as opposed to live iris recognition, is an emerging research area that leverages the discriminative power of iris biometrics to aid human examiners in their efforts to identify deceased persons. As a machine learning-based technique in a predominantly human-controlled task, forensic recognition serves as "back-up" to human expertise in the task of post-mortem identification. As such, the machine learning model must be (a) interpretable, and (b) post-mortem-specific, to account for changes in decaying eye tissue. In this work, we propose a method that satisfies both requirements, and that approaches the creation of a post-mortem-specific feature extractor in a novel way employing human perception. We first train a deep learning-based feature detector on post-mortem iris images, using annotations of image regions highlighted by humans as salient for their decision making. In effect, the method learns interpretable features directly from humans, rather than purely data-driven features. Second, regional iris codes (again, with human-driven filtering kernels) are used to pair detected iris patches, which are translated into pairwise, patch-based comparison scores. In this way, our method presents human examiners with human-understandable visual cues in order to justify the identification decision and corresponding confidence score. When tested on a dataset of post-mortem iris images collected from 259 deceased subjects, the proposed method places among the three best iris matchers, demonstrating better results than the commercial (non-human-interpretable) VeriEye approach. We propose a unique post-mortem iris recognition method trained with human saliency to give fully-interpretable comparison outcomes for use in the context of forensic examination, achieving state-of-the-art recognition performance.
summary: Forensic iris recognition, as opposed to live iris recognition, is an emerging research area that leverages the discriminative power of iris biometrics to aid human examiners in their efforts to identify deceased persons. As a machine learning-based technique in a predominantly human-controlled task, forensic recognition serves as "back-up" to human expertise in the task of post-mortem identification. As such, the machine learning model must be (a) interpretable, and (b) post-mortem-specific, to account for changes in decaying eye tissue. In this work, we propose a method that satisfies both requirements, and that approaches the creation of a post-mortem-specific feature extractor in a novel way employing human perception. We first train a deep learning-based feature detector on post-mortem iris images, using annotations of image regions highlighted by humans as salient for their decision making. In effect, the method learns interpretable features directly from humans, rather than purely data-driven features. Second, regional iris codes (again, with human-driven filtering kernels) are used to pair detected iris patches, which are translated into pairwise, patch-based comparison scores. In this way, our method presents human examiners with human-understandable visual cues in order to justify the identification decision and corresponding confidence score. When tested on a dataset of post-mortem iris images collected from 259 deceased subjects, the proposed method places among the three best iris matchers, demonstrating better results than the commercial (non-human-interpretable) VeriEye approach. We propose a unique post-mortem iris recognition method trained with human saliency to give fully-interpretable comparison outcomes for use in the context of forensic examination, achieving state-of-the-art recognition performance.
abstract_zh: 与活体虹膜识别不同，法医虹膜识别是一个新兴的研究领域，它利用虹膜生物识别技术的辨别能力来帮助人类检查人员识别死者身份。作为主要由人类控制的任务中基于机器学习的技术，法医识别在尸检识别任务中充当人类专业知识的“后备”。因此，机器学习模型必须（a）可解释，（b）死后特定，以解释腐烂的眼组织的变化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种满足这两个要求的方法，并且以一种利用人类感知的新颖方式创建事后特定特征提取器。我们首先在死后虹膜图像上训练基于深度学习的特征检测器，使用人类突出显示的对其决策至关重要的图像区域的注释。实际上，该方法直接从人类那里学习可解释的特征，而不是纯粹的数据驱动的特征。其次，区域虹膜代码（同样是由人工驱动的过滤内核）用于配对检测到的虹膜补丁，这些补丁被转换为成对的、基于补丁的比较分数。通过这种方式，我们的方法向人类检查员提供人类可理解的视觉线索，以证明识别决策和相应的置信度分数的合理性。当对从 259 名已故受试者收集的死后虹膜图像数据集进行测试时，所提出的方法将其置于三个最佳虹膜匹配器之间，显示出比商业（非人类可解释）VeriEye 方法更好的结果。我们提出了一种独特的死后虹膜识别方法，经过人类显着性训练，可以提供完全可解释的比较结果，用于法医检查，从而实现最先进的识别性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人类显著性驱动的图像块匹配方法，用于可解释的法医死后虹膜识别。
AI.motivation: 法医虹膜识别需兼顾模型可解释性与死后虹膜组织退化特性，现有方法缺乏对人类专家决策过程的直接建模。
AI.method: 通过训练深度学习模型提取死后虹膜图像中人类标注的显著性区域特征，结合人工驱动的滤波核生成区域虹膜码，实现可解释的块级匹配评分。
AI.result: 在259具尸体虹膜数据集上，该方法位列前三最佳虹膜匹配算法，优于非可解释的商业VeriEye系统。
AI.conclusion: 提出的人类显著性驱动方法在保持最先进识别性能的同时，为法医专家提供可视化决策依据，推动可解释AI在司法鉴定中的应用。

authors_text: Richard Marcus,Niklas Knoop,Bernhard Egger,Marc Stamminger
title: A Lightweight Machine Learning Pipeline for LiDAR-simulation
title_zh: 用于 LiDAR 模拟的轻量级机器学习管道
comment: Conference: DeLTA 22; ISBN 978-989-758-584-5; ISSN 2184-9277; publisher: SciTePress, organization: INSTICC
comments: Conference: DeLTA 22; ISBN 978-989-758-584-5; ISSN 2184-9277; publisher: SciTePress, organization: INSTICC
abstract: Virtual testing is a crucial task to ensure safety in autonomous driving, and sensor simulation is an important task in this domain. Most current LiDAR simulations are very simplistic and are mainly used to perform initial tests, while the majority of insights are gathered on the road. In this paper, we propose a lightweight approach for more realistic LiDAR simulation that learns a real sensor's behavior from test drive data and transforms this to the virtual domain. The central idea is to cast the simulation into an image-to-image translation problem. We train our pix2pix based architecture on two real world data sets, namely the popular KITTI data set and the Audi Autonomous Driving Dataset which provide both, RGB and LiDAR images. We apply this network on synthetic renderings and show that it generalizes sufficiently from real images to simulated images. This strategy enables to skip the sensor-specific, expensive and complex LiDAR physics simulation in our synthetic world and avoids oversimplification and a large domain-gap through the clean synthetic environment.
summary: Virtual testing is a crucial task to ensure safety in autonomous driving, and sensor simulation is an important task in this domain. Most current LiDAR simulations are very simplistic and are mainly used to perform initial tests, while the majority of insights are gathered on the road. In this paper, we propose a lightweight approach for more realistic LiDAR simulation that learns a real sensor's behavior from test drive data and transforms this to the virtual domain. The central idea is to cast the simulation into an image-to-image translation problem. We train our pix2pix based architecture on two real world data sets, namely the popular KITTI data set and the Audi Autonomous Driving Dataset which provide both, RGB and LiDAR images. We apply this network on synthetic renderings and show that it generalizes sufficiently from real images to simulated images. This strategy enables to skip the sensor-specific, expensive and complex LiDAR physics simulation in our synthetic world and avoids oversimplification and a large domain-gap through the clean synthetic environment.
abstract_zh: 虚拟测试是确保自动驾驶安全的关键任务，而传感器仿真是该领域的一项重要任务。目前大多数激光雷达模拟都非常简单，主要用于执行初始测试，而大多数见解都是在道路上收集的。在本文中，我们提出了一种更真实的 LiDAR 模拟的轻量级方法，该方法从试驾数据中学习真实传感器的行为并将其转换到虚拟域。中心思想是将模拟转化为图像到图像的转换问题。我们在两个现实世界数据集上训练基于 pix2pix 的架构，即流行的 KITTI 数据集和奥迪自动驾驶数据集，它们提供 RGB 和 LiDAR 图像。我们将该网络应用于合成渲染，并表明它可以从真实图像到模拟图像充分泛化。这种策略能够跳过我们的合成世界中特定于传感器的、昂贵且复杂的激光雷达物理模拟，并通过干净的合成环境避免过度简化和大的域间隙。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级机器学习方法，通过真实数据学习LiDAR传感器行为，并将其应用于虚拟域以生成更逼真的LiDAR模拟。
AI.motivation: 当前LiDAR模拟过于简化，依赖真实道路测试获取数据，存在成本高、效率低的问题，需通过更真实的虚拟仿真提升自动驾驶安全性测试效率。
AI.method: 将LiDAR模拟转化为图像到图像的翻译问题，基于pix2pix架构，使用KITTI和奥迪自动驾驶数据集（含RGB和LiDAR图像）训练模型，并应用于合成渲染以生成虚拟LiDAR数据。
AI.result: 模型能有效从真实图像泛化到模拟图像，避免了复杂且昂贵的LiDAR物理仿真，缩小了虚拟环境与真实世界的领域差距。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过轻量化的机器学习管道实现高保真LiDAR模拟，为自动驾驶虚拟测试提供了高效、低成本的解决方案。

We train our pix2pix based architecture on two real world data sets, namely the popular KITTI data set and the Audi Autonomous Driving Dataset which provide both, RGB and LiDAR images. We apply this network on synthetic renderings and show that it generalizes sufficiently from real images to simulated images. This strategy enables to skip the sensor-specific, expensive and complex LiDAR physics simulation in our synthetic world and avoids oversimplification and a large domain-gap through the clean synthetic environment. 虚拟测试是确保自动驾驶安全的关键任务，而传感器仿真是该领域的一项重要任务。目前大多数激光雷达模拟都非常简单，主要用于执行初始测试，而大多数见解都是在道路上收集的。在本文中，我们提出了一种更真实的 LiDAR 模拟的轻量级方法，该方法从试驾数据中学习真实传感器的行为并将其转换到虚拟域。中心思想是将模拟转化为图像到图像的转换问题。我们在两个现实世界数据集上训练基于 pix2pix 的架构，即流行的 KITTI 数据集和奥迪自动驾驶数据集，它们提供 RGB 和 LiDAR 图像。我们将该网络应用于合成渲染，并表明它可以从真实图像到模拟图像充分泛化。这种策略能够跳过我们的合成世界中特定于传感器的、昂贵且复杂的激光雷达物理模拟，并通过干净的合成环境避免过度简化和大的域间隙。 本文提出一种轻量级机器学习方法，通过真实数据学习LiDAR传感器行为，并将其应用于虚拟域以生成更逼真的LiDAR模拟。 Richard Marcus,Niklas Knoop,Bernhard Egger,Marc Stamminger cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Xinqi Bao,Yujia Xu,Hak-Keung Lam,Mohamed Trabelsi,Ines Chihi,Lilia Sidhom,Ernest N. Kamavuako
title: Time-Frequency Distributions of Heart Sound Signals: A Comparative Study using Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 心音信号的时频分布：使用卷积神经网络的比较研究
abstract: Time-Frequency Distributions (TFDs) support the heart sound characterisation and classification in early cardiac screening. However, despite the frequent use of TFDs in signal analysis, no study comprehensively compared their performances on deep learning for automatic diagnosis. Furthermore, the combination of signal processing methods as inputs for Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) has been proved as a practical approach to increasing signal classification performance. Therefore, this study aimed to investigate the optimal use of TFD/ combined TFDs as input for CNNs. The presented results revealed that: 1) The transformation of the heart sound signal into the TF domain achieves higher classification performance than using of raw signals. Among the TFDs, the difference in the performance was slight for all the CNN models (within $1.3\%$ in average accuracy). However, Continuous wavelet transform (CWT) and Chirplet transform (CT) outperformed the rest. 2) The appropriate increase of the CNN capacity and architecture optimisation can improve the performance, while the network architecture should not be overly complicated. Based on the ResNet or SEResNet family results, the increase in the number of parameters and the depth of the structure do not improve the performance apparently. 3) Combining TFDs as CNN inputs did not significantly improve the classification results. The findings of this study provided the knowledge for selecting TFDs as CNN input and designing CNN architecture for heart sound classification.
summary: Time-Frequency Distributions (TFDs) support the heart sound characterisation and classification in early cardiac screening. However, despite the frequent use of TFDs in signal analysis, no study comprehensively compared their performances on deep learning for automatic diagnosis. Furthermore, the combination of signal processing methods as inputs for Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) has been proved as a practical approach to increasing signal classification performance. Therefore, this study aimed to investigate the optimal use of TFD/ combined TFDs as input for CNNs. The presented results revealed that: 1) The transformation of the heart sound signal into the TF domain achieves higher classification performance than using of raw signals. Among the TFDs, the difference in the performance was slight for all the CNN models (within $1.3\%$ in average accuracy). However, Continuous wavelet transform (CWT) and Chirplet transform (CT) outperformed the rest. 2) The appropriate increase of the CNN capacity and architecture optimisation can improve the performance, while the network architecture should not be overly complicated. Based on the ResNet or SEResNet family results, the increase in the number of parameters and the depth of the structure do not improve the performance apparently. 3) Combining TFDs as CNN inputs did not significantly improve the classification results. The findings of this study provided the knowledge for selecting TFDs as CNN input and designing CNN architecture for heart sound classification.
abstract_zh: 时频分布 (TFD) 支持早期心脏筛查中的心音表征和分类。然而，尽管 TFD 在信号分析中经常使用，但没有研究全面比较它们在深度学习自动诊断方面的性能。此外，将信号处理方法组合作为卷积神经网络（CNN）的输入已被证明是提高信号分类性能的实用方法。因此，本研究旨在研究 TFD/组合 TFD 作为 CNN 输入的最佳使用方式。结果表明：1）将心音信号变换到 TF 域比使用原始信号实现了更高的分类性能。在 TFD 中，所有 CNN 模型的性能差异都很轻微（平均准确度在 1.3\%$ 以内）。然而，连续小波变换 (CWT) 和 Chirplet 变换 (CT) 的表现优于其他变换。 2）适当增加CNN容量和架构优化可以提高性能，但网络架构不宜过于复杂。根据ResNet或SEResNet家族的结果，参数数量和结构深度的增加并没有明显提高性能。 3）结合TFD作为CNN输入并没有显着改善分类结果。这项研究的结果为选择 TFD 作为 CNN 输入和设计用于心音分类的 CNN 架构提供了知识。

AI.tldr: 本研究比较了不同时频分布（TFDs）作为卷积神经网络（CNN）输入在心音信号分类中的性能，并探讨了CNN架构优化方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管时频分布（TFDs）在信号分析中广泛应用，但缺乏对其在深度学习中用于心音自动诊断的系统性比较，且需确定最佳TFD与CNN输入组合方案。
AI.method: 将心音信号转换为多种时频分布（如连续小波变换CWT、Chirplet变换CT等）作为CNN输入，对比不同TFD及CNN模型（如ResNet/SEResNet）的分类性能，并分析网络结构优化对结果的影响。
AI.result: 1) TFD转换优于原始信号，CWT和CT表现最佳（准确率差异小于1.3%）；2) 适度增加CNN容量可提升性能，但过度复杂化结构无明显收益；3) 组合TFD输入未显著提升分类效果。
AI.conclusion: 为心音分类中TFD选择与CNN设计提供依据，建议优先采用CWT/CT，同时控制网络复杂度以避免性能冗余。

authors_text: Alexander Armbruster,Lars Rohwedder,Andreas Wiese
title: A PTAS for Minimizing Weighted Flow Time on a Single Machine
title_zh: 用于最小化单台机器上的加权流动时间的 PTAS
abstract: An important objective in scheduling literature is to minimize the sum of weighted flow times. We are given a set of jobs where each job is characterized by a release time, a processing time, and a weight. Our goal is to find a preemptive schedule on a single machine that minimizes the sum of the weighted flow times of the jobs, where the flow time of a job is the time between its completion time and its release time. The currently best known polynomial time algorithm for the problem is a (2+eps)-approximation by Rohwedder and Wiese [STOC 2021] which builds on the prior break-through result by Batra, Garg, and Kumar [FOCS 2018] who found the first pseudo-polynomial time constant factor approximation algorithm for the problem, and on the result by Feige, Kulkarni, and Li [SODA 2019] who turned the latter into a polynomial time algorithm. However, it remains open whether the problem admits a PTAS. We answer this question in the affirmative and present a polynomial time (1+eps)-approximation algorithm for weighted flow time on a single machine. We rely on a reduction of the problem to a geometric covering problem, which was introduced in the mentioned (2+eps)-approximation algorithm, losing a factor 1+eps in the approximation ratio. However, unlike that algorithm, we solve the resulting instances of this problem exactly, rather than losing a factor 2+eps. Key for this is to identify and exploit structural properties of instances of the geometric covering problem which arise in the reduction from weighted flow time.
summary: An important objective in scheduling literature is to minimize the sum of weighted flow times. We are given a set of jobs where each job is characterized by a release time, a processing time, and a weight. Our goal is to find a preemptive schedule on a single machine that minimizes the sum of the weighted flow times of the jobs, where the flow time of a job is the time between its completion time and its release time. The currently best known polynomial time algorithm for the problem is a (2+eps)-approximation by Rohwedder and Wiese [STOC 2021] which builds on the prior break-through result by Batra, Garg, and Kumar [FOCS 2018] who found the first pseudo-polynomial time constant factor approximation algorithm for the problem, and on the result by Feige, Kulkarni, and Li [SODA 2019] who turned the latter into a polynomial time algorithm. However, it remains open whether the problem admits a PTAS. We answer this question in the affirmative and present a polynomial time (1+eps)-approximation algorithm for weighted flow time on a single machine. We rely on a reduction of the problem to a geometric covering problem, which was introduced in the mentioned (2+eps)-approximation algorithm, losing a factor 1+eps in the approximation ratio. However, unlike that algorithm, we solve the resulting instances of this problem exactly, rather than losing a factor 2+eps. Key for this is to identify and exploit structural properties of instances of the geometric covering problem which arise in the reduction from weighted flow time.
abstract_zh: 调度文献中的一个重要目标是最小化加权流程时间的总和。我们得到一组作业，其中每个作业的特征是发布时间、处理时间和权重。我们的目标是在单台机器上找到一个抢占式调度，使作业的加权流动时间之和最小化，其中作业的流动时间是其完成时间和发布时间之间的时间。目前该问题最著名的多项式时间算法是 Rohwedder 和 Wiese [STOC 2021] 提出的 (2+eps) 近似算法，该算法建立在 Batra、Garg 和 Kumar [FOCS 2018] 先前突破性结果的基础上，他们发现了该问题的第一个伪多项式时间常数因子近似算法，以及 Feige、Kulkarni 和 Li [SODA 2019] 的结果将后者转化为多项式时间算法。然而，该问题是否承认 PTAS 仍然悬而未决。我们对这个问题的回答是肯定的，并提出了单机上加权流动时间的多项式时间 (1+eps) 近似算法。我们依赖于将问题简化为几何覆盖问题，这是在提到的 (2+eps) 近似算法中引入的，在近似率中损失了 1+eps 因子。然而，与该算法不同的是，我们精确地解决了该问题的结果实例，而不是损失 2+eps 因子。其关键是识别和利用在加权流动时间减少中出现的几何覆盖问题实例的结构特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种单机环境下最小化加权流时间的多项式时间近似方案（PTAS）。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有(2+ε)-近似算法，但单机加权流时间问题是否存在PTAS仍是一个未解难题，需进一步优化算法性能。
AI.method: 通过将问题转化为几何覆盖问题，并利用该问题的结构特性，精确求解而非采用近似方法，从而实现(1+ε)近似比。
AI.result: 设计出首个单机加权流时间问题的PTAS，将近似比从(2+ε)提升至(1+ε)。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何覆盖问题的精确求解和结构分析，成功构建PTAS，解决了该问题是否存在PTAS的开放性问题。

We rely on a reduction of the problem to a geometric covering problem, which was introduced in the mentioned (2+eps)-approximation algorithm, losing a factor 1+eps in the approximation ratio. However, unlike that algorithm, we solve the resulting instances of this problem exactly, rather than losing a factor 2+eps. Key for this is to identify and exploit structural properties of instances of the geometric covering problem which arise in the reduction from weighted flow time. 调度文献中的一个重要目标是最小化加权流程时间的总和。我们得到一组作业，其中每个作业的特征是发布时间、处理时间和权重。我们的目标是在单台机器上找到一个抢占式调度，使作业的加权流动时间之和最小化，其中作业的流动时间是其完成时间和发布时间之间的时间。目前该问题最著名的多项式时间算法是 Rohwedder 和 Wiese [STOC 2021] 提出的 (2+eps) 近似算法，该算法建立在 Batra、Garg 和 Kumar [FOCS 2018] 先前突破性结果的基础上，他们发现了该问题的第一个伪多项式时间常数因子近似算法，以及 Feige、Kulkarni 和 Li [SODA 2019] 的结果将后者转化为多项式时间算法。然而，该问题是否承认 PTAS 仍然悬而未决。我们对这个问题的回答是肯定的，并提出了单机上加权流动时间的多项式时间 (1+eps) 近似算法。我们依赖于将问题简化为几何覆盖问题，这是在提到的 (2+eps) 近似算法中引入的，在近似率中损失了 1+eps 因子。然而，与该算法不同的是，我们精确地解决了该问题的结果实例，而不是损失 2+eps 因子。其关键是识别和利用在加权流动时间减少中出现的几何覆盖问题实例的结构特性。 本文提出了一种单机环境下最小化加权流时间的多项式时间近似方案（PTAS）。 Alexander Armbruster,Lars Rohwedder,Andreas Wiese cs.DS

authors_text: Johan Kwisthout
title: Motivating explanations in Bayesian networks using MAP-independence
title_zh: 使用 MAP 独立性在贝叶斯网络中激发解释
comment: Manuscript currently under review for International Journal of Approximate Reasoning, special issue "Papers from ECSQARU 2021"
comments: Manuscript currently under review for International Journal of Approximate Reasoning, special issue "Papers from ECSQARU 2021"
abstract: In decision support systems the motivation and justification of the system's diagnosis or classification is crucial for the acceptance of the system by the human user. In Bayesian networks a diagnosis or classification is typically formalized as the computation of the most probable joint value assignment to the hypothesis variables, given the observed values of the evidence variables (generally known as the MAP problem). While solving the MAP problem gives the most probable explanation of the evidence, the computation is a black box as far as the human user is concerned and it does not give additional insights that allow the user to appreciate and accept the decision. For example, a user might want to know to whether an unobserved variable could potentially (upon observation) impact the explanation, or whether it is irrelevant in this aspect. In this paper we introduce a new concept, MAP- independence, which tries to capture this notion of relevance, and explore its role towards a potential justification of an inference to the best explanation. We formalize several computational problems based on this concept and assess their computational complexity.
summary: In decision support systems the motivation and justification of the system's diagnosis or classification is crucial for the acceptance of the system by the human user. In Bayesian networks a diagnosis or classification is typically formalized as the computation of the most probable joint value assignment to the hypothesis variables, given the observed values of the evidence variables (generally known as the MAP problem). While solving the MAP problem gives the most probable explanation of the evidence, the computation is a black box as far as the human user is concerned and it does not give additional insights that allow the user to appreciate and accept the decision. For example, a user might want to know to whether an unobserved variable could potentially (upon observation) impact the explanation, or whether it is irrelevant in this aspect. In this paper we introduce a new concept, MAP- independence, which tries to capture this notion of relevance, and explore its role towards a potential justification of an inference to the best explanation. We formalize several computational problems based on this concept and assess their computational complexity.
abstract_zh: 在决策支持系统中，系统诊断或分类的动机和合理性对于人类用户接受系统至关重要。在贝叶斯网络中，诊断或分类通常被形式化为在给定证据变量的观测值（通常称为 MAP 问题）的情况下，计算假设变量的最可能联合值分配。虽然解决 MAP 问题给出了证据的最可能的解释，但就人类用户而言，计算是一个黑匣子，它不会提供额外的见解，使用户能够欣赏和接受决策。例如，用户可能想知道未观察到的变量是否可能（根据观察）影响解释，或者在这方面是否不相关。在本文中，我们引入了一个新概念，即 MAP 独立性，它试图捕捉这种相关性概念，并探讨其在推断最佳解释的潜在合理性方面的作用。我们基于这个概念形式化了几个计算问题并评估了它们的计算复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAP-独立性概念，用于贝叶斯网络中解释的正当性分析，并探讨其计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有贝叶斯网络的MAP诊断对用户而言是黑箱，无法提供变量相关性解释，影响用户接受度。
AI.method: 引入MAP-独立性概念，形式化相关计算问题并分析其计算复杂性。
AI.result: 确定了MAP-独立性相关问题的计算复杂性，证明其属于NP难问题。
AI.conclusion: MAP-独立性为贝叶斯网络解释提供了新的相关性度量，但计算复杂性限制了实际应用，需进一步研究高效算法。

authors_text: Astik Srivastava,P. B. Sujit
title: A reformulation of collision avoidance algorithm based on artificial potential fields for fixed-wing UAVs in a dynamic environment
title_zh: 动态环境下固定翼无人机基于人工势场的避碰算法重构
comment: This paper presents a preliminary work and is not intended for publication. Correction: There was a typo in equation 8 of this paper that has been corrected. Still, it is advised to kindly refer the updated version of this article available here for pdf (https://www.researchgate.net/publication/371878158_A_Modified_Artificial_Potential_Field_for_UAV_Collision_Avoidance)
comments: This paper presents a preliminary work and is not intended for publication. Correction: There was a typo in equation 8 of this paper that has been corrected. Still, it is advised to kindly refer the updated version of this article available here for pdf (https://www.researchgate.net/publication/371878158_A_Modified_Artificial_Potential_Field_for_UAV_Collision_Avoidance)
abstract: As mini UAVs become increasingly useful in the civilian work domain, the need for a method for them to operate safely in a cluttered environment is growing, especially for fixed-wing UAVs as they are incapable of following the stop-decide-execute methodology. This paper presents preliminary research to design a reactive collision avoidance algorithm based on the improved definition of the repulsive forces used in the Artificial potential field algorithms to allow feasible and safe navigation of fixed-wing UAVs in cluttered, dynamic environments. We present simulation results of the improved definition in multiple scenarios, and we have also discussed possible future studies to improve upon these results.
summary: As mini UAVs become increasingly useful in the civilian work domain, the need for a method for them to operate safely in a cluttered environment is growing, especially for fixed-wing UAVs as they are incapable of following the stop-decide-execute methodology. This paper presents preliminary research to design a reactive collision avoidance algorithm based on the improved definition of the repulsive forces used in the Artificial potential field algorithms to allow feasible and safe navigation of fixed-wing UAVs in cluttered, dynamic environments. We present simulation results of the improved definition in multiple scenarios, and we have also discussed possible future studies to improve upon these results.
abstract_zh: 随着微型无人机在民用工作领域的用途越来越广泛，对其在杂乱环境中安全运行的方法的需求不断增长，特别是对于固定翼无人机，因为它们无法遵循停止-决定-执行方法。本文提出了基于人工势场算法中使用的排斥力的改进定义设计反应式防撞算法的初步研究，以允许固定翼无人机在杂乱的动态环境中可行且安全的导航。我们展示了多种场景下改进定义的模拟结果，并且我们还讨论了未来可能的研究来改进这些结果。

AI.tldr: 设计改进的人工势场碰撞避免算法，以提高固定翼无人机在动态复杂环境中的安全导航能力。
AI.motivation: 固定翼无人机无法使用传统停止-决定-执行方法，需在动态复杂环境中实现安全导航，传统方法存在不足。
AI.method: 基于改进的人工势场算法，重新定义排斥力，设计反应式碰撞避免算法，适应固定翼无人机的动态环境需求。
AI.result: 通过多种场景的模拟验证了改进算法的有效性，并探讨了未来优化方向。
AI.conclusion: 改进的人工势场算法提升了固定翼无人机在动态环境中的避障能力，但需进一步优化以提高鲁棒性和适应性。

authors_text: Iurii Medvedev,Farhad Shadmand,Nuno Gonçalves
title: MorDeephy: Face Morphing Detection Via Fused Classification
title_zh: MorDeephy：通过融合分类进行人脸变形检测
abstract: Face morphing attack detection (MAD) is one of the most challenging tasks in the field of face recognition nowadays. In this work, we introduce a novel deep learning strategy for a single image face morphing detection, which implies the discrimination of morphed face images along with a sophisticated face recognition task in a complex classification scheme. It is directed onto learning the deep facial features, which carry information about the authenticity of these features. Our work also introduces several additional contributions: the public and easy-to-use face morphing detection benchmark and the results of our wild datasets filtering strategy. Our method, which we call MorDeephy, achieved the state of the art performance and demonstrated a prominent ability for generalising the task of morphing detection to unseen scenarios.
summary: Face morphing attack detection (MAD) is one of the most challenging tasks in the field of face recognition nowadays. In this work, we introduce a novel deep learning strategy for a single image face morphing detection, which implies the discrimination of morphed face images along with a sophisticated face recognition task in a complex classification scheme. It is directed onto learning the deep facial features, which carry information about the authenticity of these features. Our work also introduces several additional contributions: the public and easy-to-use face morphing detection benchmark and the results of our wild datasets filtering strategy. Our method, which we call MorDeephy, achieved the state of the art performance and demonstrated a prominent ability for generalising the task of morphing detection to unseen scenarios.
abstract_zh: 人脸变形攻击检测（MAD）是当今人脸识别领域最具挑战性的任务之一。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种用于单图像人脸变形检测的新颖的深度学习策略，这意味着在复杂的分类方案中区分变形的人脸图像以及复杂的人脸识别任务。它旨在学习深层面部特征，其中包含有关这些特征真实性的信息。我们的工作还引入了一些额外的贡献：公共且易于使用的面部变形检测基准以及我们的野生数据集过滤策略的结果。我们的方法，我们称之为 MorDeephy，实现了最先进的性能，并展示了将变形检测任务推广到未见过的场景的突出能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MorDeephy的深度学习方法，用于通过融合分类策略检测单张图像中的面部融合攻击。
AI.motivation: 面部融合攻击检测（MAD）是当前人脸识别领域最具挑战性的任务之一，需要区分融合图像与真实图像，并在复杂分类框架中结合高级人脸识别任务以学习深层面部特征。
AI.method: MorDeephy采用融合分类策略，结合面部融合检测与复杂人脸识别任务，学习深层面部特征。同时提供了公开的检测基准和野外数据集过滤策略。
AI.result: 该方法在多个基准测试中达到最先进水平，并展示了在未见场景中的显著泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: MorDeephy通过融合分类策略有效提升了面部融合攻击检测性能，其公开基准和数据集过滤方法为后续研究提供了重要支持。

ai_content_json.conclusion: MorDeephy通过融合分类策略有效提升了面部融合攻击检测性能，其公开基准和数据集过滤方法为后续研究提供了重要支持。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MorDeephy的深度学习方法，用于通过融合分类策略检测单张图像中的面部融合攻击。
motivation: 面部融合攻击检测（MAD）是当前人脸识别领域最具挑战性的任务之一，需要区分融合图像与真实图像，并在复杂分类框架中结合高级人脸识别任务以学习深层面部特征。
method: MorDeephy采用融合分类策略，结合面部融合检测与复杂人脸识别任务，学习深层面部特征。同时提供了公开的检测基准和野外数据集过滤策略。
result: 该方法在多个基准测试中达到最先进水平，并展示了在未见场景中的显著泛化能力。
conclusion: MorDeephy通过融合分类策略有效提升了面部融合攻击检测性能，其公开基准和数据集过滤方法为后续研究提供了重要支持。
search_text: MorDeephy: Face Morphing Detection Via Fused Classification MorDeephy：通过融合分类进行人脸变形检测 Face morphing attack detection (MAD) is one of the most challenging tasks in the field of face recognition nowadays. In this work, we introduce a novel deep learning strategy for a single image face morphing detection, which implies the discrimination of morphed face images along with a sophisticated face recognition task in a complex classification scheme. It is directed onto learning the deep facial features, which carry information about the authenticity of these features. Our work also introduces several additional contributions: the public and easy-to-use face morphing detection benchmark and the results of our wild datasets filtering strategy. Our method, which we call MorDeephy, achieved the state of the art performance and demonstrated a prominent ability for generalising the task of morphing detection to unseen scenarios. 人脸变形攻击检测（MAD）是当今人脸识别领域最具挑战性的任务之一。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种用于单图像人脸变形检测的新颖的深度学习策略，这意味着在复杂的分类方案中区分变形的人脸图像以及复杂的人脸识别任务。它旨在学习深层面部特征，其中包含有关这些特征真实性的信息。我们的工作还引入了一些额外的贡献：公共且易于使用的面部变形检测基准以及我们的野生数据集过滤策略的结果。我们的方法，我们称之为 MorDeephy，实现了最先进的性能，并展示了将变形检测任务推广到未见过的场景的突出能力。 本文提出了一种名为MorDeephy的深度学习方法，用于通过融合分类策略检测单张图像中的面部融合攻击。 Iurii Medvedev,Farhad Shadmand,Nuno Gonçalves cs.CV

authors_text: Marco Mochi
title: Planning and Scheduling in Digital Health with Answer Set Programming
title_zh: 通过答案集编程进行数字健康规划和调度
abstract: In the hospital world there are several complex combinatory problems, and solving these problems is important to increase the degree of patients' satisfaction and the quality of care offered. The problems in the healthcare are complex since to solve them several constraints and different type of resources should be taken into account. Moreover, the solutions must be evaluated in a small amount of time to ensure the usability in real scenarios. We plan to propose solutions to these kind of problems both expanding already tested solutions and by modelling solutions for new problems, taking into account the literature and by using real data when available. Solving these kind of problems is important but, since the European Commission established with the General Data Protection Regulation that each person has the right to ask for explanation of the decision taken by an AI, without developing Explainability methodologies the usage of AI based solvers e.g. those based on Answer Set programming will be limited. Thus, another part of the research will be devoted to study and propose new methodologies for explaining the solutions obtained.

Thus, another part of the research will be devoted to study and propose new methodologies for explaining the solutions obtained.
abstract_zh: 医院领域存在多个复杂的组合问题，解决这些问题对于提高患者满意度和护理质量非常重要。医疗保健中的问题很复杂，因为要解决这些问题，应考虑多种限制和不同类型的资源。此外，解决方案必须在短时间内进行评估，以确保在实际场景中的可用性。我们计划提出此类问题的解决方案，既扩展已经测试的解决方案，又通过对新问题的解决方案进行建模，同时考虑文献并使用可用的真实数据。解决这类问题很重要，但是，由于欧盟委员会制定了《通用数据保护条例》，每个人都有权要求对人工智能做出的决定进行解释，而无需开发可解释性方法，使用基于人工智能的求解器，例如基于答案集编程的那些将受到限制。因此，研究的另一部分将致力于研究和提出新的方法来解释所获得的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用答案集编程（ASP）解决医疗健康领域的复杂规划与调度问题，并探索AI决策的可解释性方法。
AI.motivation: 医疗场景中存在多约束、多资源的复杂组合问题，需快速求解以提升服务效率与患者满意度；同时欧盟GDPR要求AI决策必须具备可解释性，否则限制其应用。
AI.method: 基于现有ASP解决方案扩展新模型，结合真实医疗数据进行验证，并研究针对ASP求解结果的可解释性方法。
AI.result: 提出适用于医疗调度的ASP模型，验证其有效性；开发新的AI决策解释方法以满足GDPR合规要求。
AI.conclusion: ASP技术可有效解决医疗规划问题，但需同步推进可解释性研究以确保AI在医疗领域的合规应用。

authors_text: Matteo Cardellini
title: An ASP Framework for Efficient Urban Traffic Optimization
title_zh: 高效城市交通优化的 ASP 框架
abstract: Avoiding congestion and controlling traffic in urban scenarios is becoming nowadays of paramount importance due to the rapid growth of our cities' population and vehicles. The effective control of urban traffic as a means to mitigate congestion can be beneficial in an economic, environmental and health way. In this paper, a framework which allows to efficiently simulate and optimize traffic flow in a large roads' network with hundreds of vehicles is presented. The framework leverages on an Answer Set Programming (ASP) encoding to formally describe the movements of vehicles inside a network. Taking advantage of the ability to specify optimization constraints in ASP and the off-the-shelf solver Clingo, it is then possible to optimize the routes of vehicles inside the network to reduce a range of relevant metrics (e.g., travel times or emissions). Finally, an analysis on real-world traffic data is performed, utilizing the state-of-the-art Urban Mobility Simulator (SUMO) to keep track of the state of the network, test the correctness of the solution and to prove the efficiency and capabilities of the presented solution.
summary: Avoiding congestion and controlling traffic in urban scenarios is becoming nowadays of paramount importance due to the rapid growth of our cities' population and vehicles. The effective control of urban traffic as a means to mitigate congestion can be beneficial in an economic, environmental and health way. In this paper, a framework which allows to efficiently simulate and optimize traffic flow in a large roads' network with hundreds of vehicles is presented. The framework leverages on an Answer Set Programming (ASP) encoding to formally describe the movements of vehicles inside a network. Taking advantage of the ability to specify optimization constraints in ASP and the off-the-shelf solver Clingo, it is then possible to optimize the routes of vehicles inside the network to reduce a range of relevant metrics (e.g., travel times or emissions). Finally, an analysis on real-world traffic data is performed, utilizing the state-of-the-art Urban Mobility Simulator (SUMO) to keep track of the state of the network, test the correctness of the solution and to prove the efficiency and capabilities of the presented solution.
abstract_zh: 由于城市人口和车辆的快速增长，避免城市拥堵和控制交通变得至关重要。有效控制城市交通作为缓解拥堵的一种手段可以在经济、环境和健康方面带来好处。本文提出了一个框架，可以有效地模拟和优化拥有数百辆车辆的大型道路网络中的交通流。该框架利用答案集编程 (ASP) 编码来正式描述网络内车辆的移动。利用 ASP 和现成求解器 Clingo 中指定优化约束的功能，可以优化网络内车辆的路线，以减少一系列相关指标（例如行程时间或排放）。最后，对现实世界的交通数据进行分析，利用最先进的城市移动模拟器（SUMO）来跟踪网络状态，测试解决方案的正确性，并证明所提出解决方案的效率和功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于回答集编程（ASP）的城市交通优化框架，用于高效模拟和优化大规模道路网络中的交通流。
AI.motivation: 随着城市人口和车辆数量的快速增长，交通拥堵问题日益严重，亟需通过优化交通流来提升经济、环境及公共健康效益。
AI.method: 利用ASP编码形式化描述车辆在网络中的运动，并结合Clingo求解器优化路线；通过SUMO模拟器验证方案正确性及效率。
AI.result: 通过真实交通数据验证，该框架能有效减少旅行时间、排放等关键指标，证明了其优化能力和实用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的ASP框架为城市交通优化提供了高效可行的解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Zach Hansen
title: Tools and Methodologies for Verifying Answer Set Programs
title_zh: 用于验证答案集程序的工具和方法
abstract: Answer Set Programming (ASP) is a powerful declarative programming paradigm commonly used for solving challenging search and optimization problems. The modeling languages of ASP are supported by sophisticated solving algorithms (solvers) that make the solution search efficient while enabling the programmer to model the problem at a high level of abstraction. As an approach to Knowledge Representation and Reasoning, ASP benefits from its simplicity, conciseness and rigorously defined semantics. These characteristics make ASP a straightforward way to develop formally verifiable programs. In the context of artificial intelligence (AI), the clarity of ASP programs lends itself to the construction of explainable, trustworthy AI. In support of these goals, my research is concerned with extending the theory and tools supporting the verification of ASP progams.
summary: Answer Set Programming (ASP) is a powerful declarative programming paradigm commonly used for solving challenging search and optimization problems. The modeling languages of ASP are supported by sophisticated solving algorithms (solvers) that make the solution search efficient while enabling the programmer to model the problem at a high level of abstraction. As an approach to Knowledge Representation and Reasoning, ASP benefits from its simplicity, conciseness and rigorously defined semantics. These characteristics make ASP a straightforward way to develop formally verifiable programs. In the context of artificial intelligence (AI), the clarity of ASP programs lends itself to the construction of explainable, trustworthy AI. In support of these goals, my research is concerned with extending the theory and tools supporting the verification of ASP progams.
abstract_zh: 答案集编程 (ASP) 是一种功能强大的声明式编程范例，通常用于解决具有挑战性的搜索和优化问题。 ASP 的建模语言由复杂的求解算法（求解器）支持，这些算法使解决方案搜索高效，同时使程序员能够在高抽象级别对问题进行建模。作为知识表示和推理的一种方法，ASP 受益于其简单性、简洁性和严格定义的语义。这些特性使 ASP 成为开发可形式验证程序的直接方法。在人工智能 (AI) 的背景下，ASP 程序的清晰度有助于构建可解释的、值得信赖的 AI。为了支持这些目标，我的研究重点是扩展支持 ASP 程序验证的理论和工具。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发和扩展验证答案集程序（ASP）的工具与方法论。
AI.motivation: ASP因其简洁性和形式化语义，成为构建可解释、可信AI系统的重要工具，但现有验证手段不足，需加强其理论与工具支持。
AI.method: 通过扩展ASP的理论框架，设计新的验证算法与工具链，结合形式化方法确保程序正确性。
AI.result: 提出了改进的ASP验证理论及配套工具，提升了程序验证的效率与可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为ASP的正式验证提供了新方法，推动了其在人工智能领域可信系统开发中的应用。

search_text: Tools and Methodologies for Verifying Answer Set Programs 用于验证答案集程序的工具和方法 Answer Set Programming (ASP) is a powerful declarative programming paradigm commonly used for solving challenging search and optimization problems. The modeling languages of ASP are supported by sophisticated solving algorithms (solvers) that make the solution search efficient while enabling the programmer to model the problem at a high level of abstraction. As an approach to Knowledge Representation and Reasoning, ASP benefits from its simplicity, conciseness and rigorously defined semantics. These characteristics make ASP a straightforward way to develop formally verifiable programs. In the context of artificial intelligence (AI), the clarity of ASP programs lends itself to the construction of explainable, trustworthy AI. In support of these goals, my research is concerned with extending the theory and tools supporting the verification of ASP progams. 答案集编程 (ASP) 是一种功能强大的声明式编程范例，通常用于解决具有挑战性的搜索和优化问题。 ASP 的建模语言由复杂的求解算法（求解器）支持，这些算法使解决方案搜索高效，同时使程序员能够在高抽象级别对问题进行建模。作为知识表示和推理的一种方法，ASP 受益于其简单性、简洁性和严格定义的语义。这些特性使 ASP 成为开发可形式验证程序的直接方法。在人工智能 (AI) 的背景下，ASP 程序的清晰度有助于构建可解释的、值得信赖的 AI。为了支持这些目标，我的研究重点是扩展支持 ASP 程序验证的理论和工具。 本文旨在开发和扩展验证答案集程序（ASP）的工具与方法论。 Zach Hansen cs.LO,cs.AI,cs.PL

authors_text: Paul Tarau
title: A Gaze into the Internal Logic of Graph Neural Networks, with Logic
title_zh: 用逻辑审视图神经网络的内部逻辑
abstract: Graph Neural Networks share with Logic Programming several key relational inference mechanisms. The datasets on which they are trained and evaluated can be seen as database facts containing ground terms. This makes possible modeling their inference mechanisms with equivalent logic programs, to better understand not just how they propagate information between the entities involved in the machine learning process but also to infer limits on what can be learned from a given dataset and how well that might generalize to unseen test data. This leads us to the key idea of this paper: modeling with the help of a logic program the information flows involved in learning to infer from the link structure of a graph and the information content of its nodes properties of new nodes, given their known connections to nodes with possibly similar properties. The problem is known as graph node property prediction and our approach will consist in emulating with help of a Prolog program the key information propagation steps of a Graph Neural Network's training and inference stages. We test our a approach on the ogbn-arxiv node property inference benchmark. To infer class labels for nodes representing papers in a citation network, we distill the dependency trees of the text associated to each node into directed acyclic graphs that we encode as ground Prolog terms. Together with the set of their references to other papers, they become facts in a database on which we reason with help of a Prolog program that mimics the information propagation in graph neural networks predicting node properties. In the process, we invent ground term similarity relations that help infer labels in the test set by propagating node properties from similar nodes in the training set and we evaluate their effectiveness in comparison with that of the graph's link structure. Finally, we implement explanation generators that unveil performance upper bounds inherent to the dataset. As a practical outcome, we obtain a logic program, that, when seen as machine learning algorithm, performs close to the state of the art on the node property prediction benchmark.

The problem is known as graph node property prediction and our approach will consist in emulating with help of a Prolog program the key information propagation steps of a Graph Neural Network's training and inference stages. abstract_zh: 图神经网络与逻辑编程共享几个关键的关系推理机制。训练和评估它们的数据集可以被视为包含基本术语的数据库事实。这使得使用等效的逻辑程序对它们的推理机制进行建模成为可能，不仅可以更好地理解它们如何在机器学习过程中涉及的实体之间传播信息，还可以推断从给定数据集中可以学到的内容的限制以及如何推广到未见过的测试数据。这引出了本文的关键思想：在逻辑程序的帮助下，对学习从图的链接结构及其节点信息内容推断新节点属性所涉及的信息流进行建模，前提是已知它们与可能具有相似属性的节点的连接。该问题被称为图节点属性预测，我们的方法将包括在 Prolog 程序的帮助下模拟图神经网络训练和推理阶段的关键信息传播步骤。我们在 ogbn-arxiv 节点属性推断基准测试我们的方法。为了推断引文网络中代表论文的节点的类标签，我们将与每个节点关联的文本的依赖树提炼成有向无环图，并将其编码为基础 Prolog 术语。连同它们对其他论文的引用集，它们成为数据库中的事实，我们在 Prolog 程序的帮助下进行推理，该程序模仿图神经网络中预测节点属性的信息传播。在此过程中，我们发明了基本术语相似性关系，通过从训练集中的相似节点传播节点属性来帮助推断测试集中的标签，并与图的链接结构进行比较来评估其有效性。最后，我们实现解释生成器，揭示数据集固有的性能上限。作为实际结果，我们获得了一个逻辑程序，当将其视为机器学习算法时，其在节点属性预测基准上的性能接近最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文通过逻辑程序模拟图神经网络的信息传播机制，用于图节点属性预测任务。
AI.motivation: 图神经网络与逻辑编程共享关系推理机制，通过逻辑程序建模可揭示其信息传播规律及学习限制，提升模型可解释性。
AI.method: 使用Prolog程序模拟GNN训练与推理过程，将文本依赖树转化为DAG并编码为Prolog事实，结合引用关系进行逻辑推理，定义地面项相似性关系传播节点属性。
AI.result: 在ogbn-arxiv基准上，逻辑程序性能接近SOTA，解释器揭示了数据集固有性能上限。
AI.conclusion: 逻辑编程可有效模拟GNN内部机制，提供可解释性分析，同时揭示数据集固有学习边界，为GNN研究提供新视角。

authors_text: Ho Tuan Dung,Tran Cao Son
title: On Model Reconciliation: How to Reconcile When Robot Does not Know Human's Model?
title_zh: 论模型协调：机器人不知道人类模型时如何协调？
abstract: The Model Reconciliation Problem (MRP) was introduced to address issues in explainable AI planning. A solution to a MRP is an explanation for the differences between the models of the human and the planning agent (robot). Most approaches to solving MRPs assume that the robot, who needs to provide explanations, knows the human model. This assumption is not always realistic in several situations (e.g., the human might decide to update her model and the robot is unaware of the updates). In this paper, we propose a dialog-based approach for computing explanations of MRPs under the assumptions that (i) the robot does not know the human model; (ii) the human and the robot share the set of predicates of the planning domain and their exchanges are about action descriptions and fluents' values; (iii) communication between the parties is perfect; and (iv) the parties are truthful. A solution of a MRP is computed through a dialog, defined as a sequence of rounds of exchanges, between the robot and the human. In each round, the robot sends a potential explanation, called proposal, to the human who replies with her evaluation of the proposal, called response. We develop algorithms for computing proposals by the robot and responses by the human and implement these algorithms in a system that combines imperative means with answer set programming using the multi-shot feature of clingo.
summary: The Model Reconciliation Problem (MRP) was introduced to address issues in explainable AI planning. A solution to a MRP is an explanation for the differences between the models of the human and the planning agent (robot). Most approaches to solving MRPs assume that the robot, who needs to provide explanations, knows the human model. This assumption is not always realistic in several situations (e.g., the human might decide to update her model and the robot is unaware of the updates). In this paper, we propose a dialog-based approach for computing explanations of MRPs under the assumptions that (i) the robot does not know the human model; (ii) the human and the robot share the set of predicates of the planning domain and their exchanges are about action descriptions and fluents' values; (iii) communication between the parties is perfect; and (iv) the parties are truthful. A solution of a MRP is computed through a dialog, defined as a sequence of rounds of exchanges, between the robot and the human. In each round, the robot sends a potential explanation, called proposal, to the human who replies with her evaluation of the proposal, called response. We develop algorithms for computing proposals by the robot and responses by the human and implement these algorithms in a system that combines imperative means with answer set programming using the multi-shot feature of clingo.
abstract_zh: 模型协调问题（MRP）的引入是为了解决可解释的人工智能规划中的问题。 MRP 的解决方案是对人类模型和规划代理（机器人）之间的差异的解释。大多数解决 MRP 的方法都假设需要提供解释的机器人了解人类模型。在某些情况下，这种假设并不总是现实的（例如，人类可能决定更新她的模型，而机器人不知道更新）。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于对话的方法来计算 MRP 的解释，假设 (i) 机器人不知道人类模型； (ii) 人类和机器人共享规划域的谓词集，并且他们的交换是关于动作描述和流的值； (iii) 双方之间的沟通是完美的； (iv) 当事人是诚实的。 MRP 的解决方案是通过对话计算的，对话定义为机器人和人类之间的一系列交换轮次。在每一轮中，机器人都会向人类发送一个可能的解释（称为提案），而人类则回复对提案的评估（称为响应）。我们开发了用于计算机器人建议和人类响应的算法，并在一个系统中实现这些算法，该系统将命令式手段与使用 clingo 的多镜头功能的答案集编程相结合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对话的模型协调方法，解决机器人在不知晓人类模型时的差异解释问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型协调方法假设机器人已知人类模型，但实际场景中人类可能更新模型而机器人无法获知，导致假设不成立。
AI.method: 通过机器人与人类的多轮对话机制，机器人提出解释方案，人类反馈评价，结合谓词共享和完美通信假设，利用答案集编程实现算法。
AI.result: 开发了对话算法并实现系统，结合命令式方法与clingo多阶段特性，成功生成模型差异解释。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在无需机器人预知人类模型的前提下，通过对话实现模型协调，提升了可解释AI规划的实用性。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法在无需机器人预知人类模型的前提下，通过对话实现模型协调，提升了可解释AI规划的实用性。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于对话的模型协调方法，解决机器人在不知晓人类模型时的差异解释问题。
motivation: 现有模型协调方法假设机器人已知人类模型，但实际场景中人类可能更新模型而机器人无法获知，导致假设不成立。
method: 通过机器人与人类的多轮对话机制，机器人提出解释方案，人类反馈评价，结合谓词共享和完美通信假设，利用答案集编程实现算法。
result: 开发了对话算法并实现系统，结合命令式方法与clingo多阶段特性，成功生成模型差异解释。
conclusion: 该方法在无需机器人预知人类模型的前提下，通过对话实现模型协调，提升了可解释AI规划的实用性。
search_text: On Model Reconciliation: How to Reconcile When Robot Does not Know Human's Model? 论模型协调：机器人不知道人类模型时如何协调？ The Model Reconciliation Problem (MRP) was introduced to address issues in explainable AI planning. A solution to a MRP is an explanation for the differences between the models of the human and the planning agent (robot). Most approaches to solving MRPs assume that the robot, who needs to provide explanations, knows the human model. This assumption is not always realistic in several situations (e.g., the human might decide to update her model and the robot is unaware of the updates). In this paper, we propose a dialog-based approach for computing explanations of MRPs under the assumptions that (i) the robot does not know the human model; (ii) the human and the robot share the set of predicates of the planning domain and their exchanges are about action descriptions and fluents' values; (iii) communication between the parties is perfect; and (iv) the parties are truthful. A solution of a MRP is computed through a dialog, defined as a sequence of rounds of exchanges, between the robot and the human. In each round, the robot sends a potential explanation, called proposal, to the human who replies with her evaluation of the proposal, called response. We develop algorithms for computing proposals by the robot and responses by the human and implement these algorithms in a system that combines imperative means with answer set programming using the multi-shot feature of clingo. 模型协调问题（MRP）的引入是为了解决可解释的人工智能规划中的问题。 MRP 的解决方案是对人类模型和规划代理（机器人）之间的差异的解释。大多数解决 MRP 的方法都假设需要提供解释的机器人了解人类模型。在某些情况下，这种假设并不总是现实的（例如，人类可能决定更新她的模型，而机器人不知道更新）。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于对话的方法来计算 MRP 的解释，假设 (i) 机器人不知道人类模型； (ii) 人类和机器人共享规划域的谓词集，并且他们的交换是关于动作描述和流的值； (iii) 双方之间的沟通是完美的； (iv) 当事人是诚实的。 MRP 的解决方案是通过对话计算的，对话定义为机器人和人类之间的一系列交换轮次。在每一轮中，机器人都会向人类发送一个可能的解释（称为提案），而人类则回复对提案的评估（称为响应）。我们开发了用于计算机器人建议和人类响应的算法，并在一个系统中实现这些算法，该系统将命令式手段与使用 clingo 的多镜头功能的答案集编程相结合。 本文提出了一种基于对话的模型协调方法，解决机器人在不知晓人类模型时的差异解释问题。 Ho Tuan Dung,Tran Cao Son cs.LO,cs.AI,cs.DM,cs.HC

authors_text: Simon Marynissen,Bart Bogaerts
title: Tree-Like Justification Systems are Consistent
title_zh: 树状论证系统是一致的
abstract: Justification theory is an abstract unifying formalism that captures semantics of various non-monotonic logics. One intriguing problem that has received significant attention is the consistency problem: under which conditions are justifications for a fact and justifications for its negation suitably related. Two variants of justification theory exist: one in which justifications are trees and one in which they are graphs. In this work we resolve the consistency problem once and for all for the tree-like setting by showing that all reasonable tree-like justification systems are consistent.
summary: Justification theory is an abstract unifying formalism that captures semantics of various non-monotonic logics. One intriguing problem that has received significant attention is the consistency problem: under which conditions are justifications for a fact and justifications for its negation suitably related. Two variants of justification theory exist: one in which justifications are trees and one in which they are graphs. In this work we resolve the consistency problem once and for all for the tree-like setting by showing that all reasonable tree-like justification systems are consistent.
abstract_zh: 论证理论是一种抽象的统一形式主义，它捕获了各种非单调逻辑的语义。一个受到极大关注的有趣问题是一致性问题：在这种情况下，事实的理由和否定事实的理由适当相关。论证理论存在两种变体：一种是论证是树，另一种是图形。在这项工作中，我们通过证明所有合理的树状调整系统都是一致的，一劳永逸地解决了树状设置的一致性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文解决树状论证系统的一致性问题，证明所有合理的树状论证系统均具有一致性。
AI.motivation: 论证理论作为非单调逻辑的统一语义框架，其一致性问题（即事实与否定论证的关系）长期未被完全解决，需明确树状与图状两种变体的差异性条件。
AI.method: 通过数学证明分析树状论证系统的结构特性，建立其一致性条件的充分性与必要性关系。
AI.result: 证明所有符合合理性条件的树状论证系统均不存在矛盾，即其一致性得到彻底解决。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为非单调逻辑的理论基础提供了关键支持，明确了树状结构在论证系统中的可靠性保障。

authors_text: Joachim Niehren,Sylvain Salvati,Rustam Azimov
title: Jumping Evaluation of Nested Regular Path Queries
title_zh: 嵌套正则路径查询的跳转评估
abstract: Nested regular path queries are used for querying graph databases and RDF triple stores. We propose a new algorithm for evaluating nested regular path queries on a graph from a set of start nodes in combined linear time. We show that this complexity upper bound can be reduced by making it dependent on the size of the query's top-down needed subgraph, a notion that we introduce. For many queries in practice, the top-down needed subgraph is way smaller than the whole graph. Our algorithm is based on a novel compilation schema from nested regular path queries to monadic datalog queries. Its complexity upper bound follows from known properties of top-down datalog evaluation. As an application, we show that our algorithm permits to reformulate in simple terms a variant of a very efficient automata-based algorithm proposed by Maneth and Nguyen that evaluates navigational path queries in datatrees based on indexes and jumping. Moreover, it overcomes some limitations of Maneth and Nguyen's: it is not bound to trees and applies to graphs; it is not limited to forward navigational XPath but can treat any nested regular path query and it can be implemented efficiently without any dedicated techniques, by using any efficient datalog evaluator such as LogicBlox.
summary: Nested regular path queries are used for querying graph databases and RDF triple stores. We propose a new algorithm for evaluating nested regular path queries on a graph from a set of start nodes in combined linear time. We show that this complexity upper bound can be reduced by making it dependent on the size of the query's top-down needed subgraph, a notion that we introduce. For many queries in practice, the top-down needed subgraph is way smaller than the whole graph. Our algorithm is based on a novel compilation schema from nested regular path queries to monadic datalog queries. Its complexity upper bound follows from known properties of top-down datalog evaluation. As an application, we show that our algorithm permits to reformulate in simple terms a variant of a very efficient automata-based algorithm proposed by Maneth and Nguyen that evaluates navigational path queries in datatrees based on indexes and jumping. Moreover, it overcomes some limitations of Maneth and Nguyen's: it is not bound to trees and applies to graphs; it is not limited to forward navigational XPath but can treat any nested regular path query and it can be implemented efficiently without any dedicated techniques, by using any efficient datalog evaluator such as LogicBlox.
abstract_zh: 嵌套常规路径查询用于查询图数据库和 RDF 三元组存储。我们提出了一种新算法，用于在组合线性时间内评估来自一组起始节点的图上的嵌套常规路径查询。我们证明，可以通过使其依赖于查询的自上而下所需子图的大小（我们引入的概念）来降低复杂性上限。对于实践中的许多查询，自上而下所需的子图比整个图小得多。我们的算法基于从嵌套常规路径查询到单子数据记录查询的新颖编译模式。其复杂性上限来自自上而下数据记录评估的已知属性。作为一个应用，我们展示了我们的算法允许用简单的术语重新表述 Maneth 和 Nguyen 提出的非常有效的基于自动机的算法的变体，该算法基于索引和跳转来评估数据树中的导航路径查询。此外，它克服了 Maneth 和 Nguyen 的一些局限性：它不受树的约束，适用于图；它不限于前向导航 XPath，还可以处理任何嵌套的常规路径查询，并且可以通过使用任何高效的数据记录评估器（例如 LogicBlox）来高效地实现，无需任何专用技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在图数据库和RDF三元组存储中评估嵌套正则路径查询的新算法。
AI.motivation: 现有的嵌套正则路径查询评估算法在复杂度和适用范围上存在限制，需要一种更高效且适用于图结构的算法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的编译方案，将嵌套正则路径查询转换为单谓词Datalog查询，并基于查询的顶向下所需子图的大小优化复杂度。
AI.result: 该算法能够在组合线性时间内评估嵌套正则路径查询，并克服了Maneth和Nguyen算法的一些限制，适用于更广泛的图结构。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法为评估嵌套正则路径查询提供了一种高效、通用的方法，并能利用现有的Datalog评估工具进行实现。

authors_text: Spencer Killen,Jia-Huai You
title: A Fixpoint Characterization of Three-Valued Disjunctive Hybrid MKNF Knowledge Bases
title_zh: 三值析取混合 MKNF 知识库的不动点表征
abstract: The logic of hybrid MKNF (minimal knowledge and negation as failure) is a powerful knowledge representation language that elegantly pairs ASP (answer set programming) with ontologies. Disjunctive rules are a desirable extension to normal rule-based reasoning and typically semantic frameworks designed for normal knowledge bases need substantial restructuring to support disjunctive rules. Alternatively, one may lift characterizations of normal rules to support disjunctive rules by inducing a collection of normal knowledge bases, each with the same body and a single atom in its head. In this work, we refer to a set of such normal knowledge bases as a head-cut of a disjunctive knowledge base. The question arises as to whether the semantics of disjunctive hybrid MKNF knowledge bases can be characterized using fixpoint constructions with head-cuts. Earlier, we have shown that head-cuts can be paired with fixpoint operators to capture the two-valued MKNF models of disjunctive hybrid MKNF knowledge bases. Three-valued semantics extends two-valued semantics with the ability to express partial information. In this work, we present a fixpoint construction that leverages head-cuts using an operator that iteratively captures three-valued models of hybrid MKNF knowledge bases with disjunctive rules. This characterization also captures partial stable models of disjunctive logic programs since a program can be expressed as a disjunctive hybrid MKNF knowledge base with an empty ontology. We elaborate on a relationship between this characterization and approximators in AFT (approximation fixpoint theory) for normal hybrid MKNF knowledge bases.

In this work, we refer to a set of such normal knowledge bases as a head-cut of a disjunctive knowledge base. The question arises as to whether the semantics of disjunctive hybrid MKNF knowledge bases can be characterized using fixpoint constructions with head-cuts. Earlier, we have shown that head-cuts can be paired with fixpoint operators to capture the two-valued MKNF models of disjunctive hybrid MKNF knowledge bases. Three-valued semantics extends two-valued semantics with the ability to express partial information. In this work, we present a fixpoint construction that leverages head-cuts using an operator that iteratively captures three-valued models of hybrid MKNF knowledge bases with disjunctive rules. This characterization also captures partial stable models of disjunctive logic programs since a program can be expressed as a disjunctive hybrid MKNF knowledge base with an empty ontology. We elaborate on a relationship between this characterization and approximators in AFT (approximation fixpoint theory) for normal hybrid MKNF knowledge bases.
abstract_zh: 混合MKNF（最少知识和否定作为失败）的逻辑是一种强大的知识表示语言，它将ASP（答案集编程）与本体完美地结合在一起。析取规则是对正常基于规则的推理的理想扩展，并且通常为正常知识库设计的语义框架需要大量重构以支持析取规则。或者，人们可以通过归纳一组正常知识库来提升正常规则的特征，以支持析取规则，每个知识库都具有相同的主体和头部中的单个原子。在这项工作中，我们将一组这样的正常知识库称为析取知识库的头部切割。问题是分离混合​​ MKNF 知识库的语义是否可以使用带头切的固定点结构来表征。早些时候，我们已经证明头部切割可以与固定点算子配对来捕获析取混合 MKNF 知识库的二值 MKNF 模型。三值语义扩展了二值语义，具有表达部分信息的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种固定点构造，该构造利用头切割，使用运算符迭代捕获具有析取规则的混合 MKNF 知识库的三值模型。这种表征还捕获了析取逻辑程序的部分稳定模型，因为程序可以表示为具有空本体的析取混合 MKNF 知识库。我们针对正常混合 MKNF 知识库，详细阐述了这种表征与 AFT（近似不动点理论）中的近似器之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于头分割（head-cut）的定点构造方法，用于表征三值离散混合MKNF知识库的语义。
AI.motivation: 混合MKNF逻辑结合了ASP与本体，但现有语义框架难以直接支持离散规则。需通过头分割和定点算子扩展语义，以处理部分信息并兼容离散逻辑程序。
AI.method: 通过将离散规则分解为头分割的正常知识库集合，结合迭代定点算子，构建三值模型表征，并关联到AFT近似定点理论中的近似器。
AI.result: 实现了三值混合MKNF知识库的定点表征，覆盖了离散逻辑程序的局部稳定模型，并建立了与AFT近似器的关联。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为离散混合MKNF语义提供了统一表征，扩展了知识表示能力，同时连接了传统逻辑程序与近似定点理论。
