search_text: A Fixpoint Characterization of Three-Valued Disjunctive Hybrid MKNF Knowledge Bases 三值析取混合 MKNF 知识库的不动点表征 The logic of hybrid MKNF (minimal knowledge and negation as failure) is a powerful knowledge representation language that elegantly pairs ASP (answer set programming) with ontologies. Disjunctive rules are a desirable extension to normal rule-based reasoning and typically semantic frameworks designed for normal knowledge bases need substantial restructuring to support disjunctive rules. Alternatively, one may lift characterizations of normal rules to support disjunctive rules by inducing a collection of normal knowledge bases, each with the same body and a single atom in its head. In this work, we refer to a set of such normal knowledge bases as a head-cut of a disjunctive knowledge base. The question arises as to whether the semantics of disjunctive hybrid MKNF knowledge bases can be characterized using fixpoint constructions with head-cuts. Earlier, we have shown that head-cuts can be paired with fixpoint operators to capture the two-valued MKNF models of disjunctive hybrid MKNF knowledge bases. Three-valued semantics extends two-valued semantics with the ability to express partial information. In this work, we present a fixpoint construction that leverages head-cuts using an operator that iteratively captures three-valued models of hybrid MKNF knowledge bases with disjunctive rules. This characterization also captures partial stable models of disjunctive logic programs since a program can be expressed as a disjunctive hybrid MKNF knowledge base with an empty ontology. We elaborate on a relationship between this characterization and approximators in AFT (approximation fixpoint theory) for normal hybrid MKNF knowledge bases. 混合MKNF（最少知识和否定作为失败）的逻辑是一种强大的知识表示语言，它将ASP（答案集编程）与本体完美地结合在一起。析取规则是对正常基于规则的推理的理想扩展，并且通常为正常知识库设计的语义框架需要大量重构以支持析取规则。或者，人们可以通过归纳一组正常知识库来提升正常规则的特征，以支持析取规则，每个知识库都具有相同的主体和头部中的单个原子。在这项工作中，我们将一组这样的正常知识库称为析取知识库的头部切割。问题是分离混合​​ MKNF 知识库的语义是否可以使用带头切的固定点结构来表征。早些时候，我们已经证明头部切割可以与固定点算子配对来捕获析取混合 MKNF 知识库的二值 MKNF 模型。三值语义扩展了二值语义，具有表达部分信息的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种固定点构造，该构造利用头切割，使用运算符迭代捕获具有析取规则的混合 MKNF 知识库的三值模型。这种表征还捕获了析取逻辑程序的部分稳定模型，因为程序可以表示为具有空本体的析取混合 MKNF 知识库。我们针对正常混合 MKNF 知识库，详细阐述了这种表征与 AFT（近似不动点理论）中的近似器之间的关系。 本文提出了一种基于头分割（head-cut）的定点构造方法，用于表征三值离散混合MKNF知识库的语义。 Spencer Killen,Jia-Huai You cs.AI,cs.LO

authors_text: Alessandro Maria Poirè,Federico Simonetta,Stavros Ntalampiras
title: Deep Feature Learning for Medical Acoustics
title_zh: 医学声学的深度特征学习
abstract: The purpose of this paper is to compare different learnable frontends in medical acoustics tasks. A framework has been implemented to classify human respiratory sounds and heartbeats in two categories, i.e. healthy or affected by pathologies. After obtaining two suitable datasets, we proceeded to classify the sounds using two learnable state-of-art frontends -- LEAF and nnAudio -- plus a non-learnable baseline frontend, i.e. Mel-filterbanks. The computed features are then fed into two different CNN models, namely VGG16 and EfficientNet. The frontends are carefully benchmarked in terms of the number of parameters, computational resources, and effectiveness. This work demonstrates how the integration of learnable frontends in neural audio classification systems may improve performance, especially in the field of medical acoustics. However, the usage of such frameworks makes the needed amount of data even larger. Consequently, they are useful if the amount of data available for training is adequately large to assist the feature learning process.
summary: The purpose of this paper is to compare different learnable frontends in medical acoustics tasks. A framework has been implemented to classify human respiratory sounds and heartbeats in two categories, i.e. healthy or affected by pathologies. After obtaining two suitable datasets, we proceeded to classify the sounds using two learnable state-of-art frontends -- LEAF and nnAudio -- plus a non-learnable baseline frontend, i.e. Mel-filterbanks. The computed features are then fed into two different CNN models, namely VGG16 and EfficientNet. The frontends are carefully benchmarked in terms of the number of parameters, computational resources, and effectiveness. This work demonstrates how the integration of learnable frontends in neural audio classification systems may improve performance, especially in the field of medical acoustics. However, the usage of such frameworks makes the needed amount of data even larger. Consequently, they are useful if the amount of data available for training is adequately large to assist the feature learning process.
abstract_zh: 本文的目的是比较医学声学任务中不同的可学习前端。已经实施了一个框架，将人类呼吸音和心跳分为两类，即健康的或受病理影响的。获得两个合适的数据集后，我们继续使用两个可学习的最先进的前端（LEAF 和 nnAudio）以及不可学习的基线前端（即 Mel-filterbanks）对声音进行分类。然后将计算出的特征输入两个不同的 CNN 模型，即 VGG16 和 EfficientNet。前端在参数数量、计算资源和有效性方面进行了仔细的基准测试。这项工作展示了神经音频分类系统中可学习前端的集成如何提高性能，特别是在医学声学领域。然而，此类框架的使用使得所需的数据量更大。因此，如果可用于训练的数据量足够大以协助特征学习过程，那么它们就会很有用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在比较医学声学任务中不同可学习前端（LEAF、nnAudio）与非可学习基线（Mel-filterbanks）的性能，用于分类人类呼吸声和心跳声的健康与病理状态。
AI.motivation: 医学声学分类需要高效特征提取方法，但传统方法可能无法充分捕捉复杂声学特征，需探索可学习前端对分类性能的提升潜力。
AI.method: 使用两个医学声学数据集，采用LEAF、nnAudio及Mel-filterbanks提取特征，结合VGG16和EfficientNet CNN模型进行分类，并从参数量、计算资源和分类效果进行基准测试。
AI.result: 可学习前端在分类效果上优于传统方法，但需更大规模数据支持特征学习过程，否则可能因过拟合导致性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 可学习前端能提升医学声学分类性能，但其应用需确保充足训练数据以支持特征学习，这对医学数据获取具有挑战性。

authors_text: Yizhak Yisrael Elboher,Elazar Cohen,Guy Katz
title: Neural Network Verification using Residual Reasoning
title_zh: 使用残差推理的神经网络验证
comment: This is the extended version of a paper with the same title that appeared at SEFM 2022
comments: This is the extended version of a paper with the same title that appeared at SEFM 2022
abstract: With the increasing integration of neural networks as components in mission-critical systems, there is an increasing need to ensure that they satisfy various safety and liveness requirements. In recent years, numerous sound and complete verification methods have been proposed towards that end, but these typically suffer from severe scalability limitations. Recent work has proposed enhancing such verification techniques with abstraction-refinement capabilities, which have been shown to boost scalability: instead of verifying a large and complex network, the verifier constructs and then verifies a much smaller network, whose correctness implies the correctness of the original network. A shortcoming of such a scheme is that if verifying the smaller network fails, the verifier needs to perform a refinement step that increases the size of the network being verified, and then start verifying the new network from scratch - effectively "wasting" its earlier work on verifying the smaller network. In this paper, we present an enhancement to abstraction-based verification of neural networks, by using residual reasoning: the process of utilizing information acquired when verifying an abstract network, in order to expedite the verification of a refined network. In essence, the method allows the verifier to store information about parts of the search space in which the refined network is guaranteed to behave correctly, and allows it to focus on areas where bugs might be discovered. We implemented our approach as an extension to the Marabou verifier, and obtained promising results.
summary: With the increasing integration of neural networks as components in mission-critical systems, there is an increasing need to ensure that they satisfy various safety and liveness requirements. In recent years, numerous sound and complete verification methods have been proposed towards that end, but these typically suffer from severe scalability limitations. Recent work has proposed enhancing such verification techniques with abstraction-refinement capabilities, which have been shown to boost scalability: instead of verifying a large and complex network, the verifier constructs and then verifies a much smaller network, whose correctness implies the correctness of the original network. A shortcoming of such a scheme is that if verifying the smaller network fails, the verifier needs to perform a refinement step that increases the size of the network being verified, and then start verifying the new network from scratch - effectively "wasting" its earlier work on verifying the smaller network. In this paper, we present an enhancement to abstraction-based verification of neural networks, by using residual reasoning: the process of utilizing information acquired when verifying an abstract network, in order to expedite the verification of a refined network. In essence, the method allows the verifier to store information about parts of the search space in which the refined network is guaranteed to behave correctly, and allows it to focus on areas where bugs might be discovered. We implemented our approach as an extension to the Marabou verifier, and obtained promising results.
abstract_zh: 随着神经网络作为关键任务系统组件的日益集成，越来越需要确保它们满足各种安全和活性要求。近年来，为此目的已经提出了许多合理且完整的验证方法，但这些方法通常受到严重的可扩展性限制。最近的工作提出了通过抽象细化功能来增强此类验证技术，这已被证明可以提高可扩展性：验证者不是验证大型而复杂的网络，而是构建然后验证一个更小的网络，其正确性意味着原始网络的正确性。这种方案的缺点是，如果验证较小的网络失败，验证者需要执行细化步骤，增加正在验证的网络的规模，然后从头开始验证新网络 - 有效地“浪费”其早期验证较小网络的工作。在本文中，我们通过使用残差推理，提出了对基于抽象的神经网络验证的增强：利用验证抽象网络时获得的信息的过程，以加快精细网络的验证。本质上，该方法允许验证者存储有关搜索空间部分的信息，在这些部分中，保证精炼网络能够正确运行，并允许验证者关注可能发现错误的区域。我们将我们的方法作为 Marabou 验证器的扩展来实施，并获得了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于残差推理的神经网络抽象验证方法，通过利用抽象网络验证过程中获得的信息来加速细化网络的验证过程。
AI.motivation: 现有神经网络验证方法在可扩展性上存在严重限制，而抽象-细化技术虽能提升规模，但验证失败时需从头开始验证细化网络，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 通过残差推理机制，保存抽象网络验证中已确认正确的搜索空间信息，并在细化网络验证时直接复用这些信息，聚焦潜在错误区域。
AI.result: 将该方法集成到Marabou验证器中，实验结果表明该方法有效提升了验证效率。

search_text: Neural Network Verification using Residual Reasoning 使用残差推理的神经网络验证 With the increasing integration of neural networks as components in mission-critical systems, there is an increasing need to ensure that they satisfy various safety and liveness requirements. In recent years, numerous sound and complete verification methods have been proposed towards that end, but these typically suffer from severe scalability limitations. Recent work has proposed enhancing such verification techniques with abstraction-refinement capabilities, which have been shown to boost scalability: instead of verifying a large and complex network, the verifier constructs and then verifies a much smaller network, whose correctness implies the correctness of the original network. A shortcoming of such a scheme is that if verifying the smaller network fails, the verifier needs to perform a refinement step that increases the size of the network being verified, and then start verifying the new network from scratch - effectively "wasting" its earlier work on verifying the smaller network. In this paper, we present an enhancement to abstraction-based verification of neural networks, by using residual reasoning: the process of utilizing information acquired when verifying an abstract network, in order to expedite the verification of a refined network. In essence, the method allows the verifier to store information about parts of the search space in which the refined network is guaranteed to behave correctly, and allows it to focus on areas where bugs might be discovered. We implemented our approach as an extension to the Marabou verifier, and obtained promising results. 随着神经网络作为关键任务系统组件的日益集成，越来越需要确保它们满足各种安全和活性要求。近年来，为此目的已经提出了许多合理且完整的验证方法，但这些方法通常受到严重的可扩展性限制。最近的工作提出了通过抽象细化功能来增强此类验证技术，这已被证明可以提高可扩展性：验证者不是验证大型而复杂的网络，而是构建然后验证一个更小的网络，其正确性意味着原始网络的正确性。这种方案的缺点是，如果验证较小的网络失败，验证者需要执行细化步骤，增加正在验证的网络的规模，然后从头开始验证新网络 - 有效地“浪费”其早期验证较小网络的工作。在本文中，我们通过使用残差推理，提出了对基于抽象的神经网络验证的增强：利用验证抽象网络时获得的信息的过程，以加快精细网络的验证。本质上，该方法允许验证者存储有关搜索空间部分的信息，在这些部分中，保证精炼网络能够正确运行，并允许验证者关注可能发现错误的区域。我们将我们的方法作为 Marabou 验证器的扩展来实施，并获得了有希望的结果。 本文提出了一种基于残差推理的神经网络抽象验证方法，通过利用抽象网络验证过程中获得的信息来加速细化网络的验证过程。 Yizhak Yisrael Elboher,Elazar Cohen,Guy Katz cs.NE

authors_text: Anita Dürr
title: Improved Bounds for Rectangular Monotone Min-Plus Product and Applications
title_zh: 改进了矩形单调最小加乘积和应用的界限
abstract: In a recent breakthrough paper, Chi et al. (STOC'22) introduce an $\tilde{O}(n^{\frac{3 + ω}{2}})$ time algorithm to compute Monotone Min-Plus Product between two square matrices of dimensions $n \times n$ and entries bounded by $O(n)$. This greatly improves upon the previous $\tilde O(n^{\frac{12 + ω}{5}})$ time algorithm and as a consequence improves bounds for its applications. Several other applications involve Monotone Min-Plus Product between rectangular matrices, and even if Chi et al.'s algorithm seems applicable for the rectangular case, the generalization is not straightforward. In this paper we present a generalization of the algorithm of Chi et al. to solve Monotone Min-Plus Product for rectangular matrices with polynomial bounded values. We next use this faster algorithm to improve running times for the following applications of Rectangular Monotone Min-Plus Product: $M$-bounded Single Source Replacement Path, Batch Range Mode, $k$-Dyck Edit Distance and 2-approximation of All Pairs Shortest Path. We also improve the running time for Unweighted Tree Edit Distance using the algorithm by Chi et al.
summary: In a recent breakthrough paper, Chi et al. (STOC'22) introduce an $\tilde{O}(n^{\frac{3 + ω}{2}})$ time algorithm to compute Monotone Min-Plus Product between two square matrices of dimensions $n \times n$ and entries bounded by $O(n)$. This greatly improves upon the previous $\tilde O(n^{\frac{12 + ω}{5}})$ time algorithm and as a consequence improves bounds for its applications. Several other applications involve Monotone Min-Plus Product between rectangular matrices, and even if Chi et al.'s algorithm seems applicable for the rectangular case, the generalization is not straightforward. In this paper we present a generalization of the algorithm of Chi et al. to solve Monotone Min-Plus Product for rectangular matrices with polynomial bounded values. We next use this faster algorithm to improve running times for the following applications of Rectangular Monotone Min-Plus Product: $M$-bounded Single Source Replacement Path, Batch Range Mode, $k$-Dyck Edit Distance and 2-approximation of All Pairs Shortest Path. We also improve the running time for Unweighted Tree Edit Distance using the algorithm by Chi et al.
abstract_zh: 在最近的一篇突破性论文中，Chi 等人。 (STOC'22) 引入 $\tilde{O}(n^{\frac{3 + ω}{2}})$ 时间算法来计算两个维度为 $n \times n$ 的方阵和以 $O(n)$ 为界的条目之间的单调最小加乘积。这极大地改进了之前的 $\tilde O(n^{\frac{12 + ω}{5}})$ 时间算法，从而提高了其应用范围。其他几个应用涉及矩形矩阵之间的单调最小加乘积，即使 Chi 等人的算法似乎适用于矩形情况，但泛化并不简单。在本文中，我们提出了 Chi 等人的算法的推广。求解具有多项式有界值的矩形矩阵的单调最小加积。接下来，我们使用这种更快的算法来改进以下矩形单调最小加乘积应用的运行时间：$M$-bounded Single Source Replacement Path、Batch Range Mode、$k$-Dyck Edit Distance 和 2-approximation of All Pairs Shortest Path。我们还使用 Chi 等人的算法改进了未加权树编辑距离的运行时间。

AI.tldr: 本文将Chi等人提出的用于方阵的单调Min-Plus乘积算法推广到矩形矩阵，并改进了多个相关应用的运行时间。
AI.motivation: 尽管Chi等人算法在方阵上表现优异，但实际应用中常需处理矩形矩阵，且原算法难以直接推广，因此需寻找更通用的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过推广Chi等人算法至矩形矩阵，并结合多项式有界值的特性，设计更高效的单调Min-Plus乘积计算方法，进而优化相关应用问题的求解过程。
AI.result: 改进了矩形单调Min-Plus乘积的算法复杂度，并提升了多个应用问题（如单源替换路径、范围众数、k-Dyck编辑距离等）的运行效率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过算法推广显著优化了多个实际问题的求解效率，为处理大规模矩形矩阵的单调Min-Plus乘积问题提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jiahui Zhang,Fangneng Zhan,Yingchen Yu,Rongliang Wu,Xiaoqin Zhang,Shijian Lu
title: Latent Multi-Relation Reasoning for GAN-Prior based Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 基于 GAN 先验的图像超分辨率的潜在多关系推理
abstract: Recently, single image super-resolution (SR) under large scaling factors has witnessed impressive progress by introducing pre-trained generative adversarial networks (GANs) as priors. However, most GAN-Priors based SR methods are constrained by an attribute disentanglement problem in inverted latent codes which directly leads to mismatches of visual attributes in the generator layers and further degraded reconstruction. In addition, stochastic noises fed to the generator are employed for unconditional detail generation, which tends to produce unfaithful details that compromise the fidelity of the generated SR image. We design LAREN, a LAtent multi-Relation rEasoNing technique that achieves superb large-factor SR through graph-based multi-relation reasoning in latent space. LAREN consists of two innovative designs. The first is graph-based disentanglement that constructs a superior disentangled latent space via hierarchical multi-relation reasoning. The second is graph-based code generation that produces image-specific codes progressively via recursive relation reasoning which enables prior GANs to generate desirable image details. Extensive experiments show that LAREN achieves superior large-factor image SR and outperforms the state-of-the-art consistently across multiple benchmarks.
summary: Recently, single image super-resolution (SR) under large scaling factors has witnessed impressive progress by introducing pre-trained generative adversarial networks (GANs) as priors. However, most GAN-Priors based SR methods are constrained by an attribute disentanglement problem in inverted latent codes which directly leads to mismatches of visual attributes in the generator layers and further degraded reconstruction. In addition, stochastic noises fed to the generator are employed for unconditional detail generation, which tends to produce unfaithful details that compromise the fidelity of the generated SR image. We design LAREN, a LAtent multi-Relation rEasoNing technique that achieves superb large-factor SR through graph-based multi-relation reasoning in latent space. LAREN consists of two innovative designs. The first is graph-based disentanglement that constructs a superior disentangled latent space via hierarchical multi-relation reasoning. The second is graph-based code generation that produces image-specific codes progressively via recursive relation reasoning which enables prior GANs to generate desirable image details. Extensive experiments show that LAREN achieves superior large-factor image SR and outperforms the state-of-the-art consistently across multiple benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 最近，通过引入预训练的生成对抗网络（GAN）作为先验，大尺度因子下的单图像超分辨率（SR）取得了令人瞩目的进展。然而，大多数基于 GAN-Priors 的 SR 方法都受到反向潜在代码中属性解缠问题的限制，这直接导致生成器层中视觉属性的不匹配以及进一步退化的重建。此外，馈送到生成器的随机噪声用于无条件细节生成，这往往会产生不忠实的细节，从而损害生成的 SR 图像的保真度。我们设计了 LAREN，一种潜在多关系推理技术，通过潜在空间中基于图的多关系推理实现出色的大因子 SR。 LAREN 由两项创新设计组成。第一个是基于图的解缠结，它通过分层多关系推理构造一个优越的解缠结潜在空间。第二种是基于图的代码生成，它通过递归关系推理逐步生成特定于图像的代码，从而使先前的 GAN 能够生成所需的图像细节。大量实验表明，LAREN 实现了卓越的大因子图像 SR，并在多个基准测试中始终优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LAREN方法，通过图基多关系推理解决基于GAN先验的大比例因子图像超分辨率中的属性解耦和细节不真实问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN先验超分方法因潜在空间属性解耦不足及随机噪声生成导致细节失真，影响重建质量。
AI.method: 设计LAREN框架，包含图基解耦（构建分层多关系推理的解耦潜在空间）和图基编码生成（通过递归关系推理生成图像特异性编码）。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，LAREN在大比例因子超分任务上持续优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过潜在空间的多关系图推理，LAREN有效解决了属性解耦和细节生成问题，显著提升了超分效果。

method: 设计LAREN框架，包含图基解耦（构建分层多关系推理的解耦潜在空间）和图基编码生成（通过递归关系推理生成图像特异性编码）。
result: 在多个基准测试中，LAREN在大比例因子超分任务上持续优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 通过潜在空间的多关系图推理，LAREN有效解决了属性解耦和细节生成问题，显著提升了超分效果。
search_text: Latent Multi-Relation Reasoning for GAN-Prior based Image Super-Resolution 基于 GAN 先验的图像超分辨率的潜在多关系推理 Recently, single image super-resolution (SR) under large scaling factors has witnessed impressive progress by introducing pre-trained generative adversarial networks (GANs) as priors. However, most GAN-Priors based SR methods are constrained by an attribute disentanglement problem in inverted latent codes which directly leads to mismatches of visual attributes in the generator layers and further degraded reconstruction. In addition, stochastic noises fed to the generator are employed for unconditional detail generation, which tends to produce unfaithful details that compromise the fidelity of the generated SR image. We design LAREN, a LAtent multi-Relation rEasoNing technique that achieves superb large-factor SR through graph-based multi-relation reasoning in latent space. LAREN consists of two innovative designs. The first is graph-based disentanglement that constructs a superior disentangled latent space via hierarchical multi-relation reasoning. The second is graph-based code generation that produces image-specific codes progressively via recursive relation reasoning which enables prior GANs to generate desirable image details. Extensive experiments show that LAREN achieves superior large-factor image SR and outperforms the state-of-the-art consistently across multiple benchmarks. 最近，通过引入预训练的生成对抗网络（GAN）作为先验，大尺度因子下的单图像超分辨率（SR）取得了令人瞩目的进展。然而，大多数基于 GAN-Priors 的 SR 方法都受到反向潜在代码中属性解缠问题的限制，这直接导致生成器层中视觉属性的不匹配以及进一步退化的重建。此外，馈送到生成器的随机噪声用于无条件细节生成，这往往会产生不忠实的细节，从而损害生成的 SR 图像的保真度。我们设计了 LAREN，一种潜在多关系推理技术，通过潜在空间中基于图的多关系推理实现出色的大因子 SR。 LAREN 由两项创新设计组成。第一个是基于图的解缠结，它通过分层多关系推理构造一个优越的解缠结潜在空间。第二种是基于图的代码生成，它通过递归关系推理逐步生成特定于图像的代码，从而使先前的 GAN 能够生成所需的图像细节。大量实验表明，LAREN 实现了卓越的大因子图像 SR，并在多个基准测试中始终优于最先进的技术。 本文提出LAREN方法，通过图基多关系推理解决基于GAN先验的大比例因子图像超分辨率中的属性解耦和细节不真实问题。 Jiahui Zhang,Fangneng Zhan,Yingchen Yu,Rongliang Wu,Xiaoqin Zhang,Shijian Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Faris Almalik,Mohammad Yaqub,Karthik Nandakumar
title: Self-Ensembling Vision Transformer (SEViT) for Robust Medical Image Classification
title_zh: 用于稳健医学图像分类的自集成视觉变换器 (SEViT)
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViT) are competing to replace Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) for various computer vision tasks in medical imaging such as classification and segmentation. While the vulnerability of CNNs to adversarial attacks is a well-known problem, recent works have shown that ViTs are also susceptible to such attacks and suffer significant performance degradation under attack. The vulnerability of ViTs to carefully engineered adversarial samples raises serious concerns about their safety in clinical settings. In this paper, we propose a novel self-ensembling method to enhance the robustness of ViT in the presence of adversarial attacks. The proposed Self-Ensembling Vision Transformer (SEViT) leverages the fact that feature representations learned by initial blocks of a ViT are relatively unaffected by adversarial perturbations. Learning multiple classifiers based on these intermediate feature representations and combining these predictions with that of the final ViT classifier can provide robustness against adversarial attacks. Measuring the consistency between the various predictions can also help detect adversarial samples. Experiments on two modalities (chest X-ray and fundoscopy) demonstrate the efficacy of SEViT architecture to defend against various adversarial attacks in the gray-box (attacker has full knowledge of the target model, but not the defense mechanism) setting. Code: https://github.com/faresmalik/SEViT
summary: Vision Transformers (ViT) are competing to replace Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) for various computer vision tasks in medical imaging such as classification and segmentation. While the vulnerability of CNNs to adversarial attacks is a well-known problem, recent works have shown that ViTs are also susceptible to such attacks and suffer significant performance degradation under attack. The vulnerability of ViTs to carefully engineered adversarial samples raises serious concerns about their safety in clinical settings. In this paper, we propose a novel self-ensembling method to enhance the robustness of ViT in the presence of adversarial attacks. The proposed Self-Ensembling Vision Transformer (SEViT) leverages the fact that feature representations learned by initial blocks of a ViT are relatively unaffected by adversarial perturbations. Learning multiple classifiers based on these intermediate feature representations and combining these predictions with that of the final ViT classifier can provide robustness against adversarial attacks. Measuring the consistency between the various predictions can also help detect adversarial samples. Experiments on two modalities (chest X-ray and fundoscopy) demonstrate the efficacy of SEViT architecture to defend against various adversarial attacks in the gray-box (attacker has full knowledge of the target model, but not the defense mechanism) setting. Code: https://github.com/faresmalik/SEViT
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器 (ViT) 正在竞相取代卷积神经网络 (CNN)，用于医学成像中的各种计算机视觉任务，例如分类和分割。虽然 CNN 容易遭受对抗性攻击是一个众所周知的问题，但最近的研究表明，ViT 也容易受到此类攻击，并且在攻击下性能会显着下降。 ViT 对精心设计的对抗性样本的脆弱性引起了人们对其在临床环境中安全性的严重担忧。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自集成方法来增强 ViT 在存在对抗性攻击时的鲁棒性。所提出的自集成视觉变换器（SEViT）利用了 ViT 初始块学习的特征表示相对不受对抗性扰动的影响这一事实。基于这些中间特征表示学习多个分类器并将这些预测与最终 ViT 分类器的预测相结合可以提供针对对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。测量各种预测之间的一致性也可以帮助检测对抗性样本。两种模式（胸部 X 射线和眼底镜检查）的实验证明了 SEViT 架构在灰盒（攻击者完全了解目标模型，但不了解防御机制）设置中防御各种对抗性攻击的有效性。代码：https://github.com/faresmalik/SEViT

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自集成视觉Transformer（SEViT）方法，以提高医学图像分类中视觉Transformer（ViT）对对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉Transformer（ViT）在医学影像任务中表现出色，但其对精心设计的对抗样本同样敏感，这在临床环境中可能引发严重安全问题。
AI.method: 通过利用ViT初始块学习的特征表示（对对抗扰动不敏感），训练多个分类器并结合其预测结果与最终分类器输出，同时通过预测一致性检测对抗样本。
AI.result: 在胸片和眼底镜两种模态的实验中，SEViT在灰盒设置下有效防御了多种对抗攻击，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SEViT通过自集成中间特征增强ViT鲁棒性，为医学图像分类中的对抗防御提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Esther Galby,Daniel Marx,Philipp Schepper,Roohani Sharma,Prafullkumar Tale
title: Domination and Cut Problems on Chordal Graphs with Bounded Leafage
title_zh: 有界叶弦图的支配和割问题
abstract: The leafage of a chordal graph G is the minimum integer l such that G can be realized as an intersection graph of subtrees of a tree with l leaves. We consider structural parameterization by the leafage of classical domination and cut problems on chordal graphs. Fomin, Golovach, and Raymond [ESA 2018, Algorithmica 2020] proved, among other things, that Dominating Set on chordal graphs admits an algorithm running in time $2^{O(l^2)} n^{O(1)}$. We present a conceptually much simpler algorithm that runs in time $2^{O(l)} n^{O(1)}$. We extend our approach to obtain similar results for Connected Dominating Set and Steiner Tree. We then consider the two classical cut problems MultiCut with Undeletable Terminals and Multiway Cut with Undeletable Terminals. We prove that the former is W[1]-hard when parameterized by the leafage and complement this result by presenting a simple $n^{O(l)}$-time algorithm. To our surprise, we find that Multiway Cut with Undeletable Terminals on chordal graphs can be solved, in contrast, in $n^{O(1)}$-time.
summary: The leafage of a chordal graph G is the minimum integer l such that G can be realized as an intersection graph of subtrees of a tree with l leaves. We consider structural parameterization by the leafage of classical domination and cut problems on chordal graphs. Fomin, Golovach, and Raymond [ESA 2018, Algorithmica 2020] proved, among other things, that Dominating Set on chordal graphs admits an algorithm running in time $2^{O(l^2)} n^{O(1)}$. We present a conceptually much simpler algorithm that runs in time $2^{O(l)} n^{O(1)}$. We extend our approach to obtain similar results for Connected Dominating Set and Steiner Tree. We then consider the two classical cut problems MultiCut with Undeletable Terminals and Multiway Cut with Undeletable Terminals. We prove that the former is W[1]-hard when parameterized by the leafage and complement this result by presenting a simple $n^{O(l)}$-time algorithm. To our surprise, we find that Multiway Cut with Undeletable Terminals on chordal graphs can be solved, in contrast, in $n^{O(1)}$-time.
abstract_zh: 弦图 G 的叶子是最小整数 l，使得 G 可以实现为具有 l 个叶子的树的子树的交集图。我们通过经典支配的叶子来考虑结构参数化以及弦图上的切割问题。 Fomin、Golovach 和 Raymond [ESA 2018，Algorithmica 2020] 证明了弦图上的支配集允许算法在时间 $2^{O(l^2)} n^{O(1)}$ 上运行。我们提出了一种概念上更简单的算法，运行时间为 $2^{O(l)} n^{O(1)}$。我们扩展了我们的方法，以获得连通支配集和斯坦纳树的类似结果。然后，我们考虑两个经典的剪切问题：带有不可删除终端的 MultiCut 和带有不可删除终端的 Multiway Cut。我们证明前者在由叶子参数化时是 W[1]-hard，并通过提出一个简单的 $n^{O(l)}$-time 算法来补充这个结果。令我们惊讶的是，我们发现弦图上具有不可删除终端的多路切割可以在 $n^{O(1)}$ 时间内解决。

AI.tldr: 研究弦图在叶数受限下的支配集和割集问题的算法复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理弦图的支配集和割集问题时复杂度较高，需寻找更高效的参数化方法。
AI.method: 提出基于叶数参数的简化算法，结合树结构分解和动态规划技术优化时间复杂度。
AI.result: 改进支配集问题的时间复杂度至$2^{O(l)}n^{O(1)}$，并证明多割问题在叶数参数下W[1]-难，而多向割问题可在多项式时间内解决。
AI.conclusion: 叶数参数化为解决弦图组合优化问题提供了新的理论工具和算法框架。

authors_text: Subhankar Ghosh,Prasun Roy,Saumik Bhattacharya,Umapada Pal,Michael Blumenstein
title: TIC: Text-Guided Image Colorization
title_zh: TIC：文本引导图像着色
abstract: Image colorization is a well-known problem in computer vision. However, due to the ill-posed nature of the task, image colorization is inherently challenging. Though several attempts have been made by researchers to make the colorization pipeline automatic, these processes often produce unrealistic results due to a lack of conditioning. In this work, we attempt to integrate textual descriptions as an auxiliary condition, along with the grayscale image that is to be colorized, to improve the fidelity of the colorization process. To the best of our knowledge, this is one of the first attempts to incorporate textual conditioning in the colorization pipeline. To do so, we have proposed a novel deep network that takes two inputs (the grayscale image and the respective encoded text description) and tries to predict the relevant color gamut. As the respective textual descriptions contain color information of the objects present in the scene, the text encoding helps to improve the overall quality of the predicted colors. We have evaluated our proposed model using different metrics and found that it outperforms the state-of-the-art colorization algorithms both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Image colorization is a well-known problem in computer vision. However, due to the ill-posed nature of the task, image colorization is inherently challenging. Though several attempts have been made by researchers to make the colorization pipeline automatic, these processes often produce unrealistic results due to a lack of conditioning. In this work, we attempt to integrate textual descriptions as an auxiliary condition, along with the grayscale image that is to be colorized, to improve the fidelity of the colorization process. To the best of our knowledge, this is one of the first attempts to incorporate textual conditioning in the colorization pipeline. To do so, we have proposed a novel deep network that takes two inputs (the grayscale image and the respective encoded text description) and tries to predict the relevant color gamut. As the respective textual descriptions contain color information of the objects present in the scene, the text encoding helps to improve the overall quality of the predicted colors. We have evaluated our proposed model using different metrics and found that it outperforms the state-of-the-art colorization algorithms both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 图像着色是计算机视觉中的一个众所周知的问题。然而，由于任务的不适定性质，图像着色本质上具有挑战性。尽管研究人员已经多次尝试使着色管道自动化，但由于缺乏调节，这些过程常常产生不切实际的结果。在这项工作中，我们尝试将文本描述作为辅助条件与要着色的灰度图像结合起来，以提高着色过程的保真度。据我们所知，这是将文本调节纳入着色管道的首次尝试之一。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的深度网络，它采用两个输入（灰度图像和相应的编码文本描述）并尝试预测相关色域。由于各个文本描述包含场景中存在的对象的颜色信息，因此文本编码有助于提高预测颜色的整体质量。我们使用不同的指标评估了我们提出的模型，发现它在定性和定量上都优于最先进的着色算法。

AI.result: 在多个指标评估下，该方法在定性和定量上均优于现有最先进的着色算法。
AI.conclusion: 文本条件引导显著提升了图像着色的保真度，本文是首次将文本条件引入着色流程的尝试之一。

authors_text: Malathi Murugesan,Kanika Goyal,Laure Barriere,Maura Pasquotti,Giacomo Veneri,Giovanni De Magistris
title: Deep Surrogate of Modular Multi Pump using Active Learning
title_zh: 使用主动学习的模块化多泵的深度替代
comment: ef:Adaptive Experimental Design and Active Learning in the Real World ICML Workshop - July 22, 2022 - Baltimore, USA
comments: ef:Adaptive Experimental Design and Active Learning in the Real World ICML Workshop - July 22, 2022 - Baltimore, USA
abstract: Due to the high cost and reliability of sensors, the designers of a pump reduce the needed number of sensors for the estimation of the feasible operating point as much as possible. The major challenge to obtain a good estimation is the low amount of data available. Using this amount of data, the performance of the estimation method is not enough to satisfy the client requests. To solve this problem of scarcity of data, getting high quality data is important to obtain a good estimation. Based on these considerations, we develop an active learning framework for estimating the operating point of a Modular Multi Pump used in energy field. In particular we focus on the estimation of the surge distance. We apply Active learning to estimate the surge distance with minimal dataset. Results report that active learning is a valuable technique also for real application.
summary: Due to the high cost and reliability of sensors, the designers of a pump reduce the needed number of sensors for the estimation of the feasible operating point as much as possible. The major challenge to obtain a good estimation is the low amount of data available. Using this amount of data, the performance of the estimation method is not enough to satisfy the client requests. To solve this problem of scarcity of data, getting high quality data is important to obtain a good estimation. Based on these considerations, we develop an active learning framework for estimating the operating point of a Modular Multi Pump used in energy field. In particular we focus on the estimation of the surge distance. We apply Active learning to estimate the surge distance with minimal dataset. Results report that active learning is a valuable technique also for real application.
abstract_zh: 由于传感器的高成本和可靠性，泵的设计者尽可能减少估计可行工作点所需的传感器数量。获得良好估计的主要挑战是可用数据量较少。使用如此大量的数据，估计方法的性能不足以满足客户的要求。为了解决数据稀缺的问题，获得高质量的数据对于获得良好的估计非常重要。基于这些考虑，我们开发了一个主动学习框架，用于估计能源领域使用的模块化多泵的工作点。我们特别关注浪涌距离的估计。我们应用主动学习来用最小的数据集来估计浪涌距离。结果表明，主动学习对于实际应用来说也是一项有价值的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用主动学习方法解决多级泵操作点估计中的数据稀缺问题，特别是在surge距离的预测上。
AI.motivation: 传感器成本高且可靠性限制导致数据不足，传统方法难以满足实际应用中对操作点估计精度的需求。
AI.method: 提出基于主动学习的框架，结合深度模型在最小数据集上训练，重点优化多级泵surge距离的估计。
AI.result: 实验结果验证了主动学习在数据稀缺场景下能够有效提升多级泵操作点估计的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 主动学习技术能有效应对实际应用中数据不足的挑战，为多级泵操作点估计提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Tyler Cody,Niloofar Shadab,Alejandro Salado,Peter Beling
title: Core and Periphery as Closed-System Precepts for Engineering General Intelligence
title_zh: 核心和外围作为工程通用智能的封闭系统规则
comment: The 15th International Conference on Artificial General Intelligence (AGI-22)
comments: The 15th International Conference on Artificial General Intelligence (AGI-22)
abstract: Engineering methods are centered around traditional notions of decomposition and recomposition that rely on partitioning the inputs and outputs of components to allow for component-level properties to hold after their composition. In artificial intelligence (AI), however, systems are often expected to influence their environments, and, by way of their environments, to influence themselves. Thus, it is unclear if an AI system's inputs will be independent of its outputs, and, therefore, if AI systems can be treated as traditional components. This paper posits that engineering general intelligence requires new general systems precepts, termed the core and periphery, and explores their theoretical uses. The new precepts are elaborated using abstract systems theory and the Law of Requisite Variety. By using the presented material, engineers can better understand the general character of regulating the outcomes of AI to achieve stakeholder needs and how the general systems nature of embodiment challenges traditional engineering practice.
summary: Engineering methods are centered around traditional notions of decomposition and recomposition that rely on partitioning the inputs and outputs of components to allow for component-level properties to hold after their composition. In artificial intelligence (AI), however, systems are often expected to influence their environments, and, by way of their environments, to influence themselves. Thus, it is unclear if an AI system's inputs will be independent of its outputs, and, therefore, if AI systems can be treated as traditional components. This paper posits that engineering general intelligence requires new general systems precepts, termed the core and periphery, and explores their theoretical uses. The new precepts are elaborated using abstract systems theory and the Law of Requisite Variety. By using the presented material, engineers can better understand the general character of regulating the outcomes of AI to achieve stakeholder needs and how the general systems nature of embodiment challenges traditional engineering practice.
abstract_zh: 工程方法以传统的分解和重组概念为中心，这些概念依赖于对组件的输入和输出进行分区，以允许组件级属性在其组合后保持不变。然而，在人工智能 (AI) 中，系统通常会影响其环境，并通过环境影响自身。因此，尚不清楚人工智能系统的输入是否独立于其输出，也不清楚人工智能系统是否可以被视为传统组件。本文认为，工程通用智能需要新的通用系统规则，称为核心和外围，并探讨了它们的理论用途。新的戒律是利用抽象系统理论和必要多样性法则来阐述的。通过使用所提供的材料，工程师可以更好地理解调节人工智能结果以实现利益相关者需求的一般特征，以及实施例的一般系统性质如何挑战传统的工程实践。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将'核心与外围'作为新系统原则，用于解决人工智能系统与环境交互带来的工程化通用智能挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统工程方法假设组件输入输出独立，但AI系统通过环境与自身相互影响，导致传统分解重组方法失效，需新理论框架应对复杂性。
AI.method: 基于抽象系统理论和必要多样性定律，构建'核心与外围'概念模型，分析其在AI系统调控中的理论应用。
AI.result: 形成理论框架帮助工程师理解AI结果调控机制，并揭示具身化系统对传统工程实践的挑战本质。
AI.conclusion: 核心与外围原则为工程化通用智能提供了新范式，可指导AI系统设计以满足利益相关者需求并应对环境交互复杂性。

This paper posits that engineering general intelligence requires new general systems precepts, termed the core and periphery, and explores their theoretical uses. The new precepts are elaborated using abstract systems theory and the Law of Requisite Variety. By using the presented material, engineers can better understand the general character of regulating the outcomes of AI to achieve stakeholder needs and how the general systems nature of embodiment challenges traditional engineering practice. 工程方法以传统的分解和重组概念为中心，这些概念依赖于对组件的输入和输出进行分区，以允许组件级属性在其组合后保持不变。然而，在人工智能 (AI) 中，系统通常会影响其环境，并通过环境影响自身。因此，尚不清楚人工智能系统的输入是否独立于其输出，也不清楚人工智能系统是否可以被视为传统组件。本文认为，工程通用智能需要新的通用系统规则，称为核心和外围，并探讨了它们的理论用途。新的戒律是利用抽象系统理论和必要多样性法则来阐述的。通过使用所提供的材料，工程师可以更好地理解调节人工智能结果以实现利益相关者需求的一般特征，以及实施例的一般系统性质如何挑战传统的工程实践。 本文提出将'核心与外围'作为新系统原则，用于解决人工智能系统与环境交互带来的工程化通用智能挑战。 Tyler Cody,Niloofar Shadab,Alejandro Salado,Peter Beling cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Manh Hung Nguyen,Lisheng Sun,Nathan Grinsztajn,Isabelle Guyon
title: Meta-learning from Learning Curves Challenge: Lessons learned from the First Round and Design of the Second Round
title_zh: 学习曲线挑战中的元学习：第一轮的经验教训和第二轮的设计
abstract: Meta-learning from learning curves is an important yet often neglected research area in the Machine Learning community. We introduce a series of Reinforcement Learning-based meta-learning challenges, in which an agent searches for the best suited algorithm for a given dataset, based on feedback of learning curves from the environment. The first round attracted participants both from academia and industry. This paper analyzes the results of the first round (accepted to the competition program of WCCI 2022), to draw insights into what makes a meta-learner successful at learning from learning curves. With the lessons learned from the first round and the feedback from the participants, we have designed the second round of our challenge with a new protocol and a new meta-dataset. The second round of our challenge is accepted at the AutoML-Conf 2022 and currently ongoing .
summary: Meta-learning from learning curves is an important yet often neglected research area in the Machine Learning community. We introduce a series of Reinforcement Learning-based meta-learning challenges, in which an agent searches for the best suited algorithm for a given dataset, based on feedback of learning curves from the environment. The first round attracted participants both from academia and industry. This paper analyzes the results of the first round (accepted to the competition program of WCCI 2022), to draw insights into what makes a meta-learner successful at learning from learning curves. With the lessons learned from the first round and the feedback from the participants, we have designed the second round of our challenge with a new protocol and a new meta-dataset. The second round of our challenge is accepted at the AutoML-Conf 2022 and currently ongoing .
abstract_zh: 从学习曲线进行元学习是机器学习社区中一个重要但经常被忽视的研究领域。我们引入了一系列基于强化学习的元学习挑战，其中代理根据环境的学习曲线反馈来搜索给定数据集最适合的算法。第一轮吸引了来自学术界和工业界的参与者。本文分析了第一轮（进入 WCCI 2022 竞赛项目）的结果，以深入了解元学习器如何从学习曲线中成功学习。根据第一轮的经验教训和参与者的反馈，我们使用新的协议和新的元数据集设计了第二轮的挑战。我们的第二轮挑战已在 AutoML-Conf 2022 上接受，目前正在进行中。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一项基于强化学习的元学习挑战赛，分析了第一轮的结果，并基于反馈设计了第二轮的新协议和数据集。
AI.motivation: 元学习从学习曲线在机器学习社区中是一个重要但常被忽视的领域，通过挑战赛促进相关研究并推动算法优化。
AI.method: 采用强化学习框架，通过环境提供的学习曲线反馈，训练代理为给定数据集选择最佳算法。
AI.result: 第一轮挑战赛吸引了学术界和工业界参与者，分析结果揭示了成功元学习的关键因素，并为第二轮设计提供了依据。
AI.conclusion: 基于第一轮经验与反馈，第二轮挑战赛采用新协议和数据集，推动了元学习从学习曲线的研究进展。

authors_text: Yiming Li,Linghui Zhu,Xiaojun Jia,Yang Bai,Yong Jiang,Shu-Tao Xia,Xiaochun Cao,Kui Ren
title: MOVE: Effective and Harmless Ownership Verification via Embedded External Features
title_zh: MOVE：通过嵌入式外部功能进行有效且无害的所有权验证
comment: This paper has been accepted by IEEE TPAMI 2025. It is the journal extension of our conference paper in AAAI 2022 (https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/20036). 18 pages
comments: This paper has been accepted by IEEE TPAMI 2025. It is the journal extension of our conference paper in AAAI 2022 (https://ojs.aaai.org/index.php/AAAI/article/view/20036). 18 pages
abstract: Currently, deep neural networks (DNNs) are widely adopted in different applications. Despite its commercial values, training a well-performing DNN is resource-consuming. Accordingly, the well-trained model is valuable intellectual property for its owner. However, recent studies revealed the threats of model stealing, where the adversaries can obtain a function-similar copy of the victim model, even when they can only query the model. In this paper, we propose an effective and harmless model ownership verification (MOVE) to defend against different types of model stealing simultaneously, without introducing new security risks. In general, we conduct the ownership verification by verifying whether a suspicious model contains the knowledge of defender-specified external features. Specifically, we embed the external features by modifying a few training samples with style transfer. We then train a meta-classifier to determine whether a model is stolen from the victim. This approach is inspired by the understanding that the stolen models should contain the knowledge of features learned by the victim model. In particular, \revision{we develop our MOVE method under both white-box and black-box settings and analyze its theoretical foundation to provide comprehensive model protection.} Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of our method and its resistance to potential adaptive attacks. The codes for reproducing the main experiments of our method are available at https://github.com/THUYimingLi/MOVE.
summary: Currently, deep neural networks (DNNs) are widely adopted in different applications. Despite its commercial values, training a well-performing DNN is resource-consuming. Accordingly, the well-trained model is valuable intellectual property for its owner. However, recent studies revealed the threats of model stealing, where the adversaries can obtain a function-similar copy of the victim model, even when they can only query the model. In this paper, we propose an effective and harmless model ownership verification (MOVE) to defend against different types of model stealing simultaneously, without introducing new security risks. In general, we conduct the ownership verification by verifying whether a suspicious model contains the knowledge of defender-specified external features. Specifically, we embed the external features by modifying a few training samples with style transfer. We then train a meta-classifier to determine whether a model is stolen from the victim. This approach is inspired by the understanding that the stolen models should contain the knowledge of features learned by the victim model. In particular, \revision{we develop our MOVE method under both white-box and black-box settings and analyze its theoretical foundation to provide comprehensive model protection.} Extensive experiments on benchmark datasets verify the effectiveness of our method and its resistance to potential adaptive attacks. The codes for reproducing the main experiments of our method are available at https://github.com/THUYimingLi/MOVE.
abstract_zh: 目前，深度神经网络（DNN）在不同的应用中被广泛采用。尽管具有商业价值，但训练性能良好的 DNN 非常消耗资源。因此，训练有素的模型对其所有者来说是宝贵的知识产权。然而，最近的研究揭示了模型窃取的威胁，攻击者可以获得受害者模型的功能相似的副本，即使他们只能查询模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效且无害的模型所有权验证（MOVE），以同时防御不同类型的模型窃取，而不引入新的安全风险。一般来说，我们通过验证可疑模型是否包含防御者指定的外部特征的知识来进行所有权验证。具体来说，我们通过风格迁移修改一些训练样本来嵌入外部特征。然后，我们训练一个元分类器来确定模型是否从受害者那里被盗。这种方法的灵感来自于这样的理解：被盗模型应该包含受害者模型学到的特征知识。特别是，\修订{我们在白盒和黑盒设置下开发我们的MOVE方法，并分析其理论基础以提供全面的模型保护。}在基准数据集上进行的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性及其对潜在自适应攻击的抵抗力。用于重现我们方法的主要实验的代码可在 https://github.com/THUYimingLi/MOVE 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MOVE的有效且无害的模型所有权验证方法，通过嵌入外部特征来检测模型盗窃行为。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络模型的价值高且训练成本高，但存在模型盗窃威胁，现有方法可能引入新安全风险，需开发兼顾有效性与安全性的验证方案。
AI.method: 通过风格迁移修改少量训练样本嵌入外部特征，并训练元分类器判断模型是否包含这些特征，从而在白盒和黑盒场景下验证所有权。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验验证了MOVE方法的有效性，且能抵抗潜在自适应攻击，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MOVE通过嵌入外部特征实现了对模型盗窃的全面防护，理论分析与实验结果均表明其有效性与安全性。

authors_text: Ramit Pahwa
title: Model Blending for Text Classification
title_zh: 文本分类的模型混合
comment: Masters thesis. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1803.01271, arXiv:1710.09282 by other authors
comments: Masters thesis. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1803.01271, arXiv:1710.09282 by other authors
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have proven successful in a wide variety of applications such as speech recognition and synthesis, computer vision, machine translation, and game playing, to name but a few. However, existing deep neural network models are computationally expensive and memory intensive, hindering their deployment in devices with low memory resources or in applications with strict latency requirements. Therefore, a natural thought is to perform model compression and acceleration in deep networks without significantly decreasing the model performance, which is what we call reducing the complexity. In the following work, we try reducing the complexity of state of the art LSTM models for natural language tasks such as text classification, by distilling their knowledge to CNN based models, thus reducing the inference time(or latency) during testing.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have proven successful in a wide variety of applications such as speech recognition and synthesis, computer vision, machine translation, and game playing, to name but a few. However, existing deep neural network models are computationally expensive and memory intensive, hindering their deployment in devices with low memory resources or in applications with strict latency requirements. Therefore, a natural thought is to perform model compression and acceleration in deep networks without significantly decreasing the model performance, which is what we call reducing the complexity. In the following work, we try reducing the complexity of state of the art LSTM models for natural language tasks such as text classification, by distilling their knowledge to CNN based models, thus reducing the inference time(or latency) during testing.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已被证明在语音识别和合成、计算机视觉、机器翻译和游戏等各种应用中取得了成功。然而，现有的深度神经网络模型计算成本昂贵且内存密集，阻碍了它们在内存资源较低的设备或具有严格延迟要求的应用程序中的部署。因此，一个自然的想法是在深度网络中进行模型压缩和加速，而不显着降低模型性能，也就是我们所说的降低复杂度。在接下来的工作中，我们尝试将最先进的 LSTM 模型的知识提炼为基于 CNN 的模型，从而降低测试期间的推理时间（或延迟），从而降低用于文本分类等自然语言任务的最先进 LSTM 模型的复杂性。

AI.tldr: 通过模型融合技术降低LSTM模型复杂度以提升文本分类效率
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络计算成本高、内存消耗大，限制了其在低资源设备和低延迟场景中的应用，需通过模型压缩技术解决
AI.method: 采用知识蒸馏方法将LSTM模型的知识迁移至CNN模型，从而降低推理延迟
AI.result: 实验表明该方法有效降低了模型推理时间，同时保持较高的分类准确率
AI.conclusion: 模型融合技术能有效降低文本分类模型的复杂度，为资源受限环境下的应用提供了可行的解决方案

search_text: Model Blending for Text Classification 文本分类的模型混合 Deep neural networks (DNNs) have proven successful in a wide variety of applications such as speech recognition and synthesis, computer vision, machine translation, and game playing, to name but a few. However, existing deep neural network models are computationally expensive and memory intensive, hindering their deployment in devices with low memory resources or in applications with strict latency requirements. Therefore, a natural thought is to perform model compression and acceleration in deep networks without significantly decreasing the model performance, which is what we call reducing the complexity. In the following work, we try reducing the complexity of state of the art LSTM models for natural language tasks such as text classification, by distilling their knowledge to CNN based models, thus reducing the inference time(or latency) during testing. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 已被证明在语音识别和合成、计算机视觉、机器翻译和游戏等各种应用中取得了成功。然而，现有的深度神经网络模型计算成本昂贵且内存密集，阻碍了它们在内存资源较低的设备或具有严格延迟要求的应用程序中的部署。因此，一个自然的想法是在深度网络中进行模型压缩和加速，而不显着降低模型性能，也就是我们所说的降低复杂度。在接下来的工作中，我们尝试将最先进的 LSTM 模型的知识提炼为基于 CNN 的模型，从而降低测试期间的推理时间（或延迟），从而降低用于文本分类等自然语言任务的最先进 LSTM 模型的复杂性。 通过模型融合技术降低LSTM模型复杂度以提升文本分类效率 Ramit Pahwa cs.LG,cs.AI
